authors_text: Nguyen Hung,Francisco Rego,Joao Quintas,Joao Cruz,Marcelo Jacinto,David Souto,Andre Potes,Luis Sebastiao,Antonio Pascoal
title: A review of path following control strategies for autonomous robotic vehicles: theory, simulations, and experiments
title_zh: 自动机器人车辆路径跟踪控制策略综述：理论、模拟和实验
abstract: This article presents an in-depth review of the topic of path following for autonomous robotic vehicles, with a specific focus on vehicle motion in two dimensional space (2D). From a control system standpoint, path following can be formulated as the problem of stabilizing a path following error system that describes the dynamics of position and possibly orientation errors of a vehicle with respect to a path, with the errors defined in an appropriate reference frame. In spite of the large variety of path following methods described in the literature we show that, in principle, most of them can be categorized in two groups: stabilization of the path following error system expressed either in the vehicle's body frame or in a frame attached to a "reference point" moving along the path, such as a Frenet-Serret (F-S) frame or a Parallel Transport (P-T) frame. With this observation, we provide a unified formulation that is simple but general enough to cover many methods available in the literature. We then discuss the advantages and disadvantages of each method, comparing them from the design and implementation standpoint. We further show experimental results of the path following methods obtained from field trials testing with under-actuated and fully-actuated autonomous marine vehicles. In addition, we introduce open-source Matlab and Gazebo/ROS simulation toolboxes that are helpful in testing path following methods prior to their integration in the combined guidance, navigation, and control systems of autonomous vehicles.
summary: This article presents an in-depth review of the topic of path following for autonomous robotic vehicles, with a specific focus on vehicle motion in two dimensional space (2D). From a control system standpoint, path following can be formulated as the problem of stabilizing a path following error system that describes the dynamics of position and possibly orientation errors of a vehicle with respect to a path, with the errors defined in an appropriate reference frame. In spite of the large variety of path following methods described in the literature we show that, in principle, most of them can be categorized in two groups: stabilization of the path following error system expressed either in the vehicle's body frame or in a frame attached to a "reference point" moving along the path, such as a Frenet-Serret (F-S) frame or a Parallel Transport (P-T) frame. With this observation, we provide a unified formulation that is simple but general enough to cover many methods available in the literature. We then discuss the advantages and disadvantages of each method, comparing them from the design and implementation standpoint. We further show experimental results of the path following methods obtained from field trials testing with under-actuated and fully-actuated autonomous marine vehicles. In addition, we introduce open-source Matlab and Gazebo/ROS simulation toolboxes that are helpful in testing path following methods prior to their integration in the combined guidance, navigation, and control systems of autonomous vehicles.
abstract_zh: 本文深入回顾了自主机器人车辆的路径跟踪主题，特别关注二维空间 (2D) 中的车辆运动。从控制系统的角度来看，路径跟踪可以被表述为稳定路径跟踪误差系统的问题，该系统描述了车辆相对于路径的位置动态和可能的方向误差，其中误差在适当的参考系中定义。尽管文献中描述了各种各样的路径跟踪方法，但我们表明，原则上，它们中的大多数可以分为两类：路径跟踪误差系统的稳定性，要么在车辆的车身框架中表示，要么在连接到沿路径移动的“参考点”的框架中表示，例如 Frenet-Serret (F-S) 框架或并行传输 (P-T) 框架。通过这一观察，我们提供了一个简单但通用的统一公式，足以涵盖文献中可用的许多方法。然后我们讨论每种方法的优点和缺点，从设计和实现的角度比较它们。我们进一步展示了从欠驱动和全驱动自主海洋车辆的现场试验中获得的路径跟踪方法的实验结果。此外，我们还引入了开源 Matlab 和 Gazebo/ROS 仿真工具箱，这些工具箱有助于在将路径跟踪方法集成到自动驾驶车辆的组合制导、导航和控制系统中之前测试路径跟踪方法。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了自主机器人车辆路径跟随控制策略，重点分析了二维空间中的运动控制方法，并通过实验和仿真验证。
AI.motivation: 现有路径跟随方法繁多且分类不统一，缺乏系统性比较和通用框架，阻碍了实际应用与进一步研究。
AI.method: 将路径跟随问题统一为误差系统稳定化问题，按参考系分类为车身坐标系或路径附着坐标系（如Frenet-Serret框架），并提出通用公式化方法进行比较分析。
AI.result: 通过实验验证了不同方法在欠驱动和全驱动水下机器人上的效果，并提供了Matlab/Gazebo/ROS开源仿真工具箱。
AI.conclusion: 统一框架有助于理解现有方法的异同，实验与仿真工具为路径跟随控制的设计与验证提供了实用支持。

authors_text: Chan-Jan Hsu,Hung-yi Lee,Yu Tsao
title: XDBERT: Distilling Visual Information to BERT from Cross-Modal Systems to Improve Language Understanding
title_zh: XDBERT：从跨模态系统中将视觉信息提炼为 BERT，以提高语言理解
abstract: Transformer-based models are widely used in natural language understanding (NLU) tasks, and multimodal transformers have been effective in visual-language tasks. This study explores distilling visual information from pretrained multimodal transformers to pretrained language encoders. Our framework is inspired by cross-modal encoders' success in visual-language tasks while we alter the learning objective to cater to the language-heavy characteristics of NLU. After training with a small number of extra adapting steps and finetuned, the proposed XDBERT (cross-modal distilled BERT) outperforms pretrained-BERT in general language understanding evaluation (GLUE), situations with adversarial generations (SWAG) benchmarks, and readability benchmarks. We analyze the performance of XDBERT on GLUE to show that the improvement is likely visually grounded.
summary: Transformer-based models are widely used in natural language understanding (NLU) tasks, and multimodal transformers have been effective in visual-language tasks. This study explores distilling visual information from pretrained multimodal transformers to pretrained language encoders. Our framework is inspired by cross-modal encoders' success in visual-language tasks while we alter the learning objective to cater to the language-heavy characteristics of NLU. After training with a small number of extra adapting steps and finetuned, the proposed XDBERT (cross-modal distilled BERT) outperforms pretrained-BERT in general language understanding evaluation (GLUE), situations with adversarial generations (SWAG) benchmarks, and readability benchmarks. We analyze the performance of XDBERT on GLUE to show that the improvement is likely visually grounded.
abstract_zh: 基于 Transformer 的模型广泛应用于自然语言理解 (NLU) 任务，多模态 Transformer 在视觉语言任务中也很有效。本研究探索将视觉信息从预训练的多模态转换器提取到预训练的语言编码器。我们的框架受到跨模态编码器在视觉语言任务中成功的启发，同时我们改变学习目标以迎合 NLU 的语言重特征。经过少量额外适应步骤的训练和微调后，所提出的 XDBERT（跨模态蒸馏 BERT）在通用语言理解评估（GLUE）、对抗生成情况（SWAG）基准和可读性基准方面优于预训练的 BERT。我们分析了 XDBERT 在 GLUE 上的性能，以表明这种改进可能是基于视觉的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出XDBERT框架，通过从多模态系统中蒸馏视觉信息到预训练语言编码器BERT中，以提升语言理解能力。
AI.motivation: 尽管BERT在自然语言理解任务中表现优异，但其缺乏视觉上下文信息。多模态模型虽能处理视觉-语言任务，但未被有效用于增强纯语言模型。
AI.method: 基于跨模态编码器的成功，调整学习目标以适应语言密集型任务，通过少量额外训练步骤和微调，将多模态模型中的视觉信息蒸馏到BERT中。
AI.result: XDBERT在GLUE通用语言理解基准、SWAG对抗生成场景及可读性基准测试中均优于原始BERT，且改进效果与视觉信息关联性显著。
AI.conclusion: 跨模态知识蒸馏能有效增强语言模型的语言理解能力，证明了视觉信息对语言任务的潜在价值。

authors_text: Zhongzheng Yuan,Samyak Rawlekar,Siddharth Garg,Elza Erkip,Yao Wang
title: Feature Compression for Rate Constrained Object Detection on the Edge
title_zh: 用于边缘速率受限对象检测的特征压缩
abstract: Recent advances in computer vision has led to a growth of interest in deploying visual analytics model on mobile devices. However, most mobile devices have limited computing power, which prohibits them from running large scale visual analytics neural networks. An emerging approach to solve this problem is to offload the computation of these neural networks to computing resources at an edge server. Efficient computation offloading requires optimizing the trade-off between multiple objectives including compressed data rate, analytics performance, and computation speed. In this work, we consider a "split computation" system to offload a part of the computation of the YOLO object detection model. We propose a learnable feature compression approach to compress the intermediate YOLO features with light-weight computation. We train the feature compression and decompression module together with the YOLO model to optimize the object detection accuracy under a rate constraint. Compared to baseline methods that apply either standard image compression or learned image compression at the mobile and perform image decompression and YOLO at the edge, the proposed system achieves higher detection accuracy at the low to medium rate range. Furthermore, the proposed system requires substantially lower computation time on the mobile device with CPU only.
summary: Recent advances in computer vision has led to a growth of interest in deploying visual analytics model on mobile devices. However, most mobile devices have limited computing power, which prohibits them from running large scale visual analytics neural networks. An emerging approach to solve this problem is to offload the computation of these neural networks to computing resources at an edge server. Efficient computation offloading requires optimizing the trade-off between multiple objectives including compressed data rate, analytics performance, and computation speed. In this work, we consider a "split computation" system to offload a part of the computation of the YOLO object detection model. We propose a learnable feature compression approach to compress the intermediate YOLO features with light-weight computation. We train the feature compression and decompression module together with the YOLO model to optimize the object detection accuracy under a rate constraint. Compared to baseline methods that apply either standard image compression or learned image compression at the mobile and perform image decompression and YOLO at the edge, the proposed system achieves higher detection accuracy at the low to medium rate range. Furthermore, the proposed system requires substantially lower computation time on the mobile device with CPU only.
abstract_zh: 计算机视觉的最新进展引起了人们对在移动设备上部署视觉分析模型的兴趣的增长。然而，大多数移动设备的计算能力有限，这使得它们无法运行大规模的视觉分析神经网络。解决这个问题的一种新兴方法是将这些神经网络的计算卸载到边缘服务器的计算资源上。高效的计算卸载需要优化多个目标之间的权衡，包括压缩数据率、分析性能和计算速度。在这项工作中，我们考虑使用“分割计算”系统来卸载 YOLO 对象检测模型的部分计算。我们提出了一种可学习的特征压缩方法，通过轻量级计算来压缩中间 YOLO 特征。我们将特征压缩和解压缩模块与 YOLO 模型一起训练，以在速率约束下优化目标检测精度。与在移动设备上应用标准图像压缩或学习图像压缩并在边缘执行图像解压缩和 YOLO 的基线方法相比，所提出的系统在中低速率范围内实现了更高的检测精度。此外，所提出的系统在仅具有 CPU 的移动设备上所需的计算时间要少得多。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可学习的特征压缩方法，在边缘设备上实现受速率约束的高效目标检测。
AI.motivation: 移动设备计算能力有限，无法运行大规模视觉分析模型，而现有方法在数据传输速率、检测精度和计算速度之间难以平衡。
AI.method: 设计分阶段计算系统，将YOLO模型部分计算卸载到边缘服务器，并联合训练轻量级特征压缩与解压缩模块以优化检测精度。
AI.result: 在低至中等传输速率下检测精度优于基线方法，且移动端仅需CPU即可实现更低的计算时延。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效平衡了检测精度与边缘计算资源消耗，为移动设备上的实时目标检测提供了新思路。

search_text: Feature Compression for Rate Constrained Object Detection on the Edge 用于边缘速率受限对象检测的特征压缩 Recent advances in computer vision has led to a growth of interest in deploying visual analytics model on mobile devices. However, most mobile devices have limited computing power, which prohibits them from running large scale visual analytics neural networks. An emerging approach to solve this problem is to offload the computation of these neural networks to computing resources at an edge server. Efficient computation offloading requires optimizing the trade-off between multiple objectives including compressed data rate, analytics performance, and computation speed. In this work, we consider a "split computation" system to offload a part of the computation of the YOLO object detection model. We propose a learnable feature compression approach to compress the intermediate YOLO features with light-weight computation. We train the feature compression and decompression module together with the YOLO model to optimize the object detection accuracy under a rate constraint. Compared to baseline methods that apply either standard image compression or learned image compression at the mobile and perform image decompression and YOLO at the edge, the proposed system achieves higher detection accuracy at the low to medium rate range. Furthermore, the proposed system requires substantially lower computation time on the mobile device with CPU only. 计算机视觉的最新进展引起了人们对在移动设备上部署视觉分析模型的兴趣的增长。然而，大多数移动设备的计算能力有限，这使得它们无法运行大规模的视觉分析神经网络。解决这个问题的一种新兴方法是将这些神经网络的计算卸载到边缘服务器的计算资源上。高效的计算卸载需要优化多个目标之间的权衡，包括压缩数据率、分析性能和计算速度。在这项工作中，我们考虑使用“分割计算”系统来卸载 YOLO 对象检测模型的部分计算。我们提出了一种可学习的特征压缩方法，通过轻量级计算来压缩中间 YOLO 特征。我们将特征压缩和解压缩模块与 YOLO 模型一起训练，以在速率约束下优化目标检测精度。与在移动设备上应用标准图像压缩或学习图像压缩并在边缘执行图像解压缩和 YOLO 的基线方法相比，所提出的系统在中低速率范围内实现了更高的检测精度。此外，所提出的系统在仅具有 CPU 的移动设备上所需的计算时间要少得多。 本文提出一种可学习的特征压缩方法，在边缘设备上实现受速率约束的高效目标检测。 Zhongzheng Yuan,Samyak Rawlekar,Siddharth Garg,Elza Erkip,Yao Wang eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.DC

authors_text: Maria-Florina Balcan,Siddharth Prasad,Tuomas Sandholm,Ellen Vitercik
title: Structural Analysis of Branch-and-Cut and the Learnability of Gomory Mixed Integer Cuts
title_zh: 分支割法的结构分析和Gomory混合整数割法的可学习性
abstract: The incorporation of cutting planes within the branch-and-bound algorithm, known as branch-and-cut, forms the backbone of modern integer programming solvers. These solvers are the foremost method for solving discrete optimization problems and thus have a vast array of applications in machine learning, operations research, and many other fields. Choosing cutting planes effectively is a major research topic in the theory and practice of integer programming. We conduct a novel structural analysis of branch-and-cut that pins down how every step of the algorithm is affected by changes in the parameters defining the cutting planes added to the input integer program. Our main application of this analysis is to derive sample complexity guarantees for using machine learning to determine which cutting planes to apply during branch-and-cut. These guarantees apply to infinite families of cutting planes, such as the family of Gomory mixed integer cuts, which are responsible for the main breakthrough speedups of integer programming solvers. We exploit geometric and combinatorial structure of branch-and-cut in our analysis, which provides a key missing piece for the recent generalization theory of branch-and-cut.
summary: The incorporation of cutting planes within the branch-and-bound algorithm, known as branch-and-cut, forms the backbone of modern integer programming solvers. These solvers are the foremost method for solving discrete optimization problems and thus have a vast array of applications in machine learning, operations research, and many other fields. Choosing cutting planes effectively is a major research topic in the theory and practice of integer programming. We conduct a novel structural analysis of branch-and-cut that pins down how every step of the algorithm is affected by changes in the parameters defining the cutting planes added to the input integer program. Our main application of this analysis is to derive sample complexity guarantees for using machine learning to determine which cutting planes to apply during branch-and-cut. These guarantees apply to infinite families of cutting planes, such as the family of Gomory mixed integer cuts, which are responsible for the main breakthrough speedups of integer programming solvers. We exploit geometric and combinatorial structure of branch-and-cut in our analysis, which provides a key missing piece for the recent generalization theory of branch-and-cut.
abstract_zh: 将割平面纳入分支定界算法（称为分支定界法）构成了现代整数规划求解器的支柱。这些求解器是解决离散优化问题的最重要方法，因此在机器学习、运筹学和许多其他领域具有广泛的应用。有效选择割平面是整数规划理论和实践中的一个主要研究课题。我们对分支剪切进行了新颖的结构分析，确定了算法的每一步如何受到定义添加到输入整数程序的剪切平面的参数变化的影响。我们对此分析的主要应用是导出样本复杂性保证，以便使用机器学习来确定在分支切割过程中应用哪些切割平面。这些保证适用于无限的割平面族，例如 Gomory 混合整数割族，它是整数规划求解器的主要突破性加速的原因。我们在分析中利用了分支切割法的几何和组合结构，这为最近的分支切割法推广理论提供了一个关键的缺失部分。

AI.tldr: 本文通过结构分析研究分支定界算法中切割平面的选择机制，并探讨机器学习在确定Gomory混合整数切割中的可学习性。
AI.motivation: 现代整数规划求解器依赖切割平面提升效率，但如何有效选择切割平面仍是理论与实践中的核心挑战，尤其需要机器学习方法的理论保证。
AI.method: 对分支定界-切割算法进行结构分析，结合几何与组合特性，研究参数变化对算法步骤的影响，并推导机器学习选择切割平面的样本复杂度界。
AI.result: 建立了适用于无限族切割平面（如Gomory切割）的样本复杂度保证，填补了分支定界算法泛化理论的关键空白。
AI.conclusion: 该分析为机器学习驱动的切割平面选择提供了理论基础，推动了整数规划求解器的智能化发展。

authors_text: Chao Huang,Zhangjie Cao,Yunbo Wang,Jianmin Wang,Mingsheng Long
title: MetaSets: Meta-Learning on Point Sets for Generalizable Representations
title_zh: MetaSets：可泛化表示的点集元学习
abstract: Deep learning techniques for point clouds have achieved strong performance on a range of 3D vision tasks. However, it is costly to annotate large-scale point sets, making it critical to learn generalizable representations that can transfer well across different point sets. In this paper, we study a new problem of 3D Domain Generalization (3DDG) with the goal to generalize the model to other unseen domains of point clouds without any access to them in the training process. It is a challenging problem due to the substantial geometry shift from simulated to real data, such that most existing 3D models underperform due to overfitting the complete geometries in the source domain. We propose to tackle this problem via MetaSets, which meta-learns point cloud representations from a group of classification tasks on carefully-designed transformed point sets containing specific geometry priors. The learned representations are more generalizable to various unseen domains of different geometries. We design two benchmarks for Sim-to-Real transfer of 3D point clouds. Experimental results show that MetaSets outperforms existing 3D deep learning methods by large margins.
summary: Deep learning techniques for point clouds have achieved strong performance on a range of 3D vision tasks. However, it is costly to annotate large-scale point sets, making it critical to learn generalizable representations that can transfer well across different point sets. In this paper, we study a new problem of 3D Domain Generalization (3DDG) with the goal to generalize the model to other unseen domains of point clouds without any access to them in the training process. It is a challenging problem due to the substantial geometry shift from simulated to real data, such that most existing 3D models underperform due to overfitting the complete geometries in the source domain. We propose to tackle this problem via MetaSets, which meta-learns point cloud representations from a group of classification tasks on carefully-designed transformed point sets containing specific geometry priors. The learned representations are more generalizable to various unseen domains of different geometries. We design two benchmarks for Sim-to-Real transfer of 3D point clouds. Experimental results show that MetaSets outperforms existing 3D deep learning methods by large margins.
abstract_zh: 点云深度学习技术在一系列 3D 视觉任务中取得了出色的性能。然而，注释大规模点集的成本很高，因此学习可以在不同点集之间良好迁移的通用表示至关重要。在本文中，我们研究了 3D 域泛化 (3DDG) 的新问题，目标是将模型泛化到点云的其他未见过的域，而无需在训练过程中访问它们。这是一个具有挑战性的问题，因为从模拟数据到真实数据存在巨大的几何变化，大多数现有 3D 模型由于过度拟合源域中的完整几何形状而表现不佳。我们建议通过 MetaSets 来解决这个问题，它从一组分类任务中对包含特定几何先验的精心设计的转换点集进行元学习点云表示。学习到的表示更可推广到不同几何形状的各种看不见的领域。我们为 3D 点云的模拟到真实传输设计了两个基准。实验结果表明，MetaSets 大幅优于现有的 3D 深度学习方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MetaSets方法，通过元学习在点集上训练，以解决3D点云的领域泛化问题，使模型能适应未见过的几何领域。
AI.motivation: 点云标注成本高，现有模型因过度拟合源领域几何结构，在模拟到真实数据的领域迁移中表现不佳，需学习更具泛化的表示。
AI.method: 设计包含特定几何先验的转换点集，通过元学习多任务分类训练点云表示，构建两个Sim-to-Real迁移基准进行验证。
AI.result: 实验表明MetaSets在多个基准上大幅优于现有3D深度学习方法，证明其有效性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: MetaSets通过元学习机制有效解决了3D领域泛化问题，为点云模型在未知几何领域的应用提供了新思路。

search_text: MetaSets: Meta-Learning on Point Sets for Generalizable Representations MetaSets：可泛化表示的点集元学习 Deep learning techniques for point clouds have achieved strong performance on a range of 3D vision tasks. However, it is costly to annotate large-scale point sets, making it critical to learn generalizable representations that can transfer well across different point sets. In this paper, we study a new problem of 3D Domain Generalization (3DDG) with the goal to generalize the model to other unseen domains of point clouds without any access to them in the training process. It is a challenging problem due to the substantial geometry shift from simulated to real data, such that most existing 3D models underperform due to overfitting the complete geometries in the source domain. We propose to tackle this problem via MetaSets, which meta-learns point cloud representations from a group of classification tasks on carefully-designed transformed point sets containing specific geometry priors. The learned representations are more generalizable to various unseen domains of different geometries. We design two benchmarks for Sim-to-Real transfer of 3D point clouds. Experimental results show that MetaSets outperforms existing 3D deep learning methods by large margins. 点云深度学习技术在一系列 3D 视觉任务中取得了出色的性能。然而，注释大规模点集的成本很高，因此学习可以在不同点集之间良好迁移的通用表示至关重要。在本文中，我们研究了 3D 域泛化 (3DDG) 的新问题，目标是将模型泛化到点云的其他未见过的域，而无需在训练过程中访问它们。这是一个具有挑战性的问题，因为从模拟数据到真实数据存在巨大的几何变化，大多数现有 3D 模型由于过度拟合源域中的完整几何形状而表现不佳。我们建议通过 MetaSets 来解决这个问题，它从一组分类任务中对包含特定几何先验的精心设计的转换点集进行元学习点云表示。学习到的表示更可推广到不同几何形状的各种看不见的领域。我们为 3D 点云的模拟到真实传输设计了两个基准。实验结果表明，MetaSets 大幅优于现有的 3D 深度学习方法。 本文提出MetaSets方法，通过元学习在点集上训练，以解决3D点云的领域泛化问题，使模型能适应未见过的几何领域。 Chao Huang,Zhangjie Cao,Yunbo Wang,Jianmin Wang,Mingsheng Long cs.CV

authors_text: Ihab F. Ilyas,Theodoros Rekatsinas,Vishnu Konda,Jeffrey Pound,Xiaoguang Qi,Mohamed Soliman
title: Saga: A Platform for Continuous Construction and Serving of Knowledge At Scale
title_zh: Saga：大规模持续构建和服务知识的平台
abstract: We introduce Saga, a next-generation knowledge construction and serving platform for powering knowledge-based applications at industrial scale. Saga follows a hybrid batch-incremental design to continuously integrate billions of facts about real-world entities and construct a central knowledge graph that supports multiple production use cases with diverse requirements around data freshness, accuracy, and availability. In this paper, we discuss the unique challenges associated with knowledge graph construction at industrial scale, and review the main components of Saga and how they address these challenges. Finally, we share lessons-learned from a wide array of production use cases powered by Saga.
summary: We introduce Saga, a next-generation knowledge construction and serving platform for powering knowledge-based applications at industrial scale. Saga follows a hybrid batch-incremental design to continuously integrate billions of facts about real-world entities and construct a central knowledge graph that supports multiple production use cases with diverse requirements around data freshness, accuracy, and availability. In this paper, we discuss the unique challenges associated with knowledge graph construction at industrial scale, and review the main components of Saga and how they address these challenges. Finally, we share lessons-learned from a wide array of production use cases powered by Saga.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍 Saga，这是一个下一代知识构建和服务平台，用于支持工业规模的基于知识的应用程序。 Saga 采用混合批量增量设计，不断集成有关现实世界实体的数十亿个事实，并构建一个中央知识图，支持多个生产用例，对数据新鲜度、准确性和可用性有不同的要求。在本文中，我们讨论了与工业规模的知识图构建相关的独特挑战，并回顾了 Saga 的主要组件以及它们如何应对这些挑战。最后，我们分享从 Saga 支持的各种生产用例中吸取的经验教训。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为Saga的平台，用于在工业规模上持续构建和提供知识图谱，以支持多种生产应用。
AI.motivation: 工业级知识图谱构建面临数据新鲜度、准确性及可用性等挑战，需满足多样化的生产需求。
AI.method: 采用混合批量-增量设计，持续整合数十亿实体事实，构建中央知识图谱并支持多场景需求。
AI.result: 通过Saga组件有效应对了大规模知识构建挑战，并在多个生产案例中验证了其可行性与效果。
AI.conclusion: 展示了大规模知识图谱构建的可行方法，并提供了实际应用中的经验教训。

authors_text: Kuangen Zhang,Jiahong Chen,Jing Wang,Xinxing Chen,Yuquan Leng,Clarence W. de Silva,Chenglong Fu
title: Ensemble diverse hypotheses and knowledge distillation for unsupervised cross-subject adaptation
title_zh: 集合不同的假设和知识蒸馏以实现无监督的跨学科适应
comment: This preprint was submitted to Information Fusion on December 20, 2021 and is under review
comments: This preprint was submitted to Information Fusion on December 20, 2021 and is under review
abstract: Recognizing human locomotion intent and activities is important for controlling the wearable robots while walking in complex environments. However, human-robot interface signals are usually user-dependent, which causes that the classifier trained on source subjects performs poorly on new subjects. To address this issue, this paper designs the ensemble diverse hypotheses and knowledge distillation (EDHKD) method to realize unsupervised cross-subject adaptation. EDH mitigates the divergence between labeled data of source subjects and unlabeled data of target subjects to accurately classify the locomotion modes of target subjects without labeling data. Compared to previous domain adaptation methods based on the single learner, which may only learn a subset of features from input signals, EDH can learn diverse features by incorporating multiple diverse feature generators and thus increases the accuracy and decreases the variance of classifying target data, but it sacrifices the efficiency. To solve this problem, EDHKD (student) distills the knowledge from the EDH (teacher) to a single network to remain efficient and accurate. The performance of the EDHKD is theoretically proved and experimentally validated on a 2D moon dataset and two public human locomotion datasets. Experimental results show that the EDHKD outperforms all other methods. The EDHKD can classify target data with 96.9%, 94.4%, and 97.4% average accuracy on the above three datasets with a short computing time (1 ms). Compared to a benchmark (BM) method, the EDHKD increases 1.3% and 7.1% average accuracy for classifying the locomotion modes of target subjects. The EDHKD also stabilizes the learning curves. Therefore, the EDHKD is significant for increasing the generalization ability and efficiency of the human intent prediction and human activity recognition system, which will improve human-robot interactions.

The performance of the EDHKD is theoretically proved and experimentally validated on a 2D moon dataset and two public human locomotion datasets. Experimental results show that the EDHKD outperforms all other methods. abstract_zh: 识别人类的运动意图和活动对于在复杂环境中行走时控制可穿戴机器人非常重要。然而，人机界面信号通常依赖于用户，这导致在源主题上训练的分类器在新主题上表现不佳。为了解决这个问题，本文设计了集成多样性假设和知识蒸馏（EDHKD）方法来实现无监督的跨学科适应。 EDH 减轻了源对象的标记数据与目标对象的未标记数据之间的差异，以在没有标记数据的情况下准确地对目标对象的运动模式进行分类。与以前基于单个学习器的域自适应方法（可能只能从输入信号中学习特征的子集）相比，EDH可以通过合并多个不同的特征生成器来学习不同的特征，从而提高了分类目标数据的准确性并减少了方差，但它牺牲了效率。为了解决这个问题，EDHKD（学生）将 EDH（教师）的知识提炼到单个网络，以保持高效和准确。 EDHKD 的性能在 2D 月球数据集和两个公共人体运动数据集上得到了理论证明和实验验证。实验结果表明 EDHKD 优于所有其他方法。 EDHKD 可以在较短的计算时间（1 ms）下对上述三个数据集以 96.9%、94.4% 和 97.4% 的平均准确率对目标数据进行分类。与基准（BM）方法相比，EDHKD 对目标对象的运动模式进行分类的平均准确度提高了 1.3% 和 7.1%。 EDHKD 还稳定了学习曲线。因此，EDHKD对于提高人类意图预测和人类活动识别系统的泛化能力和效率具有重要意义，这将改善人机交互。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合集成多样化假设与知识蒸馏（EDHKD）的方法，用于在无监督条件下实现跨受试者的步态意图识别，以提升穿戴式机器人在复杂环境中的控制性能。
AI.motivation: 现有分类器因依赖特定用户的数据，在新受试者上表现不佳；单一学习器可能无法全面提取输入信号特征，导致分类准确率低且方差大。
AI.method: 设计EDH模块通过多特征生成器提取多样化特征以减少领域差异，并利用知识蒸馏将EDH的复杂模型压缩到单网络（EDHKD），兼顾效率与精度。
AI.result: 在2D月牙数据集及两个公开步态数据集上，EDHKD平均分类准确率达96.9%、94.4%、97.4%，计算时间仅1ms，较基准方法分别提升1.3%和7.1%准确率，且学习曲线更稳定。
AI.conclusion: EDHKD有效提升了人意图预测系统的泛化能力与效率，对增强人机交互性能具有重要意义。

authors_text: Shell Xu Hu,Da Li,Jan Stühmer,Minyoung Kim,Timothy M. Hospedales
title: Pushing the Limits of Simple Pipelines for Few-Shot Learning: External Data and Fine-Tuning Make a Difference
title_zh: 突破简单管道的极限以实现少样本学习：外部数据和微调会产生影响
abstract: Few-shot learning (FSL) is an important and topical problem in computer vision that has motivated extensive research into numerous methods spanning from sophisticated meta-learning methods to simple transfer learning baselines. We seek to push the limits of a simple-but-effective pipeline for more realistic and practical settings of few-shot image classification. To this end, we explore few-shot learning from the perspective of neural network architecture, as well as a three stage pipeline of network updates under different data supplies, where unsupervised external data is considered for pre-training, base categories are used to simulate few-shot tasks for meta-training, and the scarcely labelled data of an novel task is taken for fine-tuning. We investigate questions such as: (1) How pre-training on external data benefits FSL? (2) How state-of-the-art transformer architectures can be exploited? and (3) How fine-tuning mitigates domain shift? Ultimately, we show that a simple transformer-based pipeline yields surprisingly good performance on standard benchmarks such as Mini-ImageNet, CIFAR-FS, CDFSL and Meta-Dataset. Our code and demo are available at https://hushell.github.io/pmf.
summary: Few-shot learning (FSL) is an important and topical problem in computer vision that has motivated extensive research into numerous methods spanning from sophisticated meta-learning methods to simple transfer learning baselines. We seek to push the limits of a simple-but-effective pipeline for more realistic and practical settings of few-shot image classification. To this end, we explore few-shot learning from the perspective of neural network architecture, as well as a three stage pipeline of network updates under different data supplies, where unsupervised external data is considered for pre-training, base categories are used to simulate few-shot tasks for meta-training, and the scarcely labelled data of an novel task is taken for fine-tuning. We investigate questions such as: (1) How pre-training on external data benefits FSL? (2) How state-of-the-art transformer architectures can be exploited? and (3) How fine-tuning mitigates domain shift? Ultimately, we show that a simple transformer-based pipeline yields surprisingly good performance on standard benchmarks such as Mini-ImageNet, CIFAR-FS, CDFSL and Meta-Dataset. Our code and demo are available at https://hushell.github.io/pmf.
abstract_zh: 小样本学习（FSL）是计算机视觉中的一个重要且热门的问题，它激发了对从复杂的元学习方法到简单的迁移学习基线的多种方法的广泛研究。我们寻求突破简单但有效的管道的极限，以实现更现实和实用的少样本图像分类设置。为此，我们从神经网络架构的角度探索少样本学习，以及不同数据源下网络更新的三阶段管道，其中考虑无监督外部数据进行预训练，使用基本类别来模拟少样本任务进行元训练，并采用新任务的几乎没有标记的数据进行微调。我们研究的问题包括：(1) 外部数据的预训练对 FSL 有何好处？ (2) 如何利用最先进的变压器架构？ (3) 微调如何减轻域转移？最终，我们证明了一个简单的基于 Transformer 的管道在 Mini-ImageNet、CIFAR-FS、CDFSL 和 Meta-Dataset 等标准基准测试中产生了令人惊讶的良好性能。我们的代码和演示可在 https://hushell.github.io/pmf 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过结合外部数据预训练、元训练及微调，探索简单流水线在少样本图像分类中的实际效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法多依赖复杂模型，但实际应用中需考虑外部数据和微调的影响，因此需验证简单流水线的有效性。
AI.method: 采用三阶段流水线：外部数据预训练、基础类别元训练、新任务微调，并利用Transformer架构。
AI.result: 基于Transformer的简单流水线在多个基准测试中取得优异性能。
AI.conclusion: 外部数据预训练和微调能有效提升少样本学习性能，简单Transformer流水线在实际中具有竞争力。

(2) How state-of-the-art transformer architectures can be exploited? and (3) How fine-tuning mitigates domain shift? Ultimately, we show that a simple transformer-based pipeline yields surprisingly good performance on standard benchmarks such as Mini-ImageNet, CIFAR-FS, CDFSL and Meta-Dataset. authors_text: Feilong Chen,Xiuyi Chen,Shuang Xu,Bo Xu
title: Improving Cross-Modal Understanding in Visual Dialog via Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 通过对比学习提高视觉对话中的跨模态理解
abstract: Visual Dialog is a challenging vision-language task since the visual dialog agent needs to answer a series of questions after reasoning over both the image content and dialog history. Though existing methods try to deal with the cross-modal understanding in visual dialog, they are still not enough in ranking candidate answers based on their understanding of visual and textual contexts. In this paper, we analyze the cross-modal understanding in visual dialog based on the vision-language pre-training model VD-BERT and propose a novel approach to improve the cross-modal understanding for visual dialog, named ICMU. ICMU enhances cross-modal understanding by distinguishing different pulled inputs (i.e. pulled images, questions or answers) based on four-way contrastive learning. In addition, ICMU exploits the single-turn visual question answering to enhance the visual dialog model's cross-modal understanding to handle a multi-turn visually-grounded conversation. Experiments show that the proposed approach improves the visual dialog model's cross-modal understanding and brings satisfactory gain to the VisDial dataset.
summary: Visual Dialog is a challenging vision-language task since the visual dialog agent needs to answer a series of questions after reasoning over both the image content and dialog history. Though existing methods try to deal with the cross-modal understanding in visual dialog, they are still not enough in ranking candidate answers based on their understanding of visual and textual contexts. In this paper, we analyze the cross-modal understanding in visual dialog based on the vision-language pre-training model VD-BERT and propose a novel approach to improve the cross-modal understanding for visual dialog, named ICMU. ICMU enhances cross-modal understanding by distinguishing different pulled inputs (i.e. pulled images, questions or answers) based on four-way contrastive learning. In addition, ICMU exploits the single-turn visual question answering to enhance the visual dialog model's cross-modal understanding to handle a multi-turn visually-grounded conversation. Experiments show that the proposed approach improves the visual dialog model's cross-modal understanding and brings satisfactory gain to the VisDial dataset.
abstract_zh: 视觉对话是一项具有挑战性的视觉语言任务，因为视觉对话代理需要在对图像内容和对话历史进行推理后回答一系列问题。尽管现有的方法试图处理视觉对话中的跨模式理解，但它们仍然不足以根据对视觉和文本上下文的理解对候选答案进行排名。在本文中，我们基于视觉语言预训练模型VD-BERT分析了视觉对话中的跨模态理解，并提出了一种提高视觉对话跨模态理解的新方法，称为ICMU。 ICMU 通过基于四向对比学习区分不同的拉输入（即拉图像、问题或答案）来增强跨模式理解。此外，ICMU 利用单轮视觉问答来增强视觉对话模型的跨模式理解，以处理多轮视觉基础对话。实验表明，所提出的方法提高了视觉对话模型的跨模态理解，并为 VisDial 数据集带来了令人满意的增益。

AI.tldr: 通过对比学习提升视觉对话中的跨模态理解能力
AI.motivation: 现有方法在基于视觉和文本上下文排序候选答案时存在不足，需提升跨模态理解
AI.method: 提出ICMU方法，利用四向对比学习区分图像、问题和答案，并结合单轮视觉问答增强多轮对话理解
AI.result: 实验表明ICMU有效提升跨模态理解，在VisDial数据集上取得显著效果
AI.conclusion: 验证了对比学习在提升视觉对话跨模态理解中的有效性

authors_text: Binghui Chen,Pengyu Li,Xiang Chen,Biao Wang,Lei Zhang,Xian-Sheng Hua
title: Dense Learning based Semi-Supervised Object Detection
title_zh: 基于密集学习的半监督目标检测
abstract: Semi-supervised object detection (SSOD) aims to facilitate the training and deployment of object detectors with the help of a large amount of unlabeled data. Though various self-training based and consistency-regularization based SSOD methods have been proposed, most of them are anchor-based detectors, ignoring the fact that in many real-world applications anchor-free detectors are more demanded. In this paper, we intend to bridge this gap and propose a DenSe Learning (DSL) based anchor-free SSOD algorithm. Specifically, we achieve this goal by introducing several novel techniques, including an Adaptive Filtering strategy for assigning multi-level and accurate dense pixel-wise pseudo-labels, an Aggregated Teacher for producing stable and precise pseudo-labels, and an uncertainty-consistency-regularization term among scales and shuffled patches for improving the generalization capability of the detector. Extensive experiments are conducted on MS-COCO and PASCAL-VOC, and the results show that our proposed DSL method records new state-of-the-art SSOD performance, surpassing existing methods by a large margin. Codes can be found at \textcolor{blue}{https://github.com/chenbinghui1/DSL}.
summary: Semi-supervised object detection (SSOD) aims to facilitate the training and deployment of object detectors with the help of a large amount of unlabeled data. Though various self-training based and consistency-regularization based SSOD methods have been proposed, most of them are anchor-based detectors, ignoring the fact that in many real-world applications anchor-free detectors are more demanded. In this paper, we intend to bridge this gap and propose a DenSe Learning (DSL) based anchor-free SSOD algorithm. Specifically, we achieve this goal by introducing several novel techniques, including an Adaptive Filtering strategy for assigning multi-level and accurate dense pixel-wise pseudo-labels, an Aggregated Teacher for producing stable and precise pseudo-labels, and an uncertainty-consistency-regularization term among scales and shuffled patches for improving the generalization capability of the detector. Extensive experiments are conducted on MS-COCO and PASCAL-VOC, and the results show that our proposed DSL method records new state-of-the-art SSOD performance, surpassing existing methods by a large margin. Codes can be found at \textcolor{blue}{https://github.com/chenbinghui1/DSL}.
abstract_zh: 半监督目标检测（SSOD）旨在借助大量未标记数据促进目标检测器的训练和部署。尽管已经提出了各种基于自训练和基于一致性正则化的 SSOD 方法，但大多数都是基于锚的检测器，忽略了在许多实际应用中更需要无锚检测器的事实。在本文中，我们打算弥补这一差距，提出一种基于 DenSe 学习（DSL）的无锚 SSOD 算法。具体来说，我们通过引入几种新技术来实现这一目标，包括用于分配多级且精确的密集像素伪标签的自适应过滤策略、用于生成稳定且精确的伪标签的聚合教师，以及用于提高检测器泛化能力的尺度和混洗补丁之间的不确定性一致性正则化项。在 MS-COCO 和 PASCAL-VOC 上进行了大量实验，结果表明我们提出的 DSL 方法记录了新的最先进的 SSOD 性能，大幅超越了现有方法。代码可以在 \textcolor{blue}{https://github.com/chenbinghui1/DSL} 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于密集学习的半监督目标检测方法（DSL），以解决现有半监督目标检测方法多为基于锚点的检测器而忽视实际需求中无锚点检测器的应用问题。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督目标检测方法主要基于锚点，但实际应用中无锚点检测器更受需求，需填补这一技术空白。
AI.method: 提出DenSe Learning（DSL）框架，包含自适应过滤策略生成密集伪标签、聚合教师模型提升伪标签稳定性、跨尺度与打乱块的不确定性一致性正则化项。
AI.result: 在MS-COCO和PASCAL-VOC数据集上取得当前最优半监督目标检测性能，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: DSL方法有效解决了无锚点半监督目标检测的挑战，为实际应用提供了更优解决方案。

search_text: Dense Learning based Semi-Supervised Object Detection 基于密集学习的半监督目标检测 Semi-supervised object detection (SSOD) aims to facilitate the training and deployment of object detectors with the help of a large amount of unlabeled data. Though various self-training based and consistency-regularization based SSOD methods have been proposed, most of them are anchor-based detectors, ignoring the fact that in many real-world applications anchor-free detectors are more demanded. In this paper, we intend to bridge this gap and propose a DenSe Learning (DSL) based anchor-free SSOD algorithm. Specifically, we achieve this goal by introducing several novel techniques, including an Adaptive Filtering strategy for assigning multi-level and accurate dense pixel-wise pseudo-labels, an Aggregated Teacher for producing stable and precise pseudo-labels, and an uncertainty-consistency-regularization term among scales and shuffled patches for improving the generalization capability of the detector. Extensive experiments are conducted on MS-COCO and PASCAL-VOC, and the results show that our proposed DSL method records new state-of-the-art SSOD performance, surpassing existing methods by a large margin. Codes can be found at \textcolor{blue}{https://github.com/chenbinghui1/DSL}. 半监督目标检测（SSOD）旨在借助大量未标记数据促进目标检测器的训练和部署。尽管已经提出了各种基于自训练和基于一致性正则化的 SSOD 方法，但大多数都是基于锚的检测器，忽略了在许多实际应用中更需要无锚检测器的事实。在本文中，我们打算弥补这一差距，提出一种基于 DenSe 学习（DSL）的无锚 SSOD 算法。具体来说，我们通过引入几种新技术来实现这一目标，包括用于分配多级且精确的密集像素伪标签的自适应过滤策略、用于生成稳定且精确的伪标签的聚合教师，以及用于提高检测器泛化能力的尺度和混洗补丁之间的不确定性一致性正则化项。在 MS-COCO 和 PASCAL-VOC 上进行了大量实验，结果表明我们提出的 DSL 方法记录了新的最先进的 SSOD 性能，大幅超越了现有方法。代码可以在 \textcolor{blue}{https://github.com/chenbinghui1/DSL} 找到。 本文提出一种基于密集学习的半监督目标检测方法（DSL），以解决现有半监督目标检测方法多为基于锚点的检测器而忽视实际需求中无锚点检测器的应用问题。 Binghui Chen,Pengyu Li,Xiang Chen,Biao Wang,Lei Zhang,Xian-Sheng Hua cs.CV

authors_text: Mohammad Reza Karimi Dastjerdi,Yannick Hold-Geoffroy,Jonathan Eisenmann,Siavash Khodadadeh,Jean-François Lalonde
title: Guided Co-Modulated GAN for 360° Field of View Extrapolation
title_zh: 用于 360° 视场外推的引导共调制 GAN
abstract: We propose a method to extrapolate a 360° field of view from a single image that allows for user-controlled synthesis of the out-painted content. To do so, we propose improvements to an existing GAN-based in-painting architecture for out-painting panoramic image representation. Our method obtains state-of-the-art results and outperforms previous methods on standard image quality metrics. To allow controlled synthesis of out-painting, we introduce a novel guided co-modulation framework, which drives the image generation process with a common pretrained discriminative model. Doing so maintains the high visual quality of generated panoramas while enabling user-controlled semantic content in the extrapolated field of view. We demonstrate the state-of-the-art results of our method on field of view extrapolation both qualitatively and quantitatively, providing thorough analysis of our novel editing capabilities. Finally, we demonstrate that our approach benefits the photorealistic virtual insertion of highly glossy objects in photographs.
summary: We propose a method to extrapolate a 360° field of view from a single image that allows for user-controlled synthesis of the out-painted content. To do so, we propose improvements to an existing GAN-based in-painting architecture for out-painting panoramic image representation. Our method obtains state-of-the-art results and outperforms previous methods on standard image quality metrics. To allow controlled synthesis of out-painting, we introduce a novel guided co-modulation framework, which drives the image generation process with a common pretrained discriminative model. Doing so maintains the high visual quality of generated panoramas while enabling user-controlled semantic content in the extrapolated field of view. We demonstrate the state-of-the-art results of our method on field of view extrapolation both qualitatively and quantitatively, providing thorough analysis of our novel editing capabilities. Finally, we demonstrate that our approach benefits the photorealistic virtual insertion of highly glossy objects in photographs.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种从单个图像推断 360° 视野的方法，该方法允许用户控制合成未绘制的内容。为此，我们建议对现有的基于 GAN 的绘画架构进行改进，以实现全景图像表示。我们的方法获得了最先进的结果，并且在标准图像质量指标上优于以前的方法。为了允许外画的受控合成，我们引入了一种新颖的引导共调制框架，该框架通过通用的预训练判别模型驱动图像生成过程。这样做可以保持生成的全景图的高视觉质量，同时在外推视野中启用用户控制的语义内容。我们定性和定量地展示了我们的方法在视场外推方面的最先进的结果，为我们新颖的编辑能力提供了彻底的分析。最后，我们证明我们的方法有利于照片中高光泽物体的逼真虚拟插入。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于改进GAN的360度视野扩展方法，允许用户控制生成的扩展内容。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以在保持图像质量的同时实现用户可控的全景图像扩展，需改进生成架构并引入控制机制。
AI.method: 改进GAN修复架构，提出引导共调制框架，结合预训练判别模型驱动生成过程以实现可控语义扩展。
AI.result: 在标准质量指标上优于现有方法，定量化验证生成效果，并成功应用于高光泽物体的虚拟插入。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持全景图像视觉质量的同时实现了用户可控的扩展，达到领域内先进水平。

authors_text: Risako Tanigawa,Yasunori Ishii,Kazuki Kozuka,Takayoshi Yamashita
title: Invisible-to-Visible: Privacy-Aware Human Instance Segmentation using Airborne Ultrasound via Collaborative Learning Variational Autoencoder
title_zh: 从不可见到可见：通过协作学习变分自动编码器使用机载超声波进行隐私感知的人体实例分割
abstract: In action understanding in indoor, we have to recognize human pose and action considering privacy. Although camera images can be used for highly accurate human action recognition, camera images do not preserve privacy. Therefore, we propose a new task for human instance segmentation from invisible information, especially airborne ultrasound, for action recognition. To perform instance segmentation from invisible information, we first convert sound waves to reflected sound directional images (sound images). Although the sound images can roughly identify the location of a person, the detailed shape is ambiguous. To address this problem, we propose a collaborative learning variational autoencoder (CL-VAE) that simultaneously uses sound and RGB images during training. In inference, it is possible to obtain instance segmentation results only from sound images. As a result of performance verification, CL-VAE could estimate human instance segmentations more accurately than conventional variational autoencoder and some other models. Since this method can obtain human segmentations individually, it could be applied to human action recognition tasks with privacy protection.
summary: In action understanding in indoor, we have to recognize human pose and action considering privacy. Although camera images can be used for highly accurate human action recognition, camera images do not preserve privacy. Therefore, we propose a new task for human instance segmentation from invisible information, especially airborne ultrasound, for action recognition. To perform instance segmentation from invisible information, we first convert sound waves to reflected sound directional images (sound images). Although the sound images can roughly identify the location of a person, the detailed shape is ambiguous. To address this problem, we propose a collaborative learning variational autoencoder (CL-VAE) that simultaneously uses sound and RGB images during training. In inference, it is possible to obtain instance segmentation results only from sound images. As a result of performance verification, CL-VAE could estimate human instance segmentations more accurately than conventional variational autoencoder and some other models. Since this method can obtain human segmentations individually, it could be applied to human action recognition tasks with privacy protection.
abstract_zh: 在室内的动作理解中，考虑到隐私，我们必须识别人体姿势和动作。尽管摄像机图像可用于高度准确的人类动作识别，但摄像机图像不能保护隐私。因此，我们提出了一项新任务，从不可见信息（尤其是机载超声波）中进行人体实例分割，以进行动作识别。为了对不可见信息进行实例分割，我们首先将声波转换为反射声音方向图像（声音图像）。虽然声音图像可以大致识别人的位置，但详细形状是模糊的。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种协作学习变分自动编码器（CL-VAE），它在训练过程中同时使用声音和 RGB 图像。推断，仅从声音图像中就可以获得实例分割结果。经过性能验证，CL-VAE 可以比传统的变分自动编码器和其他一些模型更准确地估计人类实例分割。由于该方法可以单独获得人体分割，因此可以应用于具有隐私保护的人体动作识别任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于空气超声波的隐私保护人体实例分割方法，通过协作学习变分自编码器（CL-VAE）实现无需可见光图像的隐私友好型动作识别。
AI.motivation: 传统摄像头图像虽能精准识别动作但存在隐私泄露风险，需探索无隐私侵犯的替代方案，利用不可见的空气超声波数据进行人体分割。
AI.method: 将超声波反射声学图像与RGB图像联合输入协作学习变分自编码器（CL-VAE），训练时融合多模态信息，推理阶段仅依赖声学图像输出人体实例分割结果。
AI.result: CL-VAE在人体分割精度上优于传统变分自编码器及其他模型，验证了其通过声学数据实现隐私保护动作识别的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过声学数据替代可见光图像，为隐私敏感场景下的动作识别提供了有效技术路径。

authors_text: Minqian Liu,Shiyu Chang,Lifu Huang
title: Incremental Prompting: Episodic Memory Prompt for Lifelong Event Detection
title_zh: 增量提示：用于终身事件检测的情景记忆提示
comment: Accepted to COLING'22 Main Conference (Short paper). 9 pages, 2 figures, 3 tables
comments: Accepted to COLING'22 Main Conference (Short paper). 9 pages, 2 figures, 3 tables
abstract: Lifelong event detection aims to incrementally update a model with new event types and data while retaining the capability on previously learned old types. One critical challenge is that the model would catastrophically forget old types when continually trained on new data. In this paper, we introduce Episodic Memory Prompts (EMP) to explicitly preserve the learned task-specific knowledge. Our method adopts continuous prompt for each task and they are optimized to instruct the model prediction and learn event-specific representation. The EMPs learned in previous tasks are carried along with the model in subsequent tasks, and can serve as a memory module that keeps the old knowledge and transferring to new tasks. Experiment results demonstrate the effectiveness of our method. Furthermore, we also conduct a comprehensive analysis of the new and old event types in lifelong learning.
summary: Lifelong event detection aims to incrementally update a model with new event types and data while retaining the capability on previously learned old types. One critical challenge is that the model would catastrophically forget old types when continually trained on new data. In this paper, we introduce Episodic Memory Prompts (EMP) to explicitly preserve the learned task-specific knowledge. Our method adopts continuous prompt for each task and they are optimized to instruct the model prediction and learn event-specific representation. The EMPs learned in previous tasks are carried along with the model in subsequent tasks, and can serve as a memory module that keeps the old knowledge and transferring to new tasks. Experiment results demonstrate the effectiveness of our method. Furthermore, we also conduct a comprehensive analysis of the new and old event types in lifelong learning.
abstract_zh: 终身事件检测旨在使用新的事件类型和数据增量更新模型，同时保留先前学习的旧类型的功能。一个关键的挑战是，当不断接受新数据的训练时，模型会灾难性地忘记旧类型。在本文中，我们引入情景记忆提示（EMP）来明确保留所学到的特定于任务的知识。我们的方法对每个任务采用连续提示，并对其进行优化以指导模型预测并学习特定于事件的表示。先前任务中学习到的 EMP 会在后续任务中与模型一起携带，并且可以作为保留旧知识并转移到新任务的记忆模块。实验结果证明了我们方法的有效性。此外，我们还对终身学习中的新旧事件类型进行了综合分析。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Episodic Memory Prompts（EMP）的方法，用于解决终身事件检测中的灾难性遗忘问题，通过增量更新模型以保留旧事件类型的知识。
AI.motivation: 在终身学习中，模型在持续学习新事件类型时容易遗忘已学习的旧类型，导致性能下降，亟需有效的方法来保留历史知识。
AI.method: 采用连续提示（continuous prompt）为每个任务优化，通过将先前任务学习的EMP作为记忆模块携带至后续任务，以保持旧知识并辅助新任务学习。
AI.result: 实验验证了EMP方法在终身事件检测任务中的有效性，并对新旧事件类型的性能进行了全面分析。
AI.conclusion: EMP方法通过显式保存任务特定知识，有效缓解了灾难性遗忘问题，为终身学习提供了可行的解决方案。

search_text: Incremental Prompting: Episodic Memory Prompt for Lifelong Event Detection 增量提示：用于终身事件检测的情景记忆提示 Lifelong event detection aims to incrementally update a model with new event types and data while retaining the capability on previously learned old types. One critical challenge is that the model would catastrophically forget old types when continually trained on new data. In this paper, we introduce Episodic Memory Prompts (EMP) to explicitly preserve the learned task-specific knowledge. Our method adopts continuous prompt for each task and they are optimized to instruct the model prediction and learn event-specific representation. The EMPs learned in previous tasks are carried along with the model in subsequent tasks, and can serve as a memory module that keeps the old knowledge and transferring to new tasks. Experiment results demonstrate the effectiveness of our method. Furthermore, we also conduct a comprehensive analysis of the new and old event types in lifelong learning. 终身事件检测旨在使用新的事件类型和数据增量更新模型，同时保留先前学习的旧类型的功能。一个关键的挑战是，当不断接受新数据的训练时，模型会灾难性地忘记旧类型。在本文中，我们引入情景记忆提示（EMP）来明确保留所学到的特定于任务的知识。我们的方法对每个任务采用连续提示，并对其进行优化以指导模型预测并学习特定于事件的表示。先前任务中学习到的 EMP 会在后续任务中与模型一起携带，并且可以作为保留旧知识并转移到新任务的记忆模块。实验结果证明了我们方法的有效性。此外，我们还对终身学习中的新旧事件类型进行了综合分析。 本文提出了一种名为Episodic Memory Prompts（EMP）的方法，用于解决终身事件检测中的灾难性遗忘问题，通过增量更新模型以保留旧事件类型的知识。 Minqian Liu,Shiyu Chang,Lifu Huang cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Nay San,Martijn Bartelds,Tolúlopé Ògúnrèmí,Alison Mount,Ruben Thompson,Michael Higgins,Roy Barker,Jane Simpson,Dan Jurafsky
title: Automated speech tools for helping communities process restricted-access corpora for language revival efforts
title_zh: 自动语音工具可帮助社区处理限制访问语料库以实现语言复兴工作
abstract: Many archival recordings of speech from endangered languages remain unannotated and inaccessible to community members and language learning programs. One bottleneck is the time-intensive nature of annotation. An even narrower bottleneck occurs for recordings with access constraints, such as language that must be vetted or filtered by authorised community members before annotation can begin. We propose a privacy-preserving workflow to widen both bottlenecks for recordings where speech in the endangered language is intermixed with a more widely-used language such as English for meta-linguistic commentary and questions (e.g. What is the word for 'tree'?). We integrate voice activity detection (VAD), spoken language identification (SLI), and automatic speech recognition (ASR) to transcribe the metalinguistic content, which an authorised person can quickly scan to triage recordings that can be annotated by people with lower levels of access. We report work-in-progress processing 136 hours archival audio containing a mix of English and Muruwari. Our collaborative work with the Muruwari custodian of the archival materials show that this workflow reduces metalanguage transcription time by 20% even given only minimal amounts of annotated training data: 10 utterances per language for SLI and for ASR at most 39 minutes, and possibly as little as 39 seconds.
summary: Many archival recordings of speech from endangered languages remain unannotated and inaccessible to community members and language learning programs. One bottleneck is the time-intensive nature of annotation. An even narrower bottleneck occurs for recordings with access constraints, such as language that must be vetted or filtered by authorised community members before annotation can begin. We propose a privacy-preserving workflow to widen both bottlenecks for recordings where speech in the endangered language is intermixed with a more widely-used language such as English for meta-linguistic commentary and questions (e.g. What is the word for 'tree'?). We integrate voice activity detection (VAD), spoken language identification (SLI), and automatic speech recognition (ASR) to transcribe the metalinguistic content, which an authorised person can quickly scan to triage recordings that can be annotated by people with lower levels of access. We report work-in-progress processing 136 hours archival audio containing a mix of English and Muruwari. Our collaborative work with the Muruwari custodian of the archival materials show that this workflow reduces metalanguage transcription time by 20% even given only minimal amounts of annotated training data: 10 utterances per language for SLI and for ASR at most 39 minutes, and possibly as little as 39 seconds.
abstract_zh: 许多濒危语言的语音档案录音仍然没有注释，社区成员和语言学习项目无法访问。一个瓶颈是注释的时间密集性。对于具有访问限制的记录，会出现更窄的瓶颈，例如在开始注释之前必须由授权社区成员审查或过滤的语言。我们提出了一种隐私保护工作流程，以扩大录音的瓶颈​​，其中濒危语言的语音与更广泛使用的语言（例如用于元语言评论和问题的英语）混合在一起（例如，“树”这个词是什么？）。我们集成了语音活动检测 (VAD)、口语识别 (SLI) 和自动语音识别 (ASR) 来转录元语言内容，授权人员可以快速扫描这些内容以对录音进行分类，而访问级别较低的人员可以对录音进行注释。我们报告了正在处理的 136 小时档案音频，其中包含英语和穆鲁瓦里语的混合内容。我们与档案材料 Muruwari 保管人的合作表明，即使只提供极少量带注释的训练数据，此工作流程也能将元语言转录时间减少 20%：SLI 和 ASR 每种语言 10 个话语，最多 39 分钟，也可能短至 39 秒。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种隐私保护的工作流程，利用语音活动检测、语言识别和自动语音识别技术，帮助社区处理混合了濒危语言和通用语言（如英语）的受限访问语料库，以促进语言复兴。
AI.motivation: 许多濒危语言的档案录音未被标注且社区成员难以访问，主要瓶颈是标注耗时且受限录音需经授权成员审核后才能处理，严重影响语言复兴效率。
AI.method: 整合语音活动检测（VAD）、口语语言识别（SLI）和自动语音识别（ASR）技术，自动转录录音中的元语言内容（如英语提问），授权人员可快速筛选可由低权限人员标注的录音。
AI.result: 在处理136小时混合英语和穆鲁瓦里语的档案音频时，该流程使元语言转录时间减少20%，且仅需极少标注数据（如SLI每种语言10个语句，ASR最多39分钟或仅39秒数据）。
AI.conclusion: 该工作流程通过自动化技术有效缓解了受限语料标注的双重瓶颈，即使在标注数据极度有限的情况下也能显著提升效率，为濒危语言复兴提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Kazuki Omi,Jun Kimata,Toru Tamaki
title: Model-agnostic Multi-Domain Learning with Domain-Specific Adapters for Action Recognition
title_zh: 与模型无关的多域学习，具有用于动作识别的特定于域的适配器
comment: IEICE Transactions on Information and Systems, Vol. E105-D, No. 12, Dec. 2022
comments: IEICE Transactions on Information and Systems, Vol. E105-D, No. 12, Dec. 2022
abstract: In this paper, we propose a multi-domain learning model for action recognition. The proposed method inserts domain-specific adapters between layers of domain-independent layers of a backbone network. Unlike a multi-head network that switches classification heads only, our model switches not only the heads, but also the adapters for facilitating to learn feature representations universal to multiple domains. Unlike prior works, the proposed method is model-agnostic and doesn't assume model structures unlike prior works. Experimental results on three popular action recognition datasets (HMDB51, UCF101, and Kinetics-400) demonstrate that the proposed method is more effective than a multi-head architecture and more efficient than separately training models for each domain.
summary: In this paper, we propose a multi-domain learning model for action recognition. The proposed method inserts domain-specific adapters between layers of domain-independent layers of a backbone network. Unlike a multi-head network that switches classification heads only, our model switches not only the heads, but also the adapters for facilitating to learn feature representations universal to multiple domains. Unlike prior works, the proposed method is model-agnostic and doesn't assume model structures unlike prior works. Experimental results on three popular action recognition datasets (HMDB51, UCF101, and Kinetics-400) demonstrate that the proposed method is more effective than a multi-head architecture and more efficient than separately training models for each domain.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种用于动作识别的多领域学习模型。所提出的方法在骨干网络的域独立层之间插入域特定适配器。与仅切换分类头的多头网络不同，我们的模型不仅切换头，还切换适配器，以便于学习适用于多个域的特征表示。与之前的工作不同，所提出的方法与模型无关，并且不像之前的工作那样假设模型结构。在三个流行的动作识别数据集（HMDB51、UCF101 和 Kinetics-400）上的实验结果表明，所提出的方法比多头架构更有效，并且比每个域单独训练模型更有效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种模型无关的多领域学习方法，通过在骨干网络中插入领域特定适配器，提升动作识别的跨领域泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法要么仅切换分类头无法适应领域差异，要么依赖特定模型结构限制通用性，需设计更高效且结构无关的多领域学习框架。
AI.method: 在领域无关的骨干网络层间插入可切换的领域特定适配器，同时调整分类头与适配器组合，实现跨领域特征学习与模型参数共享。
AI.result: 在HMDB51、UCF101和Kinetics-400三个数据集上，该方法在准确率上优于多头架构，在推理效率上优于独立训练的单领域模型。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过适配器机制实现了结构无关的多领域学习，在保持模型通用性的同时提升了跨领域动作识别的性能与效率。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种模型无关的多领域学习方法，通过在骨干网络中插入领域特定适配器，提升动作识别的跨领域泛化能力。
ai_content.motivation: 现有方法要么仅切换分类头无法适应领域差异，要么依赖特定模型结构限制通用性，需设计更高效且结构无关的多领域学习框架。
ai_content.method: 在领域无关的骨干网络层间插入可切换的领域特定适配器，同时调整分类头与适配器组合，实现跨领域特征学习与模型参数共享。
ai_content.result: 在HMDB51、UCF101和Kinetics-400三个数据集上，该方法在准确率上优于多头架构，在推理效率上优于独立训练的单领域模型。
ai_content.conclusion: 所提方法通过适配器机制实现了结构无关的多领域学习，在保持模型通用性的同时提升了跨领域动作识别的性能与效率。

search_text: Model-agnostic Multi-Domain Learning with Domain-Specific Adapters for Action Recognition 与模型无关的多域学习，具有用于动作识别的特定于域的适配器 In this paper, we propose a multi-domain learning model for action recognition. The proposed method inserts domain-specific adapters between layers of domain-independent layers of a backbone network. Unlike a multi-head network that switches classification heads only, our model switches not only the heads, but also the adapters for facilitating to learn feature representations universal to multiple domains. Unlike prior works, the proposed method is model-agnostic and doesn't assume model structures unlike prior works. Experimental results on three popular action recognition datasets (HMDB51, UCF101, and Kinetics-400) demonstrate that the proposed method is more effective than a multi-head architecture and more efficient than separately training models for each domain. 在本文中，我们提出了一种用于动作识别的多领域学习模型。所提出的方法在骨干网络的域独立层之间插入域特定适配器。与仅切换分类头的多头网络不同，我们的模型不仅切换头，还切换适配器，以便于学习适用于多个域的特征表示。与之前的工作不同，所提出的方法与模型无关，并且不像之前的工作那样假设模型结构。在三个流行的动作识别数据集（HMDB51、UCF101 和 Kinetics-400）上的实验结果表明，所提出的方法比多头架构更有效，并且比每个域单独训练模型更有效。 本文提出一种模型无关的多领域学习方法，通过在骨干网络中插入领域特定适配器，提升动作识别的跨领域泛化能力。 Kazuki Omi,Jun Kimata,Toru Tamaki cs.CV

authors_text: Patrick Grady,Jeremy A. Collins,Samarth Brahmbhatt,Christopher D. Twigg,Chengcheng Tang,James Hays,Charles C. Kemp
title: Visual Pressure Estimation and Control for Soft Robotic Grippers
title_zh: 软机器人夹具的视觉压力估计和控制
abstract: Soft robotic grippers facilitate contact-rich manipulation, including robust grasping of varied objects. Yet the beneficial compliance of a soft gripper also results in significant deformation that can make precision manipulation challenging. We present visual pressure estimation & control (VPEC), a method that infers pressure applied by a soft gripper using an RGB image from an external camera. We provide results for visual pressure inference when a pneumatic gripper and a tendon-actuated gripper make contact with a flat surface. We also show that VPEC enables precision manipulation via closed-loop control of inferred pressure images. In our evaluation, a mobile manipulator (Stretch RE1 from Hello Robot) uses visual servoing to make contact at a desired pressure; follow a spatial pressure trajectory; and grasp small low-profile objects, including a microSD card, a penny, and a pill. Overall, our results show that visual estimates of applied pressure can enable a soft gripper to perform precision manipulation.
summary: Soft robotic grippers facilitate contact-rich manipulation, including robust grasping of varied objects. Yet the beneficial compliance of a soft gripper also results in significant deformation that can make precision manipulation challenging. We present visual pressure estimation & control (VPEC), a method that infers pressure applied by a soft gripper using an RGB image from an external camera. We provide results for visual pressure inference when a pneumatic gripper and a tendon-actuated gripper make contact with a flat surface. We also show that VPEC enables precision manipulation via closed-loop control of inferred pressure images. In our evaluation, a mobile manipulator (Stretch RE1 from Hello Robot) uses visual servoing to make contact at a desired pressure; follow a spatial pressure trajectory; and grasp small low-profile objects, including a microSD card, a penny, and a pill. Overall, our results show that visual estimates of applied pressure can enable a soft gripper to perform precision manipulation.
abstract_zh: 软机器人抓手有助于进行丰富的接触操作，包括牢固地抓取各种物体。然而，软夹具的有益顺应性也会导致显着变形，从而使精确操作变得困难。我们提出了视觉压力估计和控制 (VPEC)，这是一种使用外部摄像头的 RGB 图像来推断软夹具施加的压力的方法。当气动夹具和肌腱驱动夹具与平坦表面接触时，我们提供视觉压力推断结果。我们还表明，VPEC 通过推断压力图像的闭环控制实现精确操作。在我们的评估中，移动机械手（Hello Robot 的 Stretch RE1）使用视觉伺服系统以所需的压力进行接触；遵循空间压力轨迹；并抓住一些低调的小物体，包括一张 microSD 卡、一分钱和一颗药丸。总的来说，我们的结果表明，施加压力的视觉估计可以使软夹具执行精确操作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于视觉的压力估计与控制方法（VPEC），用于解决软体机械手因变形导致的精密操作难题。
AI.motivation: 软体机械手的高顺应性虽利于抓取，但显著变形使其难以实现精确控制，需通过视觉信息辅助压力感知与调节。
AI.method: 利用外部摄像头采集的RGB图像推断软机械手接触表面时的压力分布，并通过闭环控制实现压力轨迹跟踪与精密抓取。
AI.result: 实验显示该方法可使移动机械臂在指定压力下接触物体、跟踪压力路径，并成功抓取微SD卡、硬币等小型低轮廓物体。
AI.conclusion: 视觉压力估计技术能有效提升软体机械手的精密操作能力，为复杂环境下的柔性操控提供新思路。

authors_text: Cindy M. Nguyen,Julien N. P. Martel,Gordon Wetzstein
title: Learning Spatially Varying Pixel Exposures for Motion Deblurring
title_zh: 学习空间变化的像素曝光以进行运动去模糊
abstract: Computationally removing the motion blur introduced by camera shake or object motion in a captured image remains a challenging task in computational photography. Deblurring methods are often limited by the fixed global exposure time of the image capture process. The post-processing algorithm either must deblur a longer exposure that contains relatively little noise or denoise a short exposure that intentionally removes the opportunity for blur at the cost of increased noise. We present a novel approach of leveraging spatially varying pixel exposures for motion deblurring using next-generation focal-plane sensor--processors along with an end-to-end design of these exposures and a machine learning--based motion-deblurring framework. We demonstrate in simulation and a physical prototype that learned spatially varying pixel exposures (L-SVPE) can successfully deblur scenes while recovering high frequency detail. Our work illustrates the promising role that focal-plane sensor--processors can play in the future of computational imaging.
summary: Computationally removing the motion blur introduced by camera shake or object motion in a captured image remains a challenging task in computational photography. Deblurring methods are often limited by the fixed global exposure time of the image capture process. The post-processing algorithm either must deblur a longer exposure that contains relatively little noise or denoise a short exposure that intentionally removes the opportunity for blur at the cost of increased noise. We present a novel approach of leveraging spatially varying pixel exposures for motion deblurring using next-generation focal-plane sensor--processors along with an end-to-end design of these exposures and a machine learning--based motion-deblurring framework. We demonstrate in simulation and a physical prototype that learned spatially varying pixel exposures (L-SVPE) can successfully deblur scenes while recovering high frequency detail. Our work illustrates the promising role that focal-plane sensor--processors can play in the future of computational imaging.
abstract_zh: 在计算摄影中，通过计算消除由相机抖动或拍摄图像中的物体运动引起的运动模糊仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务。去模糊方法通常受到图像捕获过程的固定全局曝光时间的限制。后处理算法要么必须对包含相对较少噪声的较长曝光进行去模糊，要么对短曝光进行去噪，以增加噪声为代价有意消除模糊的机会。我们提出了一种利用空间变化的像素曝光进行运动去模糊的新颖方法，使用下一代焦平面传感器处理器以及这些曝光的端到端设计和基于机器学习的运动去模糊框架。我们在模拟和物理原型中进行了演示，该原型学习了空间变化的像素曝光（L-SVPE），可以成功地对场景进行去模糊，同时恢复高频细节。我们的工作说明了焦平面传感器处理器在未来计算成像中可以发挥的有希望的作用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用空间可变像素曝光和机器学习框架解决运动模糊问题的新方法。
AI.motivation: 传统去模糊方法受限于固定全局曝光时间，难以平衡噪声与模糊消除效果。
AI.method: 结合下一代焦平面传感器处理器与端到端曝光设计，通过机器学习实现空间可变像素曝光（L-SVPE）。
AI.result: 仿真与物理原型验证表明，L-SVPE能有效去模糊并恢复高频细节。
AI.conclusion: 焦平面传感器处理器在计算成像领域具有重要应用前景。

authors_text: Jisoo Jeong,Jamie Menjay Lin,Fatih Porikli,Nojun Kwak
title: Imposing Consistency for Optical Flow Estimation
title_zh: 强加光流估计的一致性
abstract: Imposing consistency through proxy tasks has been shown to enhance data-driven learning and enable self-supervision in various tasks. This paper introduces novel and effective consistency strategies for optical flow estimation, a problem where labels from real-world data are very challenging to derive. More specifically, we propose occlusion consistency and zero forcing in the forms of self-supervised learning and transformation consistency in the form of semi-supervised learning. We apply these consistency techniques in a way that the network model learns to describe pixel-level motions better while requiring no additional annotations. We demonstrate that our consistency strategies applied to a strong baseline network model using the original datasets and labels provide further improvements, attaining the state-of-the-art results on the KITTI-2015 scene flow benchmark in the non-stereo category. Our method achieves the best foreground accuracy (4.33% in Fl-all) over both the stereo and non-stereo categories, even though using only monocular image inputs.
summary: Imposing consistency through proxy tasks has been shown to enhance data-driven learning and enable self-supervision in various tasks. This paper introduces novel and effective consistency strategies for optical flow estimation, a problem where labels from real-world data are very challenging to derive. More specifically, we propose occlusion consistency and zero forcing in the forms of self-supervised learning and transformation consistency in the form of semi-supervised learning. We apply these consistency techniques in a way that the network model learns to describe pixel-level motions better while requiring no additional annotations. We demonstrate that our consistency strategies applied to a strong baseline network model using the original datasets and labels provide further improvements, attaining the state-of-the-art results on the KITTI-2015 scene flow benchmark in the non-stereo category. Our method achieves the best foreground accuracy (4.33% in Fl-all) over both the stereo and non-stereo categories, even though using only monocular image inputs.
abstract_zh: 事实证明，通过代理任务施加一致性可以增强数据驱动的学习并在各种任务中实现自我监督。本文介绍了用于光流估计的新颖且有效的一致性策略，这是一个很难从现实世界数据中获取标签的问题。更具体地说，我们以自监督学习的形式提出遮挡一致性和迫零，以半监督学习的形式提出转换一致性。我们应用这些一致性技术的方式是网络模型学习更好地描述像素级运动，同时不需要额外的注释。我们证明，我们的一致性策略应用于使用原始数据集和标签的强大基线网络模型，提供了进一步的改进，在非立体类别的 KITTI-2015 场景流基准上获得了最先进的结果。即使仅使用单目图像输入，我们的方法在立体和非立体类别上都实现了最佳前景精度（Fl-all 中为 4.33%）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过一致性策略改进光流估计，无需额外标注即可提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 真实世界数据的标签难以获取，传统方法依赖标注数据，而光流估计需要更有效的自监督学习策略。
AI.method: 引入遮挡一致性与零强制（自监督学习）及变换一致性（半监督学习），通过像素级运动描述优化网络模型。

AI.conclusion: 一致性策略无需额外标注即可提升光流估计，验证了自监督与半监督方法在该领域的有效性。

search_text: Imposing Consistency for Optical Flow Estimation 强加光流估计的一致性 Imposing consistency through proxy tasks has been shown to enhance data-driven learning and enable self-supervision in various tasks. This paper introduces novel and effective consistency strategies for optical flow estimation, a problem where labels from real-world data are very challenging to derive. More specifically, we propose occlusion consistency and zero forcing in the forms of self-supervised learning and transformation consistency in the form of semi-supervised learning. We apply these consistency techniques in a way that the network model learns to describe pixel-level motions better while requiring no additional annotations. We demonstrate that our consistency strategies applied to a strong baseline network model using the original datasets and labels provide further improvements, attaining the state-of-the-art results on the KITTI-2015 scene flow benchmark in the non-stereo category. Our method achieves the best foreground accuracy (4.33% in Fl-all) over both the stereo and non-stereo categories, even though using only monocular image inputs. 事实证明，通过代理任务施加一致性可以增强数据驱动的学习并在各种任务中实现自我监督。本文介绍了用于光流估计的新颖且有效的一致性策略，这是一个很难从现实世界数据中获取标签的问题。更具体地说，我们以自监督学习的形式提出遮挡一致性和迫零，以半监督学习的形式提出转换一致性。我们应用这些一致性技术的方式是网络模型学习更好地描述像素级运动，同时不需要额外的注释。我们证明，我们的一致性策略应用于使用原始数据集和标签的强大基线网络模型，提供了进一步的改进，在非立体类别的 KITTI-2015 场景流基准上获得了最先进的结果。即使仅使用单目图像输入，我们的方法在立体和非立体类别上都实现了最佳前景精度（Fl-all 中为 4.33%）。 本文提出通过一致性策略改进光流估计，无需额外标注即可提升模型性能。 Jisoo Jeong,Jamie Menjay Lin,Fatih Porikli,Nojun Kwak cs.CV

authors_text: Sahir,Ercüment İlhan,Srijita Das,Matthew E. Taylor
title: Methodical Advice Collection and Reuse in Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 深度强化学习中有条理的建议收集和重用
comment: To be published in ALA2022: Adaptive and Learning Agents Workshop 2022 at AAMAS
comments: To be published in ALA2022: Adaptive and Learning Agents Workshop 2022 at AAMAS
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has shown great success in solving many challenging tasks via use of deep neural networks. Although using deep learning for RL brings immense representational power, it also causes a well-known sample-inefficiency problem. This means that the algorithms are data-hungry and require millions of training samples to converge to an adequate policy. One way to combat this issue is to use action advising in a teacher-student framework, where a knowledgeable teacher provides action advice to help the student. This work considers how to better leverage uncertainties about when a student should ask for advice and if the student can model the teacher to ask for less advice. The student could decide to ask for advice when it is uncertain or when both it and its model of the teacher are uncertain. In addition to this investigation, this paper introduces a new method to compute uncertainty for a deep RL agent using a secondary neural network. Our empirical results show that using dual uncertainties to drive advice collection and reuse may improve learning performance across several Atari games.

Although using deep learning for RL brings immense representational power, it also causes a well-known sample-inefficiency problem. This means that the algorithms are data-hungry and require millions of training samples to converge to an adequate policy. One way to combat this issue is to use action advising in a teacher-student framework, where a knowledgeable teacher provides action advice to help the student. This work considers how to better leverage uncertainties about when a student should ask for advice and if the student can model the teacher to ask for less advice. The student could decide to ask for advice when it is uncertain or when both it and its model of the teacher are uncertain. In addition to this investigation, this paper introduces a new method to compute uncertainty for a deep RL agent using a secondary neural network. Our empirical results show that using dual uncertainties to drive advice collection and reuse may improve learning performance across several Atari games.
abstract_zh: 强化学习（RL）通过使用深度神经网络在解决许多具有挑战性的任务方面取得了巨大成功。尽管使用深度学习进行强化学习带来了巨大的表征能力，但它也导致了众所周知的样本效率低下的问题。这意味着这些算法需要大量数据，并且需要数百万个训练样本才能收敛到适当的策略。解决这个问题的一种方法是在师生框架中使用行动建议，由知识渊博的教师提供行动建议来帮助学生。这项工作考虑如何更好地利用学生何时应该寻求建议以及学生是否可以效仿老师减少寻求建议的不确定性。当学生不确定或当学生及其教师模型都不确定时，学生可以决定寻求建议。除了这项研究之外，本文还介绍了一种使用二级神经网络计算深度强化学习代理不确定性的新方法。我们的实证结果表明，使用双重不确定性来推动建议收集和重用可以提高多个 Atari 游戏的学习性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在深度强化学习中如何有效收集和复用专家建议，以提高样本效率。
AI.motivation: 深度强化学习面临样本效率低的问题，需大量数据才能收敛。通过教师-学生框架引入专家建议可缓解此问题，但需解决学生何时请求建议及如何建模教师的挑战。
AI.method: 提出基于双重不确定性的方法：学生在自身或对教师模型不确定时请求建议，并通过次级神经网络计算不确定性以驱动建议的收集与复用。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在多个Atari游戏中提升了学习性能，验证了双重不确定性机制的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合专家建议与不确定性估计，本文方法提高了深度强化学习的样本效率，为未来研究提供了新思路。

authors_text: Aysen Degerli,Fahad Sohrab,Serkan Kiranyaz,Moncef Gabbouj
title: Early Myocardial Infarction Detection with One-Class Classification over Multi-view Echocardiography
title_zh: 通过多视图超声心动图进行一类分类的早期心肌梗死检测
abstract: Myocardial infarction (MI) is the leading cause of mortality and morbidity in the world. Early therapeutics of MI can ensure the prevention of further myocardial necrosis. Echocardiography is the fundamental imaging technique that can reveal the earliest sign of MI. However, the scarcity of echocardiographic datasets for the MI detection is the major issue for training data-driven classification algorithms. In this study, we propose a framework for early detection of MI over multi-view echocardiography that leverages one-class classification (OCC) techniques. The OCC techniques are used to train a model for detecting a specific target class using instances from that particular category only. We investigated the usage of uni-modal and multi-modal one-class classification techniques in the proposed framework using the HMC-QU dataset that includes apical 4-chamber (A4C) and apical 2-chamber (A2C) views in a total of 260 echocardiography recordings. Experimental results show that the multi-modal approach achieves a sensitivity level of 85.23% and F1-Score of 80.21%.
summary: Myocardial infarction (MI) is the leading cause of mortality and morbidity in the world. Early therapeutics of MI can ensure the prevention of further myocardial necrosis. Echocardiography is the fundamental imaging technique that can reveal the earliest sign of MI. However, the scarcity of echocardiographic datasets for the MI detection is the major issue for training data-driven classification algorithms. In this study, we propose a framework for early detection of MI over multi-view echocardiography that leverages one-class classification (OCC) techniques. The OCC techniques are used to train a model for detecting a specific target class using instances from that particular category only. We investigated the usage of uni-modal and multi-modal one-class classification techniques in the proposed framework using the HMC-QU dataset that includes apical 4-chamber (A4C) and apical 2-chamber (A2C) views in a total of 260 echocardiography recordings. Experimental results show that the multi-modal approach achieves a sensitivity level of 85.23% and F1-Score of 80.21%.
abstract_zh: 心肌梗塞（MI）是世界范围内死亡和发病的主要原因。心肌梗死的早期治疗可以确保预防进一步的心肌坏死。超声心动图是可以揭示心肌梗死最早征兆的基本成像技术。然而，用于 MI 检测的超声心动图数据集的稀缺是训练数据驱动的分类算法的主要问题。在这项研究中，我们提出了一个通过多视图超声心动图早期检测 MI 的框架，该框架利用一类分类 (OCC) 技术。 OCC 技术用于训练模型，仅使用来自特定类别的实例来检测特定目标类别。我们使用 HMC-QU 数据集研究了所提出的框架中单模态和多模态一类分类技术的使用情况，该数据集包括总共 260 个超声心动图记录中的心尖 4 腔 (A4C) 和心尖 2 腔 (A2C) 视图。实验结果表明，多模态方法的灵敏度达到85.23%，F1-Score达到80.21%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多视角超声心动图和单类分类技术的早期心肌梗死检测框架。
AI.motivation: 心肌梗死是全球主要死因，早期检测可阻止心肌坏死。超声心动图能显示早期迹象，但数据稀缺导致分类算法训练困难。
AI.method: 利用单类分类（OCC）技术，结合单模态与多模态（A4C/A2C视角）超声心动图数据，构建MI检测框架并在HMC-QU数据集验证。
AI.result: 多模态方法达到85.23%灵敏度和80.21% F1-Score。
AI.conclusion: 多模态OCC框架有效提升MI检测性能，为数据稀缺场景提供新方法。

In this study, we propose a framework for early detection of MI over multi-view echocardiography that leverages one-class classification (OCC) techniques. The OCC techniques are used to train a model for detecting a specific target class using instances from that particular category only. We investigated the usage of uni-modal and multi-modal one-class classification techniques in the proposed framework using the HMC-QU dataset that includes apical 4-chamber (A4C) and apical 2-chamber (A2C) views in a total of 260 echocardiography recordings. Experimental results show that the multi-modal approach achieves a sensitivity level of 85.23% and F1-Score of 80.21%. 心肌梗塞（MI）是世界范围内死亡和发病的主要原因。心肌梗死的早期治疗可以确保预防进一步的心肌坏死。超声心动图是可以揭示心肌梗死最早征兆的基本成像技术。然而，用于 MI 检测的超声心动图数据集的稀缺是训练数据驱动的分类算法的主要问题。在这项研究中，我们提出了一个通过多视图超声心动图早期检测 MI 的框架，该框架利用一类分类 (OCC) 技术。 OCC 技术用于训练模型，仅使用来自特定类别的实例来检测特定目标类别。我们使用 HMC-QU 数据集研究了所提出的框架中单模态和多模态一类分类技术的使用情况，该数据集包括总共 260 个超声心动图记录中的心尖 4 腔 (A4C) 和心尖 2 腔 (A2C) 视图。实验结果表明，多模态方法的灵敏度达到85.23%，F1-Score达到80.21%。 本文提出一种基于多视角超声心动图和单类分类技术的早期心肌梗死检测框架。 Aysen Degerli,Fahad Sohrab,Serkan Kiranyaz,Moncef Gabbouj eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Alexander Meulemans,Matilde Tristany Farinha,Maria R. Cervera,João Sacramento,Benjamin F. Grewe
title: Minimizing Control for Credit Assignment with Strong Feedback
title_zh: 通过强有力的反馈最小化对信用分配的控制
abstract: The success of deep learning ignited interest in whether the brain learns hierarchical representations using gradient-based learning. However, current biologically plausible methods for gradient-based credit assignment in deep neural networks need infinitesimally small feedback signals, which is problematic in biologically realistic noisy environments and at odds with experimental evidence in neuroscience showing that top-down feedback can significantly influence neural activity. Building upon deep feedback control (DFC), a recently proposed credit assignment method, we combine strong feedback influences on neural activity with gradient-based learning and show that this naturally leads to a novel view on neural network optimization. Instead of gradually changing the network weights towards configurations with low output loss, weight updates gradually minimize the amount of feedback required from a controller that drives the network to the supervised output label. Moreover, we show that the use of strong feedback in DFC allows learning forward and feedback connections simultaneously, using learning rules fully local in space and time. We complement our theoretical results with experiments on standard computer-vision benchmarks, showing competitive performance to backpropagation as well as robustness to noise. Overall, our work presents a fundamentally novel view of learning as control minimization, while sidestepping biologically unrealistic assumptions.
summary: The success of deep learning ignited interest in whether the brain learns hierarchical representations using gradient-based learning. However, current biologically plausible methods for gradient-based credit assignment in deep neural networks need infinitesimally small feedback signals, which is problematic in biologically realistic noisy environments and at odds with experimental evidence in neuroscience showing that top-down feedback can significantly influence neural activity. Building upon deep feedback control (DFC), a recently proposed credit assignment method, we combine strong feedback influences on neural activity with gradient-based learning and show that this naturally leads to a novel view on neural network optimization. Instead of gradually changing the network weights towards configurations with low output loss, weight updates gradually minimize the amount of feedback required from a controller that drives the network to the supervised output label. Moreover, we show that the use of strong feedback in DFC allows learning forward and feedback connections simultaneously, using learning rules fully local in space and time. We complement our theoretical results with experiments on standard computer-vision benchmarks, showing competitive performance to backpropagation as well as robustness to noise. Overall, our work presents a fundamentally novel view of learning as control minimization, while sidestepping biologically unrealistic assumptions.
abstract_zh: 深度学习的成功引发了人们对大脑是否使用基于梯度的学习来学习分层表示的兴趣。然而，当前在深度神经网络中基于梯度的信用分配的生物学上合理的方法需要无限小的反馈信号，这在生物学上现实的噪声环境中是有问题的，并且与神经科学中表明自上而下的反馈可以显着影响神经活动的实验证据相矛盾。基于深度反馈控制（DFC）（最近提出的一种信用分配方法），我们将对神经活动的强反馈影响与基​​于梯度的学习相结合，并表明这自然会带来关于神经网络优化的新颖观点。权重更新不是逐渐将网络权重更改为具有低输出损失的配置，而是逐渐最小化将网络驱动到受监督输出标签的控制器所需的反馈量。此外，我们表明，在 DFC 中使用强反馈允许同时学习前向和反馈连接，使用空间和时间上完全局部的学习规则。我们通过标准计算机视觉基准的实验来补充我们的理论结果，显示出反向传播的竞争性能以及对噪声的鲁棒性。总的来说，我们的工作提出了一种全新的学习观点，即控制最小化，同时回避了生物学上不切实际的假设。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于强反馈的深度反馈控制（DFC）方法，通过最小化控制器反馈来实现神经网络的信用分配，同时保持生物合理性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于梯度的信用分配方法需要极小的反馈信号，这与生物系统中的噪声环境和神经科学实验结果矛盾，亟需一种更符合生物特性的学习机制。
AI.method: 结合强反馈与梯度学习，通过控制器驱动网络达到监督标签，同时学习前馈和反馈连接，使用时空局部的学习规则。
AI.result: 在标准计算机视觉基准上表现与反向传播相当，且对噪声具有鲁棒性，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出了学习作为控制最小化的全新视角，避免了生物不合理的假设，为神经网络优化提供了理论和实践支持。
