authors_text: Jordan J. Bird
title: Robotic and Generative Adversarial Attacks in Offline Writer-independent Signature Verification
title_zh: 离线作者独立签名验证中的机器人和生成对抗攻击
abstract: This study explores how robots and generative approaches can be used to mount successful false-acceptance adversarial attacks on signature verification systems. Initially, a convolutional neural network topology and data augmentation strategy are explored and tuned, producing an 87.12% accurate model for the verification of 2,640 human signatures. Two robots are then tasked with forging 50 signatures, where 25 are used for the verification attack, and the remaining 25 are used for tuning of the model to defend against them. Adversarial attacks on the system show that there exists an information security risk; the Line-us robotic arm can fool the system 24% of the time and the iDraw 2.0 robot 32% of the time. A conditional GAN finds similar success, with around 30% forged signatures misclassified as genuine. Following fine-tune transfer learning of robotic and generative data, adversarial attacks are reduced below the model threshold by both robots and the GAN. It is observed that tuning the model reduces the risk of attack by robots to 8% and 12%, and that conditional generative adversarial attacks can be reduced to 4% when 25 images are presented and 5% when 1000 images are presented.
summary: This study explores how robots and generative approaches can be used to mount successful false-acceptance adversarial attacks on signature verification systems. Initially, a convolutional neural network topology and data augmentation strategy are explored and tuned, producing an 87.12% accurate model for the verification of 2,640 human signatures. Two robots are then tasked with forging 50 signatures, where 25 are used for the verification attack, and the remaining 25 are used for tuning of the model to defend against them. Adversarial attacks on the system show that there exists an information security risk; the Line-us robotic arm can fool the system 24% of the time and the iDraw 2.0 robot 32% of the time. A conditional GAN finds similar success, with around 30% forged signatures misclassified as genuine. Following fine-tune transfer learning of robotic and generative data, adversarial attacks are reduced below the model threshold by both robots and the GAN. It is observed that tuning the model reduces the risk of attack by robots to 8% and 12%, and that conditional generative adversarial attacks can be reduced to 4% when 25 images are presented and 5% when 1000 images are presented.
abstract_zh: 本研究探讨了如何使用机器人和生成方法对签名验证系统发起成功的错误接受对抗攻击。最初，我们探索并调整了卷积神经网络拓扑和数据增强策略，生成了用于验证 2,640 个人类签名的准确率达 87.12% 的模型。然后，两个机器人的任务是伪造 50 个签名，其中 25 个用于验证攻击，其余 25 个用于调整模型以防御攻击。对系统的对抗性攻击表明存在信息安全风险； Line-us 机械臂可以在 24% 的时间欺骗系统，iDraw 2.0 机器人可以在 32% 的时间欺骗系统。条件 GAN 也取得了类似的成功，大约 30% 的伪造签名被错误地分类为真实签名。在对机器人和生成数据的迁移学习进行微调之后，机器人和 GAN 的对抗性攻击都减少到模型阈值以下。据观察，调整模型可将机器人攻击的风险降低至 8% 和 12%，当呈现 25 张图像时，条件生成对抗攻击可降低至 4%，当呈现 1000 张图像时，条件生成对抗攻击可降低至 5%。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了如何利用机器人和生成对抗网络对离线签名验证系统发起虚假接受攻击。
AI.motivation: 签名验证系统在信息安全中扮演重要角色，但其可能受到机器人和生成对抗网络的攻击，因此需要评估和增强其安全性。
AI.method: 研究首先使用卷积神经网络和数据增强策略构建了一个高准确率的签名验证模型，随后使用机器人和生成对抗网络生成伪造签名，并测试其对系统的攻击效果，最后通过微调模型来防御这些攻击。
AI.result: Line-us机器人和iDraw 2.0机器人分别有24%和32%的攻击成功率，条件生成对抗网络的攻击成功率约为30%。经过微调后，机器人攻击成功率降至8%和12%，生成对抗网络攻击成功率降至4%（25张图像）和5%（1000张图像）。
AI.conclusion: 通过微调模型可以有效降低机器人和生成对抗网络对签名验证系统的攻击风险，提高系统的安全性。

authors_text: Rabab Abdelfattah,Xiaofeng Wang,Song Wang
title: PLGAN: Generative Adversarial Networks for Power-Line Segmentation in Aerial Images
title_zh: PLGAN：用于航空图像中电力线分割的生成对抗网络
abstract: Accurate segmentation of power lines in various aerial images is very important for UAV flight safety. The complex background and very thin structures of power lines, however, make it an inherently difficult task in computer vision. This paper presents PLGAN, a simple yet effective method based on generative adversarial networks, to segment power lines from aerial images with different backgrounds. Instead of directly using the adversarial networks to generate the segmentation, we take their certain decoding features and embed them into another semantic segmentation network by considering more context, geometry, and appearance information of power lines. We further exploit the appropriate form of the generated images for high-quality feature embedding and define a new loss function in the Hough-transform parameter space to enhance the segmentation of very thin power lines. Extensive experiments and comprehensive analysis demonstrate that our proposed PLGAN outperforms the prior state-of-the-art methods for semantic segmentation and line detection.
summary: Accurate segmentation of power lines in various aerial images is very important for UAV flight safety. The complex background and very thin structures of power lines, however, make it an inherently difficult task in computer vision. This paper presents PLGAN, a simple yet effective method based on generative adversarial networks, to segment power lines from aerial images with different backgrounds. Instead of directly using the adversarial networks to generate the segmentation, we take their certain decoding features and embed them into another semantic segmentation network by considering more context, geometry, and appearance information of power lines. We further exploit the appropriate form of the generated images for high-quality feature embedding and define a new loss function in the Hough-transform parameter space to enhance the segmentation of very thin power lines. Extensive experiments and comprehensive analysis demonstrate that our proposed PLGAN outperforms the prior state-of-the-art methods for semantic segmentation and line detection.
abstract_zh: 各种航拍图像中电力线的准确分割对于无人机飞行安全非常重要。然而，电力线复杂的背景和非常细的结构使其成为计算机视觉中一项本质上困难的任务。本文提出了 PLGAN，这是一种基于生成对抗网络的简单而有效的方法，用于从不同背景的航空图像中分割电力线。我们没有直接使用对抗网络来生成分割，而是通过考虑更多的上下文、几何形状和电力线的外观信息，将其某些解码特征嵌入到另一个语义分割网络中。我们进一步利用生成图像的适当形式进行高质量特征嵌入，并在霍夫变换参数空间中定义新的损失函数，以增强非常细的电力线的分割。大量的实验和综合分析表明，我们提出的 PLGAN 优于先前最先进的语义分割和线条检测方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PLGAN，一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的方法，用于从不同背景的航拍图像中分割电力线路。
AI.motivation: 电力线路在航拍图像中的分割对无人机飞行安全至关重要，但其复杂背景和极细结构使得分割任务极具挑战性。
AI.method: 通过提取GAN的解码特征并结合电力线路的上下文、几何和外观信息嵌入语义分割网络，同时定义基于霍夫变换参数空间的新损失函数以增强细线分割。
AI.result: 实验表明，PLGAN在语义分割和线检测任务上优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: PLGAN通过融合GAN特征与多模态信息，有效解决了复杂背景下电力线路分割的难题。

authors_text: Sijia Wang,Mo Yu,Lifu Huang
title: The Art of Prompting: Event Detection based on Type Specific Prompts
title_zh: 提示的艺术：基于特定类型提示的事件检测
abstract: We compare various forms of prompts to represent event types and develop a unified framework to incorporate the event type specific prompts for supervised, few-shot, and zero-shot event detection. The experimental results demonstrate that a well-defined and comprehensive event type prompt can significantly improve the performance of event detection, especially when the annotated data is scarce (few-shot event detection) or not available (zero-shot event detection). By leveraging the semantics of event types, our unified framework shows up to 24.3\% F-score gain over the previous state-of-the-art baselines.
summary: We compare various forms of prompts to represent event types and develop a unified framework to incorporate the event type specific prompts for supervised, few-shot, and zero-shot event detection. The experimental results demonstrate that a well-defined and comprehensive event type prompt can significantly improve the performance of event detection, especially when the annotated data is scarce (few-shot event detection) or not available (zero-shot event detection). By leveraging the semantics of event types, our unified framework shows up to 24.3\% F-score gain over the previous state-of-the-art baselines.
abstract_zh: 我们比较了表示事件类型的各种形式的提示，并开发了一个统一的框架来合并事件类型特定的提示，以进行监督、少样本和零样本事件检测。实验结果表明，定义明确且全面的事件类型提示可以显着提高事件检测的性能，特别是当注释数据稀缺（少样本事件检测）或不可用（零样本事件检测）时。通过利用事件类型的语义，我们的统一框架比之前最先进的基线显示出高达 24.3% 的 F 分数增益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于类型特定提示的统一框架，用于提升监督、少样本和零样本场景下的事件检测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统事件检测方法在标注数据稀缺或完全缺失时表现不佳，需探索利用事件类型语义信息以提升模型泛化能力。
AI.method: 通过比较不同形式的事件类型提示，构建统一框架将类型特定提示嵌入检测流程，适配多种数据条件。
AI.result: 在少样本和零样本场景下，模型F分数较先前最佳方法提升最高达24.3%。
AI.conclusion: 类型特定提示能有效增强事件检测模型的语义理解能力，尤其在数据受限场景下展现显著优势。

authors_text: David Rau,Jaap Kamps
title: How Different are Pre-trained Transformers for Text Ranking?
title_zh: 用于文本排名的预训练 Transformer 有什么不同？
abstract: In recent years, large pre-trained transformers have led to substantial gains in performance over traditional retrieval models and feedback approaches. However, these results are primarily based on the MS Marco/TREC Deep Learning Track setup, with its very particular setup, and our understanding of why and how these models work better is fragmented at best. We analyze effective BERT-based cross-encoders versus traditional BM25 ranking for the passage retrieval task where the largest gains have been observed, and investigate two main questions. On the one hand, what is similar? To what extent does the neural ranker already encompass the capacity of traditional rankers? Is the gain in performance due to a better ranking of the same documents (prioritizing precision)? On the other hand, what is different? Can it retrieve effectively documents missed by traditional systems (prioritizing recall)? We discover substantial differences in the notion of relevance identifying strengths and weaknesses of BERT that may inspire research for future improvement. Our results contribute to our understanding of (black-box) neural rankers relative to (well-understood) traditional rankers, help understand the particular experimental setting of MS-Marco-based test collections.
summary: In recent years, large pre-trained transformers have led to substantial gains in performance over traditional retrieval models and feedback approaches. However, these results are primarily based on the MS Marco/TREC Deep Learning Track setup, with its very particular setup, and our understanding of why and how these models work better is fragmented at best. We analyze effective BERT-based cross-encoders versus traditional BM25 ranking for the passage retrieval task where the largest gains have been observed, and investigate two main questions. On the one hand, what is similar? To what extent does the neural ranker already encompass the capacity of traditional rankers? Is the gain in performance due to a better ranking of the same documents (prioritizing precision)? On the other hand, what is different? Can it retrieve effectively documents missed by traditional systems (prioritizing recall)? We discover substantial differences in the notion of relevance identifying strengths and weaknesses of BERT that may inspire research for future improvement. Our results contribute to our understanding of (black-box) neural rankers relative to (well-understood) traditional rankers, help understand the particular experimental setting of MS-Marco-based test collections.
abstract_zh: 近年来，大型预训练 Transformer 比传统检索模型和反馈方法在性能上有了显着提升。然而，这些结果主要基于 MS Marco/TREC 深度学习轨道设置，其设置非常特殊，而我们对这些模型为何以及如何更好地工作的理解充其量是支离破碎的。我们分析了基于 BERT 的有效交叉编码器与传统 BM25 排名的段落检索任务，其中观察到了最大的收益，并调查了两个主要问题。一方面，有什么相似之处？神经排序器在多大程度上已经涵盖了传统排序器的能力？性能的提升是否是由于对相同文档进行了更好的排名（优先考虑精度）？另一方面，有什么不同呢？它能否有效检索传统系统遗漏的文档（优先召回）？我们发现在识别 BERT 优缺点的相关性概念上存在显着差异，这可能会激发未来改进的研究。我们的结果有助于我们对（黑盒）神经排序器相对于（充分理解的）传统排序器的理解，有助于理解基于 MS-Marco 的测试集合的特定实验设置。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了预训练Transformer（如BERT）与传统BM25在文本排序任务中的差异，分析其在召回率和精确率上的表现及优缺点。
AI.motivation: 尽管预训练Transformer在文本排序中表现优异，但其优势来源及与传统方法的差异尚不明确，需深入分析以提升理解。
AI.method: 通过对比BERT-based cross-encoders与BM25在文档排序任务中的表现，分析其在精确率（召回相同文档）和召回率（发现新文档）上的差异。
AI.result: 发现BERT在相关性判断上与传统方法存在显著差异，揭示了其优势（如更高精确率）和不足（如召回率局限），并解释了MS-Marco数据集的特殊性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究深化了对神经排序器（如BERT）与传统方法差异的理解，为优化模型设计和实验设置提供了理论依据。

Can it retrieve effectively documents missed by traditional systems (prioritizing recall)? Our results contribute to our understanding of (black-box) neural rankers relative to (well-understood) traditional rankers, help understand the particular experimental setting of MS-Marco-based test collections. 近年来，大型预训练 Transformer 比传统检索模型和反馈方法在性能上有了显着提升。然而，这些结果主要基于 MS Marco/TREC 深度学习轨道设置，其设置非常特殊，而我们对这些模型为何以及如何更好地工作的理解充其量是支离破碎的。我们分析了基于 BERT 的有效交叉编码器与传统 BM25 排名的段落检索任务，其中观察到了最大的收益，并调查了两个主要问题。一方面，有什么相似之处？神经排序器在多大程度上已经涵盖了传统排序器的能力？性能的提升是否是由于对相同文档进行了更好的排名（优先考虑精度）？另一方面，有什么不同呢？它能否有效检索传统系统遗漏的文档（优先召回）？我们发现在识别 BERT 优缺点的相关性概念上存在显着差异，这可能会激发未来改进的研究。我们的结果有助于我们对（黑盒）神经排序器相对于（充分理解的）传统排序器的理解，有助于理解基于 MS-Marco 的测试集合的特定实验设置。 本文比较了预训练Transformer（如BERT）与传统BM25在文本排序任务中的差异，分析其在召回率和精确率上的表现及优缺点。 David Rau,Jaap Kamps cs.IR,cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Cong Zhang,Huinan Zeng,Huang Liu,Jiewen Zheng
title: Applying Feature Underspecified Lexicon Phonological Features in Multilingual Text-to-Speech
title_zh: 在多语言文本转语音中应用未指定词典语音特征
comment: submitted to Interspeech 2022. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2110.03609
comments: submitted to Interspeech 2022. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2110.03609
abstract: This study investigates whether the phonological features derived from the Featurally Underspecified Lexicon model can be applied in text-to-speech systems to generate native and non-native speech in English and Mandarin. We present a mapping of ARPABET/pinyin to SAMPA/SAMPA-SC and then to phonological features. This mapping was tested for whether it could lead to the successful generation of native, non-native, and code-switched speech in the two languages. We ran two experiments, one with a small dataset and one with a larger dataset. The results supported that phonological features could be used as a feasible input system for languages in or not in the train data, although further investigation is needed to improve model performance. The results lend support to FUL by presenting successfully synthesised output, and by having the output carrying a source-language accent when synthesising a language not in the training data. The TTS process stimulated human second language acquisition process and thus also confirm FUL's ability to account for acquisition.
summary: This study investigates whether the phonological features derived from the Featurally Underspecified Lexicon model can be applied in text-to-speech systems to generate native and non-native speech in English and Mandarin. We present a mapping of ARPABET/pinyin to SAMPA/SAMPA-SC and then to phonological features. This mapping was tested for whether it could lead to the successful generation of native, non-native, and code-switched speech in the two languages. We ran two experiments, one with a small dataset and one with a larger dataset. The results supported that phonological features could be used as a feasible input system for languages in or not in the train data, although further investigation is needed to improve model performance. The results lend support to FUL by presenting successfully synthesised output, and by having the output carrying a source-language accent when synthesising a language not in the training data. The TTS process stimulated human second language acquisition process and thus also confirm FUL's ability to account for acquisition.
abstract_zh: 本研究调查了源自特征未指定词典模型的语音特征是否可以应用于文本转语音系统，以生成英语和普通话的母语和非母语语音。我们提出了 ARPABET/拼音到 SAMPA/SAMPA-SC 以及音韵特征的映射。测试了这种映射是否可以成功生成两种语言的母语、非母语和语码转换语音。我们进行了两项实验，一项使用较小的数据集，另一项使用较大的数据集。结果表明，语音特征可以用作训练数据中或非训练数据中语言的可行输入系统，尽管需要进一步研究以提高模型性能。结果通过呈现成功合成的输出以及在合成不在训练数据中的语言时使输出带有源语言口音来为 FUL 提供支持。 TTS 过程刺激了人类第二语言习得过程，因此也证实了 FUL 解释习得的能力。

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨将Featurally Underspecified Lexicon模型的语音特征应用于多语言文本到语音系统，以生成英语和普通话的本族语及非本族语语音。
AI.motivation: 旨在验证语音特征能否作为跨语言TTS的通用输入系统，提升对未登录词及多语言混合语音的生成能力。
AI.method: 构建ARPABET/pinyin到SAMPA/SAMPA-SC的映射规则，并转化为语音特征；通过小数据集与大数据集实验验证特征映射的有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明语音特征可支持生成训练数据外的语言语音，且输出保留源语言口音，验证了FUL模型在语言习得模拟中的潜力。
AI.conclusion: FUL模型的语音特征为多语言TTS提供了可行方案，同时其生成机制与人类二语习得过程存在关联性，需进一步优化模型性能。

authors_text: Yansong Gao,Jie Zhang
title: On Scheduling Mechanisms Beyond the Worst Case
title_zh: 论超越最坏情况的调度机制
abstract: The problem of scheduling unrelated machines has been studied since the inception of algorithmic mechanism design \cite{NR99}. It is a resource allocation problem that entails assigning $m$ tasks to $n$ machines for execution. Machines are regarded as strategic agents who may lie about their execution costs so as to minimize their allocated workload. To address the situation when monetary payment is not an option to compensate the machines' costs, \citeauthor{DBLP:journals/mst/Koutsoupias14} [2014] devised two \textit{truthful} mechanisms, K and P respectively, that achieve an approximation ratio of $\frac{n+1}{2}$ and $n$, for social cost minimization. In addition, no truthful mechanism can achieve an approximation ratio better than $\frac{n+1}{2}$. Hence, mechanism K is optimal. While approximation ratio provides a strong worst-case guarantee, it also limits us to a comprehensive understanding of mechanism performance on various inputs. This paper investigates these two scheduling mechanisms beyond the worst case. We first show that mechanism K achieves a smaller social cost than mechanism P on every input. That is, mechanism K is pointwise better than mechanism P. Next, for each task $j$, when machines' execution costs $t_i^j$ are independent and identically drawn from a task-specific distribution $F^j(t)$, we show that the average-case approximation ratio of mechanism K converges to a constant. This bound is tight for mechanism K. For a better understanding of this distribution dependent constant, on the one hand, we estimate its value by plugging in a few common distributions; on the other, we show that this converging bound improves a known bound \cite{DBLP:conf/aaai/Zhang18} which only captures the single-task setting. Last, we find that the average-case approximation ratio of mechanism P converges to the same constant.
summary: The problem of scheduling unrelated machines has been studied since the inception of algorithmic mechanism design \cite{NR99}. It is a resource allocation problem that entails assigning $m$ tasks to $n$ machines for execution. Machines are regarded as strategic agents who may lie about their execution costs so as to minimize their allocated workload. To address the situation when monetary payment is not an option to compensate the machines' costs, \citeauthor{DBLP:journals/mst/Koutsoupias14} [2014] devised two \textit{truthful} mechanisms, K and P respectively, that achieve an approximation ratio of $\frac{n+1}{2}$ and $n$, for social cost minimization. In addition, no truthful mechanism can achieve an approximation ratio better than $\frac{n+1}{2}$. Hence, mechanism K is optimal. While approximation ratio provides a strong worst-case guarantee, it also limits us to a comprehensive understanding of mechanism performance on various inputs. This paper investigates these two scheduling mechanisms beyond the worst case. We first show that mechanism K achieves a smaller social cost than mechanism P on every input. That is, mechanism K is pointwise better than mechanism P. Next, for each task $j$, when machines' execution costs $t_i^j$ are independent and identically drawn from a task-specific distribution $F^j(t)$, we show that the average-case approximation ratio of mechanism K converges to a constant. This bound is tight for mechanism K. For a better understanding of this distribution dependent constant, on the one hand, we estimate its value by plugging in a few common distributions; on the other, we show that this converging bound improves a known bound \cite{DBLP:conf/aaai/Zhang18} which only captures the single-task setting. Last, we find that the average-case approximation ratio of mechanism P converges to the same constant.
abstract_zh: 自算法机制设计开始以来，调度不相关机器的问题就一直在研究\cite{NR99}。这是一个资源分配问题，需要将 $m$ 个任务分配给 $n$ 个机器来执行。机器被视为战略代理，它们可能会谎报其执行成本，以尽量减少分配的工作量。为了解决货币支付无法补偿机器成本的情况，\citeauthor{DBLP:journals/mst/Koutsoupias14} [2014] 设计了两种 \textit{truthful} 机制，分别为 K 和 P，实现了 $\frac{n+1}{2}$ 和 $n$ 的近似比率，以实现社会成本最小化。此外，没有任何真实的机制可以实现比 $\frac{n+1}{2}$ 更好的近似率。因此，机制 K 是最优的。虽然近似比提供了强有力的最坏情况保证，但它也限制了我们对各种输入的机制性能的全面理解。本文超越最坏情况研究了这两种调度机制。我们首先表明机制 K 在每个投入上都比机制 P 实现了更小的社会成本。也就是说，机制 K 逐点优于机制 P。接下来，对于每个任务 $j$，当机器的执行成本 $t_i^j$ 独立且相同地从任务特定分布 $F^j(t)$ 中得出时，我们表明机制 K 的平均情况近似率收敛于常数。这个界限对于机制 K 来说是紧的。为了更好地理解这个分布相关常数，一方面，我们通过插入一些常见的分布来估计它的值；另一方面，我们通过插入一些常见的分布来估计它的值。另一方面，我们表明这种收敛边界改进了已知边界\cite{DBLP:conf/aaai/Zhang18}，它仅捕获单任务设置。最后，我们发现机制 P 的平均情况近似率收敛到相同的常数。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在非最坏情况下调度机制K和P的性能，比较其社会成本和平均近似比。
AI.motivation: 传统最坏情况下的近似比无法全面反映调度机制在不同输入下的表现，需探索更细致的分析方法。
AI.method: 通过理论分析比较机制K和P的社会成本，利用平均情况近似比分析并结合常见分布估算收敛常数。
AI.result: 机制K在所有输入下优于P；其平均近似比收敛于一个与分布相关的常数，且该界对K是紧的；P的平均近似比收敛于相同常数。
AI.conclusion: 机制K在最坏和平均情况下均表现最优，平均情况分析为调度机制设计提供了更全面的评估视角。

authors_text: Sameera Horawalavithana,Ellyn Ayton,Anastasiya Usenko,Shivam Sharma,Jasmine Eshun,Robin Cosbey,Maria Glenski,Svitlana Volkova
title: EXPERT: Public Benchmarks for Dynamic Heterogeneous Academic Graphs
title_zh: 专家：动态异构学术图的公共基准
abstract: Machine learning models that learn from dynamic graphs face nontrivial challenges in learning and inference as both nodes and edges change over time. The existing large-scale graph benchmark datasets that are widely used by the community primarily focus on homogeneous node and edge attributes and are static. In this work, we present a variety of large scale, dynamic heterogeneous academic graphs to test the effectiveness of models developed for multi-step graph forecasting tasks. Our novel datasets cover both context and content information extracted from scientific publications across two communities: Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Nuclear Nonproliferation (NN). In addition, we propose a systematic approach to improve the existing evaluation procedures used in the graph forecasting models.
summary: Machine learning models that learn from dynamic graphs face nontrivial challenges in learning and inference as both nodes and edges change over time. The existing large-scale graph benchmark datasets that are widely used by the community primarily focus on homogeneous node and edge attributes and are static. In this work, we present a variety of large scale, dynamic heterogeneous academic graphs to test the effectiveness of models developed for multi-step graph forecasting tasks. Our novel datasets cover both context and content information extracted from scientific publications across two communities: Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Nuclear Nonproliferation (NN). In addition, we propose a systematic approach to improve the existing evaluation procedures used in the graph forecasting models.
abstract_zh: 从动态图学习的机器学习模型在学习和推理方面面临着不小的挑战，因为节点和边都会随着时间的推移而变化。现有的社区广泛使用的大规模图基准数据集主要关注同质节点和边属性，并且是静态的。在这项工作中，我们提出了各种大规模的动态异构学术图来测试为多步骤图预测任务开发的模型的有效性。我们的新颖数据集涵盖了从人工智能 (AI) 和核不扩散 (NN) 这两个领域的科学出版物中提取的背景信息和内容信息。此外，我们提出了一种系统方法来改进图预测模型中使用的现有评估程序。

AI.tldr: 本文提出EXPERT基准数据集，用于评估动态异构学术图的多步骤图预测模型。
AI.motivation: 现有图基准数据集多为静态且同质属性，难以满足动态变化和异构信息场景下的模型评估需求。
AI.method: 构建涵盖AI与核不扩散领域科学出版物的动态异构图，提取上下文与内容信息，并设计系统化的评估改进方法。
AI.result: 发布EXPERT数据集及改进的评估流程，为动态异构图预测任务提供标准化测试基准。
AI.conclusion: EXPERT数据集和评估方法可有效推动动态异构图模型的研究与优化。

authors_text: Ronitt Rubinfeld,Arsen Vasilyan
title: Testing distributional assumptions of learning algorithms
title_zh: 测试学习算法的分布假设
abstract: There are many high dimensional function classes that have fast agnostic learning algorithms when assumptions on the distribution of examples can be made, such as Gaussianity or uniformity over the domain. But how can one be confident that data indeed satisfies such assumption, so that one can trust in output quality of the agnostic learning algorithm? We propose a model by which to systematically study the design of tester-learner pairs $(\mathcal{A},\mathcal{T})$, such that if the distribution on examples in the data passes the tester $\mathcal{T}$ then one can safely trust the output of the agnostic learner $\mathcal{A}$ on the data. To demonstrate the power of the model, we apply it to the classical problem of agnostically learning halfspaces under the standard Gaussian distribution and present a tester-learner pair with combined run-time of $n^{\tilde{O}(1/ε^4)}$. This qualitatively matches that of the best known ordinary agnostic learning algorithms for this task. In contrast, finite sample Gaussianity testers do not exist for the $L_1$ and EMD distance measures. A key step is to show that half-spaces are well-approximated with low-degree polynomials relative to distributions with low-degree moments close to those of a Gaussian. We also go beyond spherically-symmetric distributions, and give a tester-learner pair for halfspaces under the uniform distribution on $\{0,1\}^n$ with combined run-time of $n^{\tilde{O}(1/ε^4)}$. This is achieved using polynomial approximation theory and critical index machinery. We also show there exist some well-studied settings where $2^{\tilde{O}(\sqrt{n})}$ run-time agnostic learning algorithms are available, yet the combined run-times of tester-learner pairs must be as high as $2^{Ω(n)}$. On that account, the design of tester-learner pairs is a research direction in its own right independent of standard agnostic learning.

But how can one be confident that data indeed satisfies such assumption, so that one can trust in output quality of the agnostic learning algorithm? We propose a model by which to systematically study the design of tester-learner pairs $(\mathcal{A},\mathcal{T})$, such that if the distribution on examples in the data passes the tester $\mathcal{T}$ then one can safely trust the output of the agnostic learner $\mathcal{A}$ on the data. To demonstrate the power of the model, we apply it to the classical problem of agnostically learning halfspaces under the standard Gaussian distribution and present a tester-learner pair with combined run-time of $n^{\tilde{O}(1/ε^4)}$. This qualitatively matches that of the best known ordinary agnostic learning algorithms for this task. In contrast, finite sample Gaussianity testers do not exist for the $L_1$ and EMD distance measures. A key step is to show that half-spaces are well-approximated with low-degree polynomials relative to distributions with low-degree moments close to those of a Gaussian. We also go beyond spherically-symmetric distributions, and give a tester-learner pair for halfspaces under the uniform distribution on $\{0,1\}^n$ with combined run-time of $n^{\tilde{O}(1/ε^4)}$. This is achieved using polynomial approximation theory and critical index machinery. We also show there exist some well-studied settings where $2^{\tilde{O}(\sqrt{n})}$ run-time agnostic learning algorithms are available, yet the combined run-times of tester-learner pairs must be as high as $2^{Ω(n)}$. On that account, the design of tester-learner pairs is a research direction in its own right independent of standard agnostic learning.
abstract_zh: 当可以对示例的分布做出假设时，例如域上的高斯性或均匀性，许多高维函数类具有快速的不可知学习算法。但是，如何才能确信数据确实满足这一假设，从而可以信任不可知学习算法的输出质量呢？我们提出了一种模型，通过该模型系统地研究测试者-学习者对 $(\mathcal{A},\mathcal{T})$ 的设计，这样，如果数据中示例的分布通过了测试者 $\mathcal{T}$，那么人们就可以安全地信任不可知学习者 $\mathcal{A}$ 在数据上的输出。为了证明该模型的强大功能，我们将其应用于标准高斯分布下不可知学习半空间的经典问题，并提出了一个测试者-学习者对，其组合运行时间为 $n^{\tilde{O}(1/ε^4)}$。这在质量上与该任务中最著名的普通不可知学习算法相匹配。相比之下，$L_1$ 和 EMD 距离测量不存在有限样本高斯性测试器。关键的一步是证明半空间可以用低次多项式很好地逼近，相对于低次矩接近高斯分布的分布。我们还超越了球对称分布，并给出了 $\{0,1\}^n$ 上均匀分布下半空间的测试者-学习者对，组合运行时间为 $n^{\tilde{O}(1/ε^4)}$。这是使用多项式逼近理论和临界指数机制来实现的。我们还表明，存在一些经过充分研究的设置，其中 $2^{\tilde{O}(\sqrt{n})}$ 运行时间不可知的学习算法可用，但测试器-学习器对的组合运行时间必须高达 $2^{Ω(n)}$。因此，测试者-学习者对的设计本身就是一个独立于标准不可知学习的研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种系统化研究测试器-学习器对（Tester-Learner Pair）的模型，以验证数据是否满足学习算法所需的分布假设，从而确保输出结果的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 许多高效学习算法依赖于数据分布的假设（如高斯分布或均匀分布），但缺乏验证这些假设的系统方法，导致无法信任算法输出质量。
AI.method: 设计测试器-学习器对（A,T），当数据通过测试器T时，可安全使用学习器A进行学习；利用多项式逼近理论和关键指数技术，针对高斯分布和均匀分布下的半空间问题进行分析。
AI.result: 为高斯分布和均匀分布下的半空间问题构造了运行时间为n^~O(1/ε⁴)的测试器-学习器对，且在某些场景下测试器-学习器对的运行时复杂度需达到2^Ω(n)。
AI.conclusion: 测试器-学习器对的设计是独立于传统学习算法的研究方向，验证分布假设的可靠性对提升学习算法可信度至关重要。

authors_text: Vivek Shankar Varadharajan,Sepand Dyanatkar,Giovanni Beltrame
title: Hierarchical Control of Smart Particle Swarms
title_zh: 智能粒子群的分级控制
abstract: We present a method for the control of robot swarms using two subsets of robots: a larger group of simple, oblivious robots (which we call the workers) that is governed by simple local attraction forces, and a smaller group (the guides) with sufficient mission knowledge to create and displace a desired worker formation by operating on the local forces of the workers. The guides coordinate to shape the workers like smart particles by changing their interaction parameters. We study the approach with a large scale experiment in a physics based simulator with up to 5000 robots forming three different patterns. Our experiments reveal that the approach scales well with increasing robot numbers, and presents little pattern distortion. We evaluate the approach on a physical swarm of robots that use visual inertial odometry to compute their relative positions and obtain results that are comparable with simulation. This work lays the foundation for designing and coordinating configurable smart particles, with applications in smart materials and nanomedicine.
summary: We present a method for the control of robot swarms using two subsets of robots: a larger group of simple, oblivious robots (which we call the workers) that is governed by simple local attraction forces, and a smaller group (the guides) with sufficient mission knowledge to create and displace a desired worker formation by operating on the local forces of the workers. The guides coordinate to shape the workers like smart particles by changing their interaction parameters. We study the approach with a large scale experiment in a physics based simulator with up to 5000 robots forming three different patterns. Our experiments reveal that the approach scales well with increasing robot numbers, and presents little pattern distortion. We evaluate the approach on a physical swarm of robots that use visual inertial odometry to compute their relative positions and obtain results that are comparable with simulation. This work lays the foundation for designing and coordinating configurable smart particles, with applications in smart materials and nanomedicine.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种使用两个机器人子集来控制机器人群的方法：一大群简单的、不经意的机器人（我们称之为工人），由简单的局部吸引力控制；以及一小群（向导），具有足够的任务知识，可以通过对工人的局部力量进行操作来创建和取代所需的工人编队。这些指南通过改变交互参数来协调工作人员，将其塑造成智能粒子。我们在基于物理的模拟器中进行了大规模实验来研究该方法，其中多达 5000 个机器人形成了三种不同的模式。我们的实验表明，该方法可以随着机器人数量的增加而很好地扩展，并且几乎不会出现模式失真。我们在一群物理机器人上评估了该方法，这些机器人使用视觉惯性里程计来计算它们的相对位置，并获得与模拟相当的结果。这项工作为设计和协调可配置智能粒子及其在智能材料和纳米医学中的应用奠定了基础。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种分层控制方法，通过工人机器人和引导机器人协作实现智能粒子群的控制。
AI.motivation: 传统群体机器人控制方法在大规模场景下存在可扩展性和精度不足的问题，需探索更高效的分层控制策略以满足智能材料和纳米医学等领域的应用需求。
AI.method: 将机器人分为两类：遵循局部吸引力的简单工人机器人，以及通过调整交互参数引导工人形成特定形态的引导机器人，结合物理仿真与实体机器人实验验证方法。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法可扩展至5000台机器人，模式失真度低，实体机器人实验结果与仿真结果一致。
AI.conclusion: 该分层控制框架为设计可配置的智能粒子系统提供了理论基础，有望在智能材料和纳米医学领域实现应用突破。

authors_text: Mona Gandhi,Mustafa Omer Gul,Eva Prakash,Madeleine Grunde-McLaughlin,Ranjay Krishna,Maneesh Agrawala
title: Measuring Compositional Consistency for Video Question Answering
title_zh: 测量视频问答的构图一致性
comment: To appear in CVPR 2022. 23 pages, 12 figures and 12 tables
comments: To appear in CVPR 2022. 23 pages, 12 figures and 12 tables
abstract: Recent video question answering benchmarks indicate that state-of-the-art models struggle to answer compositional questions. However, it remains unclear which types of compositional reasoning cause models to mispredict. Furthermore, it is difficult to discern whether models arrive at answers using compositional reasoning or by leveraging data biases. In this paper, we develop a question decomposition engine that programmatically deconstructs a compositional question into a directed acyclic graph of sub-questions. The graph is designed such that each parent question is a composition of its children. We present AGQA-Decomp, a benchmark containing $2.3M$ question graphs, with an average of $11.49$ sub-questions per graph, and $4.55M$ total new sub-questions. Using question graphs, we evaluate three state-of-the-art models with a suite of novel compositional consistency metrics. We find that models either cannot reason correctly through most compositions or are reliant on incorrect reasoning to reach answers, frequently contradicting themselves or achieving high accuracies when failing at intermediate reasoning steps.
summary: Recent video question answering benchmarks indicate that state-of-the-art models struggle to answer compositional questions. However, it remains unclear which types of compositional reasoning cause models to mispredict. Furthermore, it is difficult to discern whether models arrive at answers using compositional reasoning or by leveraging data biases. In this paper, we develop a question decomposition engine that programmatically deconstructs a compositional question into a directed acyclic graph of sub-questions. The graph is designed such that each parent question is a composition of its children. We present AGQA-Decomp, a benchmark containing $2.3M$ question graphs, with an average of $11.49$ sub-questions per graph, and $4.55M$ total new sub-questions. Using question graphs, we evaluate three state-of-the-art models with a suite of novel compositional consistency metrics. We find that models either cannot reason correctly through most compositions or are reliant on incorrect reasoning to reach answers, frequently contradicting themselves or achieving high accuracies when failing at intermediate reasoning steps.
abstract_zh: 最近的视频问答基准表明，最先进的模型很难回答组合问题。然而，目前尚不清楚哪些类型的组合推理会导致模型做出错误预测。此外，很难辨别模型是使用组合推理还是利用数据偏差得出答案。在本文中，我们开发了一个问题分解引擎，以编程方式将组合问题解构为子问题的有向无环图。该图的设计使得每个父问题都是其子问题的组合。我们提出了 AGQA-Decomp，这是一个包含 230 万美元问题图的基准测试，每个图平均有 11.49 美元的子问题，总共有 455 万美元的新子问题。使用问题图，我们使用一套新颖的成分一致性指标来评估三个最先进的模型。我们发现模型要么无法通过大多数组合进行正确推理，要么依赖于不正确的推理来得出答案，经常自相矛盾，或者在中间推理步骤失败时获得较高的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过分解复合问题为子问题图谱来评估视频问答模型组合推理能力的方法，并构建了AGQA-Decomp基准数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有视频问答模型在处理复合问题时表现不佳，但难以明确模型失败的具体推理类型及是否依赖数据偏差而非真实推理。
AI.method: 开发问题分解引擎将复合问题转化为有向无环子问题图谱，构建包含230万问题图的AGQA-Decomp基准，设计新型组合一致性指标评估模型。
AI.result: 实验发现模型普遍存在组合推理缺陷，要么无法正确推理，要么通过矛盾或错误中间步骤达成高准确率。
AI.conclusion: 当前模型组合推理能力不足，需更精细的评估方法揭示其缺陷，本文提出的图谱分解框架为改进模型提供了诊断工具。

authors_text: Naoki Hiratani,Haim Sompolinsky
title: Optimal quadratic binding for relational reasoning in vector symbolic neural architectures
title_zh: 向量符号神经架构中关系推理的最佳二次绑定
abstract: Binding operation is fundamental to many cognitive processes, such as cognitive map formation, relational reasoning, and language comprehension. In these processes, two different modalities, such as location and objects, events and their contextual cues, and words and their roles, need to be bound together, but little is known about the underlying neural mechanisms. Previous works introduced a binding model based on quadratic functions of bound pairs, followed by vector summation of multiple pairs. Based on this framework, we address following questions: Which classes of quadratic matrices are optimal for decoding relational structures? And what is the resultant accuracy? We introduce a new class of binding matrices based on a matrix representation of octonion algebra, an eight-dimensional extension of complex numbers. We show that these matrices enable a more accurate unbinding than previously known methods when a small number of pairs are present. Moreover, numerical optimization of a binding operator converges to this octonion binding. We also show that when there are a large number of bound pairs, however, a random quadratic binding performs as well as the octonion and previously-proposed binding methods. This study thus provides new insight into potential neural mechanisms of binding operations in the brain.
summary: Binding operation is fundamental to many cognitive processes, such as cognitive map formation, relational reasoning, and language comprehension. In these processes, two different modalities, such as location and objects, events and their contextual cues, and words and their roles, need to be bound together, but little is known about the underlying neural mechanisms. Previous works introduced a binding model based on quadratic functions of bound pairs, followed by vector summation of multiple pairs. Based on this framework, we address following questions: Which classes of quadratic matrices are optimal for decoding relational structures? And what is the resultant accuracy? We introduce a new class of binding matrices based on a matrix representation of octonion algebra, an eight-dimensional extension of complex numbers. We show that these matrices enable a more accurate unbinding than previously known methods when a small number of pairs are present. Moreover, numerical optimization of a binding operator converges to this octonion binding. We also show that when there are a large number of bound pairs, however, a random quadratic binding performs as well as the octonion and previously-proposed binding methods. This study thus provides new insight into potential neural mechanisms of binding operations in the brain.
abstract_zh: 绑定操作是许多认知过程的基础，例如认知图形成、关系推理和语言理解。在这些过程中，两种不同的模式，例如位置和物体、事件及其上下文线索、词语及其角色，需要结合在一起，但人们对潜在的神经机制知之甚少。先前的工作介绍了基于绑定对的二次函数的绑定模型，然后是多个对的向量求和。基于这个框架，我们解决了以下问题：哪类二次矩阵最适合解码关系结构？最终的准确度是多少？我们引入了一类新的基于八元代数矩阵表示的绑定矩阵，八元代数是复数的八维扩展。我们表明，当存在少量对时，这些矩阵比以前已知的方法能够更准确地解除绑定。此外，绑定算子的数值优化收敛到该八元数绑定。然而，我们还表明，当存在大量绑定对时，随机二次绑定的性能与八元数和先前提出的绑定方法一样好。因此，这项研究为大脑中结合操作的潜在神经机制提供了新的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了向量符号神经架构中用于关系推理的二次绑定操作的最优矩阵选择问题。
AI.motivation: 绑定操作是认知地图构建、关系推理等关键认知过程的基础，但其神经机制尚不明确，现有方法在处理少量绑定对时存在精度不足的问题。
AI.method: 引入基于八元数代数矩阵表示的新绑定矩阵类，通过数值优化验证其性能，并与传统方法及随机二次绑定进行对比实验。
AI.result: 八元数绑定在少量绑定对场景下解绑精度优于现有方法，而大量绑定对时随机二次绑定效果相当。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了绑定操作可能的神经机制，为不同场景下选择最优绑定策略提供了理论依据。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究了向量符号神经架构中用于关系推理的二次绑定操作的最优矩阵选择问题。

search_text: Optimal quadratic binding for relational reasoning in vector symbolic neural architectures 向量符号神经架构中关系推理的最佳二次绑定 Binding operation is fundamental to many cognitive processes, such as cognitive map formation, relational reasoning, and language comprehension. In these processes, two different modalities, such as location and objects, events and their contextual cues, and words and their roles, need to be bound together, but little is known about the underlying neural mechanisms. Previous works introduced a binding model based on quadratic functions of bound pairs, followed by vector summation of multiple pairs. Based on this framework, we address following questions: Which classes of quadratic matrices are optimal for decoding relational structures? And what is the resultant accuracy? We introduce a new class of binding matrices based on a matrix representation of octonion algebra, an eight-dimensional extension of complex numbers. We show that these matrices enable a more accurate unbinding than previously known methods when a small number of pairs are present. Moreover, numerical optimization of a binding operator converges to this octonion binding. We also show that when there are a large number of bound pairs, however, a random quadratic binding performs as well as the octonion and previously-proposed binding methods. This study thus provides new insight into potential neural mechanisms of binding operations in the brain. 绑定操作是许多认知过程的基础，例如认知图形成、关系推理和语言理解。在这些过程中，两种不同的模式，例如位置和物体、事件及其上下文线索、词语及其角色，需要结合在一起，但人们对潜在的神经机制知之甚少。先前的工作介绍了基于绑定对的二次函数的绑定模型，然后是多个对的向量求和。基于这个框架，我们解决了以下问题：哪类二次矩阵最适合解码关系结构？最终的准确度是多少？我们引入了一类新的基于八元代数矩阵表示的绑定矩阵，八元代数是复数的八维扩展。我们表明，当存在少量对时，这些矩阵比以前已知的方法能够更准确地解除绑定。此外，绑定算子的数值优化收敛到该八元数绑定。然而，我们还表明，当存在大量绑定对时，随机二次绑定的性能与八元数和先前提出的绑定方法一样好。因此，这项研究为大脑中结合操作的潜在神经机制提供了新的见解。 本文研究了向量符号神经架构中用于关系推理的二次绑定操作的最优矩阵选择问题。 Naoki Hiratani,Haim Sompolinsky q-bio.NC,cs.AI

authors_text: Vlad Sobal,Alfredo Canziani,Nicolas Carion,Kyunghyun Cho,Yann LeCun
title: Separating the World and Ego Models for Self-Driving
title_zh: 分离世界和自我模型以实现自动驾驶
comment: 8 pages main content, 14 with references and appendix. 5 figures in total. Submitted and accepted to ICLR 2022 workshop on Generalizable Policy Learning in the Physical World (https://ai-workshops.github.io/generalizable-policy-learning-in-the-physical-world/)
comments: 8 pages main content, 14 with references and appendix. 5 figures in total. Submitted and accepted to ICLR 2022 workshop on Generalizable Policy Learning in the Physical World (https://ai-workshops.github.io/generalizable-policy-learning-in-the-physical-world/)
abstract: Training self-driving systems to be robust to the long-tail of driving scenarios is a critical problem. Model-based approaches leverage simulation to emulate a wide range of scenarios without putting users at risk in the real world. One promising path to faithful simulation is to train a forward model of the world to predict the future states of both the environment and the ego-vehicle given past states and a sequence of actions. In this paper, we argue that it is beneficial to model the state of the ego-vehicle, which often has simple, predictable and deterministic behavior, separately from the rest of the environment, which is much more complex and highly multimodal. We propose to model the ego-vehicle using a simple and differentiable kinematic model, while training a stochastic convolutional forward model on raster representations of the state to predict the behavior of the rest of the environment. We explore several configurations of such decoupled models, and evaluate their performance both with Model Predictive Control (MPC) and direct policy learning. We test our methods on the task of highway driving and demonstrate lower crash rates and better stability. The code is available at https://github.com/vladisai/pytorch-PPUU/tree/ICLR2022.
summary: Training self-driving systems to be robust to the long-tail of driving scenarios is a critical problem. Model-based approaches leverage simulation to emulate a wide range of scenarios without putting users at risk in the real world. One promising path to faithful simulation is to train a forward model of the world to predict the future states of both the environment and the ego-vehicle given past states and a sequence of actions. In this paper, we argue that it is beneficial to model the state of the ego-vehicle, which often has simple, predictable and deterministic behavior, separately from the rest of the environment, which is much more complex and highly multimodal. We propose to model the ego-vehicle using a simple and differentiable kinematic model, while training a stochastic convolutional forward model on raster representations of the state to predict the behavior of the rest of the environment. We explore several configurations of such decoupled models, and evaluate their performance both with Model Predictive Control (MPC) and direct policy learning. We test our methods on the task of highway driving and demonstrate lower crash rates and better stability. The code is available at https://github.com/vladisai/pytorch-PPUU/tree/ICLR2022.
abstract_zh: 训练自动驾驶系统使其能够适应长尾驾驶场景是一个关键问题。基于模型的方法利用模拟来模拟各种场景，而不会让用户在现实世界中面临风险。实现忠实模拟的一条有希望的途径是训练一个世界前向模型，根据过去的状态和一系列动作来预测环境和自我车辆的未来状态。在本文中，我们认为对自我车辆的状态进行建模是有益的，自我车辆通常具有简单、可预测和确定性的行为，与环境的其他部分分开，环境的其他部分要复杂得多且高度多模态。我们建议使用简单且可微的运动学模型对自我车辆进行建模，同时在状态的栅​​格表示上训练随机卷积前向模型以预测环境其余部分的行为。我们探索了这种解耦模型的几种配置，并通过模型预测控制（MPC）和直接策略学习来评估它们的性能。我们在高速公路驾驶任务中测试了我们的方法，并证明了更低的碰撞率和更好的稳定性。该代码位于 https://github.com/vladisai/pytorch-PPUU/tree/ICLR2022。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将自动驾驶系统中的自我车辆模型与环境模型分离，以提高模拟的准确性和稳定性。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶系统需应对复杂多样的驾驶场景，传统单一模型难以兼顾环境复杂性与自我车辆的确定性行为。
AI.method: 使用简单可微的动力学模型模拟自我车辆，同时用随机卷积模型预测环境状态，通过解耦模型结合MPC和策略学习进行训练。
AI.result: 在高速公路场景测试中，方法降低了碰撞率并提升了系统稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 解耦世界模型与自我模型能有效提升自动驾驶系统的安全性和鲁棒性，代码已开源。

authors_text: Theodora Kontogianni,Ekin Celikkan,Siyu Tang,Konrad Schindler
title: Interactive Object Segmentation in 3D Point Clouds
title_zh: 3D 点云中的交互式对象分割
comment: 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
comments: 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
abstract: We propose an interactive approach for 3D instance segmentation, where users can iteratively collaborate with a deep learning model to segment objects in a 3D point cloud directly. Current methods for 3D instance segmentation are generally trained in a fully-supervised fashion, which requires large amounts of costly training labels, and does not generalize well to classes unseen during training. Few works have attempted to obtain 3D segmentation masks using human interactions. Existing methods rely on user feedback in the 2D image domain. As a consequence, users are required to constantly switch between 2D images and 3D representations, and custom architectures are employed to combine multiple input modalities. Therefore, integration with existing standard 3D models is not straightforward. The core idea of this work is to enable users to interact directly with 3D point clouds by clicking on desired 3D objects of interest~(or their background) to interactively segment the scene in an open-world setting. Specifically, our method does not require training data from any target domain, and can adapt to new environments where no appropriate training sets are available. Our system continuously adjusts the object segmentation based on the user feedback and achieves accurate dense 3D segmentation masks with minimal human effort (few clicks per object). Besides its potential for efficient labeling of large-scale and varied 3D datasets, our approach, where the user directly interacts with the 3D environment, enables new applications in AR/VR and human-robot interaction.
summary: We propose an interactive approach for 3D instance segmentation, where users can iteratively collaborate with a deep learning model to segment objects in a 3D point cloud directly. Current methods for 3D instance segmentation are generally trained in a fully-supervised fashion, which requires large amounts of costly training labels, and does not generalize well to classes unseen during training. Few works have attempted to obtain 3D segmentation masks using human interactions. Existing methods rely on user feedback in the 2D image domain. As a consequence, users are required to constantly switch between 2D images and 3D representations, and custom architectures are employed to combine multiple input modalities. Therefore, integration with existing standard 3D models is not straightforward. The core idea of this work is to enable users to interact directly with 3D point clouds by clicking on desired 3D objects of interest~(or their background) to interactively segment the scene in an open-world setting. Specifically, our method does not require training data from any target domain, and can adapt to new environments where no appropriate training sets are available. Our system continuously adjusts the object segmentation based on the user feedback and achieves accurate dense 3D segmentation masks with minimal human effort (few clicks per object). Besides its potential for efficient labeling of large-scale and varied 3D datasets, our approach, where the user directly interacts with the 3D environment, enables new applications in AR/VR and human-robot interaction.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种用于 3D 实例分割的交互式方法，用户可以与深度学习模型迭代协作，直接分割 3D 点云中的对象。当前的 3D 实例分割方法通常以完全监督的方式进行训练，这需要大量昂贵的训练标签，并且不能很好地推广到训练期间未见过的类。很少有作品尝试使用人类交互来获取 3D 分割掩模。现有方法依赖于 2D 图像域中的用户反馈。因此，用户需要不断在 2D 图像和 3D 表示之间切换，并且采用自定义架构来组合多种输入模式。因此，与现有标准 3D 模型的集成并不简单。这项工作的核心思想是让用户能够通过点击所需的感兴趣的 3D 对象（或其背景）来直接与 3D 点云交互，从而在开放世界设置中交互式地分割场景。具体来说，我们的方法不需要来自任何目标域的训练数据，并且可以适应没有合适训练集的新环境。我们的系统根据用户反馈不断调整对象分割，并以最少的人力（每个对象只需点击几次）即可实现准确的密集 3D 分割掩模。除了高效标记大规模和多样化 3D 数据集的潜力之外，我们的方法（用户直接与 3D 环境交互）还支持 AR/VR 和人机交互中的新应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种直接在3D点云中进行交互式实例分割的方法，用户可通过点击目标物体或背景实现高效分割。
AI.motivation: 现有3D分割方法依赖大量标注数据且泛化能力差，交互方法多基于2D图像需频繁切换视图，难以直接集成3D模型。
AI.method: 允许用户直接在3D点云中点击目标物体或背景，系统根据实时反馈动态调整分割结果，无需目标域训练数据。
AI.result: 实现高精度密集3D分割掩码，每物体仅需少量点击，支持大规模数据集标注及AR/VR等新应用场景。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在开放世界场景下实现高效分割，通过直接3D交互突破传统方法限制，为机器人交互等应用提供新可能。

search_text: Interactive Object Segmentation in 3D Point Clouds 3D 点云中的交互式对象分割 We propose an interactive approach for 3D instance segmentation, where users can iteratively collaborate with a deep learning model to segment objects in a 3D point cloud directly. Current methods for 3D instance segmentation are generally trained in a fully-supervised fashion, which requires large amounts of costly training labels, and does not generalize well to classes unseen during training. Few works have attempted to obtain 3D segmentation masks using human interactions. Existing methods rely on user feedback in the 2D image domain. As a consequence, users are required to constantly switch between 2D images and 3D representations, and custom architectures are employed to combine multiple input modalities. Therefore, integration with existing standard 3D models is not straightforward. The core idea of this work is to enable users to interact directly with 3D point clouds by clicking on desired 3D objects of interest~(or their background) to interactively segment the scene in an open-world setting. Specifically, our method does not require training data from any target domain, and can adapt to new environments where no appropriate training sets are available. Our system continuously adjusts the object segmentation based on the user feedback and achieves accurate dense 3D segmentation masks with minimal human effort (few clicks per object). Besides its potential for efficient labeling of large-scale and varied 3D datasets, our approach, where the user directly interacts with the 3D environment, enables new applications in AR/VR and human-robot interaction. 我们提出了一种用于 3D 实例分割的交互式方法，用户可以与深度学习模型迭代协作，直接分割 3D 点云中的对象。当前的 3D 实例分割方法通常以完全监督的方式进行训练，这需要大量昂贵的训练标签，并且不能很好地推广到训练期间未见过的类。很少有作品尝试使用人类交互来获取 3D 分割掩模。现有方法依赖于 2D 图像域中的用户反馈。因此，用户需要不断在 2D 图像和 3D 表示之间切换，并且采用自定义架构来组合多种输入模式。因此，与现有标准 3D 模型的集成并不简单。这项工作的核心思想是让用户能够通过点击所需的感兴趣的 3D 对象（或其背景）来直接与 3D 点云交互，从而在开放世界设置中交互式地分割场景。具体来说，我们的方法不需要来自任何目标域的训练数据，并且可以适应没有合适训练集的新环境。我们的系统根据用户反馈不断调整对象分割，并以最少的人力（每个对象只需点击几次）即可实现准确的密集 3D 分割掩模。除了高效标记大规模和多样化 3D 数据集的潜力之外，我们的方法（用户直接与 3D 环境交互）还支持 AR/VR 和人机交互中的新应用。 本文提出了一种直接在3D点云中进行交互式实例分割的方法，用户可通过点击目标物体或背景实现高效分割。 Theodora Kontogianni,Ekin Celikkan,Siyu Tang,Konrad Schindler cs.CV

authors_text: Raphael Souza de Oliveira,Erick Giovani Sperandio Nascimento
title: Analysing similarities between legal court documents using natural language processing approaches based on Transformers
title_zh: 使用基于 Transformers 的自然语言处理方法分析法律法庭文件之间的相似性
abstract: Recent advances in Artificial Intelligence (AI) have leveraged promising results in solving complex problems in the area of Natural Language Processing (NLP), being an important tool to help in the expeditious resolution of judicial proceedings in the legal area. In this context, this work targets the problem of detecting the degree of similarity between judicial documents that can be achieved in the inference group, by applying six NLP techniques based on the transformers architecture to a case study of legal proceedings in the Brazilian judicial system. The NLP transformer-based models, namely BERT, GPT-2 and RoBERTa, were pre-trained using a general purpose corpora of the Brazilian Portuguese language, and then were fine-tuned and specialised for the legal sector using 210,000 legal proceedings. Vector representations of each legal document were calculated based on their embeddings, which were used to cluster the lawsuits, calculating the quality of each model based on the cosine of the distance between the elements of the group to its centroid. We noticed that models based on transformers presented better performance when compared to previous traditional NLP techniques, with the RoBERTa model specialised for the Brazilian Portuguese language presenting the best results. This methodology can be also applied to other case studies for different languages, making it possible to advance in the current state of the art in the area of NLP applied to the legal sector.

abstract_zh: 人工智能（AI）的最新进展在解决自然语言处理（NLP）领域的复杂问题方面取得了可喜的成果，成为帮助快速解决法律领域司法诉讼的重要工具。在此背景下，这项工作的目标是通过将基于 Transformer 架构的六种 NLP 技术应用于巴西司法系统法律诉讼的案例研究，来检测推理组中可以实现的司法文件之间的相似程度。基于 NLP 变压器的模型，即 BERT、GPT-2 和 RoBERTa，使用巴西葡萄牙语通用语料库进行预训练，然后使用 210,000 个法律程序进行微调并专门用于法律领域。每个法律文档的向量表示是根据其嵌入来计算的，这些向量表示用于对诉讼进行聚类，并根据组元素与其质心之间的距离的余弦来计算每个模型的质量。我们注意到，与之前的传统 NLP 技术相比，基于 Transformer 的模型表现出了更好的性能，其中专门针对巴西葡萄牙语的 RoBERTa 模型表现出了最佳结果。该方法还可以应用于不同语言的其他案例研究，从而有可能推动 NLP 应用于法律领域的当前技术水平。

AI.tldr: 本文利用基于Transformer的NLP技术，分析巴西司法系统法律文件之间的相似性，以提高司法程序效率。
AI.motivation: 司法文件处理效率低，传统NLP方法效果有限，需探索更高效的AI技术辅助司法流程。
AI.method: 采用BERT、GPT-2和RoBERTa等预训练模型，使用巴西葡萄牙语语料库进行微调，通过嵌入向量计算法律文件相似度并聚类分析。
AI.result: Transformer模型显著优于传统方法，其中针对巴西葡萄牙语优化的RoBERTa模型表现最佳。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可推广至其他语言和司法案例，推动NLP在法律领域的应用进展。

authors_text: Yu Wu,Jianle Wei,Weiqin Ying,Yanqi Lan,Zhen Cui,Zhenyu Wang
title: A collaborative decomposition-based evolutionary algorithm integrating normal and penalty-based boundary intersection for many-objective optimization
title_zh: 一种基于协作分解的进化算法，集成了正态和基于惩罚的边界相交，用于多目标优化
abstract: Decomposition-based evolutionary algorithms have become fairly popular for many-objective optimization in recent years. However, the existing decomposition methods still are quite sensitive to the various shapes of frontiers of many-objective optimization problems (MaOPs). On the one hand, the cone decomposition methods such as the penalty-based boundary intersection (PBI) are incapable of acquiring uniform frontiers for MaOPs with very convex frontiers. On the other hand, the parallel reference lines of the parallel decomposition methods including the normal boundary intersection (NBI) might result in poor diversity because of under-sampling near the boundaries for MaOPs with concave frontiers. In this paper, a collaborative decomposition method is first proposed to integrate the advantages of parallel decomposition and cone decomposition to overcome their respective disadvantages. This method inherits the NBI-style Tchebycheff function as a convergence measure to heighten the convergence and uniformity of distribution of the PBI method. Moreover, this method also adaptively tunes the extent of rotating an NBI reference line towards a PBI reference line for every subproblem to enhance the diversity of distribution of the NBI method. Furthermore, a collaborative decomposition-based evolutionary algorithm (CoDEA) is presented for many-objective optimization. A collaborative decomposition-based environmental selection mechanism is primarily designed in CoDEA to rank all the individuals associated with the same PBI reference line in the boundary layer and pick out the best ranks. CoDEA is compared with several popular algorithms on 85 benchmark test instances. The experimental results show that CoDEA achieves high competitiveness benefiting from the collaborative decomposition maintaining a good balance among the convergence, uniformity, and diversity of distribution.
summary: Decomposition-based evolutionary algorithms have become fairly popular for many-objective optimization in recent years. However, the existing decomposition methods still are quite sensitive to the various shapes of frontiers of many-objective optimization problems (MaOPs). On the one hand, the cone decomposition methods such as the penalty-based boundary intersection (PBI) are incapable of acquiring uniform frontiers for MaOPs with very convex frontiers. On the other hand, the parallel reference lines of the parallel decomposition methods including the normal boundary intersection (NBI) might result in poor diversity because of under-sampling near the boundaries for MaOPs with concave frontiers. In this paper, a collaborative decomposition method is first proposed to integrate the advantages of parallel decomposition and cone decomposition to overcome their respective disadvantages. This method inherits the NBI-style Tchebycheff function as a convergence measure to heighten the convergence and uniformity of distribution of the PBI method. Moreover, this method also adaptively tunes the extent of rotating an NBI reference line towards a PBI reference line for every subproblem to enhance the diversity of distribution of the NBI method. Furthermore, a collaborative decomposition-based evolutionary algorithm (CoDEA) is presented for many-objective optimization. A collaborative decomposition-based environmental selection mechanism is primarily designed in CoDEA to rank all the individuals associated with the same PBI reference line in the boundary layer and pick out the best ranks. CoDEA is compared with several popular algorithms on 85 benchmark test instances. The experimental results show that CoDEA achieves high competitiveness benefiting from the collaborative decomposition maintaining a good balance among the convergence, uniformity, and diversity of distribution.
abstract_zh: 近年来，基于分解的进化算法在多目标优化中变得相当流行。然而，现有的分解方法对多目标优化问题（MaOP）的各种边界形状仍然相当敏感。一方面，诸如基于惩罚的边界相交（PBI）之类的锥体分解方法无法为具有非常凸边界的 MaOP 获取统一边界。另一方面，包括法线边界相交（NBI）在内的并行分解方法的并行参考线可能会由于凹边界 MaOP 边界附近的欠采样而导致多样性较差。本文首先提出一种协同分解方法，综合并行分解和锥体分解的优点，克服各自的缺点。该方法继承了NBI风格的Tchebycheff函数作为收敛度量，以提高PBI方法的收敛性和分布均匀性。此外，该方法还针对每个子问题自适应地调整NBI参考线向PBI参考线旋转的程度，以增强NBI方法分布的多样性。此外，提出了一种用于多目标优化的基于协作分解的进化算法（CoDEA）。 CoDEA 中主要设计了一种基于协作分解的环境选择机制，对边界层中与同一 PBI 参考线相关的所有个体进行排名，并选出最佳排名。在 85 个基准测试实例上将 CoDEA 与几种流行算法进行了比较。实验结果表明，CoDEA 得益于协作分解，在分布的收敛性、均匀性和多样性之间保持了良好的平衡，取得了较高的竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种协作分解的进化算法（CoDEA），用于解决多目标优化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的分解方法在处理多目标优化问题（MaOPs）时，对前沿形状的敏感性较高，难以同时实现收敛性、均匀性和多样性。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种协作分解方法，结合平行分解和锥形分解的优点，设计了基于协作分解的环境选择机制，并提出了CoDEA算法。
AI.result: CoDEA在85个基准测试实例上表现优异，显示出在收敛性、均匀性和多样性之间的良好平衡。
AI.conclusion: 协作分解方法有效克服了现有分解方法的不足，CoDEA在多目标优化中具有较高的竞争力。

authors_text: Gabriel Loaiza-Ganem,Brendan Leigh Ross,Jesse C. Cresswell,Anthony L. Caterini
title: Diagnosing and Fixing Manifold Overfitting in Deep Generative Models
title_zh: 诊断和修复深度生成模型中的流形过度拟合
abstract: Likelihood-based, or explicit, deep generative models use neural networks to construct flexible high-dimensional densities. This formulation directly contradicts the manifold hypothesis, which states that observed data lies on a low-dimensional manifold embedded in high-dimensional ambient space. In this paper we investigate the pathologies of maximum-likelihood training in the presence of this dimensionality mismatch. We formally prove that degenerate optima are achieved wherein the manifold itself is learned but not the distribution on it, a phenomenon we call manifold overfitting. We propose a class of two-step procedures consisting of a dimensionality reduction step followed by maximum-likelihood density estimation, and prove that they recover the data-generating distribution in the nonparametric regime, thus avoiding manifold overfitting. We also show that these procedures enable density estimation on the manifolds learned by implicit models, such as generative adversarial networks, hence addressing a major shortcoming of these models. Several recently proposed methods are instances of our two-step procedures; we thus unify, extend, and theoretically justify a large class of models.
summary: Likelihood-based, or explicit, deep generative models use neural networks to construct flexible high-dimensional densities. This formulation directly contradicts the manifold hypothesis, which states that observed data lies on a low-dimensional manifold embedded in high-dimensional ambient space. In this paper we investigate the pathologies of maximum-likelihood training in the presence of this dimensionality mismatch. We formally prove that degenerate optima are achieved wherein the manifold itself is learned but not the distribution on it, a phenomenon we call manifold overfitting. We propose a class of two-step procedures consisting of a dimensionality reduction step followed by maximum-likelihood density estimation, and prove that they recover the data-generating distribution in the nonparametric regime, thus avoiding manifold overfitting. We also show that these procedures enable density estimation on the manifolds learned by implicit models, such as generative adversarial networks, hence addressing a major shortcoming of these models. Several recently proposed methods are instances of our two-step procedures; we thus unify, extend, and theoretically justify a large class of models.
abstract_zh: 基于可能性的或显式的深度生成模型使用神经网络来构建灵活的高维密度。这种表述直接与流形假设相矛盾，流形假设指出观测到的数据位于嵌入高维环境空间的低维流形上。在本文中，我们研究了在存在这种维度不匹配的情况下最大似然训练的病态。我们正式证明了退化最优值的实现，其中流形本身被学习，但流形上的分布未被学习，这种现象我们称为流形过度拟合。我们提出了一类两步程序，包括降维步骤和最大似然密度估计，并证明它们可以恢复非参数状态下的数据生成分布，从而避免流形过度拟合。我们还表明，这些过程可以对隐式模型（例如生成对抗网络）学习的流形进行密度估计，从而解决了这些模型的主要缺点。最近提出的几种方法是我们的​​两步程序的实例；因此，我们统一、扩展并在理论上证明了一大类模型的合理性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究深度生成模型中的流形过拟合问题，提出通过两步法（降维后最大似然估计）解决该问题，并证明其有效性。
AI.motivation: 基于似然的深度生成模型与流形假设存在维度矛盾，导致模型仅学习流形结构而无法捕捉其分布，引发过拟合问题。
AI.method: 设计两步方法：先进行降维，再执行最大似然密度估计，理论证明该方法可恢复数据生成分布并避免流形过拟合。
AI.result: 方法成功解决流形过拟合，支持对隐式模型（如GAN）学习的流形进行密度估计，并统一了多种现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 两步法有效缓解流形过拟合问题，提升生成模型密度估计能力，为相关方法提供理论依据。

authors_text: Connor Bybee,Alexander Belsten,Friedrich T. Sommer
title: Cross-Frequency Coupling Increases Memory Capacity in Oscillatory Neural Networks
title_zh: 跨频耦合增加了振荡神经网络的内存容量
comment: 4 pages, one figure, Presented at Computation and Systems Neuroscience (COSYNE) 2022
comments: 4 pages, one figure, Presented at Computation and Systems Neuroscience (COSYNE) 2022
abstract: An open problem in neuroscience is to explain the functional role of oscillations in neural networks, contributing, for example, to perception, attention, and memory. Cross-frequency coupling (CFC) is associated with information integration across populations of neurons. Impaired CFC is linked to neurological disease. It is unclear what role CFC has in information processing and brain functional connectivity. We construct a model of CFC which predicts a computational role for observed $θ- γ$ oscillatory circuits in the hippocampus and cortex. Our model predicts that the complex dynamics in recurrent and feedforward networks of coupled oscillators performs robust information storage and pattern retrieval. Based on phasor associative memories (PAM), we present a novel oscillator neural network (ONN) model that includes subharmonic injection locking (SHIL) and which reproduces experimental observations of CFC. We show that the presence of CFC increases the memory capacity of a population of neurons connected by plastic synapses. CFC enables error-free pattern retrieval whereas pattern retrieval fails without CFC. In addition, the trade-offs between sparse connectivity, capacity, and information per connection are identified. The associative memory is based on a complex-valued neural network, or phasor neural network (PNN). We show that for values of $Q$ which are the same as the ratio of $γ$ to $θ$ oscillations observed in the hippocampus and the cortex, the associative memory achieves greater capacity and information storage than previous models. The novel contributions of this work are providing a computational framework based on oscillator dynamics which predicts the functional role of neural oscillations and connecting concepts in neural network theory and dynamical system theory.
summary: An open problem in neuroscience is to explain the functional role of oscillations in neural networks, contributing, for example, to perception, attention, and memory. Cross-frequency coupling (CFC) is associated with information integration across populations of neurons. Impaired CFC is linked to neurological disease. It is unclear what role CFC has in information processing and brain functional connectivity. We construct a model of CFC which predicts a computational role for observed $θ- γ$ oscillatory circuits in the hippocampus and cortex. Our model predicts that the complex dynamics in recurrent and feedforward networks of coupled oscillators performs robust information storage and pattern retrieval. Based on phasor associative memories (PAM), we present a novel oscillator neural network (ONN) model that includes subharmonic injection locking (SHIL) and which reproduces experimental observations of CFC. We show that the presence of CFC increases the memory capacity of a population of neurons connected by plastic synapses. CFC enables error-free pattern retrieval whereas pattern retrieval fails without CFC. In addition, the trade-offs between sparse connectivity, capacity, and information per connection are identified. The associative memory is based on a complex-valued neural network, or phasor neural network (PNN). We show that for values of $Q$ which are the same as the ratio of $γ$ to $θ$ oscillations observed in the hippocampus and the cortex, the associative memory achieves greater capacity and information storage than previous models. The novel contributions of this work are providing a computational framework based on oscillator dynamics which predicts the functional role of neural oscillations and connecting concepts in neural network theory and dynamical system theory.
abstract_zh: 神经科学中的一个悬而未决的问题是解释神经网络中振荡的功能作用，例如对感知、注意力和记忆的贡献。跨频耦合 (CFC) 与神经元群体之间的信息集成相关。 CFC 受损与神经系统疾病有关。目前尚不清楚 CFC 在信息处理和大脑功能连接中发挥什么作用。我们构建了一个 CFC 模型，该模型预测了海马体和皮层中观察到的 $θ-γ$ 振荡电路的计算作用。我们的模型预测耦合振荡器的循环和前馈网络中的复杂动态执行稳健的信息存储和模式检索。基于相量联想记忆 (PAM)，我们提出了一种新颖的振荡器神经网络 (ONN) 模型，其中包括次谐波注入锁定 (SHIL)，并再现了 CFC 的实验观察结果。我们发现，CFC 的存在增加了由塑料突触连接的神经元群的记忆能力。 CFC 可以实现无错误的模式检索，而如果没有 CFC，模式检索就会失败。此外，还确定了稀疏连接、容量和每个连接的信息之间的权衡。联想记忆基于复值神经网络或相量神经网络（PNN）。我们表明，对于与在海马体和皮层中观察到的 $γ$ 与 $θ$ 振荡的比率相同的 $Q$ 值，联想记忆比以前的模型实现了更大的容量和信息存储。这项工作的新颖贡献是提供了一个基于振荡动力学的计算框架，该框架预测神经振荡的功能作用并连接神经网络理论和动力系统理论中的概念。

AI.tldr: 本文通过构建振荡神经网络模型，揭示了跨频率耦合（CFC）在增强神经网络记忆容量中的计算作用。
AI.motivation: 神经科学中尚未明确神经振荡的功能角色，尤其是CFC在信息处理和脑功能连接中的作用机制。
AI.method: 基于相量联想记忆（PAM）提出振荡神经网络（ONN）模型，结合次谐波注入锁定（SHIL）机制，模拟海马体和皮层的θ-γ振荡电路。
AI.result: CFC显著提升神经元群体的记忆容量，实现无错误模式检索；当Q值与θ-γ振荡比值匹配时，模型容量超越传统模型。
AI.conclusion: 该研究建立了振荡动力学的计算框架，阐明了CFC在神经信息处理中的功能角色，连接了神经网络理论与动力系统理论。

authors_text: Victor Delvigne,Hazem Wannous,Jean-Philippe Vandeborre,Laurence Ris,Thierry Dutoit
title: Spatio-Temporal Analysis of Transformer based Architecture for Attention Estimation from EEG
title_zh: 基于 EEG 注意力估计的 Transformer 架构的时空分析
abstract: For many years now, understanding the brain mechanism has been a great research subject in many different fields. Brain signal processing and especially electroencephalogram (EEG) has recently known a growing interest both in academia and industry. One of the main examples is the increasing number of Brain-Computer Interfaces (BCI) aiming to link brains and computers. In this paper, we present a novel framework allowing us to retrieve the attention state, i.e degree of attention given to a specific task, from EEG signals. While previous methods often consider the spatial relationship in EEG through electrodes and process them in recurrent or convolutional based architecture, we propose here to also exploit the spatial and temporal information with a transformer-based network that has already shown its supremacy in many machine-learning (ML) related studies, e.g. machine translation. In addition to this novel architecture, an extensive study on the feature extraction methods, frequential bands and temporal windows length has also been carried out. The proposed network has been trained and validated on two public datasets and achieves higher results compared to state-of-the-art models. As well as proposing better results, the framework could be used in real applications, e.g. Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder (ADHD) symptoms or vigilance during a driving assessment.
summary: For many years now, understanding the brain mechanism has been a great research subject in many different fields. Brain signal processing and especially electroencephalogram (EEG) has recently known a growing interest both in academia and industry. One of the main examples is the increasing number of Brain-Computer Interfaces (BCI) aiming to link brains and computers. In this paper, we present a novel framework allowing us to retrieve the attention state, i.e degree of attention given to a specific task, from EEG signals. While previous methods often consider the spatial relationship in EEG through electrodes and process them in recurrent or convolutional based architecture, we propose here to also exploit the spatial and temporal information with a transformer-based network that has already shown its supremacy in many machine-learning (ML) related studies, e.g. machine translation. In addition to this novel architecture, an extensive study on the feature extraction methods, frequential bands and temporal windows length has also been carried out. The proposed network has been trained and validated on two public datasets and achieves higher results compared to state-of-the-art models. As well as proposing better results, the framework could be used in real applications, e.g. Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder (ADHD) symptoms or vigilance during a driving assessment.
abstract_zh: 多年来，了解大脑机制一直是许多不同领域的重要研究课题。最近，学术界和工业界对脑信号处理，尤其是脑电图 (EEG) 的兴趣日益浓厚。主要例子之一是旨在连接大脑和计算机的脑机接口（BCI）数量不断增加。在本文中，我们提出了一个新颖的框架，允许我们从脑电图信号中检索注意力状态，即对特定任务的注意力程度。虽然以前的方法经常通过电极考虑脑电图的空间关系，并在基于循环或卷积的架构中处理它们，但我们在这里建议还利用基于变压器的网络来利用空间和时间信息，该网络已经在许多机器学习（ML）相关研究中显示出其优势，例如机器翻译。除了这种新颖的架构之外，还对特征提取方法、频率带和时间窗口长度进行了广泛的研究。所提出的网络已经在两个公共数据集上进行了训练和验证，与最先进的模型相比，取得了更高的结果。除了提出更好的结果之外，该框架还可以用于实际应用中，例如驾驶评估期间的注意力缺陷多动障碍 (ADHD) 症状或警惕性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer架构的新型框架，用于从脑电图（EEG）信号中估计注意力状态。
AI.motivation: 传统方法主要依赖卷积或循环网络处理EEG的空间关系，而Transformer在处理时空信息方面表现出色，因此作者提出结合Transformer模型并优化特征提取方法以提高注意力估计的准确性。
AI.method: 采用Transformer网络架构，结合时空信息处理，并对特征提取方法、频段选择及时间窗口长度进行系统研究，模型在两个公开数据集上进行训练和验证。
AI.result: 所提框架在两个公开数据集上取得优于现有最先进模型的性能，且可应用于注意力缺陷多动障碍（ADHD）检测及驾驶警觉性评估等实际场景。
AI.conclusion: Transformer架构有效提升了EEG注意力估计的准确性，其方法在理论研究和实际应用中均具有重要意义。

search_text: Spatio-Temporal Analysis of Transformer based Architecture for Attention Estimation from EEG 基于 EEG 注意力估计的 Transformer 架构的时空分析 For many years now, understanding the brain mechanism has been a great research subject in many different fields. Brain signal processing and especially electroencephalogram (EEG) has recently known a growing interest both in academia and industry. One of the main examples is the increasing number of Brain-Computer Interfaces (BCI) aiming to link brains and computers. In this paper, we present a novel framework allowing us to retrieve the attention state, i.e degree of attention given to a specific task, from EEG signals. While previous methods often consider the spatial relationship in EEG through electrodes and process them in recurrent or convolutional based architecture, we propose here to also exploit the spatial and temporal information with a transformer-based network that has already shown its supremacy in many machine-learning (ML) related studies, e.g. machine translation. In addition to this novel architecture, an extensive study on the feature extraction methods, frequential bands and temporal windows length has also been carried out. The proposed network has been trained and validated on two public datasets and achieves higher results compared to state-of-the-art models. As well as proposing better results, the framework could be used in real applications, e.g. Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder (ADHD) symptoms or vigilance during a driving assessment. 多年来，了解大脑机制一直是许多不同领域的重要研究课题。最近，学术界和工业界对脑信号处理，尤其是脑电图 (EEG) 的兴趣日益浓厚。主要例子之一是旨在连接大脑和计算机的脑机接口（BCI）数量不断增加。在本文中，我们提出了一个新颖的框架，允许我们从脑电图信号中检索注意力状态，即对特定任务的注意力程度。虽然以前的方法经常通过电极考虑脑电图的空间关系，并在基于循环或卷积的架构中处理它们，但我们在这里建议还利用基于变压器的网络来利用空间和时间信息，该网络已经在许多机器学习（ML）相关研究中显示出其优势，例如机器翻译。除了这种新颖的架构之外，还对特征提取方法、频率带和时间窗口长度进行了广泛的研究。所提出的网络已经在两个公共数据集上进行了训练和验证，与最先进的模型相比，取得了更高的结果。除了提出更好的结果之外，该框架还可以用于实际应用中，例如驾驶评估期间的注意力缺陷多动障碍 (ADHD) 症状或警惕性。 本文提出了一种基于Transformer架构的新型框架，用于从脑电图（EEG）信号中估计注意力状态。 Victor Delvigne,Hazem Wannous,Jean-Philippe Vandeborre,Laurence Ris,Thierry Dutoit q-bio.NC,cs.AI,cs.LG,eess.SP

authors_text: Ishit Mehta,Manmohan Chandraker,Ravi Ramamoorthi
title: A Level Set Theory for Neural Implicit Evolution under Explicit Flows
title_zh: 显式流下神经隐式进化的水平集理论
abstract: Coordinate-based neural networks parameterizing implicit surfaces have emerged as efficient representations of geometry. They effectively act as parametric level sets with the zero-level set defining the surface of interest. We present a framework that allows applying deformation operations defined for triangle meshes onto such implicit surfaces. Several of these operations can be viewed as energy-minimization problems that induce an instantaneous flow field on the explicit surface. Our method uses the flow field to deform parametric implicit surfaces by extending the classical theory of level sets. We also derive a consolidated view for existing methods on differentiable surface extraction and rendering, by formalizing connections to the level-set theory. We show that these methods drift from the theory and that our approach exhibits improvements for applications like surface smoothing, mean-curvature flow, inverse rendering and user-defined editing on implicit geometry.
summary: Coordinate-based neural networks parameterizing implicit surfaces have emerged as efficient representations of geometry. They effectively act as parametric level sets with the zero-level set defining the surface of interest. We present a framework that allows applying deformation operations defined for triangle meshes onto such implicit surfaces. Several of these operations can be viewed as energy-minimization problems that induce an instantaneous flow field on the explicit surface. Our method uses the flow field to deform parametric implicit surfaces by extending the classical theory of level sets. We also derive a consolidated view for existing methods on differentiable surface extraction and rendering, by formalizing connections to the level-set theory. We show that these methods drift from the theory and that our approach exhibits improvements for applications like surface smoothing, mean-curvature flow, inverse rendering and user-defined editing on implicit geometry.
abstract_zh: 参数化隐式曲面的基于坐标的神经网络已成为几何的有效表示。它们有效地充当参数水平集，其中零水平集定义了感兴趣的表面。我们提出了一个框架，允许将为三角形网格定义的变形操作应用到此类隐式表面上。其中一些操作可以被视为能量最小化问题，在显式表面上引起瞬时流场。我们的方法通过扩展水平集的经典理论，使用流场使参数隐式曲面变形。我们还通过形式化与水平集理论的联系，得出了现有可微表面提取和渲染方法的综合视图。我们证明这些方法偏离了理论，并且我们的方法对表面平滑、平均曲率流、逆渲染和隐式几何上的用户定义编辑等应用程序表现出了改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于显式流的神经隐式曲面演化框架，通过扩展水平集理论实现三角网格变形操作在隐式曲面上的应用。
AI.motivation: 现有隐式曲面变形方法在表面平滑、曲率流等任务中存在理论偏差，缺乏与经典水平集理论的系统性联系。
AI.method: 将显式网格的变形操作转化为能量最小化问题生成流场，利用水平集理论扩展变形隐式曲面，并建立可微表面提取方法与水平集理论的统一框架。
AI.result: 在表面平滑、逆向渲染等任务中验证了方法有效性，相比现有技术在几何编辑和曲率演化方面取得性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过理论整合与流场驱动的变形机制，提出的框架为隐式几何处理提供了更精确的数学基础和更优的应用效果。

authors_text: Colin Graber,Cyril Jazra,Wenjie Luo,Liangyan Gui,Alexander Schwing
title: Joint Forecasting of Panoptic Segmentations with Difference Attention
title_zh: 具有差异注意力的全景分割联合预测
abstract: Forecasting of a representation is important for safe and effective autonomy. For this, panoptic segmentations have been studied as a compelling representation in recent work. However, recent state-of-the-art on panoptic segmentation forecasting suffers from two issues: first, individual object instances are treated independently of each other; second, individual object instance forecasts are merged in a heuristic manner. To address both issues, we study a new panoptic segmentation forecasting model that jointly forecasts all object instances in a scene using a transformer model based on 'difference attention.' It further refines the predictions by taking depth estimates into account. We evaluate the proposed model on the Cityscapes and AIODrive datasets. We find difference attention to be particularly suitable for forecasting because the difference of quantities like locations enables a model to explicitly reason about velocities and acceleration. Because of this, we attain state-of-the-art on panoptic segmentation forecasting metrics.
summary: Forecasting of a representation is important for safe and effective autonomy. For this, panoptic segmentations have been studied as a compelling representation in recent work. However, recent state-of-the-art on panoptic segmentation forecasting suffers from two issues: first, individual object instances are treated independently of each other; second, individual object instance forecasts are merged in a heuristic manner. To address both issues, we study a new panoptic segmentation forecasting model that jointly forecasts all object instances in a scene using a transformer model based on 'difference attention.' It further refines the predictions by taking depth estimates into account. We evaluate the proposed model on the Cityscapes and AIODrive datasets. We find difference attention to be particularly suitable for forecasting because the difference of quantities like locations enables a model to explicitly reason about velocities and acceleration. Because of this, we attain state-of-the-art on panoptic segmentation forecasting metrics.
abstract_zh: 表征预测对于安全有效的自治非常重要。为此，全景分割在最近的工作中被作为一种引人注目的表现形式进行了研究。然而，全景分割预测的最新技术存在两个问题：首先，各个对象实例是相互独立处理的；其次，单个对象实例预测以启发式方式合并。为了解决这两个问题，我们研究了一种新的全景分割预测模型，该模型使用基于“差异注意”的变压器模型联合预测场景中的所有对象实例。它通过考虑深度估计来进一步完善预测。我们在 Cityscapes 和 AIODrive 数据集上评估所提出的模型。我们发现差异注意力特别适合预测，因为位置等数量的差异使模型能够明确地推理速度和加速度。正因为如此，我们获得了最先进的全景分割预测指标。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于差异注意力的联合全景分割预测模型，解决现有方法中对象实例独立处理和启发式合并的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有全景分割预测方法存在两个缺陷：1) 个体对象实例被孤立处理，2) 预测结果通过启发式方式合并，导致信息利用不充分。
AI.method: 设计基于Transformer的差异注意力机制，联合预测场景中所有对象实例，并结合深度估计优化预测结果。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes和AIODrive数据集上达到全景分割预测任务的最先进水平(SOTA)。
AI.conclusion: 差异注意力机制能有效捕捉位置差异带来的速度/加速度信息，证明联合预测方法在自动驾驶场景中的优越性。
