result: 在Cityscapes和AIODrive数据集上达到全景分割预测任务的最先进水平(SOTA)。
conclusion: 差异注意力机制能有效捕捉位置差异带来的速度/加速度信息，证明联合预测方法在自动驾驶场景中的优越性。
search_text: Joint Forecasting of Panoptic Segmentations with Difference Attention 具有差异注意力的全景分割联合预测 Forecasting of a representation is important for safe and effective autonomy. For this, panoptic segmentations have been studied as a compelling representation in recent work. However, recent state-of-the-art on panoptic segmentation forecasting suffers from two issues: first, individual object instances are treated independently of each other; second, individual object instance forecasts are merged in a heuristic manner. To address both issues, we study a new panoptic segmentation forecasting model that jointly forecasts all object instances in a scene using a transformer model based on 'difference attention.' It further refines the predictions by taking depth estimates into account. We evaluate the proposed model on the Cityscapes and AIODrive datasets. We find difference attention to be particularly suitable for forecasting because the difference of quantities like locations enables a model to explicitly reason about velocities and acceleration. Because of this, we attain state-of-the-art on panoptic segmentation forecasting metrics. 表征预测对于安全有效的自治非常重要。为此，全景分割在最近的工作中被作为一种引人注目的表现形式进行了研究。然而，全景分割预测的最新技术存在两个问题：首先，各个对象实例是相互独立处理的；其次，单个对象实例预测以启发式方式合并。为了解决这两个问题，我们研究了一种新的全景分割预测模型，该模型使用基于“差异注意”的变压器模型联合预测场景中的所有对象实例。它通过考虑深度估计来进一步完善预测。我们在 Cityscapes 和 AIODrive 数据集上评估所提出的模型。我们发现差异注意力特别适合预测，因为位置等数量的差异使模型能够明确地推理速度和加速度。正因为如此，我们获得了最先进的全景分割预测指标。 本文提出一种基于差异注意力的联合全景分割预测模型，解决现有方法中对象实例独立处理和启发式合并的问题。 Colin Graber,Cyril Jazra,Wenjie Luo,Liangyan Gui,Alexander Schwing cs.CV

authors_text: Lucy Chai,Michael Gharbi,Eli Shechtman,Phillip Isola,Richard Zhang
title: Any-resolution Training for High-resolution Image Synthesis
title_zh: 高分辨率图像合成的任意分辨率训练
comment: ECCV 2022 camera ready version; project page https://chail.github.io/anyres-gan/
comments: ECCV 2022 camera ready version; project page https://chail.github.io/anyres-gan/
abstract: Generative models operate at fixed resolution, even though natural images come in a variety of sizes. As high-resolution details are downsampled away and low-resolution images are discarded altogether, precious supervision is lost. We argue that every pixel matters and create datasets with variable-size images, collected at their native resolutions. To take advantage of varied-size data, we introduce continuous-scale training, a process that samples patches at random scales to train a new generator with variable output resolutions. First, conditioning the generator on a target scale allows us to generate higher resolution images than previously possible, without adding layers to the model. Second, by conditioning on continuous coordinates, we can sample patches that still obey a consistent global layout, which also allows for scalable training at higher resolutions. Controlled FFHQ experiments show that our method can take advantage of multi-resolution training data better than discrete multi-scale approaches, achieving better FID scores and cleaner high-frequency details. We also train on other natural image domains including churches, mountains, and birds, and demonstrate arbitrary scale synthesis with both coherent global layouts and realistic local details, going beyond 2K resolution in our experiments. Our project page is available at: https://chail.github.io/anyres-gan/.
summary: Generative models operate at fixed resolution, even though natural images come in a variety of sizes. As high-resolution details are downsampled away and low-resolution images are discarded altogether, precious supervision is lost. We argue that every pixel matters and create datasets with variable-size images, collected at their native resolutions. To take advantage of varied-size data, we introduce continuous-scale training, a process that samples patches at random scales to train a new generator with variable output resolutions. First, conditioning the generator on a target scale allows us to generate higher resolution images than previously possible, without adding layers to the model. Second, by conditioning on continuous coordinates, we can sample patches that still obey a consistent global layout, which also allows for scalable training at higher resolutions. Controlled FFHQ experiments show that our method can take advantage of multi-resolution training data better than discrete multi-scale approaches, achieving better FID scores and cleaner high-frequency details. We also train on other natural image domains including churches, mountains, and birds, and demonstrate arbitrary scale synthesis with both coherent global layouts and realistic local details, going beyond 2K resolution in our experiments. Our project page is available at: https://chail.github.io/anyres-gan/.
abstract_zh: 尽管自然图像有多种尺寸，但生成模型仍以固定分辨率运行。由于高分辨率细节被下采样并且低分辨率图像被完全丢弃，因此失去了宝贵的监督。我们认为每个像素都很重要，并创建具有可变尺寸图像的数据集，并以原始分辨率收集。为了利用不同大小的数据，我们引入了连续规模训练，这是一个以随机规模对补丁进行采样的过程，以训练具有可变输出分辨率的新生成器。首先，在目标比例上调节生成器使我们能够生成比以前更高分辨率的图像，而无需向模型添加层。其次，通过对连续坐标进行调节，我们可以对仍然遵循一致的全局布局的补丁进行采样，这也允许在更高分辨率下进行可扩展的训练。受控 FFHQ 实验表明，我们的方法可以比离散多尺度方法更好地利用多分辨率训练数据，实现更好的 FID 分数和更清晰的高频细节。我们还对其他自然图像领域进行训练，包括教堂、山脉和鸟类，并展示了具有连贯全局布局和真实局部细节的任意比例合成，在我们的实验中超越了 2K 分辨率。我们的项目页面位于：https://chail.github.io/anyres-gan/。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种任意分辨率训练方法，通过利用多分辨率图像数据集生成高质量高分辨率图像。
AI.motivation: 传统生成模型固定分辨率导致高分辨率细节丢失和低分辨率图像被丢弃，无法充分利用多尺度监督信息。
AI.method: 构建原生分辨率可变图像数据集，引入连续尺度训练机制，通过随机尺度补丁采样和连续坐标条件控制实现可变分辨率生成。
AI.result: 在FFHQ等数据集上取得更优FID分数和更清晰高频细节，支持2K以上分辨率的任意尺度图像合成，保持全局布局和局部细节一致性。
AI.conclusion: 连续尺度训练有效利用多分辨率数据优势，在保持模型简洁性的同时实现更高质量的高分辨率图像生成。

As high-resolution details are downsampled away and low-resolution images are discarded altogether, precious supervision is lost. To take advantage of varied-size data, we introduce continuous-scale training, a process that samples patches at random scales to train a new generator with variable output resolutions. First, conditioning the generator on a target scale allows us to generate higher resolution images than previously possible, without adding layers to the model. We also train on other natural image domains including churches, mountains, and birds, and demonstrate arbitrary scale synthesis with both coherent global layouts and realistic local details, going beyond 2K resolution in our experiments. authors_text: Jinnian Zhang,Houwen Peng,Kan Wu,Mengchen Liu,Bin Xiao,Jianlong Fu,Lu Yuan
title: MiniViT: Compressing Vision Transformers with Weight Multiplexing
title_zh: MiniViT：通过权重复用压缩视觉变压器
abstract: Vision Transformer (ViT) models have recently drawn much attention in computer vision due to their high model capability. However, ViT models suffer from huge number of parameters, restricting their applicability on devices with limited memory. To alleviate this problem, we propose MiniViT, a new compression framework, which achieves parameter reduction in vision transformers while retaining the same performance. The central idea of MiniViT is to multiplex the weights of consecutive transformer blocks. More specifically, we make the weights shared across layers, while imposing a transformation on the weights to increase diversity. Weight distillation over self-attention is also applied to transfer knowledge from large-scale ViT models to weight-multiplexed compact models. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate the efficacy of MiniViT, showing that it can reduce the size of the pre-trained Swin-B transformer by 48\%, while achieving an increase of 1.0\% in Top-1 accuracy on ImageNet. Moreover, using a single-layer of parameters, MiniViT is able to compress DeiT-B by 9.7 times from 86M to 9M parameters, without seriously compromising the performance. Finally, we verify the transferability of MiniViT by reporting its performance on downstream benchmarks. Code and models are available at here.
summary: Vision Transformer (ViT) models have recently drawn much attention in computer vision due to their high model capability. However, ViT models suffer from huge number of parameters, restricting their applicability on devices with limited memory. To alleviate this problem, we propose MiniViT, a new compression framework, which achieves parameter reduction in vision transformers while retaining the same performance. The central idea of MiniViT is to multiplex the weights of consecutive transformer blocks. More specifically, we make the weights shared across layers, while imposing a transformation on the weights to increase diversity. Weight distillation over self-attention is also applied to transfer knowledge from large-scale ViT models to weight-multiplexed compact models. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate the efficacy of MiniViT, showing that it can reduce the size of the pre-trained Swin-B transformer by 48\%, while achieving an increase of 1.0\% in Top-1 accuracy on ImageNet. Moreover, using a single-layer of parameters, MiniViT is able to compress DeiT-B by 9.7 times from 86M to 9M parameters, without seriously compromising the performance. Finally, we verify the transferability of MiniViT by reporting its performance on downstream benchmarks. Code and models are available at here.
abstract_zh: 视觉变换器（ViT）模型由于其高模型能力，最近在计算机视觉领域引起了广泛关注。然而，ViT 模型存在大量参数，限制了其在内存有限的设备上的适用性。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了 MiniViT，一种新的压缩框架，它在保持相同性能的同时实现了视觉变换器的参数减少。 MiniViT 的中心思想是复用连续变压器块的权重。更具体地说，我们使权重跨层共享，同时对权重进行变换以增加多样性。自注意力的权重蒸馏也用于将知识从大规模 ViT 模型转移到权重复用紧凑模型。综合实验证明了 MiniViT 的功效，表明它可以将预训练的 Swin-B 变压器的尺寸减小 48%，同时在 ImageNet 上实现 Top-1 精度提高 1.0%。此外，使用单层参数，MiniViT能够将DeiT-B从86M参数压缩到9.7倍，而不会严重影响性能。最后，我们通过报告下游基准测试的性能来验证 MiniViT 的可移植性。代码和型号可在此处获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MiniViT框架，通过权重复用技术压缩视觉Transformer模型参数，同时保持模型性能。
AI.motivation: 视觉Transformer（ViT）模型参数量庞大，限制了其在内存有限设备上的应用，亟需高效压缩方法。
AI.method: 通过跨层权重共享并引入权重变换增强多样性，结合自注意力机制的知识蒸馏技术实现模型压缩。
AI.result: 将预训练Swin-B模型参数量减少48%且ImageNet Top-1准确率提升1.0%，DeiT-B模型压缩9.7倍至9M参数而性能损失较小。
AI.conclusion: MiniViT在保持模型性能的前提下显著降低参数量，且具有良好的迁移能力，适用于下游任务。

authors_text: Yufei Ye,Abhinav Gupta,Shubham Tulsiani
title: What's in your hands? 3D Reconstruction of Generic Objects in Hands
title_zh: 你手上有什么？手中通用物体的 3D 重建
abstract: Our work aims to reconstruct hand-held objects given a single RGB image. In contrast to prior works that typically assume known 3D templates and reduce the problem to 3D pose estimation, our work reconstructs generic hand-held object without knowing their 3D templates. Our key insight is that hand articulation is highly predictive of the object shape, and we propose an approach that conditionally reconstructs the object based on the articulation and the visual input. Given an image depicting a hand-held object, we first use off-the-shelf systems to estimate the underlying hand pose and then infer the object shape in a normalized hand-centric coordinate frame. We parameterized the object by signed distance which are inferred by an implicit network which leverages the information from both visual feature and articulation-aware coordinates to process a query point. We perform experiments across three datasets and show that our method consistently outperforms baselines and is able to reconstruct a diverse set of objects. We analyze the benefits and robustness of explicit articulation conditioning and also show that this allows the hand pose estimation to further improve in test-time optimization.
summary: Our work aims to reconstruct hand-held objects given a single RGB image. In contrast to prior works that typically assume known 3D templates and reduce the problem to 3D pose estimation, our work reconstructs generic hand-held object without knowing their 3D templates. Our key insight is that hand articulation is highly predictive of the object shape, and we propose an approach that conditionally reconstructs the object based on the articulation and the visual input. Given an image depicting a hand-held object, we first use off-the-shelf systems to estimate the underlying hand pose and then infer the object shape in a normalized hand-centric coordinate frame. We parameterized the object by signed distance which are inferred by an implicit network which leverages the information from both visual feature and articulation-aware coordinates to process a query point. We perform experiments across three datasets and show that our method consistently outperforms baselines and is able to reconstruct a diverse set of objects. We analyze the benefits and robustness of explicit articulation conditioning and also show that this allows the hand pose estimation to further improve in test-time optimization.
abstract_zh: 我们的工作目标是在给定单个 RGB 图像的情况下重建手持物体。与通常假设已知 3D 模板并将问题简化为 3D 姿态估计的先前工作相比，我们的工作在不知道其 3D 模板的情况下重建通用手持物体。我们的主要见解是，手部清晰度可以高度预测对象形状，并且我们提出了一种基于清晰度和视觉输入有条件地重建对象的方法。给定描绘手持物体的图像，我们首先使用现成的系统来估计潜在的手部姿势，然后在标准化的以手为中心的坐标系中推断物体形状。我们通过有符号距离对对象进行参数化，该距离是通过隐式网络推断的，该隐式网络利用来自视觉特征和关节感知坐标的信息来处理查询点。我们在三个数据集上进行实验，结果表明我们的方法始终优于基线，并且能够重建一组不同的对象。我们分析了显式关节调节的好处和鲁棒性，并且还表明这允许手部姿势估计在测试时优化中进一步改进。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过单张RGB图像重建手持通用物体的3D形状，无需预先已知的3D模板。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖已知3D模板进行重建，限制了对通用物体的处理能力。本文提出利用手部动作信息预测物体形状，突破模板依赖的局限性。
AI.method: 首先通过现成系统估计手部姿态，再在归一化坐标系中推断物体形状。使用符号距离函数参数化物体，并通过融合视觉特征与关节坐标信息的隐式网络进行重建。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上实验表明，该方法在重建多样性物体时优于基线方法，且显式关节条件化提升了鲁棒性与姿态估计精度。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出了一种无需3D模板的手持物体重建方法，通过关节动作信息有效捕捉物体形状，为通用物体重建提供了新思路。

authors_text: Vickie Ye,Zhengqi Li,Richard Tucker,Angjoo Kanazawa,Noah Snavely
title: Deformable Sprites for Unsupervised Video Decomposition
title_zh: 用于无监督视频分解的可变形精灵
abstract: We describe a method to extract persistent elements of a dynamic scene from an input video. We represent each scene element as a \emph{Deformable Sprite} consisting of three components: 1) a 2D texture image for the entire video, 2) per-frame masks for the element, and 3) non-rigid deformations that map the texture image into each video frame. The resulting decomposition allows for applications such as consistent video editing. Deformable Sprites are a type of video auto-encoder model that is optimized on individual videos, and does not require training on a large dataset, nor does it rely on pre-trained models. Moreover, our method does not require object masks or other user input, and discovers moving objects of a wider variety than previous work. We evaluate our approach on standard video datasets and show qualitative results on a diverse array of Internet videos. Code and video results can be found at https://deformable-sprites.github.io
summary: We describe a method to extract persistent elements of a dynamic scene from an input video. We represent each scene element as a \emph{Deformable Sprite} consisting of three components: 1) a 2D texture image for the entire video, 2) per-frame masks for the element, and 3) non-rigid deformations that map the texture image into each video frame. The resulting decomposition allows for applications such as consistent video editing. Deformable Sprites are a type of video auto-encoder model that is optimized on individual videos, and does not require training on a large dataset, nor does it rely on pre-trained models. Moreover, our method does not require object masks or other user input, and discovers moving objects of a wider variety than previous work. We evaluate our approach on standard video datasets and show qualitative results on a diverse array of Internet videos. Code and video results can be found at https://deformable-sprites.github.io
abstract_zh: 我们描述了一种从输入视频中提取动态场景的持久元素的方法。我们将每个场景元素表示为由三个组件组成的 \emph{Deformable Sprite}：1）整个视频的 2D 纹理图像，2）元素的每帧掩模，以及 3）将纹理图像映射到每个视频帧的非刚性变形。由此产生的分解允许诸如一致的视频编辑之类的应用。 Deformable Sprites 是一种针对单个视频进行优化的视频自动编码器模型，不需要在大型数据集上进行训练，也不依赖于预先训练的模型。此外，我们的方法不需要对象掩码或其他用户输入，并且发现比以前的工作更广泛的移动对象。我们在标准视频数据集上评估我们的方法，并在各种互联网视频上显示定性结果。代码和视频结果可以在 https://deformable-sprites.github.io 找到

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督视频分解方法，通过可变形精灵提取视频中的持久动态元素，实现无需用户输入的一致性视频编辑。
AI.motivation: 现有视频分解方法依赖预训练模型或用户标注，且难以处理复杂动态场景。本文旨在开发无需监督、无需先验知识的视频分解技术，自动发现多样化运动物体。
AI.method: 构建包含全局纹理图像、逐帧掩码和非刚性变形的可变形精灵模型，采用单视频优化的自编码器架构，通过端到端学习实现无监督分解。
AI.result: 在标准数据集和互联网视频上验证了方法有效性，展示了多样化的运动物体分解结果，并提供代码和可视化案例。
AI.conclusion: 该方法突破传统视频分解对预训练模型和用户输入的依赖，在无监督条件下实现了高质量动态元素分解，为视频编辑等应用提供新思路。

authors_text: Lara Zlokapa,Yiyue Luo,Jie Xu,Michael Foshey,Kui Wu,Pulkit Agrawal,Wojciech Matusik
title: An Integrated Design Pipeline for Tactile Sensing Robotic Manipulators
title_zh: 触觉传感机器人操纵器的集成设计流程
abstract: Traditional robotic manipulator design methods require extensive, time-consuming, and manual trial and error to produce a viable design. During this process, engineers often spend their time redesigning or reshaping components as they discover better topologies for the robotic manipulator. Tactile sensors, while useful, often complicate the design due to their bulky form factor. We propose an integrated design pipeline to streamline the design and manufacturing of robotic manipulators with knitted, glove-like tactile sensors. The proposed pipeline allows a designer to assemble a collection of modular, open-source components by applying predefined graph grammar rules. The end result is an intuitive design paradigm that allows the creation of new virtual designs of manipulators in a matter of minutes. Our framework allows the designer to fine-tune the manipulator's shape through cage-based geometry deformation. Finally, the designer can select surfaces for adding tactile sensing. Once the manipulator design is finished, the program will automatically generate 3D printing and knitting files for manufacturing. We demonstrate the utility of this pipeline by creating four custom manipulators tested on real-world tasks: screwing in a wing screw, sorting water bottles, picking up an egg, and cutting paper with scissors.
summary: Traditional robotic manipulator design methods require extensive, time-consuming, and manual trial and error to produce a viable design. During this process, engineers often spend their time redesigning or reshaping components as they discover better topologies for the robotic manipulator. Tactile sensors, while useful, often complicate the design due to their bulky form factor. We propose an integrated design pipeline to streamline the design and manufacturing of robotic manipulators with knitted, glove-like tactile sensors. The proposed pipeline allows a designer to assemble a collection of modular, open-source components by applying predefined graph grammar rules. The end result is an intuitive design paradigm that allows the creation of new virtual designs of manipulators in a matter of minutes. Our framework allows the designer to fine-tune the manipulator's shape through cage-based geometry deformation. Finally, the designer can select surfaces for adding tactile sensing. Once the manipulator design is finished, the program will automatically generate 3D printing and knitting files for manufacturing. We demonstrate the utility of this pipeline by creating four custom manipulators tested on real-world tasks: screwing in a wing screw, sorting water bottles, picking up an egg, and cutting paper with scissors.
abstract_zh: 传统的机器人操纵器设计方法需要大量、耗时的手动试验和错误才能产生可​​行的设计。在此过程中，工程师经常花时间重新设计或重塑组件，因为他们发现了更好的机器人操纵器拓扑。触觉传感器虽然有用，但由于其体积庞大，通常会使设计复杂化。我们提出了一种集成设计流程，以简化带有针织手套状触觉传感器的机器人操纵器的设计和制造。所提出的管道允许设计人员通过应用预定义的图形语法规则来组装模块化开源组件的集合。最终结果是一种直观的设计范例，可以在几分钟内创建新的机械臂虚拟设计。我们的框架允许设计者通过基于笼的几何变形来微调机械臂的形状。最后，设计者可以选择用于添加触觉传感的表面。一旦机械手设计完成，程序将自动生成用于制造的3D打印和编织文件。我们通过创建四个在实际任务中进行测试的定制机械手来展示该管道的实用性：拧入翼形螺钉、对水瓶进行分类、捡起鸡蛋以及用剪刀剪纸。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种集成设计流程，用于快速设计和制造配备针织触觉传感器的机械臂。
AI.motivation: 传统机械臂设计依赖耗时的试错法，而触觉传感器的体积问题增加了设计复杂度，亟需高效的设计方法。
AI.method: 基于模块化组件与预定义图语法规则，结合笼子变形调整形状，并自动生成3D打印和编织文件。
AI.result: 成功设计出四款机械臂，完成拧螺丝、分拣水瓶、捡鸡蛋和剪纸等实际任务。
AI.conclusion: 该流程显著提升了触觉传感机械臂的设计效率，简化了从虚拟设计到实体制造的全过程。

search_text: An Integrated Design Pipeline for Tactile Sensing Robotic Manipulators 触觉传感机器人操纵器的集成设计流程 Traditional robotic manipulator design methods require extensive, time-consuming, and manual trial and error to produce a viable design. During this process, engineers often spend their time redesigning or reshaping components as they discover better topologies for the robotic manipulator. Tactile sensors, while useful, often complicate the design due to their bulky form factor. We propose an integrated design pipeline to streamline the design and manufacturing of robotic manipulators with knitted, glove-like tactile sensors. The proposed pipeline allows a designer to assemble a collection of modular, open-source components by applying predefined graph grammar rules. The end result is an intuitive design paradigm that allows the creation of new virtual designs of manipulators in a matter of minutes. Our framework allows the designer to fine-tune the manipulator's shape through cage-based geometry deformation. Finally, the designer can select surfaces for adding tactile sensing. Once the manipulator design is finished, the program will automatically generate 3D printing and knitting files for manufacturing. We demonstrate the utility of this pipeline by creating four custom manipulators tested on real-world tasks: screwing in a wing screw, sorting water bottles, picking up an egg, and cutting paper with scissors. 传统的机器人操纵器设计方法需要大量、耗时的手动试验和错误才能产生可​​行的设计。在此过程中，工程师经常花时间重新设计或重塑组件，因为他们发现了更好的机器人操纵器拓扑。触觉传感器虽然有用，但由于其体积庞大，通常会使设计复杂化。我们提出了一种集成设计流程，以简化带有针织手套状触觉传感器的机器人操纵器的设计和制造。所提出的管道允许设计人员通过应用预定义的图形语法规则来组装模块化开源组件的集合。最终结果是一种直观的设计范例，可以在几分钟内创建新的机械臂虚拟设计。我们的框架允许设计者通过基于笼的几何变形来微调机械臂的形状。最后，设计者可以选择用于添加触觉传感的表面。一旦机械手设计完成，程序将自动生成用于制造的3D打印和编织文件。我们通过创建四个在实际任务中进行测试的定制机械手来展示该管道的实用性：拧入翼形螺钉、对水瓶进行分类、捡起鸡蛋以及用剪刀剪纸。 本文提出了一种集成设计流程，用于快速设计和制造配备针织触觉传感器的机械臂。 Lara Zlokapa,Yiyue Luo,Jie Xu,Michael Foshey,Kui Wu,Pulkit Agrawal,Wojciech Matusik cs.RO,cs.AR

authors_text: Sandra Q. Liu,Edward H. Adelson
title: GelSight Fin Ray: Incorporating Tactile Sensing into a Soft Compliant Robotic Gripper
title_zh: GelSight Fin Ray：将触觉传感融入软柔顺机器人夹具中
comment: 2022 IEEE 5th International Conference on Soft Robotics (RoboSoft)
comments: 2022 IEEE 5th International Conference on Soft Robotics (RoboSoft)
abstract: To adapt to constantly changing environments and be safe for human interaction, robots should have compliant and soft characteristics as well as the ability to sense the world around them. Even so, the incorporation of tactile sensing into a soft compliant robot, like the Fin Ray finger, is difficult due to its deformable structure. Not only does the frame need to be modified to allow room for a vision sensor, which enables intricate tactile sensing, the robot must also retain its original mechanically compliant properties. However, adding high-resolution tactile sensors to soft fingers is difficult since many sensorized fingers, such as GelSight-based ones, are rigid and function under the assumption that changes in the sensing region are only from tactile contact and not from finger compliance. A sensorized soft robotic finger needs to be able to separate its overall proprioceptive changes from its tactile information. To this end, this paper introduces the novel design of a GelSight Fin Ray, which embodies both the ability to passively adapt to any object it grasps and the ability to perform high-resolution tactile reconstruction, object orientation estimation, and marker tracking for shear and torsional forces. Having these capabilities allow soft and compliant robots to perform more manipulation tasks that require sensing. One such task the finger is able to perform successfully is a kitchen task: wine glass reorientation and placement, which is difficult to do with external vision sensors but is easy with tactile sensing. The development of this sensing technology could also potentially be applied to other soft compliant grippers, increasing their viability in many different fields.

Even so, the incorporation of tactile sensing into a soft compliant robot, like the Fin Ray finger, is difficult due to its deformable structure. Not only does the frame need to be modified to allow room for a vision sensor, which enables intricate tactile sensing, the robot must also retain its original mechanically compliant properties. However, adding high-resolution tactile sensors to soft fingers is difficult since many sensorized fingers, such as GelSight-based ones, are rigid and function under the assumption that changes in the sensing region are only from tactile contact and not from finger compliance. A sensorized soft robotic finger needs to be able to separate its overall proprioceptive changes from its tactile information. To this end, this paper introduces the novel design of a GelSight Fin Ray, which embodies both the ability to passively adapt to any object it grasps and the ability to perform high-resolution tactile reconstruction, object orientation estimation, and marker tracking for shear and torsional forces. Having these capabilities allow soft and compliant robots to perform more manipulation tasks that require sensing. One such task the finger is able to perform successfully is a kitchen task: wine glass reorientation and placement, which is difficult to do with external vision sensors but is easy with tactile sensing. The development of this sensing technology could also potentially be applied to other soft compliant grippers, increasing their viability in many different fields.
abstract_zh: 为了适应不断变化的环境并保证人类交互的安全，机器人应该具有顺从和柔软的特性以及感知周围世界的能力。即便如此，由于其结构可变形，将触觉传感融入到 Fin Ray 手指等柔性柔性机器人中仍然很困难。机器人不仅需要修改框架，为视觉传感器留出空间，从而实现复杂的触觉感知，还必须保留其原有的机械顺应性。然而，在软手指上添加高分辨率触觉传感器很困难，因为许多传感手指（例如基于 GelSight 的手指）都是刚性的，并且在假设传感区域的变化仅来自触觉接触而不是来自手指顺应性的情况下起作用。传感软机器人手指需要能够将其整体本体感觉变化与其触觉信息分开。为此，本文介绍了 GelSight Fin Ray 的新颖设计，它既体现了被动适应其抓取的任何物体的能力，也体现了执行高分辨率触觉重建、物体方向估计以及剪切力和扭转力标记跟踪的能力。拥有这些功能可以让柔软且兼容的机器人执行更多需要传感的操作任务。手指能够成功执行的一项任务是厨房任务：重新定位和放置酒杯，这对于外部视觉传感器来说很难完成，但对于触觉传感来说很容易。这种传感技术的开发也有可能应用于其他柔性柔性夹具，从而提高其在许多不同领域的可行性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型软体机械手指GelSight Fin Ray，通过整合触觉传感技术，实现高分辨率触觉重建和物体操作任务。
AI.motivation: 软体机器人需要兼具柔性和环境感知能力，但传统触觉传感器难以适配其变形结构且无法区分自身形变与触觉信息。
AI.method: 设计将视觉传感器嵌入Fin Ray手指结构，通过算法分离手指形变与触觉信号，实现剪切力/扭矩估计及物体方位识别。
AI.result: 成功完成葡萄酒杯再定位等需要精细触觉的任务，验证了该设计在复杂环境下的操作可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该技术为软体抓取器提供了可扩展的触觉感知方案，有望推动其在医疗、家用服务等领域的应用。

authors_text: Ali Hassani,Steven Walton,Jiachen Li,Shen Li,Humphrey Shi
title: Neighborhood Attention Transformer
title_zh: 邻里注意力变压器
comment: To appear in CVPR 2023. NATTEN is open-sourced at: https://github.com/SHI-Labs/NATTEN/
comments: To appear in CVPR 2023. NATTEN is open-sourced at: https://github.com/SHI-Labs/NATTEN/
abstract: We present Neighborhood Attention (NA), the first efficient and scalable sliding-window attention mechanism for vision. NA is a pixel-wise operation, localizing self attention (SA) to the nearest neighboring pixels, and therefore enjoys a linear time and space complexity compared to the quadratic complexity of SA. The sliding-window pattern allows NA's receptive field to grow without needing extra pixel shifts, and preserves translational equivariance, unlike Swin Transformer's Window Self Attention (WSA). We develop NATTEN (Neighborhood Attention Extension), a Python package with efficient C++ and CUDA kernels, which allows NA to run up to 40% faster than Swin's WSA while using up to 25% less memory. We further present Neighborhood Attention Transformer (NAT), a new hierarchical transformer design based on NA that boosts image classification and downstream vision performance. Experimental results on NAT are competitive; NAT-Tiny reaches 83.2% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet, 51.4% mAP on MS-COCO and 48.4% mIoU on ADE20K, which is 1.9% ImageNet accuracy, 1.0% COCO mAP, and 2.6% ADE20K mIoU improvement over a Swin model with similar size. To support more research based on sliding-window attention, we open source our project and release our checkpoints at: https://github.com/SHI-Labs/Neighborhood-Attention-Transformer .
summary: We present Neighborhood Attention (NA), the first efficient and scalable sliding-window attention mechanism for vision. NA is a pixel-wise operation, localizing self attention (SA) to the nearest neighboring pixels, and therefore enjoys a linear time and space complexity compared to the quadratic complexity of SA. The sliding-window pattern allows NA's receptive field to grow without needing extra pixel shifts, and preserves translational equivariance, unlike Swin Transformer's Window Self Attention (WSA). We develop NATTEN (Neighborhood Attention Extension), a Python package with efficient C++ and CUDA kernels, which allows NA to run up to 40% faster than Swin's WSA while using up to 25% less memory. We further present Neighborhood Attention Transformer (NAT), a new hierarchical transformer design based on NA that boosts image classification and downstream vision performance. Experimental results on NAT are competitive; NAT-Tiny reaches 83.2% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet, 51.4% mAP on MS-COCO and 48.4% mIoU on ADE20K, which is 1.9% ImageNet accuracy, 1.0% COCO mAP, and 2.6% ADE20K mIoU improvement over a Swin model with similar size. To support more research based on sliding-window attention, we open source our project and release our checkpoints at: https://github.com/SHI-Labs/Neighborhood-Attention-Transformer .
abstract_zh: 我们提出了邻域注意力（NA），这是第一个高效且可扩展的视觉滑动窗口注意力机制。 NA 是一种逐像素操作，将自注意力 (SA) 定位到最近的相邻像素，因此与 SA 的二次复杂度相比，具有线性时间和空间复杂度。与 Swin Transformer 的窗口自注意力 (WSA) 不同，滑动窗口模式允许 NA 的感受野增长，而无需额外的像素移位，并保留平移等方差。我们开发了 NATTEN（Neighborhood Attention Extension），这是一个具有高效 C++ 和 CUDA 内核的 Python 包，它使 NA 的运行速度比 Swin 的 WSA 快 40%，同时使用的内存最多减少 25%。我们进一步介绍了 Neighborhood Attention Transformer (NAT)，这是一种基于 NA 的新型分层变压器设计，可提高图像分类和下游视觉性能。 NAT上的实验结果具有竞争力； NAT-Tiny 在 ImageNet 上达到 83.2% top-1 准确率，在 MS-COCO 上达到 51.4% mAP，在 ADE20K 上达到 48.4% mIoU，与具有相似大小的 Swin 模型相比，ImageNet 准确率提高了 1.9%，COCO mAP 提高了 1.0%，ADE20K mIoU 提高了 2.6%。为了支持更多基于滑动窗口注意力的研究，我们开源了我们的项目并在以下位置发布了我们的检查点：https://github.com/SHI-Labs/Neighborhood-Attention-Transformer。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Neighborhood Attention (NA)的高效可扩展滑动窗口注意力机制，并基于此设计了Neighborhood Attention Transformer (NAT)模型，用于提升视觉任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统自注意力机制在视觉任务中存在计算复杂度高（二次方）的问题，而现有滑动窗口注意力方法（如Swin Transformer）存在平移不变性缺失等缺陷，需设计更高效的注意力机制。
AI.method: 提出像素级邻域注意力机制NA，通过滑动窗口限制注意力范围至相邻像素，实现线性时间复杂度；开发NATTEN工具包优化计算效率；设计分层结构NAT模型以提升视觉任务性能。
AI.result: NAT-Tiny在ImageNet上达到83.2% top-1精度（较Swin提升1.9%），在MS-COCO上达到51.4% mAP（提升1.0%），在ADE20K上达到48.4% mIoU（提升2.6%），且计算速度比Swin快40%，内存占用减少25%。
AI.conclusion: NA机制在保持平移等变性的同时显著提升了计算效率，NAT模型在多个视觉任务中表现优异，开源代码与模型权重可促进滑动窗口注意力方法的研究。

search_text: Neighborhood Attention Transformer 邻里注意力变压器 We present Neighborhood Attention (NA), the first efficient and scalable sliding-window attention mechanism for vision. NA is a pixel-wise operation, localizing self attention (SA) to the nearest neighboring pixels, and therefore enjoys a linear time and space complexity compared to the quadratic complexity of SA. The sliding-window pattern allows NA's receptive field to grow without needing extra pixel shifts, and preserves translational equivariance, unlike Swin Transformer's Window Self Attention (WSA). We develop NATTEN (Neighborhood Attention Extension), a Python package with efficient C++ and CUDA kernels, which allows NA to run up to 40% faster than Swin's WSA while using up to 25% less memory. We further present Neighborhood Attention Transformer (NAT), a new hierarchical transformer design based on NA that boosts image classification and downstream vision performance. Experimental results on NAT are competitive; NAT-Tiny reaches 83.2% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet, 51.4% mAP on MS-COCO and 48.4% mIoU on ADE20K, which is 1.9% ImageNet accuracy, 1.0% COCO mAP, and 2.6% ADE20K mIoU improvement over a Swin model with similar size. To support more research based on sliding-window attention, we open source our project and release our checkpoints at: https://github.com/SHI-Labs/Neighborhood-Attention-Transformer . 我们提出了邻域注意力（NA），这是第一个高效且可扩展的视觉滑动窗口注意力机制。 NA 是一种逐像素操作，将自注意力 (SA) 定位到最近的相邻像素，因此与 SA 的二次复杂度相比，具有线性时间和空间复杂度。与 Swin Transformer 的窗口自注意力 (WSA) 不同，滑动窗口模式允许 NA 的感受野增长，而无需额外的像素移位，并保留平移等方差。我们开发了 NATTEN（Neighborhood Attention Extension），这是一个具有高效 C++ 和 CUDA 内核的 Python 包，它使 NA 的运行速度比 Swin 的 WSA 快 40%，同时使用的内存最多减少 25%。我们进一步介绍了 Neighborhood Attention Transformer (NAT)，这是一种基于 NA 的新型分层变压器设计，可提高图像分类和下游视觉性能。 NAT上的实验结果具有竞争力； NAT-Tiny 在 ImageNet 上达到 83.2% top-1 准确率，在 MS-COCO 上达到 51.4% mAP，在 ADE20K 上达到 48.4% mIoU，与具有相似大小的 Swin 模型相比，ImageNet 准确率提高了 1.9%，COCO mAP 提高了 1.0%，ADE20K mIoU 提高了 2.6%。为了支持更多基于滑动窗口注意力的研究，我们开源了我们的项目并在以下位置发布了我们的检查点：https://github.com/SHI-Labs/Neighborhood-Attention-Transformer。 本文提出了一种名为Neighborhood Attention (NA)的高效可扩展滑动窗口注意力机制，并基于此设计了Neighborhood Attention Transformer (NAT)模型，用于提升视觉任务的性能。 Ali Hassani,Steven Walton,Jiachen Li,Shen Li,Humphrey Shi cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Rakesh R Menon,Sayan Ghosh,Shashank Srivastava
title: CLUES: A Benchmark for Learning Classifiers using Natural Language Explanations
title_zh: 线索：使用自然语言解释学习分类器的基准
abstract: Supervised learning has traditionally focused on inductive learning by observing labeled examples of a task. In contrast, humans have the ability to learn new concepts from language. Here, we explore training zero-shot classifiers for structured data purely from language. For this, we introduce CLUES, a benchmark for Classifier Learning Using natural language ExplanationS, consisting of a range of classification tasks over structured data along with natural language supervision in the form of explanations. CLUES consists of 36 real-world and 144 synthetic classification tasks. It contains crowdsourced explanations describing real-world tasks from multiple teachers and programmatically generated explanations for the synthetic tasks. To model the influence of explanations in classifying an example, we develop ExEnt, an entailment-based model that learns classifiers using explanations. ExEnt generalizes up to 18% better (relative) on novel tasks than a baseline that does not use explanations. We delineate key challenges for automated learning from explanations, addressing which can lead to progress on CLUES in the future. Code and datasets are available at: https://clues-benchmark.github.io.
summary: Supervised learning has traditionally focused on inductive learning by observing labeled examples of a task. In contrast, humans have the ability to learn new concepts from language. Here, we explore training zero-shot classifiers for structured data purely from language. For this, we introduce CLUES, a benchmark for Classifier Learning Using natural language ExplanationS, consisting of a range of classification tasks over structured data along with natural language supervision in the form of explanations. CLUES consists of 36 real-world and 144 synthetic classification tasks. It contains crowdsourced explanations describing real-world tasks from multiple teachers and programmatically generated explanations for the synthetic tasks. To model the influence of explanations in classifying an example, we develop ExEnt, an entailment-based model that learns classifiers using explanations. ExEnt generalizes up to 18% better (relative) on novel tasks than a baseline that does not use explanations. We delineate key challenges for automated learning from explanations, addressing which can lead to progress on CLUES in the future. Code and datasets are available at: https://clues-benchmark.github.io.
abstract_zh: 监督学习传统上侧重于通过观察任务的标记示例进行归纳学习。相比之下，人类有能力从语言中学习新概念。在这里，我们探索纯粹从语言中训练结构化数据的零样本分类器。为此，我们引入了 CLUES，这是使用自然语言解释进行分类器学习的基准，由结构化数据上的一系列分类任务以及解释形式的自然语言监督组成。 CLUES 包含 36 个现实世界分类任务和 144 个综合分类任务。它包含来自多位教师的描述现实世界任务的众包解释，以及以编程方式生成的综合任务解释。为了模拟解释对示例分类的影响，我们开发了 ExEnt，这是一种基于蕴涵的模型，可以使用解释来学习分类器。 ExEnt 在新任务上的泛化能力比不使用解释的基线高出 18%（相对）。我们从解释中描述了自动学习的关键挑战，解决这些挑战可能会导致未来 CLUES 方面的进展。代码和数据集可在以下位置获取：https://clues-benchmark.github.io。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CLUES基准，通过自然语言解释训练零样本分类器，解决结构化数据分类问题。
AI.motivation: 传统监督学习依赖标注样本，而人类能通过语言学习新概念。现有方法缺乏利用自然语言解释进行分类学习的有效框架。
AI.method: 构建包含36个真实和144个合成任务的CLUES基准，开发基于蕴含关系的ExEnt模型，通过解释学习分类器。
AI.result: ExEnt在新任务上比基线模型相对提升18%的准确率，验证了语言解释的有效性。
AI.conclusion: CLUES为从解释中学习提供了新方向，未来需解决解释歧义性和跨任务泛化等挑战。

authors_text: Mahmoud Assran,Mathilde Caron,Ishan Misra,Piotr Bojanowski,Florian Bordes,Pascal Vincent,Armand Joulin,Michael Rabbat,Nicolas Ballas
title: Masked Siamese Networks for Label-Efficient Learning
title_zh: 用于标签高效学习的蒙面连体网络
abstract: We propose Masked Siamese Networks (MSN), a self-supervised learning framework for learning image representations. Our approach matches the representation of an image view containing randomly masked patches to the representation of the original unmasked image. This self-supervised pre-training strategy is particularly scalable when applied to Vision Transformers since only the unmasked patches are processed by the network. As a result, MSNs improve the scalability of joint-embedding architectures, while producing representations of a high semantic level that perform competitively on low-shot image classification. For instance, on ImageNet-1K, with only 5,000 annotated images, our base MSN model achieves 72.4% top-1 accuracy, and with 1% of ImageNet-1K labels, we achieve 75.7% top-1 accuracy, setting a new state-of-the-art for self-supervised learning on this benchmark. Our code is publicly available.
summary: We propose Masked Siamese Networks (MSN), a self-supervised learning framework for learning image representations. Our approach matches the representation of an image view containing randomly masked patches to the representation of the original unmasked image. This self-supervised pre-training strategy is particularly scalable when applied to Vision Transformers since only the unmasked patches are processed by the network. As a result, MSNs improve the scalability of joint-embedding architectures, while producing representations of a high semantic level that perform competitively on low-shot image classification. For instance, on ImageNet-1K, with only 5,000 annotated images, our base MSN model achieves 72.4% top-1 accuracy, and with 1% of ImageNet-1K labels, we achieve 75.7% top-1 accuracy, setting a new state-of-the-art for self-supervised learning on this benchmark. Our code is publicly available.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 Masked Siamese Networks (MSN)，这是一种用于学习图像表示的自监督学习框架。我们的方法将包含随机屏蔽补丁的图像视图的表示与原始未屏蔽图像的表示相匹配。这种自我监督的预训练策略在应用于 Vision Transformers 时特别具有可扩展性，因为网络只处理未屏蔽的补丁。因此，MSN 提高了联合嵌入架构的可扩展性，同时生成在低样本图像分类方面具有竞争力的高语义级别表示。例如，在 ImageNet-1K 上，仅使用 5,000 张带注释的图像，我们的基本 MSN 模型就实现了 72.4% 的 top-1 准确率，而使用 1% 的 ImageNet-1K 标签，我们就实现了 75.7% 的 top-1 准确率，在该基准上为自监督学习设定了新的最先进水平。我们的代码是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Masked Siamese Networks（MSN）的自监督学习框架，旨在通过遮罩图像块并匹配其与原始图像的表示来学习高效的图像表示，尤其适用于标签稀缺的场景。
AI.motivation: 传统自监督学习方法在处理大规模数据时效率有限，而标签高效学习需要在少量标注数据下实现高性能。作者希望通过遮罩策略减少计算量并提升模型在低样本分类任务中的表现。
AI.method: 采用Siamese网络结构，对图像进行随机遮罩后，将遮罩视图与原始视图的表示进行匹配。仅处理未遮罩的图像块以提高计算效率，适用于Vision Transformers架构。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1K数据集上，使用仅5,000张标注图像时，基础MSN模型达到72.4%的top-1准确率；使用1%的标签时达到75.7%，刷新了自监督学习在该基准上的最新纪录。
AI.conclusion: MSN框架通过遮罩和匹配策略有效提升了自监督学习的标签利用效率，在低样本场景下实现了竞争性性能，证明了其在大规模视觉任务中的可扩展性和有效性。

search_text: Masked Siamese Networks for Label-Efficient Learning 用于标签高效学习的蒙面连体网络 We propose Masked Siamese Networks (MSN), a self-supervised learning framework for learning image representations. Our approach matches the representation of an image view containing randomly masked patches to the representation of the original unmasked image. This self-supervised pre-training strategy is particularly scalable when applied to Vision Transformers since only the unmasked patches are processed by the network. As a result, MSNs improve the scalability of joint-embedding architectures, while producing representations of a high semantic level that perform competitively on low-shot image classification. For instance, on ImageNet-1K, with only 5,000 annotated images, our base MSN model achieves 72.4% top-1 accuracy, and with 1% of ImageNet-1K labels, we achieve 75.7% top-1 accuracy, setting a new state-of-the-art for self-supervised learning on this benchmark. Our code is publicly available. 我们提出了 Masked Siamese Networks (MSN)，这是一种用于学习图像表示的自监督学习框架。我们的方法将包含随机屏蔽补丁的图像视图的表示与原始未屏蔽图像的表示相匹配。这种自我监督的预训练策略在应用于 Vision Transformers 时特别具有可扩展性，因为网络只处理未屏蔽的补丁。因此，MSN 提高了联合嵌入架构的可扩展性，同时生成在低样本图像分类方面具有竞争力的高语义级别表示。例如，在 ImageNet-1K 上，仅使用 5,000 张带注释的图像，我们的基本 MSN 模型就实现了 72.4% 的 top-1 准确率，而使用 1% 的 ImageNet-1K 标签，我们就实现了 75.7% 的 top-1 准确率，在该基准上为自监督学习设定了新的最先进水平。我们的代码是公开的。 本文提出了一种名为Masked Siamese Networks（MSN）的自监督学习框架，旨在通过遮罩图像块并匹配其与原始图像的表示来学习高效的图像表示，尤其适用于标签稀缺的场景。 Mahmoud Assran,Mathilde Caron,Ishan Misra,Piotr Bojanowski,Florian Bordes,Pascal Vincent,Armand Joulin,Michael Rabbat,Nicolas Ballas cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Jie Xu,Viktor Makoviychuk,Yashraj Narang,Fabio Ramos,Wojciech Matusik,Animesh Garg,Miles Macklin
title: Accelerated Policy Learning with Parallel Differentiable Simulation
title_zh: 通过并行可微分模拟加速策略学习
abstract: Deep reinforcement learning can generate complex control policies, but requires large amounts of training data to work effectively. Recent work has attempted to address this issue by leveraging differentiable simulators. However, inherent problems such as local minima and exploding/vanishing numerical gradients prevent these methods from being generally applied to control tasks with complex contact-rich dynamics, such as humanoid locomotion in classical RL benchmarks. In this work we present a high-performance differentiable simulator and a new policy learning algorithm (SHAC) that can effectively leverage simulation gradients, even in the presence of non-smoothness. Our learning algorithm alleviates problems with local minima through a smooth critic function, avoids vanishing/exploding gradients through a truncated learning window, and allows many physical environments to be run in parallel. We evaluate our method on classical RL control tasks, and show substantial improvements in sample efficiency and wall-clock time over state-of-the-art RL and differentiable simulation-based algorithms. In addition, we demonstrate the scalability of our method by applying it to the challenging high-dimensional problem of muscle-actuated locomotion with a large action space, achieving a greater than 17x reduction in training time over the best-performing established RL algorithm.
summary: Deep reinforcement learning can generate complex control policies, but requires large amounts of training data to work effectively. Recent work has attempted to address this issue by leveraging differentiable simulators. However, inherent problems such as local minima and exploding/vanishing numerical gradients prevent these methods from being generally applied to control tasks with complex contact-rich dynamics, such as humanoid locomotion in classical RL benchmarks. In this work we present a high-performance differentiable simulator and a new policy learning algorithm (SHAC) that can effectively leverage simulation gradients, even in the presence of non-smoothness. Our learning algorithm alleviates problems with local minima through a smooth critic function, avoids vanishing/exploding gradients through a truncated learning window, and allows many physical environments to be run in parallel. We evaluate our method on classical RL control tasks, and show substantial improvements in sample efficiency and wall-clock time over state-of-the-art RL and differentiable simulation-based algorithms. In addition, we demonstrate the scalability of our method by applying it to the challenging high-dimensional problem of muscle-actuated locomotion with a large action space, achieving a greater than 17x reduction in training time over the best-performing established RL algorithm.
abstract_zh: 深度强化学习可以生成复杂的控制策略，但需要大量的训练数据才能有效发挥作用。最近的工作试图通过利用可微分模拟器来解决这个问题。然而，局部极小值和数值梯度爆炸/消失等固有问题使得这些方法无法普遍应用于具有复杂的接触丰富动力学的控制任务，例如经典强化学习基准中的人形运动。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种高性能可微模拟器和一种新的策略学习算法（SHAC），即使存在非平滑性，它也可以有效地利用模拟梯度。我们的学习算法通过平滑的批评函数缓解了局部最小值的问题，通过截断的学习窗口避免了梯度消失/爆炸，并允许许多物理环境并行运行。我们在经典强化学习控制任务上评估了我们的方法，结果表明，与最先进的强化学习和基于可微分模拟的算法相比，样本效率和挂钟时间有了显着改进。此外，我们还通过将我们的方法应用于具有大动作空间的肌肉驱动运动这一具有挑战性的高维问题来展示该方法的可扩展性，与性能最佳的既定 RL 算法相比，训练时间减少了 17 倍以上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高性能可微模拟器和新型策略学习算法SHAC，通过并行计算和梯度优化技术加速复杂控制任务的策略学习。
AI.motivation: 深度强化学习依赖大量训练数据，而现有可微模拟器在处理复杂接触动力学任务时存在局部最优和梯度不稳定问题，限制了其应用效果。
AI.method: 开发了支持并行仿真的可微模拟器，设计SHAC算法通过平滑价值函数、截断学习窗口和多环境并行计算解决梯度问题。
AI.result: 在经典RL任务中样本效率提升显著，肌肉驱动高维运动任务训练时间较最优RL算法缩短17倍以上。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了可微模拟在复杂控制场景中的有效性，为高维连续控制问题提供了新的高效求解范式。

authors_text: Mohammad Kachuee,Jinseok Nam,Sarthak Ahuja,Jin-Myung Won,Sungjin Lee
title: Scalable and Robust Self-Learning for Skill Routing in Large-Scale Conversational AI Systems
title_zh: 用于大规模对话式人工智能系统中技能路由的可扩展且稳健的自学习
abstract: Skill routing is an important component in large-scale conversational systems. In contrast to traditional rule-based skill routing, state-of-the-art systems use a model-based approach to enable natural conversations. To provide supervision signal required to train such models, ideas such as human annotation, replication of a rule-based system, relabeling based on user paraphrases, and bandit-based learning were suggested. However, these approaches: (a) do not scale in terms of the number of skills and skill on-boarding, (b) require a very costly expert annotation/rule-design, (c) introduce risks in the user experience with each model update. In this paper, we present a scalable self-learning approach to explore routing alternatives without causing abrupt policy changes that break the user experience, learn from the user interaction, and incrementally improve the routing via frequent model refreshes. To enable such robust frequent model updates, we suggest a simple and effective approach that ensures controlled policy updates for individual domains, followed by an off-policy evaluation for making deployment decisions without any need for lengthy A/B experimentation. We conduct various offline and online A/B experiments on a commercial large-scale conversational system to demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method in real-world production settings.
summary: Skill routing is an important component in large-scale conversational systems. In contrast to traditional rule-based skill routing, state-of-the-art systems use a model-based approach to enable natural conversations. To provide supervision signal required to train such models, ideas such as human annotation, replication of a rule-based system, relabeling based on user paraphrases, and bandit-based learning were suggested. However, these approaches: (a) do not scale in terms of the number of skills and skill on-boarding, (b) require a very costly expert annotation/rule-design, (c) introduce risks in the user experience with each model update. In this paper, we present a scalable self-learning approach to explore routing alternatives without causing abrupt policy changes that break the user experience, learn from the user interaction, and incrementally improve the routing via frequent model refreshes. To enable such robust frequent model updates, we suggest a simple and effective approach that ensures controlled policy updates for individual domains, followed by an off-policy evaluation for making deployment decisions without any need for lengthy A/B experimentation. We conduct various offline and online A/B experiments on a commercial large-scale conversational system to demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method in real-world production settings.
abstract_zh: 技能路由是大规模会话系统的重要组成部分。与传统的基于规则的技能路由相比，最先进的系统使用基于模型的方法来实现自然对话。为了提供训练此类模型所需的监督信号，提出了诸如人工注释、基于规则的系统的复制、基于用户释义的重新标记以及基于强盗的学习等想法。然而，这些方法：（a）在技能数量和技能培训方面无法扩展，（b）需要非常昂贵的专家注释/规则设计，（c）每次模型更新都会给用户体验带来风险。在本文中，我们提出了一种可扩展的自学习方法来探索路由替代方案，而不会导致破坏用户体验的突然策略更改，从用户交互中学习，并通过频繁的模型刷新逐步改进路由。为了实现如此强大的频繁模型更新，我们建议采用一种简单而有效的方法，确保各个域的受控策略更新，然后进行离策略评估以做出部署决策，而无需进行冗长的 A/B 实验。我们在商业大型会话系统上进行了各种离线和在线 A/B 实验，以证明所提出的方法在实际生产环境中的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可扩展且鲁棒的自学习方法，用于大规模对话AI系统中的技能路由，以解决现有方法在扩展性、成本和用户体验方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 传统基于规则的技能路由方法在大规模系统中存在扩展性差、依赖专家标注成本高以及模型更新可能破坏用户体验等问题，亟需更高效且稳定的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过自学习探索路由替代方案，结合用户交互数据进行增量优化，并采用分领域控制策略更新与离线评估方法，避免频繁模型更新对用户体验的影响。
AI.result: 在商业级大规模对话系统中通过离线和在线A/B实验验证，证明了该方法在实际生产环境中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为技能路由提供了可扩展、低成本且用户体验稳定的解决方案，显著优于现有方法。

We conduct various offline and online A/B experiments on a commercial large-scale conversational system to demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method in real-world production settings. 技能路由是大规模会话系统的重要组成部分。与传统的基于规则的技能路由相比，最先进的系统使用基于模型的方法来实现自然对话。为了提供训练此类模型所需的监督信号，提出了诸如人工注释、基于规则的系统的复制、基于用户释义的重新标记以及基于强盗的学习等想法。然而，这些方法：（a）在技能数量和技能培训方面无法扩展，（b）需要非常昂贵的专家注释/规则设计，（c）每次模型更新都会给用户体验带来风险。在本文中，我们提出了一种可扩展的自学习方法来探索路由替代方案，而不会导致破坏用户体验的突然策略更改，从用户交互中学习，并通过频繁的模型刷新逐步改进路由。为了实现如此强大的频繁模型更新，我们建议采用一种简单而有效的方法，确保各个域的受控策略更新，然后进行离策略评估以做出部署决策，而无需进行冗长的 A/B 实验。我们在商业大型会话系统上进行了各种离线和在线 A/B 实验，以证明所提出的方法在实际生产环境中的有效性。 本文提出了一种可扩展且鲁棒的自学习方法，用于大规模对话AI系统中的技能路由，以解决现有方法在扩展性、成本和用户体验方面的不足。 Mohammad Kachuee,Jinseok Nam,Sarthak Ahuja,Jin-Myung Won,Sungjin Lee cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.HC

authors_text: Jakub Nawała,Tobias Hoßfeld,Lucjan Janowski,Michael Seufert
title: Systematic Analysis of Experiment Precision Measures and Methods for Experiments Comparison
title_zh: 实验精度测量和实验比较方法的系统分析
comment: 18 pages, 9 figures. Under review in IEEE Transactions on Multimedia. More results and references added. Improved style. Discussion section and appendices extended
comments: 18 pages, 9 figures. Under review in IEEE Transactions on Multimedia. More results and references added. Improved style. Discussion section and appendices extended
abstract: The notion of experiment precision quantifies the variance of user ratings in a subjective experiment. Although there exist measures that assess subjective experiment precision, there are no systematic analyses of these measures available in the literature. To the best of our knowledge, there is also no systematic framework in the Multimedia Quality Assessment field for comparing subjective experiments in terms of their precision. Therefore, the main idea of this paper is to propose a framework for comparing subjective experiments in the field of MQA based on appropriate experiment precision measures. We present three experiment precision measures and three related experiment precision comparison methods. We systematically analyse the performance of the measures and methods proposed. We do so both through a simulation study (varying user rating variance and bias) and by using data from four real-world Quality of Experience (QoE) subjective experiments. In the simulation study we focus on crowdsourcing QoE experiments, since they are known to generate ratings with higher variance and bias, when compared to traditional subjective experiment methodologies. We conclude that our proposed measures and related comparison methods properly capture experiment precision (both when tested on simulated and real-world data). One of the measures also proves capable of dealing with even significantly biased responses. We believe our experiment precision assessment framework will help compare different subjective experiment methodologies. For example, it may help decide which methodology results in more precise user ratings. This may potentially inform future standardisation activities.

We present three experiment precision measures and three related experiment precision comparison methods. We systematically analyse the performance of the measures and methods proposed. We do so both through a simulation study (varying user rating variance and bias) and by using data from four real-world Quality of Experience (QoE) subjective experiments. In the simulation study we focus on crowdsourcing QoE experiments, since they are known to generate ratings with higher variance and bias, when compared to traditional subjective experiment methodologies. We conclude that our proposed measures and related comparison methods properly capture experiment precision (both when tested on simulated and real-world data). One of the measures also proves capable of dealing with even significantly biased responses. We believe our experiment precision assessment framework will help compare different subjective experiment methodologies. For example, it may help decide which methodology results in more precise user ratings. This may potentially inform future standardisation activities.
abstract_zh: 实验精度的概念量化了主观实验中用户评分的方差。尽管存在评估主观实验精度的措施，但文献中没有对这些措施进行系统分析。据我们所知，多媒体质量评估领域还没有系统的框架来比较主观实验的精度。因此，本文的主要思想是提出一个基于适当的实验精度测量的 MQA 领域主观实验比较框架。我们提出了三种实验精度测量和三种相关实验精度比较方法。我们系统地分析了所提出的措施和方法的绩效。我们通过模拟研究（不同的用户评分方差和偏差）和使用来自四个现实世界体验质量 (QoE) 主观实验的数据来做到这一点。在模拟研究中，我们重点关注众包 QoE 实验，因为与传统的主观实验方法相比，众包 QoE 实验会产生更高方差和偏差的评分。我们得出的结论是，我们提出的措施和相关比较方法正确地捕获了实验精度（在模拟和真实数据上进行测试时）。其中一项措施也被证明能够处理甚至存在明显偏见的反应。我们相信我们的实验精度评估框架将有助于比较不同的主观实验方法。例如，它可能有助于确定哪种方法可以产生更精确的用户评级。这可能会为未来的标准化活动提供信息。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于实验精度度量的方法框架，用于在多媒体质量评估领域比较主观实验的精度。
AI.motivation: 现有文献缺乏对主观实验精度度量的系统性分析，且在多媒体质量评估领域缺少比较主观实验精度的系统框架。
AI.method: 提出三种实验精度度量方法和三种比较方法，通过模拟研究（调整用户评分方差和偏差）及四个真实世界QoE实验数据进行验证，重点分析众包QoE实验的高方差和偏差特性。
AI.result: 提出的度量和方法在模拟和真实数据中均能有效捕捉实验精度，其中一种度量方法对显著偏差具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架可帮助比较不同主观实验方法的精度，为未来标准化活动提供参考依据。

authors_text: Felicia Lucke,Daniël Paulusma,Bernard Ries
title: On The Complexity of Matching Cut for Graphs of Bounded Radius and $H$-Free Graphs
title_zh: 有界半径图和$H$自由图匹配割的复杂性
abstract: For a connected graph $G=(V,E)$, a matching $M\subseteq E$ is a matching cut of $G$ if $G-M$ is disconnected. It is known that for an integer $d$, the corresponding decision problem Matching Cut is polynomial-time solvable for graphs of diameter at most $d$ if $d\leq 2$ and NP-complete if $d\geq 3$. We prove the same dichotomy for graphs of bounded radius. For a graph $H$, a graph is $H$-free if it does not contain $H$ as an induced subgraph. As a consequence of our result, we can solve Matching Cut in polynomial time for $P_6$-free graphs, extending a recent result of Feghali for $P_5$-free graphs. We then extend our result to hold even for $(sP_3+P_6)$-free graphs for every $s\geq 0$ and initiate a complexity classification of Matching Cut for $H$-free graphs.
summary: For a connected graph $G=(V,E)$, a matching $M\subseteq E$ is a matching cut of $G$ if $G-M$ is disconnected. It is known that for an integer $d$, the corresponding decision problem Matching Cut is polynomial-time solvable for graphs of diameter at most $d$ if $d\leq 2$ and NP-complete if $d\geq 3$. We prove the same dichotomy for graphs of bounded radius. For a graph $H$, a graph is $H$-free if it does not contain $H$ as an induced subgraph. As a consequence of our result, we can solve Matching Cut in polynomial time for $P_6$-free graphs, extending a recent result of Feghali for $P_5$-free graphs. We then extend our result to hold even for $(sP_3+P_6)$-free graphs for every $s\geq 0$ and initiate a complexity classification of Matching Cut for $H$-free graphs.
abstract_zh: 对于连通图 $G=(V,E)$，如果 $G-M$ 断开连接，则匹配的 $M\subseteq E$ 是 $G$ 的匹配割。众所周知，对于整数$d$，如果$d\leq 2$，对应的决策问题Matching Cut对于直径最大为$d$的图是多项式时间可解的，如果$d\geq 3$则为NP完全。我们对有界半径图证明了相同的二分法。对于图 $H$，如果图不包含 $H$ 作为导出子图，则该图是 $H$-free 的。根据我们的结果，我们可以在多项式时间内解决无 $P_6$ 图的匹配切割问题，扩展 Feghali 最近的无 $P_5$ 图结果。然后，我们扩展我们的结果，即使对于每个 $s\geq 0$ 的 $(sP_3+P_6)$-free 图也成立，并为 $H$-free 图启动匹配切割的复杂性分类。

AI.tldr: 研究匹配割问题在有界半径图和H-自由图中的复杂性分类。
AI.motivation: 已知匹配割问题在直径≤2的图中是多项式可解的，而在直径≥3时为NP难。本文旨在将这一二分法扩展到有界半径图，并探索H-自由图的复杂性分类。
AI.method: 通过图论分析和复杂性理论，结合对特定图类（如P6-自由图）的结构特性研究，扩展已有结果并进行分类。
AI.result: 证明了有界半径图的匹配割问题具有相同的二分性；在P6-自由图及(sP3+P6)-自由图中多项式时间内可解，并启动了H-自由图的复杂性分类研究。
AI.conclusion: 扩展了直径相关结果至半径领域，为H-自由图的匹配割问题复杂性分类提供了新方向。

authors_text: Jianglong Ye,Yuntao Chen,Naiyan Wang,Xiaolong Wang
title: GIFS: Neural Implicit Function for General Shape Representation
title_zh: GIFS：用于一般形状表示的神经隐式函数
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2022. Project page: https://jianglongye.com/gifs
comments: Accepted to CVPR 2022. Project page: https://jianglongye.com/gifs
abstract: Recent development of neural implicit function has shown tremendous success on high-quality 3D shape reconstruction. However, most works divide the space into inside and outside of the shape, which limits their representing power to single-layer and watertight shapes. This limitation leads to tedious data processing (converting non-watertight raw data to watertight) as well as the incapability of representing general object shapes in the real world. In this work, we propose a novel method to represent general shapes including non-watertight shapes and shapes with multi-layer surfaces. We introduce General Implicit Function for 3D Shape (GIFS), which models the relationships between every two points instead of the relationships between points and surfaces. Instead of dividing 3D space into predefined inside-outside regions, GIFS encodes whether two points are separated by any surface. Experiments on ShapeNet show that GIFS outperforms previous state-of-the-art methods in terms of reconstruction quality, rendering efficiency, and visual fidelity. Project page is available at https://jianglongye.com/gifs .
summary: Recent development of neural implicit function has shown tremendous success on high-quality 3D shape reconstruction. However, most works divide the space into inside and outside of the shape, which limits their representing power to single-layer and watertight shapes. This limitation leads to tedious data processing (converting non-watertight raw data to watertight) as well as the incapability of representing general object shapes in the real world. In this work, we propose a novel method to represent general shapes including non-watertight shapes and shapes with multi-layer surfaces. We introduce General Implicit Function for 3D Shape (GIFS), which models the relationships between every two points instead of the relationships between points and surfaces. Instead of dividing 3D space into predefined inside-outside regions, GIFS encodes whether two points are separated by any surface. Experiments on ShapeNet show that GIFS outperforms previous state-of-the-art methods in terms of reconstruction quality, rendering efficiency, and visual fidelity. Project page is available at https://jianglongye.com/gifs .
abstract_zh: 神经隐式函数的最新发展在高质量 3D 形状重建方面取得了巨大成功。然而，大多数作品将空间划分为形状的内部和外部，这将其表现力限制在单层和水密的形状。这种限制导致繁琐的数据处理（将非防水原始数据转换为防水）以及无法表示现实世界中的一般对象形状。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的方法来表示一般形状，包括非水密形状和具有多层表面的形状。我们引入了 3D 形状的通用隐式函数 (GIFS)，它对每两点之间的关系进行建模，而不是对点和曲面之间的关系进行建模。 GIFS 不是将 3D 空间划分为预定义的内外区域，而是对两个点是否被任何表面分开进行编码。 ShapeNet 上的实验表明，GIFS 在重建质量、渲染效率和视觉保真度方面优于以前最先进的方法。项目页面位于 https://jianlongye.com/gifs 。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型神经隐式函数GIFS，用于表示包含非封闭结构和多层表面的通用3D形状。
AI.motivation: 传统神经隐式函数通过划分空间内外区域表示形状，难以处理现实世界中复杂的非封闭和多层物体，导致数据预处理繁琐且表示能力受限。
AI.method: GIFS通过建模任意两点间的空间关系，而非传统点-表面关系，无需预定义内外区域，直接编码两点是否被表面分隔。
AI.result: 在ShapeNet数据集上，GIFS在重建质量、渲染效率和视觉保真度指标上均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: GIFS突破了传统隐式函数的空间划分限制，为复杂物体的通用形状表示提供了有效解决方案。

search_text: GIFS: Neural Implicit Function for General Shape Representation GIFS：用于一般形状表示的神经隐式函数 Recent development of neural implicit function has shown tremendous success on high-quality 3D shape reconstruction. However, most works divide the space into inside and outside of the shape, which limits their representing power to single-layer and watertight shapes. This limitation leads to tedious data processing (converting non-watertight raw data to watertight) as well as the incapability of representing general object shapes in the real world. In this work, we propose a novel method to represent general shapes including non-watertight shapes and shapes with multi-layer surfaces. We introduce General Implicit Function for 3D Shape (GIFS), which models the relationships between every two points instead of the relationships between points and surfaces. Instead of dividing 3D space into predefined inside-outside regions, GIFS encodes whether two points are separated by any surface. Experiments on ShapeNet show that GIFS outperforms previous state-of-the-art methods in terms of reconstruction quality, rendering efficiency, and visual fidelity. Project page is available at https://jianglongye.com/gifs . 神经隐式函数的最新发展在高质量 3D 形状重建方面取得了巨大成功。然而，大多数作品将空间划分为形状的内部和外部，这将其表现力限制在单层和水密的形状。这种限制导致繁琐的数据处理（将非防水原始数据转换为防水）以及无法表示现实世界中的一般对象形状。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的方法来表示一般形状，包括非水密形状和具有多层表面的形状。我们引入了 3D 形状的通用隐式函数 (GIFS)，它对每两点之间的关系进行建模，而不是对点和曲面之间的关系进行建模。 GIFS 不是将 3D 空间划分为预定义的内外区域，而是对两个点是否被任何表面分开进行编码。 ShapeNet 上的实验表明，GIFS 在重建质量、渲染效率和视觉保真度方面优于以前最先进的方法。项目页面位于 https://jianlongye.com/gifs 。 本文提出一种新型神经隐式函数GIFS，用于表示包含非封闭结构和多层表面的通用3D形状。 Jianglong Ye,Yuntao Chen,Naiyan Wang,Xiaolong Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Rohin Shah,Steven H. Wang,Cody Wild,Stephanie Milani,Anssi Kanervisto,Vinicius G. Goecks,Nicholas Waytowich,David Watkins-Valls,Bharat Prakash,Edmund Mills,Divyansh Garg,Alexander Fries,Alexandra Souly,Chan Jun Shern,Daniel del Castillo,Tom Lieberum
title: Retrospective on the 2021 BASALT Competition on Learning from Human Feedback
title_zh: 2021年BASALT人类反馈学习竞赛回顾
comment: Accepted to the PMLR NeurIPS 2021 Demo & Competition Track volume
comments: Accepted to the PMLR NeurIPS 2021 Demo & Competition Track volume
abstract: We held the first-ever MineRL Benchmark for Agents that Solve Almost-Lifelike Tasks (MineRL BASALT) Competition at the Thirty-fifth Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2021). The goal of the competition was to promote research towards agents that use learning from human feedback (LfHF) techniques to solve open-world tasks. Rather than mandating the use of LfHF techniques, we described four tasks in natural language to be accomplished in the video game Minecraft, and allowed participants to use any approach they wanted to build agents that could accomplish the tasks. Teams developed a diverse range of LfHF algorithms across a variety of possible human feedback types. The three winning teams implemented significantly different approaches while achieving similar performance. Interestingly, their approaches performed well on different tasks, validating our choice of tasks to include in the competition. While the outcomes validated the design of our competition, we did not get as many participants and submissions as our sister competition, MineRL Diamond. We speculate about the causes of this problem and suggest improvements for future iterations of the competition.
summary: We held the first-ever MineRL Benchmark for Agents that Solve Almost-Lifelike Tasks (MineRL BASALT) Competition at the Thirty-fifth Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2021). The goal of the competition was to promote research towards agents that use learning from human feedback (LfHF) techniques to solve open-world tasks. Rather than mandating the use of LfHF techniques, we described four tasks in natural language to be accomplished in the video game Minecraft, and allowed participants to use any approach they wanted to build agents that could accomplish the tasks. Teams developed a diverse range of LfHF algorithms across a variety of possible human feedback types. The three winning teams implemented significantly different approaches while achieving similar performance. Interestingly, their approaches performed well on different tasks, validating our choice of tasks to include in the competition. While the outcomes validated the design of our competition, we did not get as many participants and submissions as our sister competition, MineRL Diamond. We speculate about the causes of this problem and suggest improvements for future iterations of the competition.
abstract_zh: 我们在第三十五届神经信息处理系统会议 (NeurIPS 2021) 上举办了首届 MineRL BASALT 竞赛。竞赛的目标是促进对使用人类反馈学习（LfHF）技术来解决开放世界任务的智能体的研究。我们没有强制使用 LfHF 技术，而是用自然语言描述了视频游戏 Minecraft 中要完成的四项任务，并允许参与者使用他们想要的任何方法来构建可以完成任务的代理。团队针对各种可能的人类反馈类型开发了多种 LfHF 算法。三支获胜团队采用了截然不同的方法，但取得了相似的表现。有趣的是，他们的方法在不同的任务上表现良好，验证了我们选择包含在竞赛中的任务。虽然结果验证了我们竞赛的设计，但我们并没有像我们的姊妹竞赛 MineRL Diamond 那样获得尽可能多的参与者和提交的作品。我们推测这个问题的原因，并为未来的比赛迭代提出改进建议。

AI.tldr: 本文回顾了2021年在NeurIPS会议上举办的MineRL BASALT竞赛，该竞赛旨在推动基于人类反馈学习（LfHF）技术的研究，以解决开放世界任务。
AI.motivation: 竞赛的目标是促进研究，使智能体能够使用学习人类反馈（LfHF）技术来解决开放世界任务，并鼓励研究人员探索不同的LfHF方法。
AI.method: 竞赛中，研究人员被要求在Minecraft游戏中完成四个自然语言描述的任务，允许他们使用任何方法构建智能体，没有强制要求使用LfHF技术。
AI.result: 参赛团队开发了多种不同的LfHF算法，表现各异。虽然竞赛设计得到了验证，但参与人数和提交作品数量少于同期的MineRL Diamond竞赛。
AI.conclusion: 竞赛设计成功，但参与度不如预期。作者分析了可能的原因，并提出了未来改进的建议。

authors_text: Qingxiao Zheng,Tue Ngoc Do,Lingqing Wang,Yun Huang
title: Facing the Illusion and Reality of Safety in Social VR
title_zh: 面对社交 VR 中安全的幻想与现实
comment: (CHI'EA' 2022) In CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems, Proceedings of the 1st Workshop on Novel Challenges of Safety, Security and Privacy in Extended Reality
comments: (CHI'EA' 2022) In CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems, Proceedings of the 1st Workshop on Novel Challenges of Safety, Security and Privacy in Extended Reality
abstract: The ethical design of social Virtual Reality (VR) is not a new topic, but "safety" concerns of using social VR are escalated to a different level given the heat of the Metaverse. For example, it was reported that nearly half of the female-identifying VR participants have had at least one instance of virtual sexual harassment. Feeling safe is a basic human right - in any place, regardless in real or virtual spaces. In this paper, we are seeking to understand the discrepancy between user concerns and designs in protecting user safety in social VR applications. We study safety concerns on social VR experience first by analyzing Twitter posts and then synthesize practices on safety protection adopted by four mainstream social VR platforms. We argue that future research and platforms should explore the design of social VR with boundary-awareness.
summary: The ethical design of social Virtual Reality (VR) is not a new topic, but "safety" concerns of using social VR are escalated to a different level given the heat of the Metaverse. For example, it was reported that nearly half of the female-identifying VR participants have had at least one instance of virtual sexual harassment. Feeling safe is a basic human right - in any place, regardless in real or virtual spaces. In this paper, we are seeking to understand the discrepancy between user concerns and designs in protecting user safety in social VR applications. We study safety concerns on social VR experience first by analyzing Twitter posts and then synthesize practices on safety protection adopted by four mainstream social VR platforms. We argue that future research and platforms should explore the design of social VR with boundary-awareness.
abstract_zh: 社交虚拟现实（VR）的伦理设计并不是一个新话题，但鉴于元宇宙的热度，使用社交虚拟现实的“安全”担忧升级到了不同的水平。例如，据报道，近一半的女性 VR 参与者至少经历过一次虚拟性骚扰。感到安全是一项基本人权——在任何地方，无论是在现实空间还是虚拟空间。在本文中，我们试图了解社交 VR 应用中用户关注点与保护用户安全的设计之间的差异。我们首先通过分析Twitter帖子来研究社交VR体验的安全问题，然后综合四大主流社交VR平台的安全防护实践。我们认为未来的研究和平台应该探索具有边界意识的社交 VR 设计。

AI.tldr: 探讨社交VR中用户安全顾虑与现有设计之间的差异，并提出边界意识设计的必要性
AI.motivation: 随着元宇宙热潮，社交VR中的安全问题（如虚拟性骚扰）加剧，需重新审视用户安全需求与现有设计的匹配度
AI.method: 通过分析Twitter上的用户讨论和四个主流社交VR平台的安全保护实践，识别用户担忧与设计实践的差异
AI.result: 发现现有平台的安全措施与用户对虚拟空间安全的核心需求存在显著差距，尤其在边界意识方面
AI.conclusion: 未来社交VR的设计需融入边界意识，以弥合用户安全需求与技术实现之间的鸿沟

search_text: Facing the Illusion and Reality of Safety in Social VR 面对社交 VR 中安全的幻想与现实 The ethical design of social Virtual Reality (VR) is not a new topic, but "safety" concerns of using social VR are escalated to a different level given the heat of the Metaverse. For example, it was reported that nearly half of the female-identifying VR participants have had at least one instance of virtual sexual harassment. Feeling safe is a basic human right - in any place, regardless in real or virtual spaces. In this paper, we are seeking to understand the discrepancy between user concerns and designs in protecting user safety in social VR applications. We study safety concerns on social VR experience first by analyzing Twitter posts and then synthesize practices on safety protection adopted by four mainstream social VR platforms. We argue that future research and platforms should explore the design of social VR with boundary-awareness. 社交虚拟现实（VR）的伦理设计并不是一个新话题，但鉴于元宇宙的热度，使用社交虚拟现实的“安全”担忧升级到了不同的水平。例如，据报道，近一半的女性 VR 参与者至少经历过一次虚拟性骚扰。感到安全是一项基本人权——在任何地方，无论是在现实空间还是虚拟空间。在本文中，我们试图了解社交 VR 应用中用户关注点与保护用户安全的设计之间的差异。我们首先通过分析Twitter帖子来研究社交VR体验的安全问题，然后综合四大主流社交VR平台的安全防护实践。我们认为未来的研究和平台应该探索具有边界意识的社交 VR 设计。 探讨社交VR中用户安全顾虑与现有设计之间的差异，并提出边界意识设计的必要性 Qingxiao Zheng,Tue Ngoc Do,Lingqing Wang,Yun Huang cs.HC

authors_text: Hugo Touvron,Matthieu Cord,Hervé Jégou
title: DeiT III: Revenge of the ViT
title_zh: DeiT III：ViT 的复仇
abstract: A Vision Transformer (ViT) is a simple neural architecture amenable to serve several computer vision tasks. It has limited built-in architectural priors, in contrast to more recent architectures that incorporate priors either about the input data or of specific tasks. Recent works show that ViTs benefit from self-supervised pre-training, in particular BerT-like pre-training like BeiT. In this paper, we revisit the supervised training of ViTs. Our procedure builds upon and simplifies a recipe introduced for training ResNet-50. It includes a new simple data-augmentation procedure with only 3 augmentations, closer to the practice in self-supervised learning. Our evaluations on Image classification (ImageNet-1k with and without pre-training on ImageNet-21k), transfer learning and semantic segmentation show that our procedure outperforms by a large margin previous fully supervised training recipes for ViT. It also reveals that the performance of our ViT trained with supervision is comparable to that of more recent architectures. Our results could serve as better baselines for recent self-supervised approaches demonstrated on ViT.
summary: A Vision Transformer (ViT) is a simple neural architecture amenable to serve several computer vision tasks. It has limited built-in architectural priors, in contrast to more recent architectures that incorporate priors either about the input data or of specific tasks. Recent works show that ViTs benefit from self-supervised pre-training, in particular BerT-like pre-training like BeiT. In this paper, we revisit the supervised training of ViTs. Our procedure builds upon and simplifies a recipe introduced for training ResNet-50. It includes a new simple data-augmentation procedure with only 3 augmentations, closer to the practice in self-supervised learning. Our evaluations on Image classification (ImageNet-1k with and without pre-training on ImageNet-21k), transfer learning and semantic segmentation show that our procedure outperforms by a large margin previous fully supervised training recipes for ViT. It also reveals that the performance of our ViT trained with supervision is comparable to that of more recent architectures. Our results could serve as better baselines for recent self-supervised approaches demonstrated on ViT.
abstract_zh: 视觉变换器（ViT）是一种简单的神经架构，可以服务于多种计算机视觉任务。与包含有关输入数据或特定任务的先验的最新架构相比，它具有有限的内置架构先验。最近的研究表明，ViT 受益于自监督预训练，特别是像 BeiT 这样的类似 BerT 的预训练。在本文中，我们重新审视 ViT 的监督训练。我们的程序基于并简化了为训练 ResNet-50 引入的方法。它包括一个新的简单数据增强程序，仅进行 3 次增强，更接近于自我监督学习的实践。我们对图像分类（在 ImageNet-21k 上进行或不进行预训练的 ImageNet-1k）、迁移学习和语义分割的评估表明，我们的程序大大优于之前的 ViT 完全监督训练方案。它还表明，我们经过监督训练的 ViT 的性能与最新的架构相当。我们的结果可以作为最近在 ViT 上展示的自我监督方法的更好基线。

AI.tldr: 改进Vision Transformer（ViT）的监督训练方法，通过优化数据增强和训练策略提升其在多个视觉任务中的性能。
AI.motivation: ViT缺乏内置的架构先验，且其监督训练方法未充分挖掘其潜力，需通过优化训练策略提升性能。
AI.method: 提出一种简化的监督训练方法，采用仅三种数据增强步骤，基于ResNet-50的训练策略优化ViT的训练过程。
AI.result: 在多个视觉任务中，该方法显著优于现有全监督ViT训练方法，且性能接近最新架构。
AI.conclusion: 证明了优化后的监督训练方法在ViT上的有效性，为后续自监督研究提供了更优的基准。

authors_text: Takashi Isobe,Xu Jia,Xin Tao,Changlin Li,Ruihuang Li,Yongjie Shi,Jing Mu,Huchuan Lu,Yu-Wing Tai
title: Look Back and Forth: Video Super-Resolution with Explicit Temporal Difference Modeling
title_zh: 回顾过去：具有显式时间差异建模的视频超分辨率
abstract: Temporal modeling is crucial for video super-resolution. Most of the video super-resolution methods adopt the optical flow or deformable convolution for explicitly motion compensation. However, such temporal modeling techniques increase the model complexity and might fail in case of occlusion or complex motion, resulting in serious distortion and artifacts. In this paper, we propose to explore the role of explicit temporal difference modeling in both LR and HR space. Instead of directly feeding consecutive frames into a VSR model, we propose to compute the temporal difference between frames and divide those pixels into two subsets according to the level of difference. They are separately processed with two branches of different receptive fields in order to better extract complementary information. To further enhance the super-resolution result, not only spatial residual features are extracted, but the difference between consecutive frames in high-frequency domain is also computed. It allows the model to exploit intermediate SR results in both future and past to refine the current SR output. The difference at different time steps could be cached such that information from further distance in time could be propagated to the current frame for refinement. Experiments on several video super-resolution benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method and its favorable performance against state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Temporal modeling is crucial for video super-resolution. Most of the video super-resolution methods adopt the optical flow or deformable convolution for explicitly motion compensation. However, such temporal modeling techniques increase the model complexity and might fail in case of occlusion or complex motion, resulting in serious distortion and artifacts. In this paper, we propose to explore the role of explicit temporal difference modeling in both LR and HR space. Instead of directly feeding consecutive frames into a VSR model, we propose to compute the temporal difference between frames and divide those pixels into two subsets according to the level of difference. They are separately processed with two branches of different receptive fields in order to better extract complementary information. To further enhance the super-resolution result, not only spatial residual features are extracted, but the difference between consecutive frames in high-frequency domain is also computed. It allows the model to exploit intermediate SR results in both future and past to refine the current SR output. The difference at different time steps could be cached such that information from further distance in time could be propagated to the current frame for refinement. Experiments on several video super-resolution benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method and its favorable performance against state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 时间建模对于视频超分辨率至关重要。大多数视频超分辨率方法采用光流或可变形卷积来进行显式运动补偿。然而，这种时间建模技术增加了模型的复杂性，并且在遮挡或复杂运动的情况下可能会失败，从而导致严重的失真和伪影。在本文中，我们建议探索显式时间差异建模在 LR 和 HR 空间中的作用。我们建议计算帧之间的时间差异，并根据差异程度将这些像素分为两个子集，而不是直接将连续帧输入 VSR 模型。它们分别用不同感受野的两个分支进行处理，以便更好地提取互补信息。为了进一步增强超分辨率结果，不仅提取空间残差特征，还计算高频域中连续帧之间的差异。它允许模型利用未来和过去的中间 SR 结果来细化当前的 SR 输出。不同时间步长的差异可以被缓存，以便来自更远时间距离的信息可以传播到当前帧以进行细化。对多个视频超分辨率基准数据集的实验证明了所提出方法的有效性及其相对于最先进方法的良好性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于显式时序差分建模的视频超分辨率方法，通过建模帧间差异提升视频超分辨率效果。
AI.motivation: 现有视频超分辨率方法依赖光流或可变形卷积进行运动补偿，但存在模型复杂度高、遮挡或复杂运动下易产生失真和伪影的问题。
AI.method: 计算帧间时序差分，按差异程度将像素分为两组，分别用不同感受野的分支处理；同时提取高频域帧间差异，并利用未来和过去超分结果优化当前帧，通过缓存不同时步差异实现信息传播。
AI.result: 在多个视频超分辨率基准数据集上验证了方法的有效性，性能优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 显式时序差分建模能有效提升复杂运动场景下的视频超分辨率质量，减少失真和伪影。

authors_text: Wenzhu Xing,Karen Egiazarian
title: Residual Swin Transformer Channel Attention Network for Image Demosaicing
title_zh: 用于图像去马赛克的剩余 Swin Transformer 通道注意网络
abstract: Image demosaicing is problem of interpolating full- resolution color images from raw sensor (color filter array) data. During last decade, deep neural networks have been widely used in image restoration, and in particular, in demosaicing, attaining significant performance improvement. In recent years, vision transformers have been designed and successfully used in various computer vision applications. One of the recent methods of image restoration based on a Swin Transformer (ST), SwinIR, demonstrates state-of-the-art performance with a smaller number of parameters than neural network-based methods. Inspired by the success of SwinIR, we propose in this paper a novel Swin Transformer-based network for image demosaicing, called RSTCANet. To extract image features, RSTCANet stacks several residual Swin Transformer Channel Attention blocks (RSTCAB), introducing the channel attention for each two successive ST blocks. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RSTCANet out- performs state-of-the-art image demosaicing methods, and has a smaller number of parameters.
summary: Image demosaicing is problem of interpolating full- resolution color images from raw sensor (color filter array) data. During last decade, deep neural networks have been widely used in image restoration, and in particular, in demosaicing, attaining significant performance improvement. In recent years, vision transformers have been designed and successfully used in various computer vision applications. One of the recent methods of image restoration based on a Swin Transformer (ST), SwinIR, demonstrates state-of-the-art performance with a smaller number of parameters than neural network-based methods. Inspired by the success of SwinIR, we propose in this paper a novel Swin Transformer-based network for image demosaicing, called RSTCANet. To extract image features, RSTCANet stacks several residual Swin Transformer Channel Attention blocks (RSTCAB), introducing the channel attention for each two successive ST blocks. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RSTCANet out- performs state-of-the-art image demosaicing methods, and has a smaller number of parameters.
abstract_zh: 图像去马赛克是从原始传感器（滤色器阵列）数据中插值全分辨率彩色图像的问题。在过去的十年中，深度神经网络已广泛应用于图像恢复，特别是去马赛克，取得了显着的性能提升。近年来，视觉变压器已被设计并成功应用于各种计算机视觉应用中。 SwinIR 是基于 Swin Transformer (ST) 的最新图像恢复方法之一，与基于神经网络的方法相比，它使用更少的参数展示了最先进的性能。受 SwinIR 成功的启发，我们在本文中提出了一种新颖的基于 Swin Transformer 的图像去马赛克网络，称为 RSTCANet。为了提取图像特征，RSTCANet 堆叠了几个残差 Swin Transformer 通道注意块 (RSTCAB)，为每两个连续的 ST 块引入通道注意。大量实验表明，RSTCANet 的性能优于最先进的图像去马赛克方法，并且参数数量较少。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于残差Swin Transformer通道注意力网络（RSTCANet）的图像去马赛克方法，通过引入通道注意力机制提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在图像去马赛克任务中存在参数量大或性能不足的问题，而SwinIR等基于Swin Transformer的方法在图像修复中表现优异且参数更少，因此需设计更高效的网络结构。
AI.method: 构建RSTCANet网络，通过堆叠多个残差Swin Transformer通道注意力块（RSTCAB），在两个连续Swin Transformer块间引入通道注意力机制以增强特征提取能力。
AI.result: 实验表明RSTCANet在图像去马赛克任务中优于现有最先进方法，且参数量更少。
AI.conclusion: RSTCANet通过融合残差结构与通道注意力机制，有效提升了图像去马赛克的性能与效率。
