authors_text: Zhiyuan Wu,Sheng Sun,Yuwei Wang,Min Liu,Quyang Pan,Junbo Zhang,Zeju Li,Qingxiang Liu
title: Exploring the Distributed Knowledge Congruence in Proxy-data-free Federated Distillation
title_zh: 探索无代理数据联合蒸馏中的分布式知识一致性
comment: Accepted by ACM Transactions on Intelligent Systems and Technology
comments: Accepted by ACM Transactions on Intelligent Systems and Technology
abstract: Federated learning (FL) is a privacy-preserving machine learning paradigm in which the server periodically aggregates local model parameters from clients without assembling their private data. Constrained communication and personalization requirements pose severe challenges to FL. Federated distillation (FD) is proposed to simultaneously address the above two problems, which exchanges knowledge between the server and clients, supporting heterogeneous local models while significantly reducing communication overhead. However, most existing FD methods require a proxy dataset, which is often unavailable in reality. A few recent proxy-data-free FD approaches can eliminate the need for additional public data, but suffer from remarkable discrepancy among local knowledge due to client-side model heterogeneity, leading to ambiguous representation on the server and inevitable accuracy degradation. To tackle this issue, we propose a proxy-data-free FD algorithm based on distributed knowledge congruence (FedDKC). FedDKC leverages well-designed refinement strategies to narrow local knowledge differences into an acceptable upper bound, so as to mitigate the negative effects of knowledge incongruence. Specifically, from perspectives of peak probability and Shannon entropy of local knowledge, we design kernel-based knowledge refinement (KKR) and searching-based knowledge refinement (SKR) respectively, and theoretically guarantee that the refined-local knowledge can satisfy an approximately-similar distribution and be regarded as congruent. Extensive experiments conducted on three common datasets demonstrate that our proposed FedDKC significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art on various heterogeneous settings while evidently improving the convergence speed.
summary: Federated learning (FL) is a privacy-preserving machine learning paradigm in which the server periodically aggregates local model parameters from clients without assembling their private data. Constrained communication and personalization requirements pose severe challenges to FL. Federated distillation (FD) is proposed to simultaneously address the above two problems, which exchanges knowledge between the server and clients, supporting heterogeneous local models while significantly reducing communication overhead. However, most existing FD methods require a proxy dataset, which is often unavailable in reality. A few recent proxy-data-free FD approaches can eliminate the need for additional public data, but suffer from remarkable discrepancy among local knowledge due to client-side model heterogeneity, leading to ambiguous representation on the server and inevitable accuracy degradation. To tackle this issue, we propose a proxy-data-free FD algorithm based on distributed knowledge congruence (FedDKC). FedDKC leverages well-designed refinement strategies to narrow local knowledge differences into an acceptable upper bound, so as to mitigate the negative effects of knowledge incongruence. Specifically, from perspectives of peak probability and Shannon entropy of local knowledge, we design kernel-based knowledge refinement (KKR) and searching-based knowledge refinement (SKR) respectively, and theoretically guarantee that the refined-local knowledge can satisfy an approximately-similar distribution and be regarded as congruent. Extensive experiments conducted on three common datasets demonstrate that our proposed FedDKC significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art on various heterogeneous settings while evidently improving the convergence speed.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习（FL）是一种保护隐私的机器学习范例，其中服务器定期聚合来自客户端的本地模型参数，而不组装其私有数据。有限的沟通和个性化要求给 FL 带来了严峻的挑战。联邦蒸馏（FD）的提出是为了同时解决上述两个问题，它在服务器和客户端之间交换知识，支持异构本地模型，同时显着减少通信开销。然而，大多数现有的FD方法都需要代理数据集，而这在现实中通常是不可用的。最近的一些无代理数据的FD方法可以消除对额外公共数据的需求，但由于客户端模型的异构性，本地知识之间存在显着差异，导致服务器上的表示不明确，并且不可避免地导致准确性下降。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于分布式知识同余的无代理数据的FD算法（FedDKC）。 FedDKC利用精心设计的细化策略将局部知识差异缩小到可接受的上限，从而减轻知识不一致的负面影响。具体来说，从局部知识的峰值概率和香农熵的角度，分别设计了基于核的知识细化（KKR）和基于搜索的知识细化（SKR），并从理论上保证细化的局部知识能够满足近似相似的分布并被视为全等。在三个常见数据集上进行的大量实验表明，我们提出的 FedDKC 在各种异构设置上显着优于最先进的技术，同时明显提高了收敛速度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需代理数据的联邦蒸馏算法FedDKC，通过分布式知识一致性解决客户端模型异构性导致的知识差异问题。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦蒸馏方法依赖代理数据集且难以处理客户端模型异构性，导致知识分布不一致和准确率下降。
AI.method: 设计基于核函数的知识精炼（KKR）和基于搜索的知识精炼（SKR）策略，从概率峰值和香农熵角度缩小本地知识差异，理论保证分布相似性。
AI.result: 在三个常用数据集上显著优于现有方法，在异构设置下提升准确率并加快收敛速度。
AI.conclusion: FedDKC通过知识一致性约束有效缓解模型异构性影响，为无代理数据联邦学习提供新解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种无需代理数据的联邦蒸馏算法FedDKC，通过分布式知识一致性解决客户端模型异构性导致的知识差异问题。

search_text: Exploring the Distributed Knowledge Congruence in Proxy-data-free Federated Distillation 探索无代理数据联合蒸馏中的分布式知识一致性 Federated learning (FL) is a privacy-preserving machine learning paradigm in which the server periodically aggregates local model parameters from clients without assembling their private data. Constrained communication and personalization requirements pose severe challenges to FL. Federated distillation (FD) is proposed to simultaneously address the above two problems, which exchanges knowledge between the server and clients, supporting heterogeneous local models while significantly reducing communication overhead. However, most existing FD methods require a proxy dataset, which is often unavailable in reality. A few recent proxy-data-free FD approaches can eliminate the need for additional public data, but suffer from remarkable discrepancy among local knowledge due to client-side model heterogeneity, leading to ambiguous representation on the server and inevitable accuracy degradation. To tackle this issue, we propose a proxy-data-free FD algorithm based on distributed knowledge congruence (FedDKC). FedDKC leverages well-designed refinement strategies to narrow local knowledge differences into an acceptable upper bound, so as to mitigate the negative effects of knowledge incongruence. Specifically, from perspectives of peak probability and Shannon entropy of local knowledge, we design kernel-based knowledge refinement (KKR) and searching-based knowledge refinement (SKR) respectively, and theoretically guarantee that the refined-local knowledge can satisfy an approximately-similar distribution and be regarded as congruent. Extensive experiments conducted on three common datasets demonstrate that our proposed FedDKC significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art on various heterogeneous settings while evidently improving the convergence speed. 联邦学习（FL）是一种保护隐私的机器学习范例，其中服务器定期聚合来自客户端的本地模型参数，而不组装其私有数据。有限的沟通和个性化要求给 FL 带来了严峻的挑战。联邦蒸馏（FD）的提出是为了同时解决上述两个问题，它在服务器和客户端之间交换知识，支持异构本地模型，同时显着减少通信开销。然而，大多数现有的FD方法都需要代理数据集，而这在现实中通常是不可用的。最近的一些无代理数据的FD方法可以消除对额外公共数据的需求，但由于客户端模型的异构性，本地知识之间存在显着差异，导致服务器上的表示不明确，并且不可避免地导致准确性下降。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于分布式知识同余的无代理数据的FD算法（FedDKC）。 FedDKC利用精心设计的细化策略将局部知识差异缩小到可接受的上限，从而减轻知识不一致的负面影响。具体来说，从局部知识的峰值概率和香农熵的角度，分别设计了基于核的知识细化（KKR）和基于搜索的知识细化（SKR），并从理论上保证细化的局部知识能够满足近似相似的分布并被视为全等。在三个常见数据集上进行的大量实验表明，我们提出的 FedDKC 在各种异构设置上显着优于最先进的技术，同时明显提高了收敛速度。 本文提出一种无需代理数据的联邦蒸馏算法FedDKC，通过分布式知识一致性解决客户端模型异构性导致的知识差异问题。 Zhiyuan Wu,Sheng Sun,Yuwei Wang,Min Liu,Quyang Pan,Junbo Zhang,Zeju Li,Qingxiang Liu cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Guilherme Maeda
title: Blending Primitive Policies in Shared Control for Assisted Teleoperation
title_zh: 将原始策略融合到辅助远程操作的共享控制中
abstract: Movement primitives have the property to accommodate changes in the robot state while maintaining attraction to the original policy. As such, we investigate the use of primitives as a blending mechanism by considering that state deviations from the original policy are caused by user inputs. As the primitive recovers from the user input, it implicitly blends human and robot policies without requiring their weightings -- referred to as arbitration. In this paper, we adopt Dynamical Movement Primitives (DMPs), which allow us to avoid the need for multiple demonstrations, and are fast enough to enable numerous instantiations, one for each hypothesis of the human intent. User studies are presented on assisted teleoperation tasks of reaching multiple goals and dynamic obstacle avoidance. Comparable performance to conventional teleoperation was achieved while significantly decreasing human intervention, often by more than 60%.
summary: Movement primitives have the property to accommodate changes in the robot state while maintaining attraction to the original policy. As such, we investigate the use of primitives as a blending mechanism by considering that state deviations from the original policy are caused by user inputs. As the primitive recovers from the user input, it implicitly blends human and robot policies without requiring their weightings -- referred to as arbitration. In this paper, we adopt Dynamical Movement Primitives (DMPs), which allow us to avoid the need for multiple demonstrations, and are fast enough to enable numerous instantiations, one for each hypothesis of the human intent. User studies are presented on assisted teleoperation tasks of reaching multiple goals and dynamic obstacle avoidance. Comparable performance to conventional teleoperation was achieved while significantly decreasing human intervention, often by more than 60%.
abstract_zh: 运动原语具有适应机器人状态变化的特性，同时保持对原始策略的吸引力。因此，我们考虑到原始策略的状态偏差是由用户输入引起的，从而研究使用原语作为混合机制。当原语从用户输入中恢复时，它隐式地混合了人类和机器人策略，而不需要它们的权重——这称为仲裁。在本文中，我们采用动态运动原语（DMP），它使我们能够避免多次演示，并且速度足够快，可以实现大量实例化，每个实例化一个人类意图的假设。提出了关于实现多个目标和动态避障的辅助远程操作任务的用户研究。实现了与传统远程操作相当的性能，同时显着减少了人为干预，通常减少了 60% 以上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于动态运动原语（DMP）的策略融合方法，通过隐式结合人类和机器人策略，实现辅助远程操作中减少人类干预的目标。
AI.motivation: 传统远程操作依赖大量人工干预，而运动原语能适应状态变化并保持策略吸引力，因此需探索无需显式权重分配的策略融合机制以提升效率。
AI.method: 采用DMP作为融合机制，通过用户输入引起的偏差隐式结合人类与机器人策略，无需显式仲裁权重，支持多目标抓取和动态避障任务的用户研究。
AI.result: 实验显示，与传统远程操作性能相当的情况下，人类干预减少超过60%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了隐式策略融合在辅助远程操作中的有效性，为共享控制提供了减少人工干预的新思路。

authors_text: David Zuehlke,Daniel Posada,Madhur Tiwari,Troy Henderson
title: Autonomous Satellite Detection and Tracking using Optical Flow
title_zh: 使用光流的自主卫星检测和跟踪
abstract: In this paper, an autonomous method of satellite detection and tracking in images is implemented using optical flow. Optical flow is used to estimate the image velocities of detected objects in a series of space images. Given that most objects in an image will be stars, the overall image velocity from star motion is used to estimate the image's frame-to-frame motion. Objects seen to be moving with velocity profiles distinct from the overall image velocity are then classified as potential resident space objects. The detection algorithm is exercised using both simulated star images and ground-based imagery of satellites. Finally, this algorithm will be tested and compared using a commercial and an open-source software approach to provide the reader with two different options based on their need.
summary: In this paper, an autonomous method of satellite detection and tracking in images is implemented using optical flow. Optical flow is used to estimate the image velocities of detected objects in a series of space images. Given that most objects in an image will be stars, the overall image velocity from star motion is used to estimate the image's frame-to-frame motion. Objects seen to be moving with velocity profiles distinct from the overall image velocity are then classified as potential resident space objects. The detection algorithm is exercised using both simulated star images and ground-based imagery of satellites. Finally, this algorithm will be tested and compared using a commercial and an open-source software approach to provide the reader with two different options based on their need.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，利用光流实现了图像中卫星检测和跟踪的自主方法。光流用于估计一系列空间图像中检测到的物体的图像速度。鉴于图像中的大多数物体都是恒星，恒星运动的整体图像速度用于估计图像的帧到帧运动。然后，被视为以与整体图像速度不同的速度分布移动的物体被分类为潜在的驻留空间物体。使用模拟星图和地面卫星图像来执行检测算法。最后，将使用商业和开源软件方法对该算法进行测试和比较，以便根据读者的需要为读者提供两种不同的选择。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于光流法的自主卫星检测与跟踪方法，通过分析图像中物体的运动速度差异来识别潜在空间目标。
AI.motivation: 在太空图像中，恒星占多数，而卫星等空间目标的运动轨迹与恒星存在差异，需开发自主方法实现有效区分与跟踪。
AI.method: 利用光流法估算图像中检测到的物体速度，通过恒星运动的整体图像速度计算帧间运动，将速度分布异常的物体分类为潜在空间目标，并通过模拟和实际卫星图像进行验证。
AI.result: 算法在模拟星图和地面卫星图像中均有效，且与商业及开源软件方案对比，提供了两种可选的实现路径。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功实现了自主卫星检测与跟踪，为不同需求场景提供了灵活的技术选项，推动了空间目标监测的自动化发展。

authors_text: Madan Ravi Ganesh,Salimeh Yasaei Sekeh,Jason J. Corso
title: Q-TART: Quickly Training for Adversarial Robustness and in-Transferability
title_zh: Q-TART：快速训练对抗性鲁棒性和可转移性
abstract: Raw deep neural network (DNN) performance is not enough; in real-world settings, computational load, training efficiency and adversarial security are just as or even more important. We propose to simultaneously tackle Performance, Efficiency, and Robustness, using our proposed algorithm Q-TART, Quickly Train for Adversarial Robustness and in-Transferability. Q-TART follows the intuition that samples highly susceptible to noise strongly affect the decision boundaries learned by DNNs, which in turn degrades their performance and adversarial susceptibility. By identifying and removing such samples, we demonstrate improved performance and adversarial robustness while using only a subset of the training data. Through our experiments we highlight Q-TART's high performance across multiple Dataset-DNN combinations, including ImageNet, and provide insights into the complementary behavior of Q-TART alongside existing adversarial training approaches to increase robustness by over 1.3% while using up to 17.9% less training time.
summary: Raw deep neural network (DNN) performance is not enough; in real-world settings, computational load, training efficiency and adversarial security are just as or even more important. We propose to simultaneously tackle Performance, Efficiency, and Robustness, using our proposed algorithm Q-TART, Quickly Train for Adversarial Robustness and in-Transferability. Q-TART follows the intuition that samples highly susceptible to noise strongly affect the decision boundaries learned by DNNs, which in turn degrades their performance and adversarial susceptibility. By identifying and removing such samples, we demonstrate improved performance and adversarial robustness while using only a subset of the training data. Through our experiments we highlight Q-TART's high performance across multiple Dataset-DNN combinations, including ImageNet, and provide insights into the complementary behavior of Q-TART alongside existing adversarial training approaches to increase robustness by over 1.3% while using up to 17.9% less training time.
abstract_zh: 原始深度神经网络（DNN）性能不够；在现实世界中，计算负载、训练效率和对抗安全性同样重要甚至更为重要。我们建议使用我们提出的算法 Q-TART、快速训练对抗性鲁棒性和可转移性来同时解决性能、效率和鲁棒性问题。 Q-TART 遵循这样的直觉：极易受噪声影响的样本会强烈影响 DNN 学习的决策边界，从而降低其性能和对抗敏感性。通过识别和删除此类样本，我们在仅使用训练数据的子集的情况下展示了改进的性能和对抗鲁棒性。通过我们的实验，我们强调了 Q-TART 在包括 ImageNet 在内的多个数据集-DNN 组合中的高性能，并深入了解 Q-TART 与现有对抗性训练方法的互补行为，将鲁棒性提高了 1.3% 以上，同时减少了 17.9% 的训练时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Q-TART的算法，用于快速训练对抗鲁棒性和可迁移性。
AI.motivation: 原始深度神经网络（DNN）的性能不足以满足现实场景需求，计算负载、训练效率和对抗安全性同样重要，因此需要同时解决性能、效率和鲁棒性问题。
AI.method: Q-TART通过识别并移除对噪声高度敏感的样本，利用部分训练数据来提升性能和对抗鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验表明，Q-TART在多个数据集-DNN组合中表现优异，包括ImageNet，并且与现有对抗训练方法结合使用时，可提高鲁棒性超过1.3%，同时减少高达17.9%的训练时间。
AI.conclusion: Q-TART是一种高效且鲁棒的训练方法，能够有效提升深度神经网络的性能和对抗安全性。

authors_text: Carlos Lassance,Thibault Formal,Stephane Clinchant
title: Composite Code Sparse Autoencoders for first stage retrieval
title_zh: 用于第一阶段检索的复合代码稀疏自动编码器
comment: 24 pages, longer version of short paper accepted at SIGIR 2021
comments: 24 pages, longer version of short paper accepted at SIGIR 2021
abstract: We propose a Composite Code Sparse Autoencoder (CCSA) approach for Approximate Nearest Neighbor (ANN) search of document representations based on Siamese-BERT models. In Information Retrieval (IR), the ranking pipeline is generally decomposed in two stages: the first stage focus on retrieving a candidate set from the whole collection. The second stage re-ranks the candidate set by relying on more complex models. Recently, Siamese-BERT models have been used as first stage ranker to replace or complement the traditional bag-of-word models. However, indexing and searching a large document collection require efficient similarity search on dense vectors and this is why ANN techniques come into play. Since composite codes are naturally sparse, we first show how CCSA can learn efficient parallel inverted index thanks to an uniformity regularizer. Second, CCSA can be used as a binary quantization method and we propose to combine it with the recent graph based ANN techniques. Our experiments on MSMARCO dataset reveal that CCSA outperforms IVF with product quantization. Furthermore, CCSA binary quantization is beneficial for the index size, and memory usage for the graph-based HNSW method, while maintaining a good level of recall and MRR. Third, we compare with recent supervised quantization methods for image retrieval and find that CCSA is able to outperform them.
summary: We propose a Composite Code Sparse Autoencoder (CCSA) approach for Approximate Nearest Neighbor (ANN) search of document representations based on Siamese-BERT models. In Information Retrieval (IR), the ranking pipeline is generally decomposed in two stages: the first stage focus on retrieving a candidate set from the whole collection. The second stage re-ranks the candidate set by relying on more complex models. Recently, Siamese-BERT models have been used as first stage ranker to replace or complement the traditional bag-of-word models. However, indexing and searching a large document collection require efficient similarity search on dense vectors and this is why ANN techniques come into play. Since composite codes are naturally sparse, we first show how CCSA can learn efficient parallel inverted index thanks to an uniformity regularizer. Second, CCSA can be used as a binary quantization method and we propose to combine it with the recent graph based ANN techniques. Our experiments on MSMARCO dataset reveal that CCSA outperforms IVF with product quantization. Furthermore, CCSA binary quantization is beneficial for the index size, and memory usage for the graph-based HNSW method, while maintaining a good level of recall and MRR. Third, we compare with recent supervised quantization methods for image retrieval and find that CCSA is able to outperform them.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种复合代码稀疏自动编码器 (CCSA) 方法，用于基于 Siamese-BERT 模型的文档表示的近似最近邻 (ANN) 搜索。在信息检索（IR）中，排名管道通常分为两个阶段：第一阶段侧重于从整个集合中检索候选集。第二阶段依靠更复杂的模型对候选集重新排序。最近，Siamese-BERT 模型已被用作第一阶段排名器，以取代或补充传统的词袋模型。然而，索引和搜索大型文档集合需要对密集向量进行有效的相似性搜索，这就是 ANN 技术发挥作用的原因。由于复合码本质上是稀疏的，我们首先展示 CCSA 如何通过均匀性正则器学习高效的并行倒排索引。其次，CCSA 可以用作二进制量化方法，我们建议将其与最近基于图的 ANN 技术相结合。我们在 MSMARCO 数据集上的实验表明，CCSA 在乘积量化方面优于 IVF。此外，CCSA 二进制量化有利于基于图的 HNSW 方法的索引大小和内存使用，同时保持良好的召回率和 MRR 水平。第三，我们与最近用于图像检索的监督量化方法进行比较，发现 CCSA 能够胜过它们。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Siamese-BERT模型的复合码稀疏自编码器（CCSA），用于改进信息检索中的近似最近邻（ANN）搜索。
AI.motivation: 传统词袋模型在第一阶段检索中效率不足，而Siamese-BERT虽能提升效果，但需结合高效ANN技术处理密集向量相似性搜索。复合码的稀疏性可优化索引效率，但现有方法在索引规模和内存占用上仍有改进空间。
AI.method: 通过均匀性正则化学习稀疏复合码以构建并行倒排索引，并将CCSA二值量化与基于图的ANN技术结合，提升检索效率与精度。
AI.result: 在MSMARCO数据集上，CCSA优于IVF乘积量化方法，且在HNSW图索引中减少内存占用，同时保持较高召回率和MRR；在图像检索监督量化方法对比中亦表现更优。
AI.conclusion: CCSA通过稀疏编码与图ANN结合，在第一阶段检索中实现了更高效的索引构建与更优的检索性能，为密集向量搜索提供了新思路。

authors_text: Mohammad Esmaeilpour,Patrick Cardinal,Alessandro Lameiras Koerich
title: From Environmental Sound Representation to Robustness of 2D CNN Models Against Adversarial Attacks
title_zh: 从环境声音表示到 2D CNN 模型对抗对抗性攻击的鲁棒性
comment: 32 pages, Preprint Submitted to Journal of Applied Acoustics. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2007.13703
comments: 32 pages, Preprint Submitted to Journal of Applied Acoustics. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2007.13703
abstract: This paper investigates the impact of different standard environmental sound representations (spectrograms) on the recognition performance and adversarial attack robustness of a victim residual convolutional neural network, namely ResNet-18. Our main motivation for focusing on such a front-end classifier rather than other complex architectures is balancing recognition accuracy and the total number of training parameters. Herein, we measure the impact of different settings required for generating more informative Mel-frequency cepstral coefficient (MFCC), short-time Fourier transform (STFT), and discrete wavelet transform (DWT) representations on our front-end model. This measurement involves comparing the classification performance over the adversarial robustness. We demonstrate an inverse relationship between recognition accuracy and model robustness against six benchmarking attack algorithms on the balance of average budgets allocated by the adversary and the attack cost. Moreover, our experimental results have shown that while the ResNet-18 model trained on DWT spectrograms achieves a high recognition accuracy, attacking this model is relatively more costly for the adversary than other 2D representations. We also report some results on different convolutional neural network architectures such as ResNet-34, ResNet-56, AlexNet, and GoogLeNet, SB-CNN, and LSTM-based.
summary: This paper investigates the impact of different standard environmental sound representations (spectrograms) on the recognition performance and adversarial attack robustness of a victim residual convolutional neural network, namely ResNet-18. Our main motivation for focusing on such a front-end classifier rather than other complex architectures is balancing recognition accuracy and the total number of training parameters. Herein, we measure the impact of different settings required for generating more informative Mel-frequency cepstral coefficient (MFCC), short-time Fourier transform (STFT), and discrete wavelet transform (DWT) representations on our front-end model. This measurement involves comparing the classification performance over the adversarial robustness. We demonstrate an inverse relationship between recognition accuracy and model robustness against six benchmarking attack algorithms on the balance of average budgets allocated by the adversary and the attack cost. Moreover, our experimental results have shown that while the ResNet-18 model trained on DWT spectrograms achieves a high recognition accuracy, attacking this model is relatively more costly for the adversary than other 2D representations. We also report some results on different convolutional neural network architectures such as ResNet-34, ResNet-56, AlexNet, and GoogLeNet, SB-CNN, and LSTM-based.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了不同标准环境声音表示（声谱图）对受害者残差卷积神经网络（即 ResNet-18）的识别性能和对抗攻击鲁棒性的影响。我们关注这种前端分类器而不是其他复杂架构的主要动机是平衡识别精度和训练参数总数。在这里，我们测量了生成更多信息的梅尔频率倒谱系数（MFCC）、短时傅里叶变换（STFT）和离散小波变换（DWT）表示所需的不同设置对我们的前端模型的影响。该测量涉及比较分类性能与对抗鲁棒性。我们针对六种基准攻击算法，在对手分配的平均预算与攻击成本的平衡上，证明了识别精度和模型鲁棒性之间的反比关系。此外，我们的实验结果表明，虽然在 DWT 谱图上训练的 ResNet-18 模型实现了很高的识别精度，但对于攻击者来说，攻击该模型的成本相对高于其他 2D 表示。我们还报告了不同卷积神经网络架构（例如 ResNet-34、ResNet-56、AlexNet 和 GoogLeNet、SB-CNN 和基于 LSTM）的一些结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究不同环境声音表示方法对2D卷积神经网络模型识别性能及对抗攻击鲁棒性的影响。
AI.motivation: 聚焦于平衡识别准确率与参数量的前端分类器，探索不同声学特征表示对模型鲁棒性的潜在影响。
AI.method: 通过比较MFCC、STFT和DWT三种声学特征表示，分析其对ResNet-18等模型在对抗攻击下的性能影响，并测试不同网络架构的鲁棒性差异。
AI.result: 发现识别准确率与模型鲁棒性呈负相关，DWT表示训练的ResNet-18模型识别精度高且攻击成本更高，其他架构如AlexNet、GoogLeNet等表现各异。
AI.conclusion: DWT声学特征在保持高识别精度的同时提升对抗鲁棒性，不同网络架构对攻击的敏感度存在显著差异。

search_text: From Environmental Sound Representation to Robustness of 2D CNN Models Against Adversarial Attacks 从环境声音表示到 2D CNN 模型对抗对抗性攻击的鲁棒性 This paper investigates the impact of different standard environmental sound representations (spectrograms) on the recognition performance and adversarial attack robustness of a victim residual convolutional neural network, namely ResNet-18. Our main motivation for focusing on such a front-end classifier rather than other complex architectures is balancing recognition accuracy and the total number of training parameters. Herein, we measure the impact of different settings required for generating more informative Mel-frequency cepstral coefficient (MFCC), short-time Fourier transform (STFT), and discrete wavelet transform (DWT) representations on our front-end model. This measurement involves comparing the classification performance over the adversarial robustness. We demonstrate an inverse relationship between recognition accuracy and model robustness against six benchmarking attack algorithms on the balance of average budgets allocated by the adversary and the attack cost. Moreover, our experimental results have shown that while the ResNet-18 model trained on DWT spectrograms achieves a high recognition accuracy, attacking this model is relatively more costly for the adversary than other 2D representations. We also report some results on different convolutional neural network architectures such as ResNet-34, ResNet-56, AlexNet, and GoogLeNet, SB-CNN, and LSTM-based. 本文研究了不同标准环境声音表示（声谱图）对受害者残差卷积神经网络（即 ResNet-18）的识别性能和对抗攻击鲁棒性的影响。我们关注这种前端分类器而不是其他复杂架构的主要动机是平衡识别精度和训练参数总数。在这里，我们测量了生成更多信息的梅尔频率倒谱系数（MFCC）、短时傅里叶变换（STFT）和离散小波变换（DWT）表示所需的不同设置对我们的前端模型的影响。该测量涉及比较分类性能与对抗鲁棒性。我们针对六种基准攻击算法，在对手分配的平均预算与攻击成本的平衡上，证明了识别精度和模型鲁棒性之间的反比关系。此外，我们的实验结果表明，虽然在 DWT 谱图上训练的 ResNet-18 模型实现了很高的识别精度，但对于攻击者来说，攻击该模型的成本相对高于其他 2D 表示。我们还报告了不同卷积神经网络架构（例如 ResNet-34、ResNet-56、AlexNet 和 GoogLeNet、SB-CNN 和基于 LSTM）的一些结果。 本文研究不同环境声音表示方法对2D卷积神经网络模型识别性能及对抗攻击鲁棒性的影响。 Mohammad Esmaeilpour,Patrick Cardinal,Alessandro Lameiras Koerich cs.SD,cs.CR,cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Marc Kaufmann,Maxime Larcher,Johannes Lengler,Xun Zou
title: OneMax is not the Easiest Function for Fitness Improvements
title_zh: OneMax 并不是最简单的健身改善功能
abstract: We study the $(1:s+1)$ success rule for controlling the population size of the $(1,λ)$-EA. It was shown by Hevia Fajardo and Sudholt that this parameter control mechanism can run into problems for large $s$ if the fitness landscape is too easy. They conjectured that this problem is worst for the OneMax benchmark, since in some well-established sense OneMax is known to be the easiest fitness landscape. In this paper we disprove this conjecture and show that OneMax is not the easiest fitness landscape with respect to finding improving steps. As a consequence, we show that there exists $s$ and $\varepsilon$ such that the self-adjusting $(1,λ)$-EA with $(1:s+1)$-rule optimizes OneMax efficiently when started with $\varepsilon n$ zero-bits, but does not find the optimum in polynomial time on Dynamic BinVal. Hence, we show that there are landscapes where the problem of the $(1:s+1)$-rule for controlling the population size of the $(1, λ)$-EA is more severe than for OneMax.
summary: We study the $(1:s+1)$ success rule for controlling the population size of the $(1,λ)$-EA. It was shown by Hevia Fajardo and Sudholt that this parameter control mechanism can run into problems for large $s$ if the fitness landscape is too easy. They conjectured that this problem is worst for the OneMax benchmark, since in some well-established sense OneMax is known to be the easiest fitness landscape. In this paper we disprove this conjecture and show that OneMax is not the easiest fitness landscape with respect to finding improving steps. As a consequence, we show that there exists $s$ and $\varepsilon$ such that the self-adjusting $(1,λ)$-EA with $(1:s+1)$-rule optimizes OneMax efficiently when started with $\varepsilon n$ zero-bits, but does not find the optimum in polynomial time on Dynamic BinVal. Hence, we show that there are landscapes where the problem of the $(1:s+1)$-rule for controlling the population size of the $(1, λ)$-EA is more severe than for OneMax.
abstract_zh: 我们研究 $(1:s+1)$ 成功规则来控制 $(1,λ)$-EA 的种群规模。 Hevia Fajardo 和 Sudholt 表明，如果适应度景观过于简单，这种参数控制机制可能会在大$s$ 中遇到问题。他们推测这个问题对于 OneMax 基准测试来说是最严重的，因为从某种公认的意义上来说，OneMax 被认为是最简单的健身景观。在本文中，我们反驳了这一猜想，并表明 OneMax 并不是寻找改进步骤的最简单的健身景观。因此，我们证明存在 $s$ 和 $\varepsilon$，使得具有 $(1:s+1)$ 规则的自调整 $(1,λ)$-EA 在从 $\varepsilon n$ 零位开始时可以有效地优化 OneMax，但在动态 BinVal 上找不到多项式时间的最优值。因此，我们表明，在某些情况下，用于控制 $(1, λ)$-EA 群体规模的 $(1:s+1)$ 规则的问题比 OneMax 更严重。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了(1,λ)-EA算法中(1:s+1)成功规则在控制种群规模时的表现，推翻了OneMax是适应度改进最简单函数的猜想，并比较了其与动态BinVal函数的优化效率差异。
AI.motivation: 针对(1:s+1)规则在种群规模控制中可能因景观过易而失效的问题，验证OneMax是否为最简单的优化函数，以改进参数控制机制的理论基础。
AI.method: 通过理论分析与实验对比，研究(1,λ)-EA在OneMax和动态BinVal函数上的优化效率，结合参数自适应调整策略评估算法表现。
AI.result: 证明OneMax并非最简单的函数，存在参数s和ε使得自适应(1,λ)-EA在OneMax上高效优化，但在动态BinVal上无法多项式时间内找到最优解。
AI.conclusion: (1:s+1)规则在动态BinVal函数上的种群控制问题比OneMax更严重，推翻了OneMax作为最简单景观的传统认知。

It was shown by Hevia Fajardo and Sudholt that this parameter control mechanism can run into problems for large $s$ if the fitness landscape is too easy. authors_text: Mohammed Eleffendi,Daniel Posada,M. Ilhan Akbas,Troy Henderson
title: NASA/GSFC's Flight Software Core Flight System Implementation For A Lunar Surface Imaging Mission
title_zh: NASA/GSFC 的飞行软件核心飞行系统实施用于月球表面成像任务
abstract: The interest in returning to the Moon for research and exploration has increased as new tipping point technologies are providing the possibility to do so. One of these initiatives is the Artemis program by NASA, which plans to return humans by 2024 to the lunar surface and study water deposits on the surface. This program will also serve as a practice run to plan the logistics of sending humans to explore Mars. To return humans safely to the Moon, multiple technological advances and diverse knowledge about the nature of the lunar surface are needed. This paper will discuss the design and implementation of the flight software of EagleCam, a CubeSat camera system based on the free open-source core Flight System (cFS) architecture developed by NASA's Goddard Space Flight Center. EagleCam is a payload transported to the Moon by the Commercial Lunar Payload Services Nova-C lander developed by Intuitive Machines. The camera system will capture the first third-person view of a spacecraft performing a Moon landing and collect other scientific data such as plume interaction with the surface. The complete system is composed of the CubeSat and the deployer that will eject it. This will be the first time WiFi protocol is used on the Moon to establish a local communication network.
summary: The interest in returning to the Moon for research and exploration has increased as new tipping point technologies are providing the possibility to do so. One of these initiatives is the Artemis program by NASA, which plans to return humans by 2024 to the lunar surface and study water deposits on the surface. This program will also serve as a practice run to plan the logistics of sending humans to explore Mars. To return humans safely to the Moon, multiple technological advances and diverse knowledge about the nature of the lunar surface are needed. This paper will discuss the design and implementation of the flight software of EagleCam, a CubeSat camera system based on the free open-source core Flight System (cFS) architecture developed by NASA's Goddard Space Flight Center. EagleCam is a payload transported to the Moon by the Commercial Lunar Payload Services Nova-C lander developed by Intuitive Machines. The camera system will capture the first third-person view of a spacecraft performing a Moon landing and collect other scientific data such as plume interaction with the surface. The complete system is composed of the CubeSat and the deployer that will eject it. This will be the first time WiFi protocol is used on the Moon to establish a local communication network.
abstract_zh: 随着新的临界点技术提供了这样做的可能性，人们对返回月球进行研究和探索的兴趣有所增加。其中一项举措是 NASA 的阿尔忒弥斯计划，该计划计划在 2024 年将人类送回月球表面并研究月球表面的水沉积。该计划还将作为一次练习，规划送人类探索火星的后勤工作。为了让人类安全返回月球，需要多项技术进步和有关月球表面性质的多种知识。本文将讨论 EagleCam 飞行软件的设计和实现，EagleCam 是一个基于 NASA 戈达德太空飞行中心开发的免费开源核心飞行系统（cFS）架构的 CubeSat 相机系统。 EagleCam 是由 Intuitive Machines 开发的商业月球有效载荷服务 Nova-C 着陆器运送到月球的有效载荷。该相机系统将捕捉航天器登陆月球的第一个第三人称视角，并收集其他科学数据，例如羽流与表面的相互作用。完整的系统由立方体卫星和将其弹出的部署器组成。这将是首次在月球上使用WiFi协议建立本地通信网络。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了基于NASA开源cFS架构的EagleCam立方星相机系统的飞行软件设计与实现，用于月球表面成像任务。
AI.motivation: 随着Artemis计划推进月球探索，需开发可靠技术以安全返回月球并研究月表特性，EagleCam旨在通过创新软件架构实现科学数据采集。
AI.method: 采用NASA GSFC开发的开源核心飞行系统（cFS）架构，设计EagleCam立方星及部署器系统，并首次在月球使用WiFi协议建立通信网络。
AI.result: 完成EagleCam飞行软件开发，实现月球着陆过程的第三人称视角拍摄及月表羽流交互数据采集，标志着月球WiFi通信的首次应用。
AI.conclusion: 该实施验证了cFS架构在月球任务中的可行性，为后续火星探索提供了技术验证，并推动了小型化航天器数据传输技术的发展。

search_text: NASA/GSFC's Flight Software Core Flight System Implementation For A Lunar Surface Imaging Mission NASA/GSFC 的飞行软件核心飞行系统实施用于月球表面成像任务 The interest in returning to the Moon for research and exploration has increased as new tipping point technologies are providing the possibility to do so. One of these initiatives is the Artemis program by NASA, which plans to return humans by 2024 to the lunar surface and study water deposits on the surface. This program will also serve as a practice run to plan the logistics of sending humans to explore Mars. To return humans safely to the Moon, multiple technological advances and diverse knowledge about the nature of the lunar surface are needed. This paper will discuss the design and implementation of the flight software of EagleCam, a CubeSat camera system based on the free open-source core Flight System (cFS) architecture developed by NASA's Goddard Space Flight Center. EagleCam is a payload transported to the Moon by the Commercial Lunar Payload Services Nova-C lander developed by Intuitive Machines. The camera system will capture the first third-person view of a spacecraft performing a Moon landing and collect other scientific data such as plume interaction with the surface. The complete system is composed of the CubeSat and the deployer that will eject it. This will be the first time WiFi protocol is used on the Moon to establish a local communication network. 随着新的临界点技术提供了这样做的可能性，人们对返回月球进行研究和探索的兴趣有所增加。其中一项举措是 NASA 的阿尔忒弥斯计划，该计划计划在 2024 年将人类送回月球表面并研究月球表面的水沉积。该计划还将作为一次练习，规划送人类探索火星的后勤工作。为了让人类安全返回月球，需要多项技术进步和有关月球表面性质的多种知识。本文将讨论 EagleCam 飞行软件的设计和实现，EagleCam 是一个基于 NASA 戈达德太空飞行中心开发的免费开源核心飞行系统（cFS）架构的 CubeSat 相机系统。 EagleCam 是由 Intuitive Machines 开发的商业月球有效载荷服务 Nova-C 着陆器运送到月球的有效载荷。该相机系统将捕捉航天器登陆月球的第一个第三人称视角，并收集其他科学数据，例如羽流与表面的相互作用。完整的系统由立方体卫星和将其弹出的部署器组成。这将是首次在月球上使用WiFi协议建立本地通信网络。 本文介绍了基于NASA开源cFS架构的EagleCam立方星相机系统的飞行软件设计与实现，用于月球表面成像任务。 Mohammed Eleffendi,Daniel Posada,M. Ilhan Akbas,Troy Henderson cs.RO

authors_text: Carina Negreanu,Alperen Karaoglu,Jack Williams,Shuang Chen,Daniel Fabian,Andrew Gordon,Chin-Yew Lin
title: Rows from Many Sources: Enriching row completions from Wikidata with a pre-trained Language Model
title_zh: 来自多个来源的行：使用预训练的语言模型丰富维基数据的行补全
abstract: Row completion is the task of augmenting a given table of text and numbers with additional, relevant rows. The task divides into two steps: subject suggestion, the task of populating the main column; and gap filling, the task of populating the remaining columns. We present state-of-the-art results for subject suggestion and gap filling measured on a standard benchmark (WikiTables). Our idea is to solve this task by harmoniously combining knowledge base table interpretation and free text generation. We interpret the table using the knowledge base to suggest new rows and generate metadata like headers through property linking. To improve candidate diversity, we synthesize additional rows using free text generation via GPT-3, and crucially, we exploit the metadata we interpret to produce better prompts for text generation. Finally, we verify that the additional synthesized content can be linked to the knowledge base or a trusted web source such as Wikipedia.
summary: Row completion is the task of augmenting a given table of text and numbers with additional, relevant rows. The task divides into two steps: subject suggestion, the task of populating the main column; and gap filling, the task of populating the remaining columns. We present state-of-the-art results for subject suggestion and gap filling measured on a standard benchmark (WikiTables). Our idea is to solve this task by harmoniously combining knowledge base table interpretation and free text generation. We interpret the table using the knowledge base to suggest new rows and generate metadata like headers through property linking. To improve candidate diversity, we synthesize additional rows using free text generation via GPT-3, and crucially, we exploit the metadata we interpret to produce better prompts for text generation. Finally, we verify that the additional synthesized content can be linked to the knowledge base or a trusted web source such as Wikipedia.
abstract_zh: 行完成是用附加的相关行来扩充给定的文本和数字表的任务。任务分为两步：主题建议、填充主栏目任务；和间隙填充，即填充剩余列的任务。我们提供了在标准基准（维基表）上测量的主题建议和差距填补的最先进结果。我们的想法是通过和谐地结合知识库表解释和自由文本生成来解决此任务。我们使用知识库解释该表以建议新行并通过属性链接生成标题等元数据。为了提高候选多样性，我们通过 GPT-3 使用自由文本生成来合成额外的行，最重要的是，我们利用我们解释的元数据来生成更好的文本生成提示。最后，我们验证额外的合成内容可以链接到知识库或受信任的网络资源（例如维基百科）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合知识库和预训练语言模型的方法，通过生成新行和填充表格内容来增强表格补全任务。
AI.motivation: 现有表格补全方法在利用知识库结构化数据与自由文本生成之间存在割裂，难以兼顾多样性与准确性。
AI.method: 通过知识库解析生成元数据（如表头），结合GPT-3自由文本生成技术合成新行，并利用元数据优化文本生成提示词。
AI.result: 在WikiTables基准测试中，该方法在主题建议和空值填充任务上均达到最先进水平，生成内容可关联知识库或可信网络来源。
AI.conclusion: 融合结构化知识解析与自由文本生成能有效提升表格补全质量，为多源数据整合提供新思路。

authors_text: Elina Thibeau-Sutre,Sasha Collin,Ninon Burgos,Olivier Colliot
title: Interpretability of Machine Learning Methods Applied to Neuroimaging
title_zh: 应用于神经影像的机器学习方法的可解释性
abstract: Deep learning methods have become very popular for the processing of natural images, and were then successfully adapted to the neuroimaging field. As these methods are non-transparent, interpretability methods are needed to validate them and ensure their reliability. Indeed, it has been shown that deep learning models may obtain high performance even when using irrelevant features, by exploiting biases in the training set. Such undesirable situations can potentially be detected by using interpretability methods. Recently, many methods have been proposed to interpret neural networks. However, this domain is not mature yet. Machine learning users face two major issues when aiming to interpret their models: which method to choose, and how to assess its reliability? Here, we aim at providing answers to these questions by presenting the most common interpretability methods and metrics developed to assess their reliability, as well as their applications and benchmarks in the neuroimaging context. Note that this is not an exhaustive survey: we aimed to focus on the studies which we found to be the most representative and relevant.
summary: Deep learning methods have become very popular for the processing of natural images, and were then successfully adapted to the neuroimaging field. As these methods are non-transparent, interpretability methods are needed to validate them and ensure their reliability. Indeed, it has been shown that deep learning models may obtain high performance even when using irrelevant features, by exploiting biases in the training set. Such undesirable situations can potentially be detected by using interpretability methods. Recently, many methods have been proposed to interpret neural networks. However, this domain is not mature yet. Machine learning users face two major issues when aiming to interpret their models: which method to choose, and how to assess its reliability? Here, we aim at providing answers to these questions by presenting the most common interpretability methods and metrics developed to assess their reliability, as well as their applications and benchmarks in the neuroimaging context. Note that this is not an exhaustive survey: we aimed to focus on the studies which we found to be the most representative and relevant.
abstract_zh: 深度学习方法在自然图像处理中非常流行，并成功应用于神经影像领域。由于这些方法不透明，因此需要可解释性方法来验证它们并确保其可靠性。事实上，事实证明，通过利用训练集中的偏差，即使使用不相关的特征，深度学习模型也可以获得高性能。这种不良情况可以通过使用可解释性方法来检测。最近，人们提出了许多方法来解释神经网络。然而，这个领域还不成熟。机器学习用户在解释模型时面临两个主要问题：选择哪种方法以及如何评估其可靠性？在这里，我们的目标是通过介绍为评估其可靠性而开发的最常见的可解释性方法和指标，以及它们在神经影像学背景下的应用和基准，从而为这些问题提供答案。请注意，这并不是一项详尽的调查：我们的目的是重点关注我们认为最具代表性和相关性的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了机器学习方法在神经影像学中的可解释性技术，探讨了常用解释方法及其可靠性评估指标。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型可能存在依赖训练集偏差或无关特征的风险，需通过可解释性方法验证其可靠性。
AI.method: 系统梳理神经影像学领域主流的模型解释方法与评估指标，并分析其应用场景与基准测试。
AI.result: 总结了当前可解释性技术的分类、评估框架及在神经影像任务中的典型应用案例。
AI.conclusion: 该领域尚未成熟，需进一步完善方法选择标准与可靠性评估体系以指导实际应用。

authors_text: Alexandre H. Thiery,Fabian Braeu,Tin A. Tun,Tin Aung,Michael J. A. Girard
title: Medical Application of Geometric Deep Learning for the Diagnosis of Glaucoma
title_zh: 几何深度学习在青光眼诊断中的医学应用
abstract: Purpose: (1) To assess the performance of geometric deep learning (PointNet) in diagnosing glaucoma from a single optical coherence tomography (OCT) 3D scan of the optic nerve head (ONH); (2) To compare its performance to that obtained with a standard 3D convolutional neural network (CNN), and with a gold-standard glaucoma parameter, i.e. retinal nerve fiber layer (RNFL) thickness. Methods: 3D raster scans of the ONH were acquired with Spectralis OCT for 477 glaucoma and 2,296 non-glaucoma subjects at the Singapore National Eye Centre. All volumes were automatically segmented using deep learning to identify 7 major neural and connective tissues including the RNFL, the prelamina, and the lamina cribrosa (LC). Each ONH was then represented as a 3D point cloud with 1,000 points chosen randomly from all tissue boundaries. To simplify the problem, all ONH point clouds were aligned with respect to the plane and center of Bruch's membrane opening. Geometric deep learning (PointNet) was then used to provide a glaucoma diagnosis from a single OCT point cloud. The performance of our approach was compared to that obtained with a 3D CNN, and with RNFL thickness. Results: PointNet was able to provide a robust glaucoma diagnosis solely from the ONH represented as a 3D point cloud (AUC=95%). The performance of PointNet was superior to that obtained with a standard 3D CNN (AUC=87%) and with that obtained from RNFL thickness alone (AUC=80%). Discussion: We provide a proof-of-principle for the application of geometric deep learning in the field of glaucoma. Our technique requires significantly less information as input to perform better than a 3D CNN, and with an AUC superior to that obtained from RNFL thickness alone. Geometric deep learning may have wide applicability in the field of Ophthalmology.

Methods: 3D raster scans of the ONH were acquired with Spectralis OCT for 477 glaucoma and 2,296 non-glaucoma subjects at the Singapore National Eye Centre. All volumes were automatically segmented using deep learning to identify 7 major neural and connective tissues including the RNFL, the prelamina, and the lamina cribrosa (LC). The performance of PointNet was superior to that obtained with a standard 3D CNN (AUC=87%) and with that obtained from RNFL thickness alone (AUC=80%). Discussion: We provide a proof-of-principle for the application of geometric deep learning in the field of glaucoma. Our technique requires significantly less information as input to perform better than a 3D CNN, and with an AUC superior to that obtained from RNFL thickness alone. Geometric deep learning may have wide applicability in the field of Ophthalmology.
abstract_zh: 目的：(1) 评估几何深度学习 (PointNet) 在视神经乳头 (ONH) 的单次光学相干断层扫描 (OCT) 3D 扫描中诊断青光眼的性能； (2) 将其性能与标准 3D 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 和金标准青光眼参数（即视网膜神经纤维层 (RNFL) 厚度）获得的性能进行比较。方法：使用 Spectralis OCT 对新加坡国家眼科中心的 477 名青光眼受试者和 2,296 名非青光眼受试者进行 ONH 3D 光栅扫描。所有体积均使用深度学习自动分割，以识别 7 个主要神经和结缔组织，包括 RNFL、前层和筛板 (LC)。然后，每个 ONH 表示为 3D 点云，其中从所有组织边界中随机选择 1,000 个点。为了简化问题，所有 ONH 点云均相对于 Bruch 膜开口的平面和中心对齐。然后使用几何深度学习 (PointNet) 从单个 OCT 点云提供青光眼诊断。我们的方法的性能与 3D CNN 和 RNFL 厚度获得的性能进行了比较。结果：PointNet 能够仅根据表示为 3D 点云的 ONH 提供可靠的青光眼诊断 (AUC=95%)。 PointNet 的性能优于使用标准 3D CNN 获得的性能（AUC=87%）以及仅通过 RNFL 厚度获得的性能（AUC=80%）。讨论：我们为几何深度学习在青光眼领域的应用提供了原理验证。我们的技术需要显着更少的信息作为输入，从而比 3D CNN 表现更好，并且 AUC 优于仅从 RNFL 厚度获得的结果。几何深度学习可能在眼科领域具有广泛的适用性。

AI.tldr: 该论文评估了几何深度学习（PointNet）在从单次光学相干断层扫描（OCT）3D视神经头（ONH）扫描中诊断青光眼的性能，并与标准3D卷积神经网络（CNN）和视网膜神经纤维层（RNFL）厚度进行比较。
AI.motivation: 现有青光眼诊断方法如RNFL厚度存在灵敏度不足的问题，而几何深度学习可能更高效地处理3D医学影像数据，从而提升诊断准确性。
AI.method: 使用Spectralis OCT获取477名青光眼和2,296名非青光眼患者的ONH 3D扫描，通过深度学习分割组织后生成3D点云数据，利用PointNet进行诊断，并与3D CNN和RNFL厚度结果对比。
AI.result: PointNet在ONH 3D点云诊断中达到95%的AUC，显著优于3D CNN（87%）和RNFL厚度（80%）。
AI.conclusion: 几何深度学习在青光眼诊断中展现出优于传统方法的潜力，其以更少输入信息实现更高诊断性能，可能在眼科领域有广泛应用。

authors_text: Nantheera Anantrasirichai
title: Atmospheric Turbulence Removal with Complex-Valued Convolutional Neural Network
title_zh: 使用复值卷积神经网络消除大气湍流
abstract: Atmospheric turbulence distorts visual imagery and is always problematic for information interpretation by both human and machine. Most well-developed approaches to remove atmospheric turbulence distortion are model-based. However, these methods require high computation and large memory making real-time operation infeasible. Deep learning-based approaches have hence gained more attention but currently work efficiently only on static scenes. This paper presents a novel learning-based framework offering short temporal spanning to support dynamic scenes. We exploit complex-valued convolutions as phase information, altered by atmospheric turbulence, is captured better than using ordinary real-valued convolutions. Two concatenated modules are proposed. The first module aims to remove geometric distortions and, if enough memory, the second module is applied to refine micro details of the videos. Experimental results show that our proposed framework efficiently mitigates the atmospheric turbulence distortion and significantly outperforms existing methods.
summary: Atmospheric turbulence distorts visual imagery and is always problematic for information interpretation by both human and machine. Most well-developed approaches to remove atmospheric turbulence distortion are model-based. However, these methods require high computation and large memory making real-time operation infeasible. Deep learning-based approaches have hence gained more attention but currently work efficiently only on static scenes. This paper presents a novel learning-based framework offering short temporal spanning to support dynamic scenes. We exploit complex-valued convolutions as phase information, altered by atmospheric turbulence, is captured better than using ordinary real-valued convolutions. Two concatenated modules are proposed. The first module aims to remove geometric distortions and, if enough memory, the second module is applied to refine micro details of the videos. Experimental results show that our proposed framework efficiently mitigates the atmospheric turbulence distortion and significantly outperforms existing methods.
abstract_zh: 大气湍流会扭曲视觉图像，并且总是给人类和机器的信息解释带来问题。大多数成熟的消除大气湍流畸变的方法都是基于模型的。然而，这些方法需要高计算量和大内存，使得实时操作不可行。基于深度学习的方法因此获得了更多关注，但目前仅在静态场景上有效。本文提出了一种新颖的基于学习的框架，提供短时间跨度来支持动态场景。我们利用复值卷积作为由大气湍流改变的相位信息，比使用普通实值卷积可以更好地捕获相位信息。提出了两个串联模块。第一个模块旨在消除几何扭曲，如果内存足够，第二个模块将用于细化视频的微观细节。实验结果表明，我们提出的框架有效地减轻了大气湍流失真，并且显着优于现有方法。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于复值卷积神经网络的框架，用于有效去除动态场景中的大气湍流失真。
AI.motivation: 现有基于模型的方法计算量大且内存需求高，难以实时操作；深度学习方法在动态场景中效果有限，需改进。
AI.method: 采用复值卷积神经网络，利用相位信息，并设计两个串联模块：第一模块去除几何失真，第二模块（内存充足时）细化视频细节。
AI.result: 实验表明框架有效减轻湍流失真，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法在动态场景中有效，复值卷积和模块设计提升了性能。

authors_text: Chuanguang Yang,Helong Zhou,Zhulin An,Xue Jiang,Yongjun Xu,Qian Zhang
title: Cross-Image Relational Knowledge Distillation for Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 用于语义分割的跨图像关系知识蒸馏
abstract: Current Knowledge Distillation (KD) methods for semantic segmentation often guide the student to mimic the teacher's structured information generated from individual data samples. However, they ignore the global semantic relations among pixels across various images that are valuable for KD. This paper proposes a novel Cross-Image Relational KD (CIRKD), which focuses on transferring structured pixel-to-pixel and pixel-to-region relations among the whole images. The motivation is that a good teacher network could construct a well-structured feature space in terms of global pixel dependencies. CIRKD makes the student mimic better structured semantic relations from the teacher, thus improving the segmentation performance. Experimental results over Cityscapes, CamVid and Pascal VOC datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed approach against state-of-the-art distillation methods. The code is available at https://github.com/winycg/CIRKD.
summary: Current Knowledge Distillation (KD) methods for semantic segmentation often guide the student to mimic the teacher's structured information generated from individual data samples. However, they ignore the global semantic relations among pixels across various images that are valuable for KD. This paper proposes a novel Cross-Image Relational KD (CIRKD), which focuses on transferring structured pixel-to-pixel and pixel-to-region relations among the whole images. The motivation is that a good teacher network could construct a well-structured feature space in terms of global pixel dependencies. CIRKD makes the student mimic better structured semantic relations from the teacher, thus improving the segmentation performance. Experimental results over Cityscapes, CamVid and Pascal VOC datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed approach against state-of-the-art distillation methods. The code is available at https://github.com/winycg/CIRKD.
abstract_zh: 当前用于语义分割的知识蒸馏（KD）方法通常引导学生模仿教师从单个数据样本生成的结构化信息。然而，他们忽略了对 KD 有价值的各种图像中像素之间的全局语义关系。本文提出了一种新颖的跨图像关系 KD（CIRKD），其重点是传输整个图像之间的结构化像素到像素和像素到区域关系。其动机是一个好的教师网络可以根据全局像素依赖性构建结构良好的特征空间。 CIRKD 使学生模仿老师更好的结构化语义关系，从而提高分割性能。 Cityscapes、CamVid 和 Pascal VOC 数据集的实验结果证明了我们提出的方法相对于最先进的蒸馏方法的有效性。该代码可在 https://github.com/winycg/CIRKD 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种跨图像关系知识蒸馏方法（CIRKD），用于改进语义分割中的知识蒸馏技术。
AI.motivation: 当前知识蒸馏方法在语义分割中通常只关注单个数据样本的结构化信息，而忽略了不同图像间像素的全局语义关系，这些关系对知识蒸馏非常重要。
AI.method: CIRKD方法通过构建全局像素依赖关系的结构化特征空间，使学生模型模仿教师模型中跨图像的像素到像素和像素到区域的关系。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes、CamVid和Pascal VOC数据集上的实验结果表明，该方法在性能上优于最先进的知识蒸馏方法。
AI.conclusion: CIRKD通过关注跨图像的全局语义关系，有效提升了语义分割的性能，是一种有效的知识蒸馏方法。

search_text: Cross-Image Relational Knowledge Distillation for Semantic Segmentation 用于语义分割的跨图像关系知识蒸馏 Current Knowledge Distillation (KD) methods for semantic segmentation often guide the student to mimic the teacher's structured information generated from individual data samples. However, they ignore the global semantic relations among pixels across various images that are valuable for KD. This paper proposes a novel Cross-Image Relational KD (CIRKD), which focuses on transferring structured pixel-to-pixel and pixel-to-region relations among the whole images. The motivation is that a good teacher network could construct a well-structured feature space in terms of global pixel dependencies. CIRKD makes the student mimic better structured semantic relations from the teacher, thus improving the segmentation performance. Experimental results over Cityscapes, CamVid and Pascal VOC datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed approach against state-of-the-art distillation methods. The code is available at https://github.com/winycg/CIRKD. 当前用于语义分割的知识蒸馏（KD）方法通常引导学生模仿教师从单个数据样本生成的结构化信息。然而，他们忽略了对 KD 有价值的各种图像中像素之间的全局语义关系。本文提出了一种新颖的跨图像关系 KD（CIRKD），其重点是传输整个图像之间的结构化像素到像素和像素到区域关系。其动机是一个好的教师网络可以根据全局像素依赖性构建结构良好的特征空间。 CIRKD 使学生模仿老师更好的结构化语义关系，从而提高分割性能。 Cityscapes、CamVid 和 Pascal VOC 数据集的实验结果证明了我们提出的方法相对于最先进的蒸馏方法的有效性。该代码可在 https://github.com/winycg/CIRKD 获取。 本文提出了一种跨图像关系知识蒸馏方法（CIRKD），用于改进语义分割中的知识蒸馏技术。 Chuanguang Yang,Helong Zhou,Zhulin An,Xue Jiang,Yongjun Xu,Qian Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Daniel Coquelin,Behnood Rasti,Markus Götz,Pedram Ghamisi,Richard Gloaguen,Achim Streit
title: HyDe: The First Open-Source, Python-Based, GPU-Accelerated Hyperspectral Denoising Package
title_zh: HyDe：第一个开源、基于 Python、GPU 加速的高光谱去噪包
abstract: As with any physical instrument, hyperspectral cameras induce different kinds of noise in the acquired data. Therefore, Hyperspectral denoising is a crucial step for analyzing hyperspectral images (HSIs). Conventional computational methods rarely use GPUs to improve efficiency and are not fully open-source. Alternatively, deep learning-based methods are often open-source and use GPUs, but their training and utilization for real-world applications remain non-trivial for many researchers. Consequently, we propose HyDe: the first open-source, GPU-accelerated Python-based, hyperspectral image denoising toolbox, which aims to provide a large set of methods with an easy-to-use environment. HyDe includes a variety of methods ranging from low-rank wavelet-based methods to deep neural network (DNN) models. HyDe's interface dramatically improves the interoperability of these methods and the performance of the underlying functions. In fact, these methods maintain similar HSI denoising performance to their original implementations while consuming nearly ten times less energy. Furthermore, we present a method for training DNNs for denoising HSIs which are not spatially related to the training dataset, i.e., training on ground-level HSIs for denoising HSIs with other perspectives including airborne, drone-borne, and space-borne. To utilize the trained DNNs, we show a sliding window method to effectively denoise HSIs which would otherwise require more than 40 GB. The package can be found at: \url{https://github.com/Helmholtz-AI-Energy/HyDe}.
summary: As with any physical instrument, hyperspectral cameras induce different kinds of noise in the acquired data. Therefore, Hyperspectral denoising is a crucial step for analyzing hyperspectral images (HSIs). Conventional computational methods rarely use GPUs to improve efficiency and are not fully open-source. Alternatively, deep learning-based methods are often open-source and use GPUs, but their training and utilization for real-world applications remain non-trivial for many researchers. Consequently, we propose HyDe: the first open-source, GPU-accelerated Python-based, hyperspectral image denoising toolbox, which aims to provide a large set of methods with an easy-to-use environment. HyDe includes a variety of methods ranging from low-rank wavelet-based methods to deep neural network (DNN) models. HyDe's interface dramatically improves the interoperability of these methods and the performance of the underlying functions. In fact, these methods maintain similar HSI denoising performance to their original implementations while consuming nearly ten times less energy. Furthermore, we present a method for training DNNs for denoising HSIs which are not spatially related to the training dataset, i.e., training on ground-level HSIs for denoising HSIs with other perspectives including airborne, drone-borne, and space-borne. To utilize the trained DNNs, we show a sliding window method to effectively denoise HSIs which would otherwise require more than 40 GB. The package can be found at: \url{https://github.com/Helmholtz-AI-Energy/HyDe}.
abstract_zh: 与任何物理仪器一样，高光谱相机在采集的数据中会产生不同类型的噪声。因此，高光谱去噪是分析高光谱图像（HSIs）的关键步骤。传统的计算方法很少使用GPU来提高效率，并且不是完全开源的。另外，基于深度学习的方法通常是开源的并使用 GPU，但对于许多研究人员来说，它们在实际应用中的训练和利用仍然很重要。因此，我们提出 HyDe：第一个开源、GPU 加速、基于 Python 的高光谱图像去噪工具箱，旨在提供大量方法和易于使用的环境。 HyDe 包括从基于低秩小波的方法到深度神经网络 (DNN) 模型的各种方法。 HyDe 的接口极大地提高了这些方法的互操作性和底层函数的性能。事实上，这些方法保持了与其原始实现类似的 HSI 去噪性能，同时消耗的能量减少了近十倍。此外，我们提出了一种训练 DNN 的方法，用于与训练数据集在空间上不相关的 HSI 去噪，即在地面 HSI 上进行训练，以从机载、无人机载和星载等其他角度对 HSI 进行去噪。为了利用经过训练的 DNN，我们展示了一种滑动窗口方法来有效地对 HSI 进行去噪，否则需要超过 40 GB 的空间。该软件包可以在以下位置找到：\url{https://github.com/Helmholtz-AI-Energy/HyDe}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HyDe，首个开源的基于Python且支持GPU加速的高光谱图像去噪工具包，整合多种去噪方法并优化实际应用效率。
AI.motivation: 传统高光谱去噪方法效率低且非全开源，深度学习方法虽开源但训练和应用复杂，需开发易用且高效的工具包以降低研究门槛。
AI.method: 整合低秩小波方法与深度神经网络模型，通过统一接口提升方法互操作性；提出跨视角训练策略及滑动窗口去噪方法以处理大规模数据。
AI.result: 方法性能与原实现相当但能耗降低十倍，滑动窗口技术可处理超40GB高光谱数据，工具包开源供社区使用。
AI.conclusion: HyDe为高光谱去噪提供高效开源解决方案，通过跨视角训练与优化接口设计，显著提升实际应用可行性。

authors_text: Geri Skenderi,Christian Joppi,Matteo Denitto,Berniero Scarpa,Marco Cristani
title: The multi-modal universe of fast-fashion: the Visuelle 2.0 benchmark
title_zh: 快时尚的多模式世界：Visuelle 2.0 基准
comment: Accepted at the 5th Workshop on Computer Vision for Fashion, Art, and Design @ CVPR22
comments: Accepted at the 5th Workshop on Computer Vision for Fashion, Art, and Design @ CVPR22
abstract: We present Visuelle 2.0, the first dataset useful for facing diverse prediction problems that a fast-fashion company has to manage routinely. Furthermore, we demonstrate how the use of computer vision is substantial in this scenario. Visuelle 2.0 contains data for 6 seasons / 5355 clothing products of Nuna Lie, a famous Italian company with hundreds of shops located in different areas within the country. In particular, we focus on a specific prediction problem, namely short-observation new product sale forecasting (SO-fore). SO-fore assumes that the season has started and a set of new products is on the shelves of the different stores. The goal is to forecast the sales for a particular horizon, given a short, available past (few weeks), since no earlier statistics are available. To be successful, SO-fore approaches should capture this short past and exploit other modalities or exogenous data. To these aims, Visuelle 2.0 is equipped with disaggregated data at the item-shop level and multi-modal information for each clothing item, allowing computer vision approaches to come into play. The main message that we deliver is that the use of image data with deep networks boosts performances obtained when using the time series in long-term forecasting scenarios, ameliorating the WAPE and MAE by up to 5.48% and 7% respectively compared to competitive baseline methods. The dataset is available at https://humaticslab.github.io/forecasting/visuelle
summary: We present Visuelle 2.0, the first dataset useful for facing diverse prediction problems that a fast-fashion company has to manage routinely. Furthermore, we demonstrate how the use of computer vision is substantial in this scenario. Visuelle 2.0 contains data for 6 seasons / 5355 clothing products of Nuna Lie, a famous Italian company with hundreds of shops located in different areas within the country. In particular, we focus on a specific prediction problem, namely short-observation new product sale forecasting (SO-fore). SO-fore assumes that the season has started and a set of new products is on the shelves of the different stores. The goal is to forecast the sales for a particular horizon, given a short, available past (few weeks), since no earlier statistics are available. To be successful, SO-fore approaches should capture this short past and exploit other modalities or exogenous data. To these aims, Visuelle 2.0 is equipped with disaggregated data at the item-shop level and multi-modal information for each clothing item, allowing computer vision approaches to come into play. The main message that we deliver is that the use of image data with deep networks boosts performances obtained when using the time series in long-term forecasting scenarios, ameliorating the WAPE and MAE by up to 5.48% and 7% respectively compared to competitive baseline methods. The dataset is available at https://humaticslab.github.io/forecasting/visuelle
abstract_zh: 我们推出了 Visuelle 2.0，这是第一个可用于应对快时尚公司必须定期管理的各种预测问题的数据集。此外，我们还演示了计算机视觉的使用在这种情况下的重要性。 Visuelle 2.0 包含 Nuna Lie 的 6 个季节 / 5355 种服装产品的数据，Nuna Lie 是一家著名的意大利公司，在全国不同地区拥有数百家商店。我们特别关注一个特定的预测问题，即短观察新产品销售预测（SO-fore）。 SO-fore 假设季节已经开始，并且不同商店的货架上有一系列新产品。目标是在给定一个短暂的、可用的过去（几周）的情况下预测特定范围内的销售额，因为没有早期的统计数据可用。为了取得成功，SO-fore 方法应该捕捉这段短暂的过去并利用其他模式或外生数据。为了实现这些目标，Visuelle 2.0 配备了商品商店级别的分类数据以及每件服装的多模式信息，从而使计算机视觉方法能够发挥作用。我们传达的主要信息是，使用深度网络的图像数据可以提高在长期预测场景中使用时间序列时获得的性能，与竞争性基线方法相比，WAPE 和 MAE 分别提高了 5.48% 和 7%。该数据集可在 https://humaticslab.github.io/forecasting/visuelle 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出Visuelle 2.0数据集，用于解决快时尚行业中基于短期观察的新产品销量预测问题，并验证计算机视觉在该场景中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 快时尚企业需在新产品上架初期预测销量，但传统时间序列方法因缺乏历史数据效果有限，需结合多模态数据（如商品图像、外部因素）提升预测准确性。
AI.method: 构建包含6个季节/5355件服装产品的Visuelle 2.0数据集，提供单品-门店层级的细粒度数据及多模态信息，采用深度网络融合图像数据与时间序列进行短期销量预测。
AI.result: 相比基准方法，图像数据与深度网络的结合使WAPE和MAE指标分别提升5.48%和7%，验证了多模态方法在短期预测中的优势。
AI.conclusion: 计算机视觉与深度学习有效提升了快时尚短期销量预测性能，多模态数据融合是解决该类问题的关键方向。

search_text: The multi-modal universe of fast-fashion: the Visuelle 2.0 benchmark 快时尚的多模式世界：Visuelle 2.0 基准 We present Visuelle 2.0, the first dataset useful for facing diverse prediction problems that a fast-fashion company has to manage routinely. Furthermore, we demonstrate how the use of computer vision is substantial in this scenario. Visuelle 2.0 contains data for 6 seasons / 5355 clothing products of Nuna Lie, a famous Italian company with hundreds of shops located in different areas within the country. In particular, we focus on a specific prediction problem, namely short-observation new product sale forecasting (SO-fore). SO-fore assumes that the season has started and a set of new products is on the shelves of the different stores. The goal is to forecast the sales for a particular horizon, given a short, available past (few weeks), since no earlier statistics are available. To be successful, SO-fore approaches should capture this short past and exploit other modalities or exogenous data. To these aims, Visuelle 2.0 is equipped with disaggregated data at the item-shop level and multi-modal information for each clothing item, allowing computer vision approaches to come into play. The main message that we deliver is that the use of image data with deep networks boosts performances obtained when using the time series in long-term forecasting scenarios, ameliorating the WAPE and MAE by up to 5.48% and 7% respectively compared to competitive baseline methods. The dataset is available at https://humaticslab.github.io/forecasting/visuelle 我们推出了 Visuelle 2.0，这是第一个可用于应对快时尚公司必须定期管理的各种预测问题的数据集。此外，我们还演示了计算机视觉的使用在这种情况下的重要性。 Visuelle 2.0 包含 Nuna Lie 的 6 个季节 / 5355 种服装产品的数据，Nuna Lie 是一家著名的意大利公司，在全国不同地区拥有数百家商店。我们特别关注一个特定的预测问题，即短观察新产品销售预测（SO-fore）。 SO-fore 假设季节已经开始，并且不同商店的货架上有一系列新产品。目标是在给定一个短暂的、可用的过去（几周）的情况下预测特定范围内的销售额，因为没有早期的统计数据可用。为了取得成功，SO-fore 方法应该捕捉这段短暂的过去并利用其他模式或外生数据。为了实现这些目标，Visuelle 2.0 配备了商品商店级别的分类数据以及每件服装的多模式信息，从而使计算机视觉方法能够发挥作用。我们传达的主要信息是，使用深度网络的图像数据可以提高在长期预测场景中使用时间序列时获得的性能，与竞争性基线方法相比，WAPE 和 MAE 分别提高了 5.48% 和 7%。该数据集可在 https://humaticslab.github.io/forecasting/visuelle 获取 本文提出Visuelle 2.0数据集，用于解决快时尚行业中基于短期观察的新产品销量预测问题，并验证计算机视觉在该场景中的有效性。 Geri Skenderi,Christian Joppi,Matteo Denitto,Berniero Scarpa,Marco Cristani cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Bailey Ramesh,Anna Konstant,Pragathi Praveena,Emmanuel Senft,Michael Gleicher,Bilge Mutlu,Michael Zinn,Robert G. Radwin
title: Manually Acquiring Targets from Multiple Viewpoints Using Video Feedback
title_zh: 使用视频反馈从多个视角手动获取目标
comment: Accepted for publication in Human Factors
comments: Accepted for publication in Human Factors
abstract: Objective: The effect of camera viewpoint was studied when performing visually obstructed psychomotor targeting tasks. Background: Previous research in laparoscopy and robotic teleoperation found that complex perceptual-motor adaptations associated with misaligned viewpoints corresponded to degraded performance in manipulation. Because optimal camera positioning is often unavailable in restricted environments, alternative viewpoints that might mitigate performance effects are not obvious. Methods: A virtual keyboard-controlled targeting task was remotely distributed to workers of Amazon Mechanical Turk. The experiment was performed by 192 subjects for a static viewpoint with independent parameters of target direction, Fitts' law index of difficulty, viewpoint azimuthal angle (AA), and viewpoint polar angle (PA). A dynamic viewpoint experiment was also performed by 112 subjects in which the viewpoint AA changed after every trial. Results: AA and target direction had significant effects on performance for the static viewpoint experiment. Movement time and travel distance increased while AA increased until there was a discrete improvement in performance for 180°. Increasing AA from 225° to 315° linearly decreased movement time and distance. There were significant main effects of current AA and magnitude of transition for the dynamic viewpoint experiment. Orthogonal direction and no-change viewpoint transitions least affected performance. Conclusions: Viewpoint selection should aim to minimize associated rotations within the manipulation plane when performing targeting tasks whether implementing a static or dynamic viewing solution. Because PA rotations had negligible performance effects, PA adjustments may extend the space of viable viewpoints. Applications: These results can inform viewpoint-selection for visual feedback during psychomotor tasks.

A dynamic viewpoint experiment was also performed by 112 subjects in which the viewpoint AA changed after every trial. Results: AA and target direction had significant effects on performance for the static viewpoint experiment. abstract_zh: 目的：研究在执行视觉障碍的精神运动瞄准任务时摄像机视角的影响。背景：先前对腹腔镜检查和机器人远程操作的研究发现，与未对准的视点相关的复杂知觉运动适应与操作性能下降相对应。由于在受限环境中通常无法获得最佳相机定位，因此可能减轻性能影响的替代视角并不明显。方法：将虚拟键盘控制的目标任务远程分发给 Amazon Mechanical Turk 的工作人员。该实验由 192 名受试者进行，采用静态视点，具有目标方向、费茨难度指数、视点方位角 (AA) 和视点极角 (PA) 等独立参数。还对 112 名受试者进行了动态视点实验，其中视点 AA 在每次试验后都会发生变化。结果：AA 和目标方向对静态视点实验的性能有显着影响。移动时间和行进距离增加，AA 增加，直到 180° 性能出现离散改善。将 AA 从 225° 增加到 315° 会线性减少移动时间和距离。动态视点实验中，当前 AA 和转变幅度具有显着的主效应。正交方向和不变的视点转换对性能的影响最小。结论：无论是实施静态还是动态查看解决方案，在执行目标任务时，视点选择应旨在最大限度地减少操作平面内的相关旋转。由于 PA 旋转对性能的影响可以忽略不计，因此 PA 调整可能会扩展可行视点的空间。应用：这些结果可以为精神运动任务期间视觉反馈的视点选择提供信息。

AI.tldr: 研究不同摄像机视角对受阻心理运动目标获取任务性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 在受限环境中，由于无法获得最佳摄像机位置，需要探索替代视角以减少性能下降。
AI.method: 通过Amazon Mechanical Turk远程进行虚拟键盘控制任务，分静态视角（192名受试者）和动态视角（112名受试者）实验，分析目标方向、视角方位角（AA）和极角（PA）的影响。
AI.result: 静态实验中，AA与目标方向显著影响性能；AA增加至180°后性能改善，225°至315°时移动时间和距离线性下降。动态实验中，当前AA和转换幅度显著影响性能，无变化或正交方向转换影响最小。
AI.conclusion: 视角选择应尽量减少操作平面内的旋转，PA调整对性能影响小，可扩展有效视角范围。

authors_text: Dario Sitnik,Ivica Kopriva
title: LEFM-Nets: Learnable Explicit Feature Map Deep Networks for Segmentation of Histopathological Images of Frozen Sections
title_zh: LEFM-Nets：用于分割冰冻切片组织病理学图像的可学习显式特征图深度网络
abstract: Accurate segmentation of medical images is essential for diagnosis and treatment of diseases. These problems are solved by highly complex models, such as deep networks (DN), requiring a large amount of labeled data for training. Thereby, many DNs possess task- or imaging modality specific architectures with a decision-making process that is often hard to explain and interpret. Here, we propose a framework that embeds existing DNs into a low-dimensional subspace induced by the learnable explicit feature map (LEFM) layer. Compared to the existing DN, the framework adds one hyperparameter and only modestly increase the number of learnable parameters. The method is aimed at, but not limited to, segmentation of low-dimensional medical images, such as color histopathological images of stained frozen sections. Since features in the LEFM layer are polynomial functions of the original features, proposed LEFM-Nets contribute to the interpretability of network decisions. In this work, we combined LEFM with the known networks: DeepLabv3+, UNet, UNet++ and MA-net. New LEFM-Nets are applied to the segmentation of adenocarcinoma of a colon in a liver from images of hematoxylin and eosin (H&E) stained frozen sections. LEFM-Nets are also tested on nuclei segmentation from images of H&E stained frozen sections of ten human organs. On the first problem, LEFM-Nets achieved statistically significant performance improvement in terms of micro balanced accuracy and $F_1$ score than original networks. LEFM-Nets achieved only better performance in comparison with the original networks on the second problem. The source code is available at https://github.com/dsitnik/lefm.
summary: Accurate segmentation of medical images is essential for diagnosis and treatment of diseases. These problems are solved by highly complex models, such as deep networks (DN), requiring a large amount of labeled data for training. Thereby, many DNs possess task- or imaging modality specific architectures with a decision-making process that is often hard to explain and interpret. Here, we propose a framework that embeds existing DNs into a low-dimensional subspace induced by the learnable explicit feature map (LEFM) layer. Compared to the existing DN, the framework adds one hyperparameter and only modestly increase the number of learnable parameters. The method is aimed at, but not limited to, segmentation of low-dimensional medical images, such as color histopathological images of stained frozen sections. Since features in the LEFM layer are polynomial functions of the original features, proposed LEFM-Nets contribute to the interpretability of network decisions. In this work, we combined LEFM with the known networks: DeepLabv3+, UNet, UNet++ and MA-net. New LEFM-Nets are applied to the segmentation of adenocarcinoma of a colon in a liver from images of hematoxylin and eosin (H&E) stained frozen sections. LEFM-Nets are also tested on nuclei segmentation from images of H&E stained frozen sections of ten human organs. On the first problem, LEFM-Nets achieved statistically significant performance improvement in terms of micro balanced accuracy and $F_1$ score than original networks. LEFM-Nets achieved only better performance in comparison with the original networks on the second problem. The source code is available at https://github.com/dsitnik/lefm.
abstract_zh: 医学图像的精确分割对于疾病的诊断和治疗至关重要。这些问题通过高度复杂的模型来解决，例如深度网络（DN），需要大量标记数据进行训练。因此，许多 DN 拥有特定于任务或成像模式的架构，其决策过程通常难以解释和解释。在这里，我们提出了一个框架，将现有的 DN 嵌入到由可学习显式特征图 (LEFM) 层引起的低维子空间中。与现有的 DN 相比，该框架增加了一个超参数，并且仅适度增加了可学习参数的数量。该方法旨在但不限于低维医学图像的分割，例如染色冰冻切片的彩色组织病理学图像。由于 LEFM 层中的特征是原始特征的多项式函数，因此提出的 LEFM-Net 有助于网络决策的可解释性。在这项工作中，我们将 LEFM 与已知网络相结合：DeepLabv3+、UNet、UNet++ 和 MA-net。新的 LEFM-Net 应用于从苏木精和伊红 (H&E) 染色的冷冻切片图像中分割肝脏结肠腺癌。 LEFM-Net 还针对十个人体器官的 H&E 染色冷冻切片图像的细胞核分割进行了测试。在第一个问题上，LEFM-Nets 在微平衡精度和 $F_1$ 分数方面比原始网络取得了统计上显着的性能改进。与原始网络相比，LEFM-Nets 在第二个问题上仅取得了更好的性能。源代码可在 https://github.com/dsitnik/lefm 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LEFM-Nets框架，通过可学习的显式特征映射层改进深度网络，用于冷冻切片组织病理学图像的分割任务。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型参数量大且可解释性差，医学图像分割需在有限标注数据下提升性能与可解释性。
AI.method: 将可学习显式特征映射（LEFM）层嵌入现有网络（如UNet、DeepLabv3+），通过多项式函数转换特征以降低维度并增强可解释性。
AI.result: 在结肠癌肝转移分割任务中，LEFM-Nets在微平衡准确率和F1分数上显著优于原网络；在10种器官核分割任务中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: LEFM-Nets通过轻量参数扩展实现性能提升与可解释性平衡，适用于医学图像分割场景，代码已开源。

search_text: LEFM-Nets: Learnable Explicit Feature Map Deep Networks for Segmentation of Histopathological Images of Frozen Sections LEFM-Nets：用于分割冰冻切片组织病理学图像的可学习显式特征图深度网络 Accurate segmentation of medical images is essential for diagnosis and treatment of diseases. These problems are solved by highly complex models, such as deep networks (DN), requiring a large amount of labeled data for training. Thereby, many DNs possess task- or imaging modality specific architectures with a decision-making process that is often hard to explain and interpret. Here, we propose a framework that embeds existing DNs into a low-dimensional subspace induced by the learnable explicit feature map (LEFM) layer. Compared to the existing DN, the framework adds one hyperparameter and only modestly increase the number of learnable parameters. The method is aimed at, but not limited to, segmentation of low-dimensional medical images, such as color histopathological images of stained frozen sections. Since features in the LEFM layer are polynomial functions of the original features, proposed LEFM-Nets contribute to the interpretability of network decisions. In this work, we combined LEFM with the known networks: DeepLabv3+, UNet, UNet++ and MA-net. New LEFM-Nets are applied to the segmentation of adenocarcinoma of a colon in a liver from images of hematoxylin and eosin (H&E) stained frozen sections. LEFM-Nets are also tested on nuclei segmentation from images of H&E stained frozen sections of ten human organs. On the first problem, LEFM-Nets achieved statistically significant performance improvement in terms of micro balanced accuracy and $F_1$ score than original networks. LEFM-Nets achieved only better performance in comparison with the original networks on the second problem. The source code is available at https://github.com/dsitnik/lefm. 医学图像的精确分割对于疾病的诊断和治疗至关重要。这些问题通过高度复杂的模型来解决，例如深度网络（DN），需要大量标记数据进行训练。因此，许多 DN 拥有特定于任务或成像模式的架构，其决策过程通常难以解释和解释。在这里，我们提出了一个框架，将现有的 DN 嵌入到由可学习显式特征图 (LEFM) 层引起的低维子空间中。与现有的 DN 相比，该框架增加了一个超参数，并且仅适度增加了可学习参数的数量。该方法旨在但不限于低维医学图像的分割，例如染色冰冻切片的彩色组织病理学图像。由于 LEFM 层中的特征是原始特征的多项式函数，因此提出的 LEFM-Net 有助于网络决策的可解释性。在这项工作中，我们将 LEFM 与已知网络相结合：DeepLabv3+、UNet、UNet++ 和 MA-net。新的 LEFM-Net 应用于从苏木精和伊红 (H&E) 染色的冷冻切片图像中分割肝脏结肠腺癌。 LEFM-Net 还针对十个人体器官的 H&E 染色冷冻切片图像的细胞核分割进行了测试。在第一个问题上，LEFM-Nets 在微平衡精度和 $F_1$ 分数方面比原始网络取得了统计上显着的性能改进。与原始网络相比，LEFM-Nets 在第二个问题上仅取得了更好的性能。源代码可在 https://github.com/dsitnik/lefm 获取。 本文提出LEFM-Nets框架，通过可学习的显式特征映射层改进深度网络，用于冷冻切片组织病理学图像的分割任务。 Dario Sitnik,Ivica Kopriva eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Dihan Zheng,Chenglong Bao,Zuoqiang Shi,Haibin Ling,Kaisheng Ma
title: Unsupervised Deep Learning Meets Chan-Vese Model
title_zh: 无监督深度学习遇见 Chan-Vese 模型
abstract: The Chan-Vese (CV) model is a classic region-based method in image segmentation. However, its piecewise constant assumption does not always hold for practical applications. Many improvements have been proposed but the issue is still far from well solved. In this work, we propose an unsupervised image segmentation approach that integrates the CV model with deep neural networks, which significantly improves the original CV model's segmentation accuracy. Our basic idea is to apply a deep neural network that maps the image into a latent space to alleviate the violation of the piecewise constant assumption in image space. We formulate this idea under the classic Bayesian framework by approximating the likelihood with an evidence lower bound (ELBO) term while keeping the prior term in the CV model. Thus, our model only needs the input image itself and does not require pre-training from external datasets. Moreover, we extend the idea to multi-phase case and dataset based unsupervised image segmentation. Extensive experiments validate the effectiveness of our model and show that the proposed method is noticeably better than other unsupervised segmentation approaches.
summary: The Chan-Vese (CV) model is a classic region-based method in image segmentation. However, its piecewise constant assumption does not always hold for practical applications. Many improvements have been proposed but the issue is still far from well solved. In this work, we propose an unsupervised image segmentation approach that integrates the CV model with deep neural networks, which significantly improves the original CV model's segmentation accuracy. Our basic idea is to apply a deep neural network that maps the image into a latent space to alleviate the violation of the piecewise constant assumption in image space. We formulate this idea under the classic Bayesian framework by approximating the likelihood with an evidence lower bound (ELBO) term while keeping the prior term in the CV model. Thus, our model only needs the input image itself and does not require pre-training from external datasets. Moreover, we extend the idea to multi-phase case and dataset based unsupervised image segmentation. Extensive experiments validate the effectiveness of our model and show that the proposed method is noticeably better than other unsupervised segmentation approaches.
abstract_zh: Chan-Vese (CV) 模型是图像分割中经典的基于区域的方法。然而，其分段常数假设并不总是适用于实际应用。尽管已经提出了许多改进方案，但问题仍远未得到很好的解决。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种将 CV 模型与深度神经网络相结合的无监督图像分割方法，显着提高了原始 CV 模型的分割精度。我们的基本思想是应用深度神经网络将图像映射到潜在空间，以减轻对图像空间中分段常数假设的违反。我们在经典贝叶斯框架下通过用证据下界 (ELBO) 项近似似然性来阐述这一想法，同时保留 CV 模型中的先验项。因此，我们的模型只需要输入图像本身，不需要来自外部数据集的预训练。此外，我们将这个想法扩展到基于多阶段情况和数据集的无监督图像分割。大量的实验验证了我们模型的有效性，并表明所提出的方法明显优于其他无监督分割方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合无监督深度学习与Chan-Vese模型的图像分割方法，通过深度网络映射潜在空间提升分割精度。
AI.motivation: Chan-Vese模型的分段常数假设在实际应用中存在局限性，现有改进方法仍未能有效解决该问题。
AI.method: 构建深度神经网络将图像映射至潜在空间，基于贝叶斯框架用ELBO近似似然函数并保留CV先验项，无需预训练且支持多相分割。
AI.result: 实验验证该方法在分割精度上显著优于其他无监督分割方法，适用于多种场景。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效缓解CV模型的假设限制，在无监督条件下实现了更优的图像分割性能。

search_text: Unsupervised Deep Learning Meets Chan-Vese Model 无监督深度学习遇见 Chan-Vese 模型 The Chan-Vese (CV) model is a classic region-based method in image segmentation. However, its piecewise constant assumption does not always hold for practical applications. Many improvements have been proposed but the issue is still far from well solved. In this work, we propose an unsupervised image segmentation approach that integrates the CV model with deep neural networks, which significantly improves the original CV model's segmentation accuracy. Thus, our model only needs the input image itself and does not require pre-training from external datasets. Moreover, we extend the idea to multi-phase case and dataset based unsupervised image segmentation. Extensive experiments validate the effectiveness of our model and show that the proposed method is noticeably better than other unsupervised segmentation approaches.
