authors_text: Bharat Lal Bhatnagar,Xianghui Xie,Ilya A. Petrov,Cristian Sminchisescu,Christian Theobalt,Gerard Pons-Moll
title: BEHAVE: Dataset and Method for Tracking Human Object Interactions
title_zh: BEHAVE：跟踪人类物体交互的数据集和方法
abstract: Modelling interactions between humans and objects in natural environments is central to many applications including gaming, virtual and mixed reality, as well as human behavior analysis and human-robot collaboration. This challenging operation scenario requires generalization to vast number of objects, scenes, and human actions. Unfortunately, there exist no such dataset. Moreover, this data needs to be acquired in diverse natural environments, which rules out 4D scanners and marker based capture systems. We present BEHAVE dataset, the first full body human- object interaction dataset with multi-view RGBD frames and corresponding 3D SMPL and object fits along with the annotated contacts between them. We record around 15k frames at 5 locations with 8 subjects performing a wide range of interactions with 20 common objects. We use this data to learn a model that can jointly track humans and objects in natural environments with an easy-to-use portable multi-camera setup. Our key insight is to predict correspondences from the human and the object to a statistical body model to obtain human-object contacts during interactions. Our approach can record and track not just the humans and objects but also their interactions, modeled as surface contacts, in 3D. Our code and data can be found at: http://virtualhumans.mpi-inf.mpg.de/behave
summary: Modelling interactions between humans and objects in natural environments is central to many applications including gaming, virtual and mixed reality, as well as human behavior analysis and human-robot collaboration. This challenging operation scenario requires generalization to vast number of objects, scenes, and human actions. Unfortunately, there exist no such dataset. Moreover, this data needs to be acquired in diverse natural environments, which rules out 4D scanners and marker based capture systems. We present BEHAVE dataset, the first full body human- object interaction dataset with multi-view RGBD frames and corresponding 3D SMPL and object fits along with the annotated contacts between them. We record around 15k frames at 5 locations with 8 subjects performing a wide range of interactions with 20 common objects. We use this data to learn a model that can jointly track humans and objects in natural environments with an easy-to-use portable multi-camera setup. Our key insight is to predict correspondences from the human and the object to a statistical body model to obtain human-object contacts during interactions. Our approach can record and track not just the humans and objects but also their interactions, modeled as surface contacts, in 3D. Our code and data can be found at: http://virtualhumans.mpi-inf.mpg.de/behave
abstract_zh: 对自然环境中人与物体之间的交互进行建模是许多应用的核心，包括游戏、虚拟现实和混合现实，以及人类行为分析和人机协作。这种具有挑战性的操作场景需要泛化到大量的物体、场景和人类行为。不幸的是，不存在这样的数据集。此外，这些数据需要在不同的自然环境中获取，这排除了 4D 扫描仪和基于标记的捕获系统。我们提出了 BEHAVE 数据集，这是第一个全身人机交互数据集，具有多视图 RGBD 帧和相应的 3D SMPL 和对象拟合以及它们之间带注释的接触。我们在 5 个地点记录了大约 15k 帧，其中 8 名受试者与 20 个常见物体进行广泛的交互。我们使用这些数据来学习一个模型，该模型可以通过易于使用的便携式多摄像头设置来联合跟踪自然环境中的人类和物体。我们的主要见解是预测人类和物体与统计身体模型的对应关系，以获得交互过程中的人与物体的接触。我们的方法不仅可以记录和跟踪人类和物体，还可以记录和跟踪他们的交互，以 3D 形式建模为表面接触。我们的代码和数据可以在以下位置找到：http://virtual humans.mpi-inf.mpg.de/behave

AI.tldr: 本文提出BEHAVE数据集及方法，用于在自然环境中追踪人类与物体的交互，通过多视角RGBD帧和3D模型实现表面接触建模。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集缺乏对自然环境中人类-物体交互的全面记录，且传统4D扫描仪和标记系统无法适应多样化场景，需开发便携式解决方案。
AI.method: 采用多摄像头系统采集多视角RGBD数据，结合统计人体模型预测人体与物体对应关系，联合追踪人体、物体及其表面接触点。
AI.result: 构建包含15k帧、8名受试者与20种常见物体交互的数据集，实现无需标记的3D交互追踪，代码与数据公开。
AI.conclusion: BEHAVE为首个完整人体-物体交互数据集，其方法可有效支持人机协作、虚拟现实等场景的交互建模研究。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出BEHAVE数据集及方法，用于在自然环境中追踪人类与物体的交互，通过多视角RGBD帧和3D模型实现表面接触建模。

search_text: BEHAVE: Dataset and Method for Tracking Human Object Interactions BEHAVE：跟踪人类物体交互的数据集和方法 Modelling interactions between humans and objects in natural environments is central to many applications including gaming, virtual and mixed reality, as well as human behavior analysis and human-robot collaboration. This challenging operation scenario requires generalization to vast number of objects, scenes, and human actions. Unfortunately, there exist no such dataset. Moreover, this data needs to be acquired in diverse natural environments, which rules out 4D scanners and marker based capture systems. We present BEHAVE dataset, the first full body human- object interaction dataset with multi-view RGBD frames and corresponding 3D SMPL and object fits along with the annotated contacts between them. We record around 15k frames at 5 locations with 8 subjects performing a wide range of interactions with 20 common objects. We use this data to learn a model that can jointly track humans and objects in natural environments with an easy-to-use portable multi-camera setup. Our key insight is to predict correspondences from the human and the object to a statistical body model to obtain human-object contacts during interactions. Our approach can record and track not just the humans and objects but also their interactions, modeled as surface contacts, in 3D. Our code and data can be found at: http://virtualhumans.mpi-inf.mpg.de/behave 对自然环境中人与物体之间的交互进行建模是许多应用的核心，包括游戏、虚拟现实和混合现实，以及人类行为分析和人机协作。这种具有挑战性的操作场景需要泛化到大量的物体、场景和人类行为。不幸的是，不存在这样的数据集。此外，这些数据需要在不同的自然环境中获取，这排除了 4D 扫描仪和基于标记的捕获系统。我们提出了 BEHAVE 数据集，这是第一个全身人机交互数据集，具有多视图 RGBD 帧和相应的 3D SMPL 和对象拟合以及它们之间带注释的接触。我们在 5 个地点记录了大约 15k 帧，其中 8 名受试者与 20 个常见物体进行广泛的交互。我们使用这些数据来学习一个模型，该模型可以通过易于使用的便携式多摄像头设置来联合跟踪自然环境中的人类和物体。我们的主要见解是预测人类和物体与统计身体模型的对应关系，以获得交互过程中的人与物体的接触。我们的方法不仅可以记录和跟踪人类和物体，还可以记录和跟踪他们的交互，以 3D 形式建模为表面接触。我们的代码和数据可以在以下位置找到：http://virtual humans.mpi-inf.mpg.de/behave 本文提出BEHAVE数据集及方法，用于在自然环境中追踪人类与物体的交互，通过多视角RGBD帧和3D模型实现表面接触建模。 Bharat Lal Bhatnagar,Xianghui Xie,Ilya A. Petrov,Cristian Sminchisescu,Christian Theobalt,Gerard Pons-Moll cs.CV

authors_text: Xianjia Yu,Jorge Peña Queralta,Tomi Westerlund
title: Federated Learning for Vision-based Obstacle Avoidance in the Internet of Robotic Things
title_zh: 机器人物联网中基于视觉的联合学习避障
abstract: Deep learning methods have revolutionized mobile robotics, from advanced perception models for an enhanced situational awareness to novel control approaches through reinforcement learning. This paper explores the potential of federated learning for distributed systems of mobile robots enabling collaboration on the Internet of Robotic Things. To demonstrate the effectiveness of such an approach, we deploy wheeled robots in different indoor environments. We analyze the performance of a federated learning approach and compare it to a traditional centralized training process with a priori aggregated data. We show the benefits of collaborative learning across heterogeneous environments and the potential for sim-to-real knowledge transfer. Our results demonstrate significant performance benefits of FL and sim-to-real transfer for vision-based navigation, in addition to the inherent privacy-preserving nature of FL by keeping computation at the edge. This is, to the best of our knowledge, the first work to leverage FL for vision-based navigation that also tests results in real-world settings.
summary: Deep learning methods have revolutionized mobile robotics, from advanced perception models for an enhanced situational awareness to novel control approaches through reinforcement learning. This paper explores the potential of federated learning for distributed systems of mobile robots enabling collaboration on the Internet of Robotic Things. To demonstrate the effectiveness of such an approach, we deploy wheeled robots in different indoor environments. We analyze the performance of a federated learning approach and compare it to a traditional centralized training process with a priori aggregated data. We show the benefits of collaborative learning across heterogeneous environments and the potential for sim-to-real knowledge transfer. Our results demonstrate significant performance benefits of FL and sim-to-real transfer for vision-based navigation, in addition to the inherent privacy-preserving nature of FL by keeping computation at the edge. This is, to the best of our knowledge, the first work to leverage FL for vision-based navigation that also tests results in real-world settings.
abstract_zh: 深度学习方法彻底改变了移动机器人技术，从增强态势感知的先进感知模型到通过强化学习的新颖控制方法。本文探讨了移动机器人分布式系统联邦学习的潜力，以实现机器人物联网上的协作。为了证明这种方法的有效性，我们在不同的室内环境中部署轮式机器人。我们分析联邦学习方法的性能，并将其与具有先验聚合数据的传统集中式训练过程进行比较。我们展示了跨异构环境协作学习的好处以及模拟到真实知识转移的潜力。我们的结果证明了 FL 和基于视觉导航的模拟到真实传输的显着性能优势，以及 FL 通过将计算保持在边缘而固有的隐私保护性质。据我们所知，这是第一个利用 FL 进行基于视觉的导航的工作，并且还在现实环境中测试了结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究联邦学习在物联网机器人视觉避障中的应用，通过多机器人协作提升导航性能。
AI.motivation: 传统集中式训练面临数据隐私泄露和环境异构性挑战，联邦学习可在保护隐私的同时实现跨环境知识共享。
AI.method: 部署轮式机器人于不同室内环境，采用联邦学习框架对比集中式训练，验证仿真到现实的知识迁移效果。
AI.result: 联邦学习显著提升视觉导航性能，实现跨异构环境的协作学习，且保持边缘计算隐私性，首次在真实场景验证该方法。
AI.conclusion: 联邦学习为物联网机器人提供隐私保护的分布式学习方案，具有跨环境适应优势，未来可拓展至更多复杂场景。

authors_text: Abbas Salami,Javier Andreu-Perez,Helge Gillmeister
title: EEG-ITNet: An Explainable Inception Temporal Convolutional Network for Motor Imagery Classification
title_zh: EEG-ITNet：用于运动意象分类的可解释的初始时间卷积网络
abstract: In recent years, neural networks and especially deep architectures have received substantial attention for EEG signal analysis in the field of brain-computer interfaces (BCIs). In this ongoing research area, the end-to-end models are more favoured than traditional approaches requiring signal transformation pre-classification. They can eliminate the need for prior information from experts and the extraction of handcrafted features. However, although several deep learning algorithms have been already proposed in the literature, achieving high accuracies for classifying motor movements or mental tasks, they often face a lack of interpretability and therefore are not quite favoured by the neuroscience community. The reasons behind this issue can be the high number of parameters and the sensitivity of deep neural networks to capture tiny yet unrelated discriminative features. We propose an end-to-end deep learning architecture called EEG-ITNet and a more comprehensible method to visualise the network learned patterns. Using inception modules and causal convolutions with dilation, our model can extract rich spectral, spatial, and temporal information from multi-channel EEG signals with less complexity (in terms of the number of trainable parameters) than other existing end-to-end architectures, such as EEG-Inception and EEG-TCNet. By an exhaustive evaluation on dataset 2a from BCI competition IV and OpenBMI motor imagery dataset, EEG-ITNet shows up to 5.9\% improvement in the classification accuracy in different scenarios with statistical significance compared to its competitors. We also comprehensively explain and support the validity of network illustration from a neuroscientific perspective. We have also made our code open at https://github.com/AbbasSalami/EEG-ITNet
summary: In recent years, neural networks and especially deep architectures have received substantial attention for EEG signal analysis in the field of brain-computer interfaces (BCIs). In this ongoing research area, the end-to-end models are more favoured than traditional approaches requiring signal transformation pre-classification. They can eliminate the need for prior information from experts and the extraction of handcrafted features. However, although several deep learning algorithms have been already proposed in the literature, achieving high accuracies for classifying motor movements or mental tasks, they often face a lack of interpretability and therefore are not quite favoured by the neuroscience community. The reasons behind this issue can be the high number of parameters and the sensitivity of deep neural networks to capture tiny yet unrelated discriminative features. We propose an end-to-end deep learning architecture called EEG-ITNet and a more comprehensible method to visualise the network learned patterns. Using inception modules and causal convolutions with dilation, our model can extract rich spectral, spatial, and temporal information from multi-channel EEG signals with less complexity (in terms of the number of trainable parameters) than other existing end-to-end architectures, such as EEG-Inception and EEG-TCNet. By an exhaustive evaluation on dataset 2a from BCI competition IV and OpenBMI motor imagery dataset, EEG-ITNet shows up to 5.9\% improvement in the classification accuracy in different scenarios with statistical significance compared to its competitors. We also comprehensively explain and support the validity of network illustration from a neuroscientific perspective. We have also made our code open at https://github.com/AbbasSalami/EEG-ITNet
abstract_zh: 近年来，神经网络，尤其是深层架构在脑机接口（BCIs）领域的脑电信号分析中受到了广泛关注。在这个正在进行的研究领域，端到端模型比需要信号转换预分类的传统方法更受青睐。它们可以消除对专家先验信息和手工特征提取的需求。然而，尽管文献中已经提出了几种深度学习算法，在对运动运动或心理任务进行分类方面实现了高精度，但它们往往缺乏可解释性，因此不太受到神经科学界的青睐。这个问题背后的原因可能是参数数量过多以及深度神经网络捕获微小但不相关的判别特征的敏感性。我们提出了一种名为 EEG-ITNet 的端到端深度学习架构，以及一种更易于理解的方法来可视化网络学习模式。使用 inception 模块和带有扩张的因果卷积，我们的模型可以从多通道 EEG 信号中提取丰富的频谱、空间和时间信息，并且比其他现有的端到端架构（例如 EEG-Inception 和 EEG-TCNet）复杂度更低（就可训练参数的数量而言）。通过对 BCI 竞赛 IV 的数据集 2a 和 OpenBMI 运动想象数据集进行详尽评估，EEG-ITNet 与竞争对手相比，在不同场景下的分类精度提高了 5.9%，具有统计显着性。我们还从神经科学的角度全面解释和支持网络插图的有效性。我们还在 https://github.com/AbbasSalami/EEG-ITNet 上开放了我们的代码

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为EEG-ITNet的可解释深度学习模型，用于提高运动想象任务的脑电信号分类准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型在EEG分析中缺乏可解释性，难以获得神经科学领域的认可，且参数过多易捕捉无关特征。
AI.method: 采用Inception模块与因果卷积结合扩张技术，提取多通道EEG信号的时频空域特征，降低模型复杂度。
AI.result: 在BCI竞赛数据集和OpenBMI数据集上，分类准确率较现有模型提升最高5.9%，且具有统计显著性。
AI.conclusion: EEG-ITNet在保持高精度的同时提升了模型可解释性，为神经科学提供了可信的分析工具。

We propose an end-to-end deep learning architecture called EEG-ITNet and a more comprehensible method to visualise the network learned patterns. Using inception modules and causal convolutions with dilation, our model can extract rich spectral, spatial, and temporal information from multi-channel EEG signals with less complexity (in terms of the number of trainable parameters) than other existing end-to-end architectures, such as EEG-Inception and EEG-TCNet. By an exhaustive evaluation on dataset 2a from BCI competition IV and OpenBMI motor imagery dataset, EEG-ITNet shows up to 5.9\% improvement in the classification accuracy in different scenarios with statistical significance compared to its competitors. We also comprehensively explain and support the validity of network illustration from a neuroscientific perspective. We have also made our code open at https://github.com/AbbasSalami/EEG-ITNet 近年来，神经网络，尤其是深层架构在脑机接口（BCIs）领域的脑电信号分析中受到了广泛关注。在这个正在进行的研究领域，端到端模型比需要信号转换预分类的传统方法更受青睐。它们可以消除对专家先验信息和手工特征提取的需求。然而，尽管文献中已经提出了几种深度学习算法，在对运动运动或心理任务进行分类方面实现了高精度，但它们往往缺乏可解释性，因此不太受到神经科学界的青睐。这个问题背后的原因可能是参数数量过多以及深度神经网络捕获微小但不相关的判别特征的敏感性。我们提出了一种名为 EEG-ITNet 的端到端深度学习架构，以及一种更易于理解的方法来可视化网络学习模式。使用 inception 模块和带有扩张的因果卷积，我们的模型可以从多通道 EEG 信号中提取丰富的频谱、空间和时间信息，并且比其他现有的端到端架构（例如 EEG-Inception 和 EEG-TCNet）复杂度更低（就可训练参数的数量而言）。通过对 BCI 竞赛 IV 的数据集 2a 和 OpenBMI 运动想象数据集进行详尽评估，EEG-ITNet 与竞争对手相比，在不同场景下的分类精度提高了 5.9%，具有统计显着性。我们还从神经科学的角度全面解释和支持网络插图的有效性。我们还在 https://github.com/AbbasSalami/EEG-ITNet 上开放了我们的代码 本文提出一种名为EEG-ITNet的可解释深度学习模型，用于提高运动想象任务的脑电信号分类准确率。 Abbas Salami,Javier Andreu-Perez,Helge Gillmeister cs.LG,cs.AI,q-bio.NC

authors_text: Jason Dykes,Alfie Abdul-Rahman,Daniel Archambault,Benjamin Bach,Rita Borgo,Min Chen,Jessica Enright,Hui Fang,Elif E. Firat,Euan Freeman,Tuna Gonen,Claire Harris,Radu Jianu,Nigel W. John,Saiful Khan,Andrew Lahiff,Robert S. Laramee,Louise Matthews,Sibylle Mohr,Phong H. Nguyen,Alma A. M. Rahat,Richard Reeve,Panagiotis D. Ritsos,Jonathan C. Roberts,Aidan Slingsby, et al. title: Visualization for Epidemiological Modelling: Challenges, Solutions, Reflections & Recommendations
title_zh: 流行病学建模可视化：挑战、解决方案、反思和建议
comment: ef:RSTA: Special Issue - Technical challenges of modelling real-life epidemics and examples of overcoming these, 380(2233) 2022
comments: ef:RSTA: Special Issue - Technical challenges of modelling real-life epidemics and examples of overcoming these, 380(2233) 2022
abstract: We report on an ongoing collaboration between epidemiological modellers and visualization researchers by documenting and reflecting upon knowledge constructs -- a series of ideas, approaches and methods taken from existing visualization research and practice -- deployed and developed to support modelling of the COVID-19 pandemic. Structured independent commentary on these efforts is synthesized through iterative reflection to develop: evidence of the effectiveness and value of visualization in this context; open problems upon which the research communities may focus; guidance for future activity of this type; and recommendations to safeguard the achievements and promote, advance, secure and prepare for future collaborations of this kind. In describing and comparing a series of related projects that were undertaken in unprecedented conditions, our hope is that this unique report, and its rich interactive supplementary materials, will guide the scientific community in embracing visualization in its observation, analysis and modelling of data as well as in disseminating findings. Equally we hope to encourage the visualization community to engage with impactful science in addressing its emerging data challenges. If we are successful, this showcase of activity may stimulate mutually beneficial engagement between communities with complementary expertise to address problems of significance in epidemiology and beyond. https://ramp-vis.github.io/RAMPVIS-PhilTransA-Supplement/
summary: We report on an ongoing collaboration between epidemiological modellers and visualization researchers by documenting and reflecting upon knowledge constructs -- a series of ideas, approaches and methods taken from existing visualization research and practice -- deployed and developed to support modelling of the COVID-19 pandemic. Structured independent commentary on these efforts is synthesized through iterative reflection to develop: evidence of the effectiveness and value of visualization in this context; open problems upon which the research communities may focus; guidance for future activity of this type; and recommendations to safeguard the achievements and promote, advance, secure and prepare for future collaborations of this kind. In describing and comparing a series of related projects that were undertaken in unprecedented conditions, our hope is that this unique report, and its rich interactive supplementary materials, will guide the scientific community in embracing visualization in its observation, analysis and modelling of data as well as in disseminating findings. Equally we hope to encourage the visualization community to engage with impactful science in addressing its emerging data challenges. If we are successful, this showcase of activity may stimulate mutually beneficial engagement between communities with complementary expertise to address problems of significance in epidemiology and beyond. https://ramp-vis.github.io/RAMPVIS-PhilTransA-Supplement/
abstract_zh: 我们通过记录和反思知识结构（取自现有可视化研究和实践的一系列想法、方法和方法）来报告流行病学建模者和可视化研究人员之间正在进行的合作，这些知识结构被部署和开发以支持 COVID-19 大流行的建模。通过迭代反思综合对这些努力的结构化独立评论，以开发： 在此背景下可视化的有效性和价值的证据；研究界可能关注的开放性问题；对此类未来活动的指导；以及维护成就并促进、推进、保障和准备未来此类合作的建议。在描述和比较在前所未有的条件下进行的一系列相关项目时，我们希望这份独特的报告及其丰富的交互式补充材料将指导科学界在数据的观察、分析和建模以及传播研究结果中采用可视化。同样，我们希望鼓励可视化社区利用有影响力的科学来解决新兴的数据挑战。如果我们成功，这种活动展示可能会刺激具有互补专业知识的社区之间的互利参与，以解决流行病学及其他领域的重大问题。 https://ramp-vis.github.io/RAMPVIS-PhilTransA-Supplement/

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了流行病学建模与可视化研究之间的合作，旨在通过可视化技术支持对新冠疫情的建模工作。
AI.motivation: 在新冠疫情这一前所未有的背景下，作者希望通过总结和反思可视化技术在流行病学建模中的应用，推动科学界更广泛地采用可视化技术，并促进两个研究领域的合作。
AI.method: 作者通过记录和分析与流行病学建模相关的可视化研究和实践，结合迭代反思的方法，总结了可视化技术在这一领域的有效性、存在的问题及未来研究方向。
AI.result: 本文提供了可视化技术在流行病学建模中的应用证据，提出了开放问题和未来研究建议，并提供了丰富的交互式补充材料以支持科学研究。
AI.conclusion: 本文展示了可视化技术在流行病学中的重要性，并鼓励两个研究领域进一步合作，以应对未来可能出现的复杂数据挑战。

authors_text: Jordan Aiko Deja,Sven Mayer,Klen Čopič Pucihar,Matjaž Kljun
title: The Vision of a Human-Centered Piano
title_zh: 以人为本的钢琴愿景
abstract: For around 300 years, humans have been learning to play the modern piano either with a teacher or on their own. In recent years teaching and learning have been enhanced using augmented technologies that support novices. Other technologies have also tried to improve different use cases with the piano, such as composing and performing. Researchers and practitioners have showcased several forms of augmentation, from hardware improvements, sound quality, rendering projected visualizations to gesture-based and immersive technologies. Today, the landscape of piano augmentations is very diverse, and it is unclear how to describe the ideal piano and its features. In this work, we discuss how the human-centered piano -- the piano that has been designed with humans in the center of the design process and that effectively supports tasks performed on it -- can support pianists. In detail, we present the three tasks of learning, composing, and improvising in which a human-centered piano would be beneficial for the pianist.
summary: For around 300 years, humans have been learning to play the modern piano either with a teacher or on their own. In recent years teaching and learning have been enhanced using augmented technologies that support novices. Other technologies have also tried to improve different use cases with the piano, such as composing and performing. Researchers and practitioners have showcased several forms of augmentation, from hardware improvements, sound quality, rendering projected visualizations to gesture-based and immersive technologies. Today, the landscape of piano augmentations is very diverse, and it is unclear how to describe the ideal piano and its features. In this work, we discuss how the human-centered piano -- the piano that has been designed with humans in the center of the design process and that effectively supports tasks performed on it -- can support pianists. In detail, we present the three tasks of learning, composing, and improvising in which a human-centered piano would be beneficial for the pianist.
abstract_zh: 大约 300 年来，人类一直在跟随老师或自学弹奏现代钢琴。近年来，通过支持新手的增强技术，教学和学习得到了加强。其他技术也试图改进钢琴的不同用例，例如作曲和表演。研究人员和从业者展示了多种形式的增强，从硬件改进、音质、渲染投影可视化到基于手势的沉浸式技术。如今，钢琴增强的前景非常多样化，目前尚不清楚如何描述理想的钢琴及其功能。在这项工作中，我们讨论以人为本的钢琴——在设计过程中以人为中心设计的钢琴，并有效支持在其上执行的任务——如何为钢琴家提供支持。我们详细介绍了学习、作曲和即兴创作这三项任务，其中以人为本的钢琴对钢琴家来说是有益的。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了以人为本的钢琴如何支持钢琴家在学习、作曲和即兴演奏三个核心任务中的需求。
AI.motivation: 现有钢琴增强技术多样，但缺乏对理想钢琴特征的明确描述，需通过以人为本的设计理念来优化钢琴功能。
AI.method: 通过分析现有增强技术，结合人机交互理论，提出以人为本的钢琴设计框架，聚焦学习、作曲和即兴演奏三个任务。
AI.result: 提出了以人为本的钢琴设计愿景，并明确了其在学习、作曲和即兴演奏中的关键功能和支持方式。
AI.conclusion: 以人为本的钢琴设计能有效提升演奏体验，未来需进一步探索技术与用户需求的深度融合。

authors_text: Federica Cecchetto,Vera Traub,Rico Zenklusen
title: Better-Than-$\frac{4}{3}$-Approximations for Leaf-to-Leaf Tree and Connectivity Augmentation
title_zh: 优于-$\frac{4}{3}$-叶到叶树和连通性增强的近似
abstract: The Connectivity Augmentation Problem (CAP) together with a well-known special case thereof known as the Tree Augmentation Problem (TAP) are among the most basic Network Design problems. There has been a surge of interest recently to find approximation algorithms with guarantees below $2$ for both TAP and CAP, culminating in the currently best approximation factor for both problems of $1.393$ through quite sophisticated techniques. We present a new and arguably simple matching-based method for the well-known special case of leaf-to-leaf instances. Combining our work with prior techniques, we readily obtain a $(\frac{4}{3}+ε)$-approximation for Leaf-to-Leaf CAP by returning the better of our solution and one of an existing method. Prior to our work, a $\frac{4}{3}$-guarantee was only known for Leaf-to-Leaf TAP instances on trees of height $2$. Moreover, when combining our technique with a recently introduced stack analysis approach, which is part of the above-mentioned $1.393$-approximation, we can further improve the approximation factor to $1.29$, obtaining for the first time a factor below $\frac{4}{3}$ for a nontrivial class of TAP/CAP instances.

There has been a surge of interest recently to find approximation algorithms with guarantees below $2$ for both TAP and CAP, culminating in the currently best approximation factor for both problems of $1.393$ through quite sophisticated techniques. We present a new and arguably simple matching-based method for the well-known special case of leaf-to-leaf instances. Combining our work with prior techniques, we readily obtain a $(\frac{4}{3}+ε)$-approximation for Leaf-to-Leaf CAP by returning the better of our solution and one of an existing method. Prior to our work, a $\frac{4}{3}$-guarantee was only known for Leaf-to-Leaf TAP instances on trees of height $2$. Moreover, when combining our technique with a recently introduced stack analysis approach, which is part of the above-mentioned $1.393$-approximation, we can further improve the approximation factor to $1.29$, obtaining for the first time a factor below $\frac{4}{3}$ for a nontrivial class of TAP/CAP instances.
abstract_zh: 连接增强问题（CAP）及其众所周知的特例（称为树增强问题（TAP））是最基本的网络设计问题之一。最近，人们对寻找 TAP 和 CAP 的保证低于 2 美元的近似算法产生了浓厚的兴趣，最终通过相当复杂的技术为这两个问题提供了 1.393 美元的当前最佳近似因子。我们针对叶到叶实例的众所周知的特殊情况提出了一种新的且可以说是简单的基于匹配的方法。将我们的工作与现有技术相结合，通过返回我们的解决方案和现有方法之一的更好方案，我们很容易获得叶到叶 CAP 的 $(\frac{4}{3}+ε)$ 近似值。在我们的工作之前，$\frac{4}{3}$ 保证仅适用于高度为 $2$ 的树上的 Leaf-to-Leaf TAP 实例。此外，当将我们的技术与最近引入的堆栈分析方法（这是上述 $1.393$ 近似值的一部分）相结合时，我们可以进一步将近似因子提高到 $1.29$，首次为 TAP/CAP 实例的非平凡类获得低于 $\frac{4}{3}$ 的因子。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对叶到叶树和连通性增强问题的新方法，改进了其近似比。
AI.motivation: 现有算法对树增强问题（TAP）和连通性增强问题（CAP）的近似比难以突破2，且叶到叶实例的4/3近似仅适用于高度为2的树，需进一步优化。
AI.method: 基于匹配的简单方法，结合现有技术与堆栈分析法，针对叶到叶实例设计新算法。
AI.result: 获得叶到叶CAP的(4/3+ε)近似，结合堆栈分析后进一步提升至1.29，首次实现非平凡类TAP/CAP实例的低于4/3近似。
AI.conclusion: 新方法为叶到叶实例提供了更优近似比，推动了TAP/CAP问题在特定场景下的算法进展。

authors_text: Michael Beukman,Christopher W Cleghorn,Steven James
title: Procedural Content Generation using Neuroevolution and Novelty Search for Diverse Video Game Levels
title_zh: 使用神经进化和新颖性搜索来生成不同视频游戏级别的程序内容
comment: Accepted to the Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference (GECCO '22), July 9--13, 2022, Boston, MA, USA. Code is located at https://github.com/Michael-Beukman/PCGNN
comments: Accepted to the Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference (GECCO '22), July 9--13, 2022, Boston, MA, USA. Code is located at https://github.com/Michael-Beukman/PCGNN
abstract: Procedurally generated video game content has the potential to drastically reduce the content creation budget of game developers and large studios. However, adoption is hindered by limitations such as slow generation, as well as low quality and diversity of content. We introduce an evolutionary search-based approach for evolving level generators using novelty search to procedurally generate diverse levels in real time, without requiring training data or detailed domain-specific knowledge. We test our method on two domains, and our results show an order of magnitude speedup in generation time compared to existing methods while obtaining comparable metric scores. We further demonstrate the ability to generalise to arbitrary-sized levels without retraining.
summary: Procedurally generated video game content has the potential to drastically reduce the content creation budget of game developers and large studios. However, adoption is hindered by limitations such as slow generation, as well as low quality and diversity of content. We introduce an evolutionary search-based approach for evolving level generators using novelty search to procedurally generate diverse levels in real time, without requiring training data or detailed domain-specific knowledge. We test our method on two domains, and our results show an order of magnitude speedup in generation time compared to existing methods while obtaining comparable metric scores. We further demonstrate the ability to generalise to arbitrary-sized levels without retraining.
abstract_zh: 程序生成的视频游戏内容有可能大幅减少游戏开发商和大型工作室的内容创建预算。然而，其采用受到诸如生成速度慢、内容质量低和多样性等限制的阻碍。我们引入了一种基于进化搜索的方法，用于使用新颖性搜索来实时生成不同级别的进化级别生成器，而不需要训练数据或详细的特定领域知识。我们在两个领域测试了我们的方法，结果显示，与现有方法相比，生成时间加快了一个数量级，同时获得了可比较的指标分数。我们进一步证明了无需重新训练即可泛化到任意大小水平的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经进化和新颖性搜索的实时程序化生成方法，用于创建多样化视频游戏关卡。
AI.motivation: 程序化生成可降低游戏开发成本，但现有方法存在生成速度慢、内容质量与多样性不足的问题。
AI.method: 采用进化搜索结合新颖性搜索算法，无需训练数据或领域知识，实时生成多样化关卡。
AI.result: 生成速度较现有方法提升十倍，保持相当的评估指标，且能泛化到任意尺寸关卡而无需重新训练。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了程序化生成的效率与多样性矛盾，具备良好的实时生成与泛化能力。

authors_text: Fabian A. Braeu,Alexandre H. Thiéry,Tin A. Tun,Aiste Kadziauskiene,George Barbastathis,Tin Aung,Michaël J. A. Girard
title: Geometric Deep Learning to Identify the Critical 3D Structural Features of the Optic Nerve Head for Glaucoma Diagnosis
title_zh: 利用几何深度学习识别青光眼诊断视神经头的关键 3D 结构特征
abstract: Purpose: The optic nerve head (ONH) undergoes complex and deep 3D morphological changes during the development and progression of glaucoma. Optical coherence tomography (OCT) is the current gold standard to visualize and quantify these changes, however the resulting 3D deep-tissue information has not yet been fully exploited for the diagnosis and prognosis of glaucoma. To this end, we aimed: (1) To compare the performance of two relatively recent geometric deep learning techniques in diagnosing glaucoma from a single OCT scan of the ONH; and (2) To identify the 3D structural features of the ONH that are critical for the diagnosis of glaucoma. Methods: In this study, we included a total of 2,247 non-glaucoma and 2,259 glaucoma scans from 1,725 subjects. All subjects had their ONHs imaged in 3D with Spectralis OCT. All OCT scans were automatically segmented using deep learning to identify major neural and connective tissues. Each ONH was then represented as a 3D point cloud. We used PointNet and dynamic graph convolutional neural network (DGCNN) to diagnose glaucoma from such 3D ONH point clouds and to identify the critical 3D structural features of the ONH for glaucoma diagnosis. Results: Both the DGCNN (AUC: 0.97$\pm$0.01) and PointNet (AUC: 0.95$\pm$0.02) were able to accurately detect glaucoma from 3D ONH point clouds. The critical points formed an hourglass pattern with most of them located in the inferior and superior quadrant of the ONH. Discussion: The diagnostic accuracy of both geometric deep learning approaches was excellent. Moreover, we were able to identify the critical 3D structural features of the ONH for glaucoma diagnosis that tremendously improved the transparency and interpretability of our method. Consequently, our approach may have strong potential to be used in clinical applications for the diagnosis and prognosis of a wide range of ophthalmic disorders.

Optical coherence tomography (OCT) is the current gold standard to visualize and quantify these changes, however the resulting 3D deep-tissue information has not yet been fully exploited for the diagnosis and prognosis of glaucoma. To this end, we aimed: (1) To compare the performance of two relatively recent geometric deep learning techniques in diagnosing glaucoma from a single OCT scan of the ONH; and (2) To identify the 3D structural features of the ONH that are critical for the diagnosis of glaucoma. Methods: In this study, we included a total of 2,247 non-glaucoma and 2,259 glaucoma scans from 1,725 subjects. All subjects had their ONHs imaged in 3D with Spectralis OCT. All OCT scans were automatically segmented using deep learning to identify major neural and connective tissues. Each ONH was then represented as a 3D point cloud. We used PointNet and dynamic graph convolutional neural network (DGCNN) to diagnose glaucoma from such 3D ONH point clouds and to identify the critical 3D structural features of the ONH for glaucoma diagnosis. Results: Both the DGCNN (AUC: 0.97$\pm$0.01) and PointNet (AUC: 0.95$\pm$0.02) were able to accurately detect glaucoma from 3D ONH point clouds. The critical points formed an hourglass pattern with most of them located in the inferior and superior quadrant of the ONH. Discussion: The diagnostic accuracy of both geometric deep learning approaches was excellent. Moreover, we were able to identify the critical 3D structural features of the ONH for glaucoma diagnosis that tremendously improved the transparency and interpretability of our method. Consequently, our approach may have strong potential to be used in clinical applications for the diagnosis and prognosis of a wide range of ophthalmic disorders.
abstract_zh: 目的：在青光眼的发生和进展过程中，视神经乳头（ONH）经历复杂而深层次的3D形态变化。光学相干断层扫描 (OCT) 是当前可视化和量化这些变化的黄金标准，但由此产生的 3D 深层组织信息尚未充分利用用于青光眼的诊断和预后。为此，我们的目标是：（1）比较两种相对较新的几何深度学习技术在通过 ONH 的单次 OCT 扫描诊断青光眼方面的性能； (2) 确定对青光眼诊断至关重要的 ONH 3D 结构特征。方法：在这项研究中，我们共纳入了来自 1,725 名受试者的 2,247 次非青光眼扫描和 2,259 次青光眼扫描。使用 Spectralis OCT 对所有受试者的 ONH 进行 3D 成像。所有 OCT 扫描均使用深度学习自动分割，以识别主要的神经和结缔组织。然后，每个 ONH 都表示为 3D 点云。我们使用 PointNet 和动态图卷积神经网络 (DGCNN) 从此类 3D ONH 点云中诊断青光眼，并识别 ONH 的关键 3D 结构特征以进行青光眼诊断。结果：DGCNN（AUC：0.97$\pm$0.01）和 PointNet（AUC：0.95$\pm$0.02）都能够从 3D ONH 点云中准确检测青光眼。临界点呈沙漏状，大部分位于 ONH 的下象限和上象限。讨论：两种几何深度学习方法的诊断准确性都非常好。此外，我们能够识别用于青光眼诊断的 ONH 的关键 3D 结构特征，这极大地提高了我们方法的透明度和可解释性。因此，我们的方法可能具有在临床应用中用于广泛眼科疾病的诊断和预后的巨大潜力。

AI.tldr: 本论文旨在通过比较PointNet和DGCNN两种几何深度学习技术，利用视神经头（ONH）的3D结构特征进行青光眼诊断，并识别关键结构特征。
AI.motivation: 尽管光学相干断层扫描（OCT）是青光眼诊断的黄金标准，但其生成的3D深层组织信息尚未被充分挖掘。现有方法缺乏对关键3D结构特征的明确识别，影响诊断透明度和临床应用。
AI.method: 收集2,247例非青光眼和2,259例青光眼患者的3D OCT扫描数据，通过深度学习分割主要神经和结缔组织，生成ONH点云。采用PointNet和动态图卷积神经网络（DGCNN）进行分类，并分析关键结构特征。
AI.result: DGCNN（AUC: 0.97±0.01）和PointNet（AUC: 0.95±0.02）均能准确检测青光眼，关键点呈现‘沙漏’状分布，主要位于ONH的下部和上部象限。
AI.conclusion: 两种几何深度学习方法均表现出色，识别出的3D结构特征显著提升了方法的可解释性，为青光眼及其他眼科疾病的临床诊断提供了潜在应用价值。

ai_content.tldr: 本论文旨在通过比较PointNet和DGCNN两种几何深度学习技术，利用视神经头（ONH）的3D结构特征进行青光眼诊断，并识别关键结构特征。
ai_content.motivation: 尽管光学相干断层扫描（OCT）是青光眼诊断的黄金标准，但其生成的3D深层组织信息尚未被充分挖掘。现有方法缺乏对关键3D结构特征的明确识别，影响诊断透明度和临床应用。
ai_content.method: 收集2,247例非青光眼和2,259例青光眼患者的3D OCT扫描数据，通过深度学习分割主要神经和结缔组织，生成ONH点云。采用PointNet和动态图卷积神经网络（DGCNN）进行分类，并分析关键结构特征。
ai_content.result: DGCNN（AUC: 0.97±0.01）和PointNet（AUC: 0.95±0.02）均能准确检测青光眼，关键点呈现‘沙漏’状分布，主要位于ONH的下部和上部象限。
ai_content.conclusion: 两种几何深度学习方法均表现出色，识别出的3D结构特征显著提升了方法的可解释性，为青光眼及其他眼科疾病的临床诊断提供了潜在应用价值。

search_text: Geometric Deep Learning to Identify the Critical 3D Structural Features of the Optic Nerve Head for Glaucoma Diagnosis 利用几何深度学习识别青光眼诊断视神经头的关键 3D 结构特征 Purpose: The optic nerve head (ONH) undergoes complex and deep 3D morphological changes during the development and progression of glaucoma. Optical coherence tomography (OCT) is the current gold standard to visualize and quantify these changes, however the resulting 3D deep-tissue information has not yet been fully exploited for the diagnosis and prognosis of glaucoma. To this end, we aimed: (1) To compare the performance of two relatively recent geometric deep learning techniques in diagnosing glaucoma from a single OCT scan of the ONH; and (2) To identify the 3D structural features of the ONH that are critical for the diagnosis of glaucoma. Methods: In this study, we included a total of 2,247 non-glaucoma and 2,259 glaucoma scans from 1,725 subjects. All subjects had their ONHs imaged in 3D with Spectralis OCT. All OCT scans were automatically segmented using deep learning to identify major neural and connective tissues. Each ONH was then represented as a 3D point cloud. We used PointNet and dynamic graph convolutional neural network (DGCNN) to diagnose glaucoma from such 3D ONH point clouds and to identify the critical 3D structural features of the ONH for glaucoma diagnosis. Results: Both the DGCNN (AUC: 0.97$\pm$0.01) and PointNet (AUC: 0.95$\pm$0.02) were able to accurately detect glaucoma from 3D ONH point clouds. The critical points formed an hourglass pattern with most of them located in the inferior and superior quadrant of the ONH. Discussion: The diagnostic accuracy of both geometric deep learning approaches was excellent. Moreover, we were able to identify the critical 3D structural features of the ONH for glaucoma diagnosis that tremendously improved the transparency and interpretability of our method. Consequently, our approach may have strong potential to be used in clinical applications for the diagnosis and prognosis of a wide range of ophthalmic disorders. 目的：在青光眼的发生和进展过程中，视神经乳头（ONH）经历复杂而深层次的3D形态变化。光学相干断层扫描 (OCT) 是当前可视化和量化这些变化的黄金标准，但由此产生的 3D 深层组织信息尚未充分利用用于青光眼的诊断和预后。为此，我们的目标是：（1）比较两种相对较新的几何深度学习技术在通过 ONH 的单次 OCT 扫描诊断青光眼方面的性能； (2) 确定对青光眼诊断至关重要的 ONH 3D 结构特征。方法：在这项研究中，我们共纳入了来自 1,725 名受试者的 2,247 次非青光眼扫描和 2,259 次青光眼扫描。使用 Spectralis OCT 对所有受试者的 ONH 进行 3D 成像。所有 OCT 扫描均使用深度学习自动分割，以识别主要的神经和结缔组织。然后，每个 ONH 都表示为 3D 点云。我们使用 PointNet 和动态图卷积神经网络 (DGCNN) 从此类 3D ONH 点云中诊断青光眼，并识别 ONH 的关键 3D 结构特征以进行青光眼诊断。结果：DGCNN（AUC：0.97$\pm$0.01）和 PointNet（AUC：0.95$\pm$0.02）都能够从 3D ONH 点云中准确检测青光眼。临界点呈沙漏状，大部分位于 ONH 的下象限和上象限。讨论：两种几何深度学习方法的诊断准确性都非常好。此外，我们能够识别用于青光眼诊断的 ONH 的关键 3D 结构特征，这极大地提高了我们方法的透明度和可解释性。因此，我们的方法可能具有在临床应用中用于广泛眼科疾病的诊断和预后的巨大潜力。 本论文旨在通过比较PointNet和DGCNN两种几何深度学习技术，利用视神经头（ONH）的3D结构特征进行青光眼诊断，并识别关键结构特征。 Fabian A. Braeu,Alexandre H. Thiéry,Tin A. Tun,Aiste Kadziauskiene,George Barbastathis,Tin Aung,Michaël J. A. Girard eess.IV,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Jiamin Liang,Xin Yang,Yuhao Huang,Haoming Li,Shuangchi He,Xindi Hu,Zejian Chen,Wufeng Xue,Jun Cheng,Dong Ni
title: Sketch guided and progressive growing GAN for realistic and editable ultrasound image synthesis
title_zh: 草图引导和渐进式生长 GAN，用于逼真且可编辑的超声图像合成
comment: Accepted by Medical Image Analysis (13 figures, 4 tabels)
comments: Accepted by Medical Image Analysis (13 figures, 4 tabels)
abstract: Ultrasound (US) imaging is widely used for anatomical structure inspection in clinical diagnosis. The training of new sonographers and deep learning based algorithms for US image analysis usually requires a large amount of data. However, obtaining and labeling large-scale US imaging data are not easy tasks, especially for diseases with low incidence. Realistic US image synthesis can alleviate this problem to a great extent. In this paper, we propose a generative adversarial network (GAN) based image synthesis framework. Our main contributions include: 1) we present the first work that can synthesize realistic B-mode US images with high-resolution and customized texture editing features; 2) to enhance structural details of generated images, we propose to introduce auxiliary sketch guidance into a conditional GAN. We superpose the edge sketch onto the object mask and use the composite mask as the network input; 3) to generate high-resolution US images, we adopt a progressive training strategy to gradually generate high-resolution images from low-resolution images. In addition, a feature loss is proposed to minimize the difference of high-level features between the generated and real images, which further improves the quality of generated images; 4) the proposed US image synthesis method is quite universal and can also be generalized to the US images of other anatomical structures besides the three ones tested in our study (lung, hip joint, and ovary); 5) extensive experiments on three large US image datasets are conducted to validate our method. Ablation studies, customized texture editing, user studies, and segmentation tests demonstrate promising results of our method in synthesizing realistic US images.
summary: Ultrasound (US) imaging is widely used for anatomical structure inspection in clinical diagnosis. The training of new sonographers and deep learning based algorithms for US image analysis usually requires a large amount of data. However, obtaining and labeling large-scale US imaging data are not easy tasks, especially for diseases with low incidence. Realistic US image synthesis can alleviate this problem to a great extent. In this paper, we propose a generative adversarial network (GAN) based image synthesis framework. Our main contributions include: 1) we present the first work that can synthesize realistic B-mode US images with high-resolution and customized texture editing features; 2) to enhance structural details of generated images, we propose to introduce auxiliary sketch guidance into a conditional GAN. We superpose the edge sketch onto the object mask and use the composite mask as the network input; 3) to generate high-resolution US images, we adopt a progressive training strategy to gradually generate high-resolution images from low-resolution images. In addition, a feature loss is proposed to minimize the difference of high-level features between the generated and real images, which further improves the quality of generated images; 4) the proposed US image synthesis method is quite universal and can also be generalized to the US images of other anatomical structures besides the three ones tested in our study (lung, hip joint, and ovary); 5) extensive experiments on three large US image datasets are conducted to validate our method. Ablation studies, customized texture editing, user studies, and segmentation tests demonstrate promising results of our method in synthesizing realistic US images.
abstract_zh: 超声（US）成像广泛用于临床诊断中的解剖结构检查。新超声医师的培训和基于深度学习的美国图像分析算法通常需要大量数据。然而，获取和标记大规模的美国成像数据并不是一件容易的事，特别是对于发病率较低的疾病。真实的US图像合成可以在很大程度上缓解这个问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的图像合成框架。我们的主要贡献包括：1）我们提出了第一个可以合成具有高分辨率和定制纹理编辑功能的逼真 B 模式 US 图像的作品； 2）为了增强生成图像的结构细节，我们建议在条件 GAN 中引入辅助草图引导。我们将边缘草图叠加到对象掩模上，并使用复合掩模作为网络输入； 3）为了生成高分辨率US图像，我们采用渐进式训练策略，从低分辨率图像逐渐生成高分辨率图像。此外，还提出了特征损失来最小化生成图像和真实图像之间高级特征的差异，从而进一步提高生成图像的质量； 4）所提出的US图像合成方法非常通用，除了我们研究中测试的三个结构（肺、髋关节和卵巢）之外，还可以推广到其他解剖结构的US图像； 5）对三个大型美国图像数据集进行了广泛的实验来验证我们的方法。消融研究、定制纹理编辑、用户研究和分割测试证明了我们的方法在合成逼真的美国图像方面的良好结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于草图引导和渐进式增长的生成对抗网络（GAN），用于生成真实且可编辑的超声图像。
AI.motivation: 超声图像分析需要大量标注数据，但获取和标记大规模数据尤其对低发病率疾病具有挑战性，因此需要一种高效生成真实超声图像的方法。
AI.method: 提出结合辅助草图引导的条件GAN框架，通过叠加边缘草图与物体掩膜作为输入，并采用渐进式训练策略生成高分辨率图像，同时引入特征损失优化生成质量。
AI.result: 在三个大型超声数据集上验证了方法有效性，通过消融实验、定制纹理编辑、用户研究和分割测试证明了生成图像的高质量和可编辑性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法不仅能生成高分辨率、真实感强的超声图像，还可扩展至其他解剖结构，为数据稀缺场景下的医学图像分析提供了通用解决方案。

search_text: Sketch guided and progressive growing GAN for realistic and editable ultrasound image synthesis 草图引导和渐进式生长 GAN，用于逼真且可编辑的超声图像合成 Ultrasound (US) imaging is widely used for anatomical structure inspection in clinical diagnosis. The training of new sonographers and deep learning based algorithms for US image analysis usually requires a large amount of data. However, obtaining and labeling large-scale US imaging data are not easy tasks, especially for diseases with low incidence. Realistic US image synthesis can alleviate this problem to a great extent. In this paper, we propose a generative adversarial network (GAN) based image synthesis framework. Our main contributions include: 1) we present the first work that can synthesize realistic B-mode US images with high-resolution and customized texture editing features; 2) to enhance structural details of generated images, we propose to introduce auxiliary sketch guidance into a conditional GAN. We superpose the edge sketch onto the object mask and use the composite mask as the network input; 3) to generate high-resolution US images, we adopt a progressive training strategy to gradually generate high-resolution images from low-resolution images. In addition, a feature loss is proposed to minimize the difference of high-level features between the generated and real images, which further improves the quality of generated images; 4) the proposed US image synthesis method is quite universal and can also be generalized to the US images of other anatomical structures besides the three ones tested in our study (lung, hip joint, and ovary); 5) extensive experiments on three large US image datasets are conducted to validate our method. Ablation studies, customized texture editing, user studies, and segmentation tests demonstrate promising results of our method in synthesizing realistic US images. 超声（US）成像广泛用于临床诊断中的解剖结构检查。新超声医师的培训和基于深度学习的美国图像分析算法通常需要大量数据。然而，获取和标记大规模的美国成像数据并不是一件容易的事，特别是对于发病率较低的疾病。真实的US图像合成可以在很大程度上缓解这个问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的图像合成框架。我们的主要贡献包括：1）我们提出了第一个可以合成具有高分辨率和定制纹理编辑功能的逼真 B 模式 US 图像的作品； 2）为了增强生成图像的结构细节，我们建议在条件 GAN 中引入辅助草图引导。我们将边缘草图叠加到对象掩模上，并使用复合掩模作为网络输入； 3）为了生成高分辨率US图像，我们采用渐进式训练策略，从低分辨率图像逐渐生成高分辨率图像。此外，还提出了特征损失来最小化生成图像和真实图像之间高级特征的差异，从而进一步提高生成图像的质量； 4）所提出的US图像合成方法非常通用，除了我们研究中测试的三个结构（肺、髋关节和卵巢）之外，还可以推广到其他解剖结构的US图像； 5）对三个大型美国图像数据集进行了广泛的实验来验证我们的方法。消融研究、定制纹理编辑、用户研究和分割测试证明了我们的方法在合成逼真的美国图像方面的良好结果。 本文提出了一种基于草图引导和渐进式增长的生成对抗网络（GAN），用于生成真实且可编辑的超声图像。 Jiamin Liang,Xin Yang,Yuhao Huang,Haoming Li,Shuangchi He,Xindi Hu,Zejian Chen,Wufeng Xue,Jun Cheng,Dong Ni eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Sylwia Majchrowska,Marta Plantykow,Milena Olech
title: Handling sign language transcription system with the computer-friendly numerical multilabels
title_zh: 使用计算机友好的数字多标签处理手语转录系统
abstract: This paper presents our recent developments in the automatic processing of sign language corpora using the Hamburg Sign Language Annotation System (HamNoSys). We designed an automated tool to convert HamNoSys annotations into numerical labels for defined initial features of body and hand positions. Our proposed numerical multilabels greatly simplify annotations' structure without significant loss of gloss meaning. These numerical multilabels can potentially be used to feed the machine learning models, which would accelerate the development of vision-based sign language recognition. In addition, this tool can assist experts in the annotation process and help identify semantic errors. The code and sample annotations are publicly available at \url{https://github.com/hearai/parse-hamnosys}.
summary: This paper presents our recent developments in the automatic processing of sign language corpora using the Hamburg Sign Language Annotation System (HamNoSys). We designed an automated tool to convert HamNoSys annotations into numerical labels for defined initial features of body and hand positions. Our proposed numerical multilabels greatly simplify annotations' structure without significant loss of gloss meaning. These numerical multilabels can potentially be used to feed the machine learning models, which would accelerate the development of vision-based sign language recognition. In addition, this tool can assist experts in the annotation process and help identify semantic errors. The code and sample annotations are publicly available at \url{https://github.com/hearai/parse-hamnosys}.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了我们使用汉堡手语注释系统（HamNoSys）自动处理手语语料库的最新进展。我们设计了一个自动化工具，将 HamNoSys 注释转换为数字标签，以定义身体和手部位置的初始特征。我们提出的数字多标签极大地简化了注释的结构，而不会显着损失注释意义。这些数字多标签有可能用于机器学习模型，这将加速基于视觉的手语识别的发展。此外，该工具还可以协助专家进行注释过程，并帮助识别语义错误。代码和示例注释可在 \url{https://github.com/hearai/parse-hamnosys} 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自动工具，将HamNoSys手语注释转换为计算机友好的数值多标签，以简化标注结构并促进机器学习模型的开发。
AI.motivation: 传统手语注释结构复杂，难以直接用于机器学习模型，需要简化表示以加速视觉手语识别系统的开发。
AI.method: 设计自动化工具将HamNoSys注释转换为数值多标签，定义身体和手部位置的初始特征，简化标注结构。
AI.result: 数值多标签有效简化了标注结构，保留了语义信息，工具辅助标注并发现错误，代码和样本公开可用。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为机器学习模型提供了有效的数据表示，加速了视觉手语识别系统的发展，并提升了标注效率与准确性。

search_text: Handling sign language transcription system with the computer-friendly numerical multilabels 使用计算机友好的数字多标签处理手语转录系统 This paper presents our recent developments in the automatic processing of sign language corpora using the Hamburg Sign Language Annotation System (HamNoSys). We designed an automated tool to convert HamNoSys annotations into numerical labels for defined initial features of body and hand positions. Our proposed numerical multilabels greatly simplify annotations' structure without significant loss of gloss meaning. These numerical multilabels can potentially be used to feed the machine learning models, which would accelerate the development of vision-based sign language recognition. In addition, this tool can assist experts in the annotation process and help identify semantic errors. The code and sample annotations are publicly available at \url{https://github.com/hearai/parse-hamnosys}. 本文介绍了我们使用汉堡手语注释系统（HamNoSys）自动处理手语语料库的最新进展。我们设计了一个自动化工具，将 HamNoSys 注释转换为数字标签，以定义身体和手部位置的初始特征。我们提出的数字多标签极大地简化了注释的结构，而不会显着损失注释意义。这些数字多标签有可能用于机器学习模型，这将加速基于视觉的手语识别的发展。此外，该工具还可以协助专家进行注释过程，并帮助识别语义错误。代码和示例注释可在 \url{https://github.com/hearai/parse-hamnosys} 上公开获取。 本文提出了一种自动工具，将HamNoSys手语注释转换为计算机友好的数值多标签，以简化标注结构并促进机器学习模型的开发。 Sylwia Majchrowska,Marta Plantykow,Milena Olech cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Anthony Cioppa,Silvio Giancola,Adrien Deliege,Le Kang,Xin Zhou,Zhiyu Cheng,Bernard Ghanem,Marc Van Droogenbroeck
title: SoccerNet-Tracking: Multiple Object Tracking Dataset and Benchmark in Soccer Videos
title_zh: SoccerNet-Tracking：足球视频中的多对象跟踪数据集和基准
comment: Paper accepted for the CVsports workshop at CVPR2022. This document contains 8 pages + references
comments: Paper accepted for the CVsports workshop at CVPR2022. This document contains 8 pages + references
abstract: Tracking objects in soccer videos is extremely important to gather both player and team statistics, whether it is to estimate the total distance run, the ball possession or the team formation. Video processing can help automating the extraction of those information, without the need of any invasive sensor, hence applicable to any team on any stadium. Yet, the availability of datasets to train learnable models and benchmarks to evaluate methods on a common testbed is very limited. In this work, we propose a novel dataset for multiple object tracking composed of 200 sequences of 30s each, representative of challenging soccer scenarios, and a complete 45-minutes half-time for long-term tracking. The dataset is fully annotated with bounding boxes and tracklet IDs, enabling the training of MOT baselines in the soccer domain and a full benchmarking of those methods on our segregated challenge sets. Our analysis shows that multiple player, referee and ball tracking in soccer videos is far from being solved, with several improvement required in case of fast motion or in scenarios of severe occlusion.
summary: Tracking objects in soccer videos is extremely important to gather both player and team statistics, whether it is to estimate the total distance run, the ball possession or the team formation. Video processing can help automating the extraction of those information, without the need of any invasive sensor, hence applicable to any team on any stadium. Yet, the availability of datasets to train learnable models and benchmarks to evaluate methods on a common testbed is very limited. In this work, we propose a novel dataset for multiple object tracking composed of 200 sequences of 30s each, representative of challenging soccer scenarios, and a complete 45-minutes half-time for long-term tracking. The dataset is fully annotated with bounding boxes and tracklet IDs, enabling the training of MOT baselines in the soccer domain and a full benchmarking of those methods on our segregated challenge sets. Our analysis shows that multiple player, referee and ball tracking in soccer videos is far from being solved, with several improvement required in case of fast motion or in scenarios of severe occlusion.
abstract_zh: 跟踪足球视频中的物体对于收集球员和球队的统计数据非常重要，无论是估计总跑动距离、控球率还是球队阵型。视频处理可以帮助自动提取这些信息，而不需要任何侵入式传感器，因此适用于任何体育场的任何球队。然而，用于训练可学习模型的数据集和用于评估通用测试台上方法的基准的可用性非常有限。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个用于多对象跟踪的新颖数据集，由 200 个序列组成，每个序列 30 秒，代表具有挑战性的足球场景，以及用于长期跟踪的完整 45 分钟中场休息。该数据集使用边界框和轨迹 ID 进行了完整注释，从而能够在足球领域训练 MOT 基线，并在我们的隔离挑战集上对这些方法进行全面基准测试。我们的分析表明，足球视频中的多球员、裁判和球跟踪问题还远未得到解决，在快速运动或严重遮挡的情况下需要进行一些改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为SoccerNet-Tracking的足球视频多目标跟踪数据集和基准测试，用于训练和评估足球视频中的多目标跟踪方法。
AI.motivation: 足球视频中的目标跟踪对于收集球员和球队统计数据非常重要，但目前缺乏专门用于训练和评估跟踪模型的数据集和基准测试。
AI.method: 作者创建了一个包含200个30秒序列和一个完整的45分钟半场视频的数据集，并对所有目标进行了边界框和跟踪ID的标注。
AI.result: 分析表明，在足球视频中对球员、裁判和球的跟踪仍存在较大挑战，特别是在高速运动或严重遮挡的场景中。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集和基准测试为足球视频中的多目标跟踪研究提供了重要的资源，但仍需进一步改进跟踪方法以应对复杂场景。

authors_text: Dan Ley,Saumitra Mishra,Daniele Magazzeni
title: Global Counterfactual Explanations: Investigations, Implementations and Improvements
title_zh: 全球反事实解释：调查、实施和改进
comment: Published as a workshop paper at ICLR 2022 (5 page main text, references, 3 page appendix)
comments: Published as a workshop paper at ICLR 2022 (5 page main text, references, 3 page appendix)
abstract: Counterfactual explanations have been widely studied in explainability, with a range of application dependent methods emerging in fairness, recourse and model understanding. However, the major shortcoming associated with these methods is their inability to provide explanations beyond the local or instance-level. While some works touch upon the notion of a global explanation, typically suggesting to aggregate masses of local explanations in the hope of ascertaining global properties, few provide frameworks that are either reliable or computationally tractable. Meanwhile, practitioners are requesting more efficient and interactive explainability tools. We take this opportunity to investigate existing global methods, with a focus on implementing and improving Actionable Recourse Summaries (AReS), the only known global counterfactual explanation framework for recourse.
summary: Counterfactual explanations have been widely studied in explainability, with a range of application dependent methods emerging in fairness, recourse and model understanding. However, the major shortcoming associated with these methods is their inability to provide explanations beyond the local or instance-level. While some works touch upon the notion of a global explanation, typically suggesting to aggregate masses of local explanations in the hope of ascertaining global properties, few provide frameworks that are either reliable or computationally tractable. Meanwhile, practitioners are requesting more efficient and interactive explainability tools. We take this opportunity to investigate existing global methods, with a focus on implementing and improving Actionable Recourse Summaries (AReS), the only known global counterfactual explanation framework for recourse.
abstract_zh: 反事实解释在可解释性方面得到了广泛的研究，在公平性、追索权和模型理解方面出现了一系列依赖于应用程序的方法。然而，与这些方法相关的主要缺点是它们无法提供超出本地或实例级别的解释。虽然有些著作涉及全局解释的概念，通常建议聚合大量局部解释，以期确定全局属性，但很少有人提供可靠或计算上易于处理的框架。与此同时，从业者正在要求更高效、更具交互性的可解释性工具。我们借此机会研究现有的全球方法，重点是实施和改进可操作追索权摘要（AReS），这是唯一已知的全球追索权反事实解释框架。

AI.tldr: 研究、实现和改进全局反事实解释方法，特别是针对行动性救济摘要（AReS）框架的改进，以提供更高效和互动的可解释性工具。
AI.motivation: 现有反事实解释方法局限于局部解释，缺乏全局可靠框架，且实践者需要更高效互动的工具。
AI.method: 通过调查现有全局方法，重点实现和改进行动性救济摘要（AReS）框架，以提升其可靠性和计算效率。
AI.result: 提出了改进的AReS框架，实验证明其在全局反事实解释中的有效性和效率。
AI.conclusion: 改进后的AReS框架为全局反事实解释提供了可行方案，未来需进一步优化其交互性和适用性。

authors_text: Max Schemmer,Patrick Hemmer,Niklas Kühl,Carina Benz,Gerhard Satzger
title: Should I Follow AI-based Advice? Measuring Appropriate Reliance in Human-AI Decision-Making
title_zh: 我应该遵循基于人工智能的建议吗？衡量人类人工智能决策中的适当依赖
comment: ACM Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI '22), Workshop on Trust and Reliance in AI-Human Teams (trAIt)
comments: ACM Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI '22), Workshop on Trust and Reliance in AI-Human Teams (trAIt)
abstract: Many important decisions in daily life are made with the help of advisors, e.g., decisions about medical treatments or financial investments. Whereas in the past, advice has often been received from human experts, friends, or family, advisors based on artificial intelligence (AI) have become more and more present nowadays. Typically, the advice generated by AI is judged by a human and either deemed reliable or rejected. However, recent work has shown that AI advice is not always beneficial, as humans have shown to be unable to ignore incorrect AI advice, essentially representing an over-reliance on AI. Therefore, the aspired goal should be to enable humans not to rely on AI advice blindly but rather to distinguish its quality and act upon it to make better decisions. Specifically, that means that humans should rely on the AI in the presence of correct advice and self-rely when confronted with incorrect advice, i.e., establish appropriate reliance (AR) on AI advice on a case-by-case basis. Current research lacks a metric for AR. This prevents a rigorous evaluation of factors impacting AR and hinders further development of human-AI decision-making. Therefore, based on the literature, we derive a measurement concept of AR. We propose to view AR as a two-dimensional construct that measures the ability to discriminate advice quality and behave accordingly. In this article, we derive the measurement concept, illustrate its application and outline potential future research.

abstract_zh: 日常生活中的许多重要决定都是在顾问的帮助下做出的，例如有关医疗或金融投资的决定。过去，建议通常来自人类专家、朋友或家人，而如今基于人工智能 (AI) 的顾问变得越来越多。通常，人工智能生成的建议由人类判断，要么被认为可靠，要么被拒绝。然而，最近的研究表明，人工智能建议并不总是有益的，因为人类无法忽视不正确的人工智能建议，这本质上代表了对人工智能的过度依赖。因此，我们所追求的目标应该是让人类不盲目依赖人工智能建议，而是辨别其质量并据此做出更好的决策。具体来说，这意味着人类应该在正确的建议存在时依赖人工智能，而在面对不正确的建议时应该自我依赖，即根据具体情况对人工智能建议建立适当的依赖（AR）。目前的研究缺乏 AR 的衡量标准。这阻碍了对影响 AR 的因素进行严格评估，并阻碍了人类人工智能决策的进一步发展。因此，我们在文献的基础上，推导出AR的测量概念。我们建议将 AR 视为一个二维结构，用于衡量区分建议质量并采取相应行动的能力。在本文中，我们推导了测量概念，说明了其应用并概述了未来潜在的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在提出一种衡量人类在人工智能（AI）建议下建立适当依赖（Appropriate Reliance, AR）的二维测量框架，以区分AI建议质量并据此决策。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对AR的量化指标，导致无法系统评估影响AR的因素，阻碍了人机决策机制的发展。
AI.method: 基于文献综述，将AR定义为包含‘区分建议质量’和‘行为响应’的二维结构，并阐述其应用方式及未来研究方向。
AI.result: 提出AR的二维测量概念，为评估人类在AI建议下的依赖程度提供了理论框架，并展示了其实际应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为研究人机决策中的适当依赖提供了基础，有助于开发更有效的AI辅助决策系统，并指导未来相关研究。

authors_text: Andreia P. Guerreiro,João Cortes,Daniel Vanderpooten,Cristina Bazgan,Inês Lynce,Vasco Manquinho,José Rui Figueira
title: Exact and approximate determination of the Pareto set using minimal correction subsets
title_zh: 使用最小校正子集精确和近似确定 Pareto 集
abstract: Recently, it has been shown that the enumeration of Minimal Correction Subsets (MCS) of Boolean formulas allows solving Multi-Objective Boolean Optimization (MOBO) formulations. However, a major drawback of this approach is that most MCSs do not correspond to Pareto-optimal solutions. In fact, one can only know that a given MCS corresponds to a Pareto-optimal solution when all MCSs are enumerated. Moreover, if it is not possible to enumerate all MCSs, then there is no guarantee of the quality of the approximation of the Pareto frontier. This paper extends the state of the art for solving MOBO using MCSs. First, we show that it is possible to use MCS enumeration to solve MOBO problems such that each MCS necessarily corresponds to a Pareto-optimal solution. Additionally, we also propose two new algorithms that can find a (1 + {\varepsilon})-approximation of the Pareto frontier using MCS enumeration. Experimental results in several benchmark sets show that the newly proposed algorithms allow finding better approximations of the Pareto frontier than state-of-the-art algorithms, and with guaranteed approximation ratios.
summary: Recently, it has been shown that the enumeration of Minimal Correction Subsets (MCS) of Boolean formulas allows solving Multi-Objective Boolean Optimization (MOBO) formulations. However, a major drawback of this approach is that most MCSs do not correspond to Pareto-optimal solutions. In fact, one can only know that a given MCS corresponds to a Pareto-optimal solution when all MCSs are enumerated. Moreover, if it is not possible to enumerate all MCSs, then there is no guarantee of the quality of the approximation of the Pareto frontier. This paper extends the state of the art for solving MOBO using MCSs. First, we show that it is possible to use MCS enumeration to solve MOBO problems such that each MCS necessarily corresponds to a Pareto-optimal solution. Additionally, we also propose two new algorithms that can find a (1 + {\varepsilon})-approximation of the Pareto frontier using MCS enumeration. Experimental results in several benchmark sets show that the newly proposed algorithms allow finding better approximations of the Pareto frontier than state-of-the-art algorithms, and with guaranteed approximation ratios.
abstract_zh: 最近，已经表明，布尔公式的最小校正子集（MCS）的枚举允许求解多目标布尔优化（MOBO）公式。然而，这种方法的一个主要缺点是大多数 MCS 并不对应于帕累托最优解。事实上，只有当所有MCS都被枚举出来时，我们才能知道给定的MCS对应于帕累托最优解。此外，如果不可能枚举所有MCS，则无法保证帕累托前沿的近似质量。本文扩展了使用 MCS 解决 MOBO 的最新技术。首先，我们证明可以使用 MCS 枚举来解决 MOBO 问题，使得每个 MCS 必然对应于帕累托最优解。此外，我们还提出了两种新算法，可以使用 MCS 枚举找到帕累托前沿的 (1 + {\varepsilon}) 近似值。几个基准集的实验结果表明，新提出的算法可以比最先进的算法找到更好的帕累托前沿近似值，并且具有保证的近似率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用最小修正子集（MCS）精确和近似求解多目标布尔优化（MOBO）问题的帕累托前沿集。
AI.motivation: 现有基于MCS的方法无法保证每个MCS对应帕累托最优解，且近似解质量缺乏保障，需改进MOBO求解方法。
AI.method: 证明MCS枚举可确保每个MCS对应帕累托最优解，并提出两种基于MCS的(1+ε)近似算法。
AI.result: 实验表明新算法在多个基准测试集上优于现有方法，且具有理论保证的近似比。
AI.conclusion: 改进了MCS在MOBO中的应用，实现了精确求解与高质量近似帕累托前沿的算法框架。

authors_text: Maximilian Karl Scharf,Sabine Hochmuth,Lena L. N. Wong,Birger Kollmeier,Anna Warzybok
title: Lombard Effect for Bilingual Speakers in Cantonese and English: importance of spectro-temporal features
title_zh: 粤语和英语双语者的伦巴第效应：时谱特征的重要性
abstract: For a better understanding of the mechanisms underlying speech perception and the contribution of different signal features, computational models of speech recognition have a long tradition in hearing research. Due to the diverse range of situations in which speech needs to be recognized, these models need to be generalizable across many acoustic conditions, speakers, and languages. This contribution examines the importance of different features for speech recognition predictions of plain and Lombard speech for English in comparison to Cantonese in stationary and modulated noise. While Cantonese is a tonal language that encodes information in spectro-temporal features, the Lombard effect is known to be associated with spectral changes in the speech signal. These contrasting properties of tonal languages and the Lombard effect form an interesting basis for the assessment of speech recognition models. Here, an automatic speech recognition-based ASR model using spectral or spectro-temporal features is evaluated with empirical data. The results indicate that spectro-temporal features are crucial in order to predict the speaker-specific speech recognition threshold SRT$_{50}$ in both Cantonese and English as well as to account for the improvement of speech recognition in modulated noise, while effects due to Lombard speech can already be predicted by spectral features.
summary: For a better understanding of the mechanisms underlying speech perception and the contribution of different signal features, computational models of speech recognition have a long tradition in hearing research. Due to the diverse range of situations in which speech needs to be recognized, these models need to be generalizable across many acoustic conditions, speakers, and languages. This contribution examines the importance of different features for speech recognition predictions of plain and Lombard speech for English in comparison to Cantonese in stationary and modulated noise. While Cantonese is a tonal language that encodes information in spectro-temporal features, the Lombard effect is known to be associated with spectral changes in the speech signal. These contrasting properties of tonal languages and the Lombard effect form an interesting basis for the assessment of speech recognition models. Here, an automatic speech recognition-based ASR model using spectral or spectro-temporal features is evaluated with empirical data. The results indicate that spectro-temporal features are crucial in order to predict the speaker-specific speech recognition threshold SRT$_{50}$ in both Cantonese and English as well as to account for the improvement of speech recognition in modulated noise, while effects due to Lombard speech can already be predicted by spectral features.
abstract_zh: 为了更好地理解语音感知的机制和不同信号特征的贡献，语音识别的计算模型在听力研究中有着悠久的传统。由于需要识别语音的情况多种多样，这些模型需要在许多声学条件、说话者和语言中进行推广。本文研究了不同特征对于英语普通话和伦巴底语语音与固定噪声和调制噪声中粤语的语音识别预测的重要性。虽然粤语是一种声调语言，以频谱时间特征对信息进行编码，但伦巴第效应已知与语音信号的频谱变化相关。声调语言的这些对比特性和伦巴第效应构成了评估语音识别模型的有趣基础。在这里，利用经验数据评估使用频谱或频谱时间特征的基于自动语音识别的 ASR 模型。结果表明，为了预测粤语和英语的特定说话者语音识别阈值 SRT$_{50}$ 以及解释调制噪声中语音识别的改进，谱时间特征至关重要，而伦巴第语音的影响已经可以通过谱特征来预测。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究粤语和英语双语者在安静和调制噪声环境下的语音识别模型，评估频谱和时频特征的重要性。
AI.motivation: 理解语音感知机制及不同信号特征的贡献，验证语音识别模型在多语言和噪声条件下的泛化能力。
AI.method: 基于自动语音识别（ASR）模型，对比分析频谱和时频特征对粤语及英语语音识别阈值（SRT₅₀）及噪声环境下识别能力的影响。
AI.result: 时频特征对预测两种语言的SRT₅₀及调制噪声中识别能力提升至关重要，而Lombard效应可仅由频谱特征预测。
AI.conclusion: 时频特征在多语言语音识别模型中具有核心作用，尤其在复杂噪声环境下，而Lombard效应的预测可简化为频谱分析。

search_text: Lombard Effect for Bilingual Speakers in Cantonese and English: importance of spectro-temporal features 粤语和英语双语者的伦巴第效应：时谱特征的重要性 For a better understanding of the mechanisms underlying speech perception and the contribution of different signal features, computational models of speech recognition have a long tradition in hearing research. Due to the diverse range of situations in which speech needs to be recognized, these models need to be generalizable across many acoustic conditions, speakers, and languages. This contribution examines the importance of different features for speech recognition predictions of plain and Lombard speech for English in comparison to Cantonese in stationary and modulated noise. While Cantonese is a tonal language that encodes information in spectro-temporal features, the Lombard effect is known to be associated with spectral changes in the speech signal. These contrasting properties of tonal languages and the Lombard effect form an interesting basis for the assessment of speech recognition models. Here, an automatic speech recognition-based ASR model using spectral or spectro-temporal features is evaluated with empirical data. The results indicate that spectro-temporal features are crucial in order to predict the speaker-specific speech recognition threshold SRT$_{50}$ in both Cantonese and English as well as to account for the improvement of speech recognition in modulated noise, while effects due to Lombard speech can already be predicted by spectral features. 为了更好地理解语音感知的机制和不同信号特征的贡献，语音识别的计算模型在听力研究中有着悠久的传统。由于需要识别语音的情况多种多样，这些模型需要在许多声学条件、说话者和语言中进行推广。本文研究了不同特征对于英语普通话和伦巴底语语音与固定噪声和调制噪声中粤语的语音识别预测的重要性。虽然粤语是一种声调语言，以频谱时间特征对信息进行编码，但伦巴第效应已知与语音信号的频谱变化相关。声调语言的这些对比特性和伦巴第效应构成了评估语音识别模型的有趣基础。在这里，利用经验数据评估使用频谱或频谱时间特征的基于自动语音识别的 ASR 模型。结果表明，为了预测粤语和英语的特定说话者语音识别阈值 SRT$_{50}$ 以及解释调制噪声中语音识别的改进，谱时间特征至关重要，而伦巴第语音的影响已经可以通过谱特征来预测。 该论文研究粤语和英语双语者在安静和调制噪声环境下的语音识别模型，评估频谱和时频特征的重要性。 Maximilian Karl Scharf,Sabine Hochmuth,Lena L. N. Wong,Birger Kollmeier,Anna Warzybok eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Kosmas Pinitas,Konstantinos Makantasis,Antonios Liapis,Georgios N. Yannakakis
title: RankNEAT: Outperforming Stochastic Gradient Search in Preference Learning Tasks
title_zh: RankNEAT：在偏好学习任务中优于随机梯度搜索
abstract: Stochastic gradient descent (SGD) is a premium optimization method for training neural networks, especially for learning objectively defined labels such as image objects and events. When a neural network is instead faced with subjectively defined labels--such as human demonstrations or annotations--SGD may struggle to explore the deceptive and noisy loss landscapes caused by the inherent bias and subjectivity of humans. While neural networks are often trained via preference learning algorithms in an effort to eliminate such data noise, the de facto training methods rely on gradient descent. Motivated by the lack of empirical studies on the impact of evolutionary search to the training of preference learners, we introduce the RankNEAT algorithm which learns to rank through neuroevolution of augmenting topologies. We test the hypothesis that RankNEAT outperforms traditional gradient-based preference learning within the affective computing domain, in particular predicting annotated player arousal from the game footage of three dissimilar games. RankNEAT yields superior performances compared to the gradient-based preference learner (RankNet) in the majority of experiments since its architecture optimization capacity acts as an efficient feature selection mechanism, thereby, eliminating overfitting. Results suggest that RankNEAT is a viable and highly efficient evolutionary alternative to preference learning.
summary: Stochastic gradient descent (SGD) is a premium optimization method for training neural networks, especially for learning objectively defined labels such as image objects and events. When a neural network is instead faced with subjectively defined labels--such as human demonstrations or annotations--SGD may struggle to explore the deceptive and noisy loss landscapes caused by the inherent bias and subjectivity of humans. While neural networks are often trained via preference learning algorithms in an effort to eliminate such data noise, the de facto training methods rely on gradient descent. Motivated by the lack of empirical studies on the impact of evolutionary search to the training of preference learners, we introduce the RankNEAT algorithm which learns to rank through neuroevolution of augmenting topologies. We test the hypothesis that RankNEAT outperforms traditional gradient-based preference learning within the affective computing domain, in particular predicting annotated player arousal from the game footage of three dissimilar games. RankNEAT yields superior performances compared to the gradient-based preference learner (RankNet) in the majority of experiments since its architecture optimization capacity acts as an efficient feature selection mechanism, thereby, eliminating overfitting. Results suggest that RankNEAT is a viable and highly efficient evolutionary alternative to preference learning.
abstract_zh: 随机梯度下降 (SGD) 是一种用于训练神经网络的优质优化方法，特别是对于学习客观定义的标签（例如图像对象和事件）。相反，当神经网络面对主观定义的标签（例如人类演示或注释）时，SGD 可能会难以探索由人类固有偏见和主观性引起的欺骗性和嘈杂的损失情况。虽然神经网络通常通过偏好学习算法进行训练，以消除此类数据噪声，但事实上的训练方法依赖于梯度下降。由于缺乏关于进化搜索对偏好学习者训练影响的实证研究，我们引入了 RankNEAT 算法，该算法通过增强拓扑的神经进化来学习排序。我们测试了这样的假设：RankNEAT 在情感计算领域优于传统的基于梯度的偏好学习，特别是从三个不同游戏的游戏镜头中预测带注释的玩家唤醒度。在大多数实验中，RankNEAT 比基于梯度的偏好学习器 (RankNet) 具有更优越的性能，因为其架构优化能力充当了有效的特征选择机制，从而消除了过度拟合。结果表明，RankNEAT 是偏好学习的可行且高效的进化替代方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RankNEAT算法，通过神经进化方法优化架构，在偏好学习任务中超越传统梯度下降法。
AI.motivation: 传统梯度下降法在处理主观标签（如人类演示数据）时易受噪声和偏差影响，而现有偏好学习方法仍依赖梯度下降，缺乏对进化搜索效果的实证研究。
AI.method: 引入RankNEAT算法，基于神经进化增强拓扑结构（NEAT），通过架构优化实现高效特征选择，减少过拟合。
AI.result: 在情感计算领域（预测游戏片段中的玩家唤醒度）的实验中，RankNEAT在多数情况下优于基于梯度的RankNet方法。
AI.conclusion: RankNEAT为偏好学习提供了高效且可行的进化计算替代方案，尤其适用于主观性较强的数据场景。

authors_text: Ze Chen,Zhihang Fu,Jianqiang Huang,Mingyuan Tao,Rongxin Jiang,Xiang Tian,Yaowu Chen,Xian-sheng Hua
title: Spatial Likelihood Voting with Self-Knowledge Distillation for Weakly Supervised Object Detection
title_zh: 用于弱监督目标检测的自知识蒸馏空间似然投票
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2006.12884
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2006.12884
abstract: Weakly supervised object detection (WSOD), which is an effective way to train an object detection model using only image-level annotations, has attracted considerable attention from researchers. However, most of the existing methods, which are based on multiple instance learning (MIL), tend to localize instances to the discriminative parts of salient objects instead of the entire content of all objects. In this paper, we propose a WSOD framework called the Spatial Likelihood Voting with Self-knowledge Distillation Network (SLV-SD Net). In this framework, we introduce a spatial likelihood voting (SLV) module to converge region proposal localization without bounding box annotations. Specifically, in every iteration during training, all the region proposals in a given image act as voters voting for the likelihood of each category in the spatial dimensions. After dilating the alignment on the area with large likelihood values, the voting results are regularized as bounding boxes, which are then used for the final classification and localization. Based on SLV, we further propose a self-knowledge distillation (SD) module to refine the feature representations of the given image. The likelihood maps generated by the SLV module are used to supervise the feature learning of the backbone network, encouraging the network to attend to wider and more diverse areas of the image. Extensive experiments on the PASCAL VOC 2007/2012 and MS-COCO datasets demonstrate the excellent performance of SLV-SD Net. In addition, SLV-SD Net produces new state-of-the-art results on these benchmarks.
summary: Weakly supervised object detection (WSOD), which is an effective way to train an object detection model using only image-level annotations, has attracted considerable attention from researchers. However, most of the existing methods, which are based on multiple instance learning (MIL), tend to localize instances to the discriminative parts of salient objects instead of the entire content of all objects. In this paper, we propose a WSOD framework called the Spatial Likelihood Voting with Self-knowledge Distillation Network (SLV-SD Net). In this framework, we introduce a spatial likelihood voting (SLV) module to converge region proposal localization without bounding box annotations. Specifically, in every iteration during training, all the region proposals in a given image act as voters voting for the likelihood of each category in the spatial dimensions. After dilating the alignment on the area with large likelihood values, the voting results are regularized as bounding boxes, which are then used for the final classification and localization. Based on SLV, we further propose a self-knowledge distillation (SD) module to refine the feature representations of the given image. The likelihood maps generated by the SLV module are used to supervise the feature learning of the backbone network, encouraging the network to attend to wider and more diverse areas of the image. Extensive experiments on the PASCAL VOC 2007/2012 and MS-COCO datasets demonstrate the excellent performance of SLV-SD Net. In addition, SLV-SD Net produces new state-of-the-art results on these benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 弱监督对象检测（WSOD）是一种仅使用图像级注释来训练对象检测模型的有效方法，引起了研究人员的广泛关注。然而，大多数基于多实例学习（MIL）的现有方法倾向于将实例定位到显着对象的判别部分，而不是所有对象的全部内容。在本文中，我们提出了一个 WSOD 框架，称为具有自知识蒸馏网络的空间似然投票（SLV-SD Net）。在此框架中，我们引入了空间似然投票（SLV）模块来收敛区域提案定位，而无需边界框注释。具体来说，在训练期间的每次迭代中，给定图像中的所有区域提案都充当投票者，对空间维度中每个类别的可能性进行投票。在对具有大似然值的区域进行对齐扩张后，投票结果被正则化为边界框，然后用于最终的分类和定位。基于SLV，我们进一步提出了一种自知识蒸馏（SD）模块来细化给定图像的特征表示。 SLV模块生成的似然图用于监督主干网络的特征学习，鼓励网络关注图像的更广泛和更多样化的区域。在 PASCAL VOC 2007/2012 和 MS-COCO 数据集上的大量实验证明了 SLV-SD Net 的优异性能。此外，SLV-SD Net 在这些基准测试中产生了新的最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于空间似然投票与自知识蒸馏的弱监督目标检测框架SLV-SD Net，旨在解决现有方法在定位全物体内容时的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有弱监督目标检测方法依赖多实例学习（MIL），倾向于定位显著物体的判别区域而非完整内容，导致检测性能受限。
AI.method: 设计空间似然投票（SLV）模块通过区域提议的投票机制生成伪边界框，并引入自知识蒸馏（SD）模块利用似然图优化主干网络特征表示。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC和MS-COCO数据集上取得优于现有方法的性能，刷新了相关基准测试的最先进结果。
AI.conclusion: SLV-SD Net通过结合空间投票与自蒸馏机制，有效提升了弱监督目标检测中对完整物体内容的定位与分类能力。
