search_text: Spatial Likelihood Voting with Self-Knowledge Distillation for Weakly Supervised Object Detection 用于弱监督目标检测的自知识蒸馏空间似然投票 Weakly supervised object detection (WSOD), which is an effective way to train an object detection model using only image-level annotations, has attracted considerable attention from researchers. However, most of the existing methods, which are based on multiple instance learning (MIL), tend to localize instances to the discriminative parts of salient objects instead of the entire content of all objects. In this paper, we propose a WSOD framework called the Spatial Likelihood Voting with Self-knowledge Distillation Network (SLV-SD Net). In this framework, we introduce a spatial likelihood voting (SLV) module to converge region proposal localization without bounding box annotations. Specifically, in every iteration during training, all the region proposals in a given image act as voters voting for the likelihood of each category in the spatial dimensions. After dilating the alignment on the area with large likelihood values, the voting results are regularized as bounding boxes, which are then used for the final classification and localization. Based on SLV, we further propose a self-knowledge distillation (SD) module to refine the feature representations of the given image. The likelihood maps generated by the SLV module are used to supervise the feature learning of the backbone network, encouraging the network to attend to wider and more diverse areas of the image. Extensive experiments on the PASCAL VOC 2007/2012 and MS-COCO datasets demonstrate the excellent performance of SLV-SD Net. In addition, SLV-SD Net produces new state-of-the-art results on these benchmarks. 弱监督对象检测（WSOD）是一种仅使用图像级注释来训练对象检测模型的有效方法，引起了研究人员的广泛关注。然而，大多数基于多实例学习（MIL）的现有方法倾向于将实例定位到显着对象的判别部分，而不是所有对象的全部内容。在本文中，我们提出了一个 WSOD 框架，称为具有自知识蒸馏网络的空间似然投票（SLV-SD Net）。在此框架中，我们引入了空间似然投票（SLV）模块来收敛区域提案定位，而无需边界框注释。具体来说，在训练期间的每次迭代中，给定图像中的所有区域提案都充当投票者，对空间维度中每个类别的可能性进行投票。在对具有大似然值的区域进行对齐扩张后，投票结果被正则化为边界框，然后用于最终的分类和定位。基于SLV，我们进一步提出了一种自知识蒸馏（SD）模块来细化给定图像的特征表示。 SLV模块生成的似然图用于监督主干网络的特征学习，鼓励网络关注图像的更广泛和更多样化的区域。在 PASCAL VOC 2007/2012 和 MS-COCO 数据集上的大量实验证明了 SLV-SD Net 的优异性能。此外，SLV-SD Net 在这些基准测试中产生了新的最先进的结果。 本文提出了一种基于空间似然投票与自知识蒸馏的弱监督目标检测框架SLV-SD Net，旨在解决现有方法在定位全物体内容时的不足。 Ze Chen,Zhihang Fu,Jianqiang Huang,Mingyuan Tao,Rongxin Jiang,Xiang Tian,Yaowu Chen,Xian-sheng Hua cs.CV

authors_text: Xinyu Zhang,Dongdong Li,Zhigang Wang,Jian Wang,Errui Ding,Javen Qinfeng Shi,Zhaoxiang Zhang,Jingdong Wang
title: Implicit Sample Extension for Unsupervised Person Re-Identification
title_zh: 无监督人员重新识别的隐式样本扩展
abstract: Most existing unsupervised person re-identification (Re-ID) methods use clustering to generate pseudo labels for model training. Unfortunately, clustering sometimes mixes different true identities together or splits the same identity into two or more sub clusters. Training on these noisy clusters substantially hampers the Re-ID accuracy. Due to the limited samples in each identity, we suppose there may lack some underlying information to well reveal the accurate clusters. To discover these information, we propose an Implicit Sample Extension (\OurWholeMethod) method to generate what we call support samples around the cluster boundaries. Specifically, we generate support samples from actual samples and their neighbouring clusters in the embedding space through a progressive linear interpolation (PLI) strategy. PLI controls the generation with two critical factors, i.e., 1) the direction from the actual sample towards its K-nearest clusters and 2) the degree for mixing up the context information from the K-nearest clusters. Meanwhile, given the support samples, ISE further uses a label-preserving loss to pull them towards their corresponding actual samples, so as to compact each cluster. Consequently, ISE reduces the "sub and mixed" clustering errors, thus improving the Re-ID performance. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed method is effective and achieves state-of-the-art performance for unsupervised person Re-ID. Code is available at: \url{https://github.com/PaddlePaddle/PaddleClas}.
summary: Most existing unsupervised person re-identification (Re-ID) methods use clustering to generate pseudo labels for model training. Unfortunately, clustering sometimes mixes different true identities together or splits the same identity into two or more sub clusters. Training on these noisy clusters substantially hampers the Re-ID accuracy. Due to the limited samples in each identity, we suppose there may lack some underlying information to well reveal the accurate clusters. To discover these information, we propose an Implicit Sample Extension (\OurWholeMethod) method to generate what we call support samples around the cluster boundaries. Specifically, we generate support samples from actual samples and their neighbouring clusters in the embedding space through a progressive linear interpolation (PLI) strategy. PLI controls the generation with two critical factors, i.e., 1) the direction from the actual sample towards its K-nearest clusters and 2) the degree for mixing up the context information from the K-nearest clusters. Meanwhile, given the support samples, ISE further uses a label-preserving loss to pull them towards their corresponding actual samples, so as to compact each cluster. Consequently, ISE reduces the "sub and mixed" clustering errors, thus improving the Re-ID performance. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed method is effective and achieves state-of-the-art performance for unsupervised person Re-ID. Code is available at: \url{https://github.com/PaddlePaddle/PaddleClas}.
abstract_zh: 大多数现有的无监督行人重新识别（Re-ID）方法使用聚类来生成用于模型训练的伪标签。不幸的是，聚类有时会将不同的真实身份混合在一起，或者将相同的身份分成两个或多个子集群。对这些噪声集群的训练极大地影响了 Re-ID 的准确性。由于每个身份的样本有限，我们认为可能缺乏一些底层信息来很好地揭示准确的聚类。为了发现这些信息，我们提出了一种隐式样本扩展（\OurWholeMethod）方法来生成我们所说的围绕簇边界的支持样本。具体来说，我们通过渐进线性插值（PLI）策略从嵌入空间中的实际样本及其相邻簇生成支持样本。 PLI 通过两个关键因素控制生成，即 1）从实际样本到其 K 最近簇的方向和 2）混合来自 K 最近簇的上下文信息的程度。同时，给定支持样本，ISE进一步使用标签保留损失将它们拉向对应的实际样本，从而压缩每个簇。因此，ISE 减少了“子和混合”聚类错误，从而提高了 Re-ID 性能。大量的实验表明，所提出的方法是有效的，并且在无监督人员重新识别方面实现了最先进的性能。代码位于：\url{https://github.com/PaddlePaddle/PaddleClas}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督行人重识别方法，通过生成支持样本来优化聚类过程。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督Re-ID方法依赖聚类生成伪标签，但聚类结果常出现身份混淆或分裂，导致模型性能下降。
AI.method: 提出隐式样本扩展（ISE）方法，通过渐进式线性插值（PLI）在嵌入空间中生成边界支持样本，并利用标签保留损失优化簇结构。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在无监督Re-ID任务中达到最先进性能，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: ISE通过生成支持样本减少聚类错误，有效提升了无监督行人重识别的准确率。

Unfortunately, clustering sometimes mixes different true identities together or splits the same identity into two or more sub clusters. Training on these noisy clusters substantially hampers the Re-ID accuracy. Due to the limited samples in each identity, we suppose there may lack some underlying information to well reveal the accurate clusters. To discover these information, we propose an Implicit Sample Extension (\OurWholeMethod) method to generate what we call support samples around the cluster boundaries. Specifically, we generate support samples from actual samples and their neighbouring clusters in the embedding space through a progressive linear interpolation (PLI) strategy. PLI controls the generation with two critical factors, i.e., 1) the direction from the actual sample towards its K-nearest clusters and 2) the degree for mixing up the context information from the K-nearest clusters. Meanwhile, given the support samples, ISE further uses a label-preserving loss to pull them towards their corresponding actual samples, so as to compact each cluster. Consequently, ISE reduces the "sub and mixed" clustering errors, thus improving the Re-ID performance. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed method is effective and achieves state-of-the-art performance for unsupervised person Re-ID. authors_text: Xinqian Gu,Hong Chang,Bingpeng Ma,Shutao Bai,Shiguang Shan,Xilin Chen
title: Clothes-Changing Person Re-identification with RGB Modality Only
title_zh: 仅使用 RGB 模态的换衣者重新识别
abstract: The key to address clothes-changing person re-identification (re-id) is to extract clothes-irrelevant features, e.g., face, hairstyle, body shape, and gait. Most current works mainly focus on modeling body shape from multi-modality information (e.g., silhouettes and sketches), but do not make full use of the clothes-irrelevant information in the original RGB images. In this paper, we propose a Clothes-based Adversarial Loss (CAL) to mine clothes-irrelevant features from the original RGB images by penalizing the predictive power of re-id model w.r.t. clothes. Extensive experiments demonstrate that using RGB images only, CAL outperforms all state-of-the-art methods on widely-used clothes-changing person re-id benchmarks. Besides, compared with images, videos contain richer appearance and additional temporal information, which can be used to model proper spatiotemporal patterns to assist clothes-changing re-id. Since there is no publicly available clothes-changing video re-id dataset, we contribute a new dataset named CCVID and show that there exists much room for improvement in modeling spatiotemporal information. The code and new dataset are available at: https://github.com/guxinqian/Simple-CCReID.
summary: The key to address clothes-changing person re-identification (re-id) is to extract clothes-irrelevant features, e.g., face, hairstyle, body shape, and gait. Most current works mainly focus on modeling body shape from multi-modality information (e.g., silhouettes and sketches), but do not make full use of the clothes-irrelevant information in the original RGB images. In this paper, we propose a Clothes-based Adversarial Loss (CAL) to mine clothes-irrelevant features from the original RGB images by penalizing the predictive power of re-id model w.r.t. clothes. Extensive experiments demonstrate that using RGB images only, CAL outperforms all state-of-the-art methods on widely-used clothes-changing person re-id benchmarks. Besides, compared with images, videos contain richer appearance and additional temporal information, which can be used to model proper spatiotemporal patterns to assist clothes-changing re-id. Since there is no publicly available clothes-changing video re-id dataset, we contribute a new dataset named CCVID and show that there exists much room for improvement in modeling spatiotemporal information. The code and new dataset are available at: https://github.com/guxinqian/Simple-CCReID.
abstract_zh: 解决换衣服者重新识别（re-id）的关键是提取与衣服无关的特征，例如面部、发型、体型和步态。目前的大多数工作主要集中在从多模态信息（例如轮廓和草图）中对身体形状进行建模，但没有充分利用原始 RGB 图像中与衣服无关的信息。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于衣服的对抗性损失（CAL），通过惩罚 re-id 模型的预测能力，从原始 RGB 图像中挖掘与衣服无关的特征。衣服。大量实验表明，仅使用 RGB 图像，CAL 在广泛使用的换衣服人员重新识别基准上优于所有最先进的方法。此外，与图像相比，视频包含更丰富的外观和额外的时间信息，可以用来建模适当的时空模式以辅助换衣服重新识别。由于没有公开的换衣服视频重识别数据集，我们贡献了一个名为 CCVID 的新数据集，并表明在时空信息建模方面存在很大的改进空间。代码和新数据集可在以下网址获取：https://github.com/guxinqian/Simple-CCReID。

AI.tldr: 本文提出仅使用RGB模态解决衣物变化的人再识别问题，通过提取与衣物无关的特征（如面部、发型、体型和步态）进行身份识别。
AI.motivation: 现有方法主要依赖多模态信息（如轮廓和草图）建模体型，但未充分利用原始RGB图像中的非衣物相关信息，导致性能受限。
AI.method: 提出基于衣物的对抗损失（CAL），通过惩罚模型对衣物的预测能力，从RGB图像中挖掘非衣物特征；并构建新的衣物变化视频数据集CCVID。
AI.result: CAL在主流衣物变化人再识别基准测试中优于所有现有方法，且CCVID数据集验证了时空信息建模的改进空间。
AI.conclusion: CAL有效提升了仅依赖RGB图像的衣物变化再识别性能，未来需进一步探索视频数据中的时空特征建模。

search_text: Clothes-Changing Person Re-identification with RGB Modality Only 仅使用 RGB 模态的换衣者重新识别 The key to address clothes-changing person re-identification (re-id) is to extract clothes-irrelevant features, e.g., face, hairstyle, body shape, and gait. Most current works mainly focus on modeling body shape from multi-modality information (e.g., silhouettes and sketches), but do not make full use of the clothes-irrelevant information in the original RGB images. In this paper, we propose a Clothes-based Adversarial Loss (CAL) to mine clothes-irrelevant features from the original RGB images by penalizing the predictive power of re-id model w.r.t. clothes. Extensive experiments demonstrate that using RGB images only, CAL outperforms all state-of-the-art methods on widely-used clothes-changing person re-id benchmarks. Besides, compared with images, videos contain richer appearance and additional temporal information, which can be used to model proper spatiotemporal patterns to assist clothes-changing re-id. Since there is no publicly available clothes-changing video re-id dataset, we contribute a new dataset named CCVID and show that there exists much room for improvement in modeling spatiotemporal information. The code and new dataset are available at: https://github.com/guxinqian/Simple-CCReID. 解决换衣服者重新识别（re-id）的关键是提取与衣服无关的特征，例如面部、发型、体型和步态。目前的大多数工作主要集中在从多模态信息（例如轮廓和草图）中对身体形状进行建模，但没有充分利用原始 RGB 图像中与衣服无关的信息。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于衣服的对抗性损失（CAL），通过惩罚 re-id 模型的预测能力，从原始 RGB 图像中挖掘与衣服无关的特征。衣服。大量实验表明，仅使用 RGB 图像，CAL 在广泛使用的换衣服人员重新识别基准上优于所有最先进的方法。此外，与图像相比，视频包含更丰富的外观和额外的时间信息，可以用来建模适当的时空模式以辅助换衣服重新识别。由于没有公开的换衣服视频重识别数据集，我们贡献了一个名为 CCVID 的新数据集，并表明在时空信息建模方面存在很大的改进空间。代码和新数据集可在以下网址获取：https://github.com/guxinqian/Simple-CCReID。 本文提出仅使用RGB模态解决衣物变化的人再识别问题，通过提取与衣物无关的特征（如面部、发型、体型和步态）进行身份识别。 Xinqian Gu,Hong Chang,Bingpeng Ma,Shutao Bai,Shiguang Shan,Xilin Chen cs.CV

authors_text: Jingzhe Ma,Xiaoqing Zhang,Shiqi Yu
title: An Identity-Preserved Framework for Human Motion Transfer
title_zh: 人体运动传输的身份保留框架
comment: Accepted at IEEE Transactions on Information Forensics and Security (TIFS), see https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/10426775
comments: Accepted at IEEE Transactions on Information Forensics and Security (TIFS), see https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/10426775
abstract: Human motion transfer (HMT) aims to generate a video clip for the target subject by imitating the source subject's motion. Although previous methods have achieved good results in synthesizing good-quality videos, they lose sight of individualized motion information from the source and target motions, which is significant for the realism of the motion in the generated video. To address this problem, we propose a novel identity-preserved HMT network, termed \textit{IDPres}. This network is a skeleton-based approach that uniquely incorporates the target's individualized motion and skeleton information to augment identity representations. This integration significantly enhances the realism of movements in the generated videos. Our method focuses on the fine-grained disentanglement and synthesis of motion. To improve the representation learning capability in latent space and facilitate the training of \textit{IDPres}, we introduce three training schemes. These schemes enable \textit{IDPres} to concurrently disentangle different representations and accurately control them, ensuring the synthesis of ideal motions. To evaluate the proportion of individualized motion information in the generated video, we are the first to introduce a new quantitative metric called Identity Score (\textit{ID-Score}), motivated by the success of gait recognition methods in capturing identity information. Moreover, we collect an identity-motion paired dataset, $Dancer101$, consisting of solo-dance videos of 101 subjects from the public domain, providing a benchmark to prompt the development of HMT methods. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed \textit{IDPres} method surpasses existing state-of-the-art techniques in terms of reconstruction accuracy, realistic motion, and identity preservation.
summary: Human motion transfer (HMT) aims to generate a video clip for the target subject by imitating the source subject's motion. Although previous methods have achieved good results in synthesizing good-quality videos, they lose sight of individualized motion information from the source and target motions, which is significant for the realism of the motion in the generated video. To address this problem, we propose a novel identity-preserved HMT network, termed \textit{IDPres}. This network is a skeleton-based approach that uniquely incorporates the target's individualized motion and skeleton information to augment identity representations. This integration significantly enhances the realism of movements in the generated videos. Our method focuses on the fine-grained disentanglement and synthesis of motion. To improve the representation learning capability in latent space and facilitate the training of \textit{IDPres}, we introduce three training schemes. These schemes enable \textit{IDPres} to concurrently disentangle different representations and accurately control them, ensuring the synthesis of ideal motions. To evaluate the proportion of individualized motion information in the generated video, we are the first to introduce a new quantitative metric called Identity Score (\textit{ID-Score}), motivated by the success of gait recognition methods in capturing identity information. Moreover, we collect an identity-motion paired dataset, $Dancer101$, consisting of solo-dance videos of 101 subjects from the public domain, providing a benchmark to prompt the development of HMT methods. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed \textit{IDPres} method surpasses existing state-of-the-art techniques in terms of reconstruction accuracy, realistic motion, and identity preservation.
abstract_zh: 人体动作迁移（HMT）旨在通过模仿源主体的动作来生成目标主体的视频剪辑。尽管以前的方法在合成高质量视频方面取得了良好的效果，但它们忽略了来自源运动和目标运动的个性化运动信息，这对于生成视频中运动的真实感具有重要意义。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的身份保留 HMT 网络，称为 \textit{IDPres}。该网络是一种基于骨架的方法，独特地结合了目标的个性化运动和骨架信息来增强身份表示。这种集成显着增强了生成视频中动作的真实感。我们的方法侧重于运动的细粒度解开和合成。为了提高潜在空间中的表示学习能力并促进 \textit{IDPres} 的训练，我们引入了三种训练方案。这些方案使 \textit{IDPres} 能够同时解开不同的表示并准确地控制它们，确保理想运动的合成。为了评估生成的视频中个性化运动信息的比例，我们首先引入了一种称为身份得分（\textit{ID-Score}）的新定量指标，其动机是步态识别方法在捕获身份信息方面取得的成功。此外，我们还收集了一个身份-运动配对数据集 $Dancer101$，由来自公共领域的 101 个受试者的独舞视频组成，为促进 HMT 方法的发展提供了基准。大量的实验表明，所提出的 \textit{IDPres} 方法在重建精度、真实运动和身份保留方面超越了现有的最先进技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为IDPres的身份保留的人体运动迁移框架，通过结合目标人物的运动和骨骼信息生成更逼真的视频。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在生成高质量视频时忽略了源和目标运动中的个体化信息，导致生成视频的运动真实感不足。
AI.method: 设计基于骨骼的身份保留网络IDPres，融合目标个体的运动与骨骼信息增强身份表征，并引入三种训练方案及新指标ID-Score，同时构建身份-运动配对数据集Dancer101。
AI.result: 实验表明IDPres在运动重建精度、真实感和身份保留方面优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: IDPres通过细粒度运动解耦与合成有效保留身份特征，其提出的指标与数据集为HMT方法发展提供了新基准。

ai_content.conclusion: IDPres通过细粒度运动解耦与合成有效保留身份特征，其提出的指标与数据集为HMT方法发展提供了新基准。

authors_text: Renaud Vandeghen,Anthony Cioppa,Marc Van Droogenbroeck
title: Semi-Supervised Training to Improve Player and Ball Detection in Soccer
title_zh: 半监督训练以改善足球中的球员和球检测
comment: Paper accepted at the CVsports workshop at CVPR2022
comments: Paper accepted at the CVsports workshop at CVPR2022
abstract: Accurate player and ball detection has become increasingly important in recent years for sport analytics. As most state-of-the-art methods rely on training deep learning networks in a supervised fashion, they require huge amounts of annotated data, which are rarely available. In this paper, we present a novel generic semi-supervised method to train a network based on a labeled image dataset by leveraging a large unlabeled dataset of soccer broadcast videos. More precisely, we design a teacher-student approach in which the teacher produces surrogate annotations on the unlabeled data to be used later for training a student which has the same architecture as the teacher. Furthermore, we introduce three training loss parametrizations that allow the student to doubt the predictions of the teacher during training depending on the proposal confidence score. We show that including unlabeled data in the training process allows to substantially improve the performances of the detection network trained only on the labeled data. Finally, we provide a thorough performance study including different proportions of labeled and unlabeled data, and establish the first benchmark on the new SoccerNet-v3 detection task, with an mAP of 52.3%. Our code is available at https://github.com/rvandeghen/SST .
summary: Accurate player and ball detection has become increasingly important in recent years for sport analytics. As most state-of-the-art methods rely on training deep learning networks in a supervised fashion, they require huge amounts of annotated data, which are rarely available. In this paper, we present a novel generic semi-supervised method to train a network based on a labeled image dataset by leveraging a large unlabeled dataset of soccer broadcast videos. More precisely, we design a teacher-student approach in which the teacher produces surrogate annotations on the unlabeled data to be used later for training a student which has the same architecture as the teacher. Furthermore, we introduce three training loss parametrizations that allow the student to doubt the predictions of the teacher during training depending on the proposal confidence score. We show that including unlabeled data in the training process allows to substantially improve the performances of the detection network trained only on the labeled data. Finally, we provide a thorough performance study including different proportions of labeled and unlabeled data, and establish the first benchmark on the new SoccerNet-v3 detection task, with an mAP of 52.3%. Our code is available at https://github.com/rvandeghen/SST .
abstract_zh: 近年来，准确的球员和球检测对于运动分析变得越来越重要。由于大多数最先进的方法依赖于以监督方式训练深度学习网络，因此它们需要大量的注释数据，而这些数据很少可用。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的通用半监督方法，通过利用大型未标记的足球广播视频数据集来训练基于标记图像数据集的网络。更准确地说，我们设计了一种师生方法，其中教师对未标记的数据生成代理注释，以便稍后用于训练与教师具有相同架构的学生。此外，我们引入了三种训练损失参数化，允许学生在训练期间根据建议置信度分数怀疑老师的预测。我们表明，在训练过程中包含未标记的数据可以显着提高仅在标记数据上训练的检测网络的性能。最后，我们提供了包括不同比例的标记和未标记数据在内的全面性能研究，并在新的 SoccerNet-v3 检测任务上建立了第一个基准，mAP 为 52.3%。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/rvandeghen/SST 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种半监督训练方法，用于提高足球比赛中球员和球的检测性能。
AI.motivation: 由于大多数先进的方法依赖于大量标注数据进行监督训练，而这些数据在实际中很难获得，因此需要一种更高效的方法来提升检测性能。
AI.method: 本文设计了一种教师-学生方法，利用教师模型在未标注数据上生成伪标注，用于训练具有相同架构的学生模型，并引入了三种训练损失参数化方法，使学生模型可以根据预测置信度对教师模型的预测产生怀疑。
AI.result: 通过引入未标注数据，显著提升了仅使用标注数据训练的检测网络性能，并在SoccerNet-v3检测任务上建立了首个基准，mAP达到52.3%。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的半监督训练方法有效提升了球员和球的检测性能，为体育分析提供了新的解决方案。

search_text: Semi-Supervised Training to Improve Player and Ball Detection in Soccer 半监督训练以改善足球中的球员和球检测 Accurate player and ball detection has become increasingly important in recent years for sport analytics. As most state-of-the-art methods rely on training deep learning networks in a supervised fashion, they require huge amounts of annotated data, which are rarely available. In this paper, we present a novel generic semi-supervised method to train a network based on a labeled image dataset by leveraging a large unlabeled dataset of soccer broadcast videos. More precisely, we design a teacher-student approach in which the teacher produces surrogate annotations on the unlabeled data to be used later for training a student which has the same architecture as the teacher. Furthermore, we introduce three training loss parametrizations that allow the student to doubt the predictions of the teacher during training depending on the proposal confidence score. We show that including unlabeled data in the training process allows to substantially improve the performances of the detection network trained only on the labeled data. Finally, we provide a thorough performance study including different proportions of labeled and unlabeled data, and establish the first benchmark on the new SoccerNet-v3 detection task, with an mAP of 52.3%. Our code is available at https://github.com/rvandeghen/SST . 近年来，准确的球员和球检测对于运动分析变得越来越重要。由于大多数最先进的方法依赖于以监督方式训练深度学习网络，因此它们需要大量的注释数据，而这些数据很少可用。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的通用半监督方法，通过利用大型未标记的足球广播视频数据集来训练基于标记图像数据集的网络。更准确地说，我们设计了一种师生方法，其中教师对未标记的数据生成代理注释，以便稍后用于训练与教师具有相同架构的学生。此外，我们引入了三种训练损失参数化，允许学生在训练期间根据建议置信度分数怀疑老师的预测。我们表明，在训练过程中包含未标记的数据可以显着提高仅在标记数据上训练的检测网络的性能。最后，我们提供了包括不同比例的标记和未标记数据在内的全面性能研究，并在新的 SoccerNet-v3 检测任务上建立了第一个基准，mAP 为 52.3%。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/rvandeghen/SST 获取。 本文提出了一种半监督训练方法，用于提高足球比赛中球员和球的检测性能。 Renaud Vandeghen,Anthony Cioppa,Marc Van Droogenbroeck cs.CV

authors_text: Zhihao Gavin Tang,Hongxun Wu,Jinzhao Wu
title: (Fractional) Online Stochastic Matching via Fine-Grained Offline Statistics
title_zh: 通过细粒度离线统计进行（分数）在线随机匹配
abstract: Motivated by display advertising on the internet, the online stochastic matching problem is proposed by Feldman, Mehta, Mirrokni, and Muthukrishnan (FOCS 2009). Consider a stochastic bipartite graph with offline vertices on one side and with i.i.d. online vertices on the other side. The algorithm knows the offline vertices and the distribution of the online vertices in advance. Upon the arrival of each online vertex, its type is realized and the algorithm immediately and irrevocably decides how to match it. In the vertex-weighted version of the problem, each offline vertex is associated with a weight and the goal is to maximize the total weight of the matching. In this paper, we generalize the model to allow non-identical online vertices and focus on the fractional version of the vertex-weighted stochastic matching. We design fractional algorithms that are $0.718$-competitive and $0.731$-competitive for non i.i.d. arrivals and i.i.d. arrivals respectively. We also prove that no fractional algorithm can achieve a competitive ratio better than $0.75$ for non i.i.d. arrivals. Furthermore, we round our fractional algorithms by applying the recently developed multiway online correlated selection by Gao et al. (FOCS 2021) and achieve $0.666$-competitive and $0.704$-competitive integral algorithms for non i.i.d. arrivals and i.i.d. arrivals. Our results for non i.i.d. arrivals are the first algorithms beating the $1-1/e \approx 0.632$ barrier of the classical adversarial setting. Our $0.704$-competitive integral algorithm for i.i.d. arrivals slightly improves the state-of-the-art $0.701$-competitive ratio by Huang and Shu (STOC 2021).

Consider a stochastic bipartite graph with offline vertices on one side and with i.i.d. online vertices on the other side. The algorithm knows the offline vertices and the distribution of the online vertices in advance. Upon the arrival of each online vertex, its type is realized and the algorithm immediately and irrevocably decides how to match it. In the vertex-weighted version of the problem, each offline vertex is associated with a weight and the goal is to maximize the total weight of the matching. In this paper, we generalize the model to allow non-identical online vertices and focus on the fractional version of the vertex-weighted stochastic matching. We design fractional algorithms that are $0.718$-competitive and $0.731$-competitive for non i.i.d. arrivals and i.i.d. arrivals respectively. We also prove that no fractional algorithm can achieve a competitive ratio better than $0.75$ for non i.i.d. arrivals. Furthermore, we round our fractional algorithms by applying the recently developed multiway online correlated selection by Gao et al. (FOCS 2021) and achieve $0.666$-competitive and $0.704$-competitive integral algorithms for non i.i.d. arrivals and i.i.d. arrivals. Our results for non i.i.d. arrivals are the first algorithms beating the $1-1/e \approx 0.632$ barrier of the classical adversarial setting. Our $0.704$-competitive integral algorithm for i.i.d. arrivals slightly improves the state-of-the-art $0.701$-competitive ratio by Huang and Shu (STOC 2021).
abstract_zh: 受互联网上展示广告的推动，Feldman、Mehta、Mirrokni 和 Muthukrishnan 提出了在线随机匹配问题（FOCS 2009）。考虑一个随机二分图，其一侧具有离线顶点且具有独立同分布。另一侧的在线顶点。该算法预先知道离线顶点和在线顶点的分布。当每个在线顶点到达时，它的类型就被实现，并且算法立即且不可撤销地决定如何匹配它。在该问题的顶点加权版本中，每个离线顶点都与一个权重相关联，目标是最大化匹配的总权重。在本文中，我们将模型推广为允许不相同的在线顶点，并重点关注顶点加权随机匹配的分数版本。我们设计的分数算法对于非独立同分布来说具有 0.718 美元的竞争力和 0.731 美元的竞争力。到达人数和 i.i.d.分别到达。我们还证明，对于非 i.i.d.，没有任何分数算法可以实现比 0.75 美元更好的竞争比。到达。此外，我们通过应用Gao等人最近开发的多路在线相关选择来舍入我们的分数算法。 (FOCS 2021) 并实现非独立同分布的 0.666 美元竞争性和 0.704 美元竞争性积分算法。到达人数和 i.i.d.到达。我们的非独立同分布结果到达是第一个突破经典对抗设置的 $1-1/e \大约 0.632$ 障碍的算法。我们的 i.i.d. 竞争性积分算法为 0.704 美元。到达率略微提高了 Huang 和 Shu 提出的最先进的 0.701 美元竞争比（STOC 2021）。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在线随机匹配问题的分数和整数算法设计，针对非独立同分布和独立同分布的在线顶点情况，提出了新的竞争比算法。
AI.motivation: 受互联网展示广告启发，传统在线随机匹配模型假设在线顶点独立同分布，但实际场景中在线顶点可能具有非同分布特性，需扩展模型并改进算法性能。
AI.method: 设计分数算法并证明其竞争比，通过多路在线相关选择技术将分数算法转化为整数算法，针对非i.i.d和i.i.d场景分别优化。
AI.result: 非i.i.d场景下分数算法达0.718竞争比，整数算法达0.666；i.i.d场景下分数算法达0.731，整数算法达0.704，首次突破经典对抗设置的1-1/e上限并改进现有最优结果。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次在非i.i.d场景下突破对抗模型性能上限，且在i.i.d场景下小幅提升现有最优算法，为在线随机匹配问题提供了更灵活高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Christopher D. Walsh,Joanne Edwards,Robert H. Insall
title: Ensuring accurate stain reproduction in deep generative networks for virtual immunohistochemistry
title_zh: 确保虚拟免疫组织化学深层生成网络中准确的染色再现
abstract: Immunohistochemistry is a valuable diagnostic tool for cancer pathology. However, it requires specialist labs and equipment, is time-intensive, and is difficult to reproduce. Consequently, a long term aim is to provide a digital method of recreating physical immunohistochemical stains. Generative Adversarial Networks have become exceedingly advanced at mapping one image type to another and have shown promise at inferring immunostains from haematoxylin and eosin. However, they have a substantial weakness when used with pathology images as they can fabricate structures that are not present in the original data. CycleGANs can mitigate invented tissue structures in pathology image mapping but have a related disposition to generate areas of inaccurate staining. In this paper, we describe a modification to the loss function of a CycleGAN to improve its mapping ability for pathology images by enforcing realistic stain replication while retaining tissue structure. Our approach improves upon others by considering structure and staining during model training. We evaluated our network using the Fréchet Inception distance, coupled with a new technique that we propose to appraise the accuracy of virtual immunohistochemistry. This assesses the overlap between each stain component in the inferred and ground truth images through colour deconvolution, thresholding and the Sorensen-Dice coefficient. Our modified loss function resulted in a Dice coefficient for the virtual stain of 0.78 compared with the real AE1/AE3 slide. This was superior to the unaltered CycleGAN's score of 0.74. Additionally, our loss function improved the Fréchet Inception distance for the reconstruction to 74.54 from 76.47. We, therefore, describe an advance in virtual restaining that can extend to other immunostains and tumour types and deliver reproducible, fast and readily accessible immunohistochemistry worldwide.
summary: Immunohistochemistry is a valuable diagnostic tool for cancer pathology. However, it requires specialist labs and equipment, is time-intensive, and is difficult to reproduce. Consequently, a long term aim is to provide a digital method of recreating physical immunohistochemical stains. Generative Adversarial Networks have become exceedingly advanced at mapping one image type to another and have shown promise at inferring immunostains from haematoxylin and eosin. However, they have a substantial weakness when used with pathology images as they can fabricate structures that are not present in the original data. CycleGANs can mitigate invented tissue structures in pathology image mapping but have a related disposition to generate areas of inaccurate staining. In this paper, we describe a modification to the loss function of a CycleGAN to improve its mapping ability for pathology images by enforcing realistic stain replication while retaining tissue structure. Our approach improves upon others by considering structure and staining during model training. We evaluated our network using the Fréchet Inception distance, coupled with a new technique that we propose to appraise the accuracy of virtual immunohistochemistry. This assesses the overlap between each stain component in the inferred and ground truth images through colour deconvolution, thresholding and the Sorensen-Dice coefficient. Our modified loss function resulted in a Dice coefficient for the virtual stain of 0.78 compared with the real AE1/AE3 slide. This was superior to the unaltered CycleGAN's score of 0.74. Additionally, our loss function improved the Fréchet Inception distance for the reconstruction to 74.54 from 76.47. We, therefore, describe an advance in virtual restaining that can extend to other immunostains and tumour types and deliver reproducible, fast and readily accessible immunohistochemistry worldwide.
abstract_zh: 免疫组织化学是癌症病理学的重要诊断工具。然而，它需要专业的实验室和设备，耗时且难以重现。因此，长期目标是提供一种重建物理免疫组织化学染色的数字方法。生成对抗网络在将一种图像类型映射到另一种图像类型方面已经变得非常先进，并且在从苏木精和伊红推断免疫染色方面显示出了前景。然而，当与病理图像一起使用时，它们有很大的弱点，因为它们可以制造原始数据中不存在的结构。 CycleGAN 可以减轻病理图像映射中发明的组织结构，但具有生成不准确染色区域的相关倾向。在本文中，我们描述了对 CycleGAN 损失函数的修改，通过在保留组织结构的同时强制执行真实的染色复制来提高其病理图像的映射能力。我们的方法通过在模型训练期间考虑结构和染色来改进其他方法。我们使用 Fréchet Inception 距离以及我们建议评估虚拟免疫组织化学准确性的新技术来评估我们的网络。它通过颜色反卷积、阈值处理和 Sorensen-Dice 系数来评估推断图像和地面真实图像中每个染色成分之间的重叠。与真实的 AE1/AE3 载玻片相比，我们修改后的损失函数导致虚拟染色的 Dice 系数为 0.78。这优于未改变的 CycleGAN 的 0.74 分。此外，我们的损失函数将重建的 Fréchet Inception 距离从 76.47 提高到 74.54。因此，我们描述了虚拟再染色的进展，它可以扩展到其他免疫染色和肿瘤类型，并在全世界范围内提供可重复、快速且易于访问的免疫组织化学。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的CycleGAN损失函数，以提高病理图像虚拟免疫组化染色的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有生成对抗网络在病理图像映射中易生成非真实结构或染色不准确区域，影响虚拟免疫组化的可靠性。
AI.method: 通过修改CycleGAN的损失函数，在保留组织结构的同时强化真实染色复现，结合Fréchet Inception距离与色度分解、阈值处理及Sorensen-Dice系数的新型评估方法。
AI.result: 改进后的模型在虚拟染色Dice系数达0.78（优于原CycleGAN的0.74），重建图像Fréchet Inception距离降至74.54（原为76.47）。
AI.conclusion: 该方法提升了虚拟染色准确性，可扩展至其他免疫染色及肿瘤类型，推动全球可及性与可重复性免疫组化技术发展。

search_text: Ensuring accurate stain reproduction in deep generative networks for virtual immunohistochemistry 确保虚拟免疫组织化学深层生成网络中准确的染色再现 Immunohistochemistry is a valuable diagnostic tool for cancer pathology. However, it requires specialist labs and equipment, is time-intensive, and is difficult to reproduce. Consequently, a long term aim is to provide a digital method of recreating physical immunohistochemical stains. Generative Adversarial Networks have become exceedingly advanced at mapping one image type to another and have shown promise at inferring immunostains from haematoxylin and eosin. However, they have a substantial weakness when used with pathology images as they can fabricate structures that are not present in the original data. CycleGANs can mitigate invented tissue structures in pathology image mapping but have a related disposition to generate areas of inaccurate staining. In this paper, we describe a modification to the loss function of a CycleGAN to improve its mapping ability for pathology images by enforcing realistic stain replication while retaining tissue structure. Our approach improves upon others by considering structure and staining during model training. We evaluated our network using the Fréchet Inception distance, coupled with a new technique that we propose to appraise the accuracy of virtual immunohistochemistry. This assesses the overlap between each stain component in the inferred and ground truth images through colour deconvolution, thresholding and the Sorensen-Dice coefficient. Our modified loss function resulted in a Dice coefficient for the virtual stain of 0.78 compared with the real AE1/AE3 slide. This was superior to the unaltered CycleGAN's score of 0.74. Additionally, our loss function improved the Fréchet Inception distance for the reconstruction to 74.54 from 76.47. We, therefore, describe an advance in virtual restaining that can extend to other immunostains and tumour types and deliver reproducible, fast and readily accessible immunohistochemistry worldwide. 免疫组织化学是癌症病理学的重要诊断工具。然而，它需要专业的实验室和设备，耗时且难以重现。因此，长期目标是提供一种重建物理免疫组织化学染色的数字方法。生成对抗网络在将一种图像类型映射到另一种图像类型方面已经变得非常先进，并且在从苏木精和伊红推断免疫染色方面显示出了前景。然而，当与病理图像一起使用时，它们有很大的弱点，因为它们可以制造原始数据中不存在的结构。 CycleGAN 可以减轻病理图像映射中发明的组织结构，但具有生成不准确染色区域的相关倾向。在本文中，我们描述了对 CycleGAN 损失函数的修改，通过在保留组织结构的同时强制执行真实的染色复制来提高其病理图像的映射能力。我们的方法通过在模型训练期间考虑结构和染色来改进其他方法。我们使用 Fréchet Inception 距离以及我们建议评估虚拟免疫组织化学准确性的新技术来评估我们的网络。它通过颜色反卷积、阈值处理和 Sorensen-Dice 系数来评估推断图像和地面真实图像中每个染色成分之间的重叠。与真实的 AE1/AE3 载玻片相比，我们修改后的损失函数导致虚拟染色的 Dice 系数为 0.78。这优于未改变的 CycleGAN 的 0.74 分。此外，我们的损失函数将重建的 Fréchet Inception 距离从 76.47 提高到 74.54。因此，我们描述了虚拟再染色的进展，它可以扩展到其他免疫染色和肿瘤类型，并在全世界范围内提供可重复、快速且易于访问的免疫组织化学。 本文提出一种改进的CycleGAN损失函数，以提高病理图像虚拟免疫组化染色的准确性。 Christopher D. Walsh,Joanne Edwards,Robert H. Insall eess.IV,cs.CV,q-bio.QM

authors_text: Jingrui Yu,Roman Seidel,Gangolf Hirtz
title: OmniPD: One-Step Person Detection in Top-View Omnidirectional Indoor Scenes
title_zh: OmniPD：俯视全向室内场景中的一步式人员检测
abstract: We propose a one-step person detector for topview omnidirectional indoor scenes based on convolutional neural networks (CNNs). While state of the art person detectors reach competitive results on perspective images, missing CNN architectures as well as training data that follows the distortion of omnidirectional images makes current approaches not applicable to our data. The method predicts bounding boxes of multiple persons directly in omnidirectional images without perspective transformation, which reduces overhead of pre- and post-processing and enables real-time performance. The basic idea is to utilize transfer learning to fine-tune CNNs trained on perspective images with data augmentation techniques for detection in omnidirectional images. We fine-tune two variants of Single Shot MultiBox detectors (SSDs). The first one uses Mobilenet v1 FPN as feature extractor (moSSD). The second one uses ResNet50 v1 FPN (resSSD). Both models are pre-trained on Microsoft Common Objects in Context (COCO) dataset. We fine-tune both models on PASCAL VOC07 and VOC12 datasets, specifically on class person. Random 90-degree rotation and random vertical flipping are used for data augmentation in addition to the methods proposed by original SSD. We reach an average precision (AP) of 67.3 % with moSSD and 74.9 % with resSSD onthe evaluation dataset. To enhance the fine-tuning process, we add a subset of HDA Person dataset and a subset of PIROPOdatabase and reduce the number of perspective images to PASCAL VOC07. The AP rises to 83.2 % for moSSD and 86.3 % for resSSD, respectively. The average inference speed is 28 ms per image for moSSD and 38 ms per image for resSSD using Nvidia Quadro P6000. Our method is applicable to other CNN-based object detectors and can potentially generalize for detecting other objects in omnidirectional images.

We fine-tune two variants of Single Shot MultiBox detectors (SSDs). The first one uses Mobilenet v1 FPN as feature extractor (moSSD). The second one uses ResNet50 v1 FPN (resSSD). Both models are pre-trained on Microsoft Common Objects in Context (COCO) dataset. We fine-tune both models on PASCAL VOC07 and VOC12 datasets, specifically on class person. Random 90-degree rotation and random vertical flipping are used for data augmentation in addition to the methods proposed by original SSD. We reach an average precision (AP) of 67.3 % with moSSD and 74.9 % with resSSD onthe evaluation dataset. To enhance the fine-tuning process, we add a subset of HDA Person dataset and a subset of PIROPOdatabase and reduce the number of perspective images to PASCAL VOC07. abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的俯视全向室内场景的一步人体检测器。虽然最先进的人体检测器在透视图像上达到了有竞争力的结果，但缺少 CNN 架构以及全向图像失真后的训练数据，使得当前的方法不适用于我们的数据。该方法直接在全向图像中预测多人的边界框，无需透视变换，从而减少了前后处理的开销并实现了实时性能。其基本思想是利用迁移学习来微调在透视图像上训练的 CNN，并使用数据增强技术来检测全向图像。我们对 Single Shot MultiBox 探测器 (SSD) 的两种变体进行了微调。第一个使用 Mobilenet v1 FPN 作为特征提取器 (moSSD)。第二个使用 ResNet50 v1 FPN (resSSD)。这两个模型都在 Microsoft Common Objects in Context (COCO) 数据集上进行了预训练。我们在 PASCAL VOC07 ​​和 VOC12 数据集上对两个模型进行微调，特别是在类 person 上。除了原始SSD提出的方法外，还使用随机90度旋转和随机垂直翻转来进行数据增强。在评估数据集上，moSSD 的平均精度 (AP) 为 67.3%，resSSD 的平均精度 (AP) 为 74.9%。为了增强微调过程，我们添加了 HDA Person 数据集的子集和 PIROPO 数据库的子集，并减少了 PASCAL VOC07 ​​的透视图像数量。 moSSD 的 AP 上升至 83.2%，resSSD 的 AP 上升至 86.3%。使用 Nvidia Quadro P6000，moSSD 的平均推理速度为每张图像 28 毫秒，resSSD 的平均推理速度为每张图像 38 毫秒。我们的方法适用于其他基于 CNN 的目标检测器，并且可以推广到检测全向图像中的其他目标。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于卷积神经网络的单步人体检测方法，用于顶部视角的全向室内场景。
AI.motivation: 现有检测方法难以处理全向图像的畸变，缺乏适配的网络架构和训练数据，需直接在全向图像中检测人体以减少预处理开销。
AI.method: 采用迁移学习微调SSD检测器（moSSD和resSSD），结合数据增强技术，并引入HDA Person和PIROPO数据集子集优化模型。
AI.result: 在评估数据集上，moSSD和resSSD的平均精度分别达到83.2%和86.3%，推理速度分别为28ms和38ms/图像。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可扩展至其他CNN目标检测器，并适用于全向图像中其他物体的检测。

authors_text: Yuanqing Zhang,Jiaming Sun,Xingyi He,Huan Fu,Rongfei Jia,Xiaowei Zhou
title: Modeling Indirect Illumination for Inverse Rendering
title_zh: 逆向渲染的间接照明建模
abstract: Recent advances in implicit neural representations and differentiable rendering make it possible to simultaneously recover the geometry and materials of an object from multi-view RGB images captured under unknown static illumination. Despite the promising results achieved, indirect illumination is rarely modeled in previous methods, as it requires expensive recursive path tracing which makes the inverse rendering computationally intractable. In this paper, we propose a novel approach to efficiently recovering spatially-varying indirect illumination. The key insight is that indirect illumination can be conveniently derived from the neural radiance field learned from input images instead of being estimated jointly with direct illumination and materials. By properly modeling the indirect illumination and visibility of direct illumination, interreflection- and shadow-free albedo can be recovered. The experiments on both synthetic and real data demonstrate the superior performance of our approach compared to previous work and its capability to synthesize realistic renderings under novel viewpoints and illumination. Our code and data are available at https://zju3dv.github.io/invrender/.
summary: Recent advances in implicit neural representations and differentiable rendering make it possible to simultaneously recover the geometry and materials of an object from multi-view RGB images captured under unknown static illumination. Despite the promising results achieved, indirect illumination is rarely modeled in previous methods, as it requires expensive recursive path tracing which makes the inverse rendering computationally intractable. In this paper, we propose a novel approach to efficiently recovering spatially-varying indirect illumination. The key insight is that indirect illumination can be conveniently derived from the neural radiance field learned from input images instead of being estimated jointly with direct illumination and materials. By properly modeling the indirect illumination and visibility of direct illumination, interreflection- and shadow-free albedo can be recovered. The experiments on both synthetic and real data demonstrate the superior performance of our approach compared to previous work and its capability to synthesize realistic renderings under novel viewpoints and illumination. Our code and data are available at https://zju3dv.github.io/invrender/.
abstract_zh: 隐式神经表示和可微渲染的最新进展使得从未知静态照明下捕获的多视图 RGB 图像中同时恢复对象的几何形状和材质成为可能。尽管取得了有希望的结果，但在以前的方法中很少对间接照明进行建模，因为它需要昂贵的递归路径跟踪，这使得逆渲染在计算上变得困难。在本文中，我们提出了一种有效恢复空间变化的间接照明的新方法。关键的见解是，间接照明可以方便地从输入图像学习的神经辐射场中导出，而不是与直接照明和材质联合估计。通过正确建模间接照明和直接照明的可见度，可以恢复无互反射和无阴影的反照率。对合成数据和真实数据的实验表明，与之前的工作相比，我们的方法具有卓越的性能，并且能够在新颖的视点和照明下合成逼真的渲染。我们的代码和数据可在 https://zju3dv.github.io/invrender/ 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效恢复空间变化间接光照的方法，以改进逆向渲染中几何和材质的重建。
AI.motivation: 现有逆向渲染方法因递归路径追踪计算量大，难以有效建模间接光照，导致重建效果受限。
AI.method: 通过神经辐射场推导间接光照而非联合估计，结合直接光照可见性建模，实现无镜面反射和阴影的反照率恢复。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上优于现有方法，可生成新视角和光照条件下的真实感渲染结果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了间接光照建模的计算瓶颈，为逆向渲染提供了更高效且精确的解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出一种高效恢复空间变化间接光照的方法，以改进逆向渲染中几何和材质的重建。
motivation: 现有逆向渲染方法因递归路径追踪计算量大，难以有效建模间接光照，导致重建效果受限。
method: 通过神经辐射场推导间接光照而非联合估计，结合直接光照可见性建模，实现无镜面反射和阴影的反照率恢复。
result: 在合成与真实数据集上优于现有方法，可生成新视角和光照条件下的真实感渲染结果。
conclusion: 该方法有效解决了间接光照建模的计算瓶颈，为逆向渲染提供了更高效且精确的解决方案。
search_text: Modeling Indirect Illumination for Inverse Rendering 逆向渲染的间接照明建模 Recent advances in implicit neural representations and differentiable rendering make it possible to simultaneously recover the geometry and materials of an object from multi-view RGB images captured under unknown static illumination. Despite the promising results achieved, indirect illumination is rarely modeled in previous methods, as it requires expensive recursive path tracing which makes the inverse rendering computationally intractable. In this paper, we propose a novel approach to efficiently recovering spatially-varying indirect illumination. The key insight is that indirect illumination can be conveniently derived from the neural radiance field learned from input images instead of being estimated jointly with direct illumination and materials. By properly modeling the indirect illumination and visibility of direct illumination, interreflection- and shadow-free albedo can be recovered. The experiments on both synthetic and real data demonstrate the superior performance of our approach compared to previous work and its capability to synthesize realistic renderings under novel viewpoints and illumination. Our code and data are available at https://zju3dv.github.io/invrender/. 隐式神经表示和可微渲染的最新进展使得从未知静态照明下捕获的多视图 RGB 图像中同时恢复对象的几何形状和材质成为可能。尽管取得了有希望的结果，但在以前的方法中很少对间接照明进行建模，因为它需要昂贵的递归路径跟踪，这使得逆渲染在计算上变得困难。在本文中，我们提出了一种有效恢复空间变化的间接照明的新方法。关键的见解是，间接照明可以方便地从输入图像学习的神经辐射场中导出，而不是与直接照明和材质联合估计。通过正确建模间接照明和直接照明的可见度，可以恢复无互反射和无阴影的反照率。对合成数据和真实数据的实验表明，与之前的工作相比，我们的方法具有卓越的性能，并且能够在新颖的视点和照明下合成逼真的渲染。我们的代码和数据可在 https://zju3dv.github.io/invrender/ 获取。 本文提出一种高效恢复空间变化间接光照的方法，以改进逆向渲染中几何和材质的重建。 Yuanqing Zhang,Jiaming Sun,Xingyi He,Huan Fu,Rongfei Jia,Xiaowei Zhou cs.CV

authors_text: Anil Kurkcu,Cihan Acar,Domenico Campolo,Keng Peng Tee
title: GloCAL: Glocalized Curriculum-Aided Learning of Multiple Tasks with Application to Robotic Grasping
title_zh: GloCAL：全球本地化课程辅助的多任务学习及其在机器人抓取中的应用
abstract: The domain of robotics is challenging to apply deep reinforcement learning due to the need for large amounts of data and for ensuring safety during learning. Curriculum learning has shown good performance in terms of sample- efficient deep learning. In this paper, we propose an algorithm (named GloCAL) that creates a curriculum for an agent to learn multiple discrete tasks, based on clustering tasks according to their evaluation scores. From the highest-performing cluster, a global task representative of the cluster is identified for learning a global policy that transfers to subsequently formed new clusters, while the remaining tasks in the cluster are learned as local policies. The efficacy and efficiency of our GloCAL algorithm are compared with other approaches in the domain of grasp learning for 49 objects with varied object complexity and grasp difficulty from the EGAD! dataset. The results show that GloCAL is able to learn to grasp 100% of the objects, whereas other approaches achieve at most 86% despite being given 1.5 times longer training time.
summary: The domain of robotics is challenging to apply deep reinforcement learning due to the need for large amounts of data and for ensuring safety during learning. Curriculum learning has shown good performance in terms of sample- efficient deep learning. In this paper, we propose an algorithm (named GloCAL) that creates a curriculum for an agent to learn multiple discrete tasks, based on clustering tasks according to their evaluation scores. From the highest-performing cluster, a global task representative of the cluster is identified for learning a global policy that transfers to subsequently formed new clusters, while the remaining tasks in the cluster are learned as local policies. The efficacy and efficiency of our GloCAL algorithm are compared with other approaches in the domain of grasp learning for 49 objects with varied object complexity and grasp difficulty from the EGAD! dataset. The results show that GloCAL is able to learn to grasp 100% of the objects, whereas other approaches achieve at most 86% despite being given 1.5 times longer training time.
abstract_zh: 由于需要大量数据并确保学习过程中的安全性，机器人领域应用深度强化学习具有挑战性。课程学习在样本效率深度学习方面表现出了良好的表现。在本文中，我们提出了一种算法（名为 GloCAL），该算法根据评估分数对任务进行聚类，为代理创建学习多个离散任务的课程。从性能最高的集群中，识别出集群的全局任务代表，用于学习转移到随后形成的新集群的全局策略，而集群中的其余任务则被学习为本地策略。我们的 GloCAL 算法的功效和效率与抓取学习领域的其他方法进行了比较，针对 EGAD 中具有不同对象复杂性和抓取难度的 49 个对象！数据集。结果表明，GloCAL 能够学习抓取 100% 的物体，而其他方法尽管训练时间延长 1.5 倍，但最多只能达到 86%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为GloCAL的算法，通过课程学习方法解决机器人抓取任务中的多任务学习问题，提升样本效率和安全性。
AI.motivation: 深度强化学习在机器人领域面临数据需求大和学习过程不安全的挑战，而课程学习能提高样本效率，因此需开发一种适用于多任务的课程学习方法。
AI.method: 基于任务评估分数聚类，从最高性能聚类中提取全局任务代表学习全局策略，并对剩余任务学习局部策略，实现多任务的协同学习。
AI.result: 在EGAD!数据集的49个物体抓取任务中，GloCAL实现100%成功率，而其他方法在1.5倍训练时间下最多仅达86%。
AI.conclusion: GloCAL通过全局与局部策略结合，有效提升了多任务机器人抓取的样本效率和成功率，优于现有方法。

authors_text: Tianxi Wang,Feng Xue,Yu Zhou,Anlong Ming
title: MARF: Multiscale Adaptive-switch Random Forest for Leg Detection with 2D Laser Scanners
title_zh: MARF：使用 2D 激光扫描仪进行腿部检测的多尺度自适应开关随机森林
abstract: For the 2D laser-based tasks, e.g., people detection and people tracking, leg detection is usually the first step. Thus, it carries great weight in determining the performance of people detection and people tracking. However, many leg detectors ignore the inevitable noise and the multiscale characteristics of the laser scan, which makes them sensitive to the unreliable features of point cloud and further degrades the performance of the leg detector. In this paper, we propose a multiscale adaptive-switch Random Forest (MARF) to overcome these two challenges. Firstly, the adaptive-switch decision tree is designed to use noisesensitive features to conduct weighted classification and noiseinvariant features to conduct binary classification, which makes our detector perform more robust to noise. Secondly, considering the multiscale property that the sparsity of the 2D point cloud is proportional to the length of laser beams, we design a multiscale random forest structure to detect legs at different distances. Moreover, the proposed approach allows us to discover a sparser human leg from point clouds than others. Consequently, our method shows an improved performance compared to other state-of-the-art leg detectors on the challenging Moving Legs dataset and retains the whole pipeline at a speed of 60+ FPS on lowcomputational laptops. Moreover, we further apply the proposed MARF to the people detection and tracking system, achieving a considerable gain in all metrics.
summary: For the 2D laser-based tasks, e.g., people detection and people tracking, leg detection is usually the first step. Thus, it carries great weight in determining the performance of people detection and people tracking. However, many leg detectors ignore the inevitable noise and the multiscale characteristics of the laser scan, which makes them sensitive to the unreliable features of point cloud and further degrades the performance of the leg detector. In this paper, we propose a multiscale adaptive-switch Random Forest (MARF) to overcome these two challenges. Firstly, the adaptive-switch decision tree is designed to use noisesensitive features to conduct weighted classification and noiseinvariant features to conduct binary classification, which makes our detector perform more robust to noise. Secondly, considering the multiscale property that the sparsity of the 2D point cloud is proportional to the length of laser beams, we design a multiscale random forest structure to detect legs at different distances. Moreover, the proposed approach allows us to discover a sparser human leg from point clouds than others. Consequently, our method shows an improved performance compared to other state-of-the-art leg detectors on the challenging Moving Legs dataset and retains the whole pipeline at a speed of 60+ FPS on lowcomputational laptops. Moreover, we further apply the proposed MARF to the people detection and tracking system, achieving a considerable gain in all metrics.
abstract_zh: 对于基于 2D 激光的任务，例如人员检测和人员跟踪，腿部检测通常是第一步。因此，它在确定人员检测和人员跟踪的性能方面具有重要意义。然而，许多腿部探测器忽略了不可避免的噪声和激光扫描的多尺度特性，这使得它们对点云的不可靠特征敏感，并进一步降低了腿部探测器的性能。在本文中，我们提出了一种多尺度自适应切换随机森林（MARF）来克服这两个挑战。首先，自适应切换决策树被设计为使用噪声敏感特征进行加权分类，使用噪声不变特征进行二元分类，这使得我们的检测器对噪声具有更强的鲁棒性。其次，考虑到二维点云的稀疏性与激光束的长度成正比的多尺度特性，我们设计了多尺度随机森林结构来检测不同距离的腿部。此外，所提出的方法使我们能够从点云中发现比其他方法更稀疏的人体腿。因此，与其他最先进的腿部检测器相比，我们的方法在具有挑战性的 Moving Legs 数据集上显示出改进的性能，并且在低计算量笔记本电脑上以 60+ FPS 的速度保留整个管道。此外，我们进一步将所提出的 MARF 应用到人员检测和跟踪系统中，在所有指标上都取得了可观的收益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多尺度自适应切换随机森林（MARF）方法，用于改进基于2D激光扫描仪的人腿检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有腿检测器忽视激光点云的噪声和多尺度特性，导致检测鲁棒性不足，需设计更适应实际场景的检测方法。
AI.method: 设计自适应切换决策树区分噪声敏感特征与噪声不变特征，并构建多尺度随机森林结构以应对不同距离的点云稀疏性问题。
AI.result: 在Moving Legs数据集上优于现有方法，且在低算力设备上实现60+ FPS实时检测，应用于人体检测追踪系统后各项指标显著提升。
AI.conclusion: MARF通过噪声鲁棒性增强和多尺度结构设计，有效解决了2D激光腿检测中的关键挑战，为实际应用提供了高效解决方案。

Moreover, the proposed approach allows us to discover a sparser human leg from point clouds than others. Consequently, our method shows an improved performance compared to other state-of-the-art leg detectors on the challenging Moving Legs dataset and retains the whole pipeline at a speed of 60+ FPS on lowcomputational laptops. Moreover, we further apply the proposed MARF to the people detection and tracking system, achieving a considerable gain in all metrics. 对于基于 2D 激光的任务，例如人员检测和人员跟踪，腿部检测通常是第一步。因此，它在确定人员检测和人员跟踪的性能方面具有重要意义。然而，许多腿部探测器忽略了不可避免的噪声和激光扫描的多尺度特性，这使得它们对点云的不可靠特征敏感，并进一步降低了腿部探测器的性能。在本文中，我们提出了一种多尺度自适应切换随机森林（MARF）来克服这两个挑战。首先，自适应切换决策树被设计为使用噪声敏感特征进行加权分类，使用噪声不变特征进行二元分类，这使得我们的检测器对噪声具有更强的鲁棒性。其次，考虑到二维点云的稀疏性与激光束的长度成正比的多尺度特性，我们设计了多尺度随机森林结构来检测不同距离的腿部。此外，所提出的方法使我们能够从点云中发现比其他方法更稀疏的人体腿。因此，与其他最先进的腿部检测器相比，我们的方法在具有挑战性的 Moving Legs 数据集上显示出改进的性能，并且在低计算量笔记本电脑上以 60+ FPS 的速度保留整个管道。此外，我们进一步将所提出的 MARF 应用到人员检测和跟踪系统中，在所有指标上都取得了可观的收益。 本文提出一种多尺度自适应切换随机森林（MARF）方法，用于改进基于2D激光扫描仪的人腿检测性能。 Tianxi Wang,Feng Xue,Yu Zhou,Anlong Ming cs.RO,cs.LG

authors_text: Roman Pflugfelder,Axel Weissenfeld,Julian Wagner
title: Deep Vehicle Detection in Satellite Video
title_zh: 卫星视频中的深度车辆检测
abstract: This work presents a deep learning approach for vehicle detection in satellite video. Vehicle detection is perhaps impossible in single EO satellite images due to the tininess of vehicles (4-10 pixel) and their similarity to the background. Instead, we consider satellite video which overcomes the lack of spatial information by temporal consistency of vehicle movement. A new spatiotemporal model of a compact $3 \times 3$ convolutional, neural network is proposed which neglects pooling layers and uses leaky ReLUs. Then we use a reformulation of the output heatmap including Non-Maximum-Suppression (NMS) for the final segmentation. Empirical results on two new annotated satellite videos reconfirm the applicability of this approach for vehicle detection. They more importantly indicate that pre-training on WAMI data and then fine-tuning on few annotated video frames for a new video is sufficient. In our experiment only five annotated images yield a $F_1$ score of 0.81 on a new video showing more complex traffic patterns than the Las Vegas video. Our best result on Las Vegas is a $F_1$ score of 0.87 which makes the proposed approach a leading method for this benchmark.
summary: This work presents a deep learning approach for vehicle detection in satellite video. Vehicle detection is perhaps impossible in single EO satellite images due to the tininess of vehicles (4-10 pixel) and their similarity to the background. Instead, we consider satellite video which overcomes the lack of spatial information by temporal consistency of vehicle movement. A new spatiotemporal model of a compact $3 \times 3$ convolutional, neural network is proposed which neglects pooling layers and uses leaky ReLUs. Then we use a reformulation of the output heatmap including Non-Maximum-Suppression (NMS) for the final segmentation. Empirical results on two new annotated satellite videos reconfirm the applicability of this approach for vehicle detection. They more importantly indicate that pre-training on WAMI data and then fine-tuning on few annotated video frames for a new video is sufficient. In our experiment only five annotated images yield a $F_1$ score of 0.81 on a new video showing more complex traffic patterns than the Las Vegas video. Our best result on Las Vegas is a $F_1$ score of 0.87 which makes the proposed approach a leading method for this benchmark.
abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了一种用于卫星视频中车辆检测的深度学习方法。由于车辆很小（4-10 像素）且与背景相似，因此在单个 EO 卫星图像中检测车辆可能是不可能的。相反，我们考虑卫星视频，它通过车辆运动的时间一致性来克服空间信息的缺乏。提出了一种新的紧凑 $3 \times 3$ 卷积神经网络的时空模型，该模型忽略池化层并使用leaky ReLU。然后，我们使用输出热图的重新表述，包括非极大值抑制（NMS）进行最终分割。两个新的带注释的卫星视频的实证结果再次证实了这种方法对于车辆检测的适用性。更重要的是，他们表明对 WAMI 数据进行预训练，然后对新视频的几个带注释的视频帧进行微调就足够了。在我们的实验中，只有 5 张带注释的图像在显示比拉斯维加斯视频更复杂的流量模式的新视频上获得 0.81 的 $F_1$ 分数。我们在拉斯维加斯的最佳结果是 $F_1$ 得分为 0.87，这使得所提出的方法成为该基准测试的领先方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的卫星视频车辆检测方法，利用时空信息克服单张卫星图像中车辆检测的困难。
AI.motivation: 单张EO卫星图像中车辆尺寸过小（4-10像素）且与背景相似，导致检测困难，而卫星视频可通过时间一致性补充空间信息。
AI.method: 设计紧凑的3×3卷积神经网络模型（无池化层、使用leaky ReLU），结合改进的热图输出与非极大值抑制（NMS）进行分割。
AI.result: 在两个新标注卫星视频数据集上，预训练WAMI数据后仅用5张标注图像即可达到F1=0.81；Las Vegas数据集上F1达0.87，为当前最优方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过时空建模和预训练微调策略，在卫星视频车辆检测任务中取得领先性能，尤其适用于标注数据有限的场景。

authors_text: Andrea Castellani,Sebastian Schmitt,Barbara Hammer
title: Stream-based Active Learning with Verification Latency in Non-stationary Environments
title_zh: 非平稳环境中具有验证延迟的基于流的主动学习
comment: ENNS Best Paper Award at ICANN 2022
comments: ENNS Best Paper Award at ICANN 2022
abstract: Data stream classification is an important problem in the field of machine learning. Due to the non-stationary nature of the data where the underlying distribution changes over time (concept drift), the model needs to continuously adapt to new data statistics. Stream-based Active Learning (AL) approaches address this problem by interactively querying a human expert to provide new data labels for the most recent samples, within a limited budget. Existing AL strategies assume that labels are immediately available, while in a real-world scenario the expert requires time to provide a queried label (verification latency), and by the time the requested labels arrive they may not be relevant anymore. In this article, we investigate the influence of finite, time-variable, and unknown verification delay, in the presence of concept drift on AL approaches. We propose PRopagate (PR), a latency independent utility estimator which also predicts the requested, but not yet known, labels. Furthermore, we propose a drift-dependent dynamic budget strategy, which uses a variable distribution of the labelling budget over time, after a detected drift. Thorough experimental evaluation, with both synthetic and real-world non-stationary datasets, and different settings of verification latency and budget are conducted and analyzed. We empirically show that the proposed method consistently outperforms the state-of-the-art. Additionally, we demonstrate that with variable budget allocation in time, it is possible to boost the performance of AL strategies, without increasing the overall labeling budget.
summary: Data stream classification is an important problem in the field of machine learning. Due to the non-stationary nature of the data where the underlying distribution changes over time (concept drift), the model needs to continuously adapt to new data statistics. Stream-based Active Learning (AL) approaches address this problem by interactively querying a human expert to provide new data labels for the most recent samples, within a limited budget. Existing AL strategies assume that labels are immediately available, while in a real-world scenario the expert requires time to provide a queried label (verification latency), and by the time the requested labels arrive they may not be relevant anymore. In this article, we investigate the influence of finite, time-variable, and unknown verification delay, in the presence of concept drift on AL approaches. We propose PRopagate (PR), a latency independent utility estimator which also predicts the requested, but not yet known, labels. Furthermore, we propose a drift-dependent dynamic budget strategy, which uses a variable distribution of the labelling budget over time, after a detected drift. Thorough experimental evaluation, with both synthetic and real-world non-stationary datasets, and different settings of verification latency and budget are conducted and analyzed. We empirically show that the proposed method consistently outperforms the state-of-the-art. Additionally, we demonstrate that with variable budget allocation in time, it is possible to boost the performance of AL strategies, without increasing the overall labeling budget.
abstract_zh: 数据流分类是机器学习领域的一个重要问题。由于数据的非平稳性质，其中基础分布随时间变化（概念漂移），因此模型需要不断适应新的数据统计数据。基于流的主动学习 (AL) 方法通过交互式查询人类专家来解决这个问题，以便在有限的预算内为最新样本提供新的数据标签。现有的 AL 策略假设标签立即可用，而在现实场景中，专家需要时间来提供查询的标签（验证延迟），并且当请求的标签到达时，它们可能不再相关。在本文中，我们研究了在存在概念漂移的情况下，有限的、时变的和未知的验证延迟对 AL 方法的影响。我们提出了 PROpagate (PR)，一种与延迟无关的效用估计器，它还可以预测所请求的但尚不知道的标签。此外，我们提出了一种依赖于漂移的动态预算策略，该策略在检测到漂移后使用标签预算随时间的变化分布。使用合成和现实世界的非平稳数据集以及验证延迟和预算的不同设置进行了彻底的实验评估。我们的经验表明，所提出的方法始终优于最先进的方法。此外，我们还证明，通过及时分配可变预算，可以在不增加总体标签预算的情况下提高 AL 策略的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在非平稳环境中考虑验证延迟的流式主动学习方法，提出了一种延迟无关的效用估计器和动态预算策略。
AI.motivation: 现有主动学习方法假设标签立即可用，但实际场景中专家反馈存在延迟，导致标签过时，影响模型适应概念漂移的能力。
AI.method: 提出PRopagate（PR）方法，通过预测未标注标签的效用并独立于延迟进行估计，结合漂移检测的动态预算分配策略。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在合成和真实非平稳数据集上均优于现有方法，且动态预算分配能提升性能而无需增加总标注预算。
AI.conclusion: 考虑验证延迟和动态预算分配的主动学习方法能有效应对非平稳环境下的概念漂移问题。

authors_text: Lorena Sanchez Chamorro,Kerstin Bongard-Blanchy,Vincent Koenig
title: Justice in interaction design: preventing manipulation in interfaces
title_zh: 交互设计中的正义：防止界面中的操纵
abstract: Designers incorporate values in the design process that raise risks for vulnerable groups. Persuasion in user interfaces can quickly turn into manipulation and become potentially harmful for those groups in the realm of intellectual disabilities, class, or health, requiring proactive responsibility approaches in design. Here we introduce the Capability Sensitive Design Approach and explain how it can be used proactively to inform designers' decisions when it comes to evaluating justice in their designs preventing the risk of manipulation.
summary: Designers incorporate values in the design process that raise risks for vulnerable groups. Persuasion in user interfaces can quickly turn into manipulation and become potentially harmful for those groups in the realm of intellectual disabilities, class, or health, requiring proactive responsibility approaches in design. Here we introduce the Capability Sensitive Design Approach and explain how it can be used proactively to inform designers' decisions when it comes to evaluating justice in their designs preventing the risk of manipulation.
abstract_zh: 设计师在设计过程中融入了增加弱势群体风险的价值观。用户界面中的说服可能很快就会变成操纵，并对智力障碍、阶级或健康领域的群体产生潜在危害，需要在设计中采取积极主动的责任方法。在这里，我们介绍了能力敏感设计方法，并解释了在评估设计的公正性以防止操纵风险时，如何主动使用它来为设计人员的决策提供信息。

AI.tldr: 提出能力敏感设计方法，预防界面操纵，保障弱势群体权益
AI.motivation: 现有设计可能无意中操纵弱势群体，需主动设计责任方法
AI.method: 引入能力敏感设计方法，评估设计中的正义性，预防操纵风险
AI.result: 帮助设计师识别并减少设计中的操纵风险，促进公平性
AI.conclusion: 能力敏感设计方法可有效提升交互设计的正义性，减少对弱势群体的潜在危害

authors_text: Alexey Zakharov,Maxim Pisov,Alim Bukharaev,Alexey Petraikin,Sergey Morozov,Victor Gombolevskiy,Mikhail Belyaev
title: Interpretable Vertebral Fracture Quantification via Anchor-Free Landmarks Localization
title_zh: 通过无锚地标定位进行可解释的椎骨骨折量化
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2005.11960
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2005.11960
abstract: Vertebral body compression fractures are early signs of osteoporosis. Though these fractures are visible on Computed Tomography (CT) images, they are frequently missed by radiologists in clinical settings. Prior research on automatic methods of vertebral fracture classification proves its reliable quality; however, existing methods provide hard-to-interpret outputs and sometimes fail to process cases with severe abnormalities such as highly pathological vertebrae or scoliosis. We propose a new two-step algorithm to localize the vertebral column in 3D CT images and then detect individual vertebrae and quantify fractures in 2D simultaneously. We train neural networks for both steps using a simple 6-keypoints based annotation scheme, which corresponds precisely to the current clinical recommendation. Our algorithm has no exclusion criteria, processes 3D CT in 2 seconds on a single GPU, and provides an interpretable and verifiable output. The method approaches expert-level performance and demonstrates state-of-the-art results in vertebrae 3D localization (the average error is 1 mm), vertebrae 2D detection (precision and recall are 0.99), and fracture identification (ROC AUC at the patient level is up to 0.96). Our anchor-free vertebra detection network shows excellent generalizability on a new domain by achieving ROC AUC 0.95, sensitivity 0.85, specificity 0.9 on a challenging VerSe dataset with many unseen vertebra types.
summary: Vertebral body compression fractures are early signs of osteoporosis. Though these fractures are visible on Computed Tomography (CT) images, they are frequently missed by radiologists in clinical settings. Prior research on automatic methods of vertebral fracture classification proves its reliable quality; however, existing methods provide hard-to-interpret outputs and sometimes fail to process cases with severe abnormalities such as highly pathological vertebrae or scoliosis. We propose a new two-step algorithm to localize the vertebral column in 3D CT images and then detect individual vertebrae and quantify fractures in 2D simultaneously. We train neural networks for both steps using a simple 6-keypoints based annotation scheme, which corresponds precisely to the current clinical recommendation. Our algorithm has no exclusion criteria, processes 3D CT in 2 seconds on a single GPU, and provides an interpretable and verifiable output. The method approaches expert-level performance and demonstrates state-of-the-art results in vertebrae 3D localization (the average error is 1 mm), vertebrae 2D detection (precision and recall are 0.99), and fracture identification (ROC AUC at the patient level is up to 0.96). Our anchor-free vertebra detection network shows excellent generalizability on a new domain by achieving ROC AUC 0.95, sensitivity 0.85, specificity 0.9 on a challenging VerSe dataset with many unseen vertebra types.
abstract_zh: 椎体压缩性骨折是骨质疏松症的早期症状。尽管这些骨折在计算机断层扫描 (CT) 图像上可见，但在临床环境中放射科医生经常会错过它们。椎体骨折自动分类方法的前期研究证明其质量可靠；然而，现有方法提供难以解释的输出，有时无法处理严重异常的病例，例如高度病理性椎骨或脊柱侧凸。我们提出了一种新的两步算法，在 3D CT 图像中定位脊柱，然后同时检测单个椎骨并量化 2D 骨折。我们使用简单的基于 6 个关键点的注释方案来训练这两个步骤的神经网络，该方案与当前的临床建议完全一致。我们的算法没有排除标准，在单个 GPU 上 2 秒内处理 3D CT，并提供可解释和可验证的输出。该方法接近专家级性能，并在椎骨 3D 定位（平均误差为 1 mm）、椎骨 2D 检测（精确度和召回率为 0.99）和骨折识别（患者层面的 ROC AUC 高达 0.96）方面展示了最先进的结果。我们的无锚椎骨检测网络在具有许多未见过的椎骨类型的具有挑战性的 VerSe 数据集上实现 ROC AUC 0.95、灵敏度 0.85、特异性 0.9，在新领域表现出出色的通用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于无锚点标志点定位的可解释性椎体骨折量化方法，用于在CT图像中定位脊柱并检测单个椎体以量化骨折。
AI.motivation: 现有自动椎体骨折分类方法在处理严重异常病例（如高度病理性椎体或脊柱侧弯）时存在可解释性差和处理能力不足的问题，需开发更可靠且符合临床标注标准的算法。
AI.method: 设计两步算法：首先在3D CT图像中定位脊柱，然后在2D平面同时检测单个椎体并量化骨折。采用基于6个关键点的简单标注方案训练神经网络，无需排除病例，支持快速处理。
AI.result: 算法在3D脊柱定位（平均误差1mm）、2D椎体检测（精度和召回率0.99）及骨折识别（患者级ROC AUC达0.96）上表现优异，并在VerSe数据集上实现0.95的ROC AUC、0.85灵敏度和0.9特异性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法达到专家水平，具有可解释性与临床适用性，且在新领域数据集上展现良好泛化能力，可有效辅助椎体骨折筛查与骨质疏松早期诊断。
